Name: NABA Nuova Accademia di Belle Arti
Description:
Founded in 1980, NABA, Nuova Accademia di Belle Arti, with campus in Milan and in Rome, is the largest art academy in Italy. Since 1981 NABA is legally recognised by the Higher Education in Art and Music system (AFAM, Alta Formazione Artistica e Musicale), regulated by the Ministry of University and Research (MUR). As a recognised Academy, NABA offers in its two campus in Milan and Rome academic diplomas equivalent to first and second level university degrees in the fields of design, fashion design, graphics and communication, multimedia arts, new technologies, set design, visual arts. The Academy was founded by Ausonio Zappa in Milan in 1980 with the involvement of Guido Ballo and Tito Varisco during a first phase, later attracting to its faculty artists such as Gianni Colombo and many others, the idea being to abandon rigorous academic traditions and instead introduce new visions and languages based on contemporary artistic and professional practice. For the 2023 edition and for the third year in a row, QS World University Rankings by Subject named NABA as the first and only Italian Academy of Fine Arts among the 100 best universities in the Art & Design field. This achievement confirms the excellence of the Academy's distinctive didactic methodology, revolving around a strong vocation for research and for the constant relationship with the artistic and professional context.
Currently the courses are attended by more than 5,000 students from all over Italy and from over 80 international countries in Milan and Rome Capus. The continued success of NABA is based on the multidisciplinary approach of all its programs and relies upon a well-balanced combination of theory taught by distinguished professionals and practical work with leading companies and studios.

Name: Art Marketing Academy
Description: The Art School

Name: Villa Arson
Description:
La Villa Arson est établissement d'enseignement supérieur artistique du ministère de la Culture et composante à personnalité morale de l'Université Côte d'Azur. Unique en son genre, elle réunit dans un même site une école d’art, un centre d’art, une résidence d’artistes et une bibliothèque spécialisée.
Implantée sur la colline Saint-Barthélémy, la Villa Arson occupe un vaste domaine de plus de deux hectares qui offre un splendide panorama sur la ville de Nice et la Baie des Anges. Labyrinthe de béton, de pierres et de plantes entremêlées, où s’imbriquent harmonieusement autour de l’ancienne demeure de la famille Arson, rues intérieures avec patios, amphithéâtres en plein air, terrasses et jardins suspendus.
Conçu dans les années 1960 par l’architecte Michel Marot, cet ensemble architectural singulier, érigé au milieu d’un jardin méditerranéen, est à découvrir par la promenade.
Architecture non dominante et sans façade, elle se déploie sur 17000 m2 en épousant la topographie de la colline.
Des œuvres d’artistes contemporains dialoguant avec l’architecture et les jardins ponctuent la visite.

Name: School of Calligraphy & Ornamentation
Description: The School of Calligraphy and Ornamentation is a new specialised art school in Fujairah, UAE under the patronage of His Highness Sheikh Mohammed Bin Hamad Alsharqi.

Name: Academy of Arts, Architecture and Design in Prague
Description:
Vysoká škola uměleckoprůmyslová v Praze byla založena v roce 1885. Po celou dobu své existence se řadí mezi nejkvalitnější vzdělávací instituce. Důkazem je množství úspěšných absolventů, kteří patří mezi respektované odborníky s prestiží přesahující hranice České republiky. Škola je rozdělena na šest kateder – architektury, designu, volného umění, užitého umění, grafiky a teorie a dějin umění.
Jednotlivé katedry se dále člení na ateliéry dle své odborné specializace, vedené respektovaným osobnostmi.

Name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Roma
Description:
The Accademia (Academy) originates from the "Accademia di San Luca", born at the end of the sixteenth century and became the papal seat for artistic studies. At that time it was a prestigious meeting place for artists and at the same time an educational model to be imitated for similar developing institutions.
With the Unity of Italy and with Rome as the capital, there was a need to initiate a reform of art education that would respond to the needs of the young Italian state. A slow process followed which gave birth to didactic typologies oriented towards cultural research and professionalism linked to industrial and artisanal development.

The Academy first took the name of "Regia Accademia di Belle Arti denominata di San Luca" (Royal Academy of Fine Arts of San Luca), then "Istituto di Belle Arti" (Institute of Fine Arts) and finally defined itself according to the current version "Accademia di Belle Arti di Roma" (Academy of Fine Arts of Rome).
The historic complex that houses its premises in Via di Ripetta, traditionally called "The horseshoe", was built in the 1840s as a residential building and was adapted to the headquarters of the Academy with the addition of rooms designed specifically for the "Scuola Libera del Nudo" (Free School of Nude).

Name: REA Academy
Description:
RomEur Academy è un Accademia di alta formazione professionale nelle arti visive.

Romeur Academy forma futuri professionisti delle arti visive accompagnandoli in un percorso ottimizzato all'inserimento nel mondo del lavoro, con diplomi di II livello europeo e stage presso aziende alla fine dell' anno accademico

Name: ANdÉA Association nationale des écoles supérieures d'art
Description:
Créée en 1995, l’ANdÉA fédère les écoles supérieures d'art et design sous tutelle du ministère de la Culture. Ces établissements d’enseignement supérieur et de recherche délivrant des diplômes nationaux de niveau Bac +3, Bac +5 et Bac +8, des 3es cycles et post-masters professionnels, sont représentés au sein de l’ANdÉA par plus de 200 membres issus de toutes les catégories d’acteurs : enseignant·e·s, étudiant·e·s, directeurs·ices, administrateurs·ices, chef·fe·s de services. 
Mettant en réseau des écoles territoriales et nationales de toutes envergures et de tous les territoires, l’ANdÉA est une plate-forme de réflexion, une instance de proposition et une force d’affirmation de la spécificité de l’enseignement supérieur artistique par la création. Elle défend un modèle de formation et de recherche singulier qui se caractérise par le primat de la référence au champ artistique contemporain, aux figures de l’artiste et de l’auteur et par une pédagogie fondée sur l’expérimentation, le jugement critique et le projet personnel de l’étudiant·e.

Name: Miami Arts Charter School
Description: We strive to be the school where students dare to dream. We promise to make sure no doors for students are ever closed. We value the privilege of our role in shaping the future leaders of tomorrow. Together, we will create an inspiring environment that sparks curiosity in all students while developing intellectually and creatively. Free thought will always be protected so that students may pursue their purpose in the world. We will ensure that students always have a path to success in all that they do because they deserve a life full of choice. Since learning is for life and life is about learning, our wish is for our name always to be synonymous with excellence.

Name: Ministry of Art
Description:
Ministry of Art is an online platform where professional artists teach live, one-on-one art sessions to children aged 4 to 18.

We create meaningful work opportunities for artists, offering steady income and flexible hours without pulling them away from their creative paths. Our sessions follow a structured curriculum, but every teacher brings their own perspective and approach to the lessons.

We focus on quality, fairness, and care in how we work with both artists and families. If you’re an artist or educator who believes in thoughtful, skill-based art instruction, we’d love for you to get to know us.

Name: Programa Jovem Monitor Cultural (PJMC)
Description: Política pública de formação em gestão e produção cultural para as juventudes da cidade de São Paulo.

Name: Gnana Nrithya
Description:
Welcome to Gnananrithya - Your Gateway to Cultural Enrichment through Bharatanatyam!

At Gnananrithya, we are dedicated to preserving and promoting the rich heritage of Bharatanatyam, an iconic Indian classical dance form. Our dance academy offers a holistic learning experience, catering to both adults and kids who share a passion for dance and cultural exploration.

Led by the esteemed Guru Smt. Charulatha, our academy emphasizes the importance of tradition while embracing contemporary elements, ensuring a well-rounded dance education. From mastering intricate adavus (steps) and mudras (gestures) to diving into the depths of abhinaya (expressions), our students embark on a transformative journey of artistic and spiritual growth.

Beyond dance technique, we delve into the historical context and spiritual significance of Bharatanatyam, allowing our students to connect with the roots of this captivating art. Our Guru Smt. Charulatha, with her decades of experience, guides students through the intricate rhythms, gestures, and expressions that define Bharatanatyam.

Gnananrithya is not just a dance academy; it's a haven for those who seek to embrace their cultural identity, express themselves artistically, and connect with a vibrant community of like-minded individuals. Our classes foster discipline, self-confidence, and a strong sense of purpose as students navigate the intricate world of Bharatanatyam. 

As you navigate our website, www.gnananrithya.com, you'll find detailed information about our classes, schedules, events, and the incredible work our students have achieved over the years. We encourage you to embark on this remarkable journey with us, where every step is an exploration of culture, creativity, and connection.

Join the Gnananrithya family today, and experience the magic of Bharatanatyam unfold in your life. Let's dance together, celebrate our heritage, and create lasting memories through the timeless art form that is Bharatanatyam.

Name: The Crucible
Description: The Crucible is a nonprofit educational facility that fosters a collaboration of Arts, Industry and Community. Through training in the fine and industrial arts, The Crucible promotes creative expression, reuse of materials, and innovative design while serving as an accessible arts venue for the general public.

Name: Arrowmont School of Arts and Crafts
Description:
In 1912, the Pi Beta Phi Fraternity for Women founded the Pi Beta Phi Settlement School in Gatlinburg, TN as a service project to commemorate its 50th anniversary.  Today, Arrowmont School of Arts and Crafts is a nationally renowned center of contemporary arts and crafts education. Workshops are offered for one and two weeks in the spring and summer, and one-week and weekends in the fall. Areas of study include: ceramics, fibers, metals/jewelry, painting, drawing, photography, warm glass, woodturning, woodworking, sculpture, and book and paper arts. The public is welcome year-round to visit the school’s five galleries, resource center and book and supply store. Artist residencies, assistantships, work-study, scholarships, community outreach, conferences and music programs contribute to Arrowmont’s mission of “enriching lives through art.” 

Arrowmont’s historic 14 acre campus is a hidden treasure in the heart of downtown Gatlinburg. Quaint and intimate spaces define Arrowmont’s charm. With art around every corner, it isn’t hard to find inspiration and creativity, making it the perfect location for a board, business or staff retreat, meeting, special event or large family gathering.

Name: Quiosco Cultural - Ateliê Itinerante
Description:
A Cidade de Itanhaém foi descoberta e fundada pelo navegador português Martim Afonso de Souza, no dia 22 de Abril de 1.532. Segundo historiadores ele estabeleceu o fundamento da povoação de Itanhaém entre a tribo dos Itanhaens que vivia juntamente com colonos, ao redor de pequeno porteiro na praia de Peruíbe a 13 km, ao sul de Itanhaém.

Mais é evidente que o navegador ao estabelecer essa povoação, estava na realidade fundando toda esta região e principalmente à margem direita do Rio Itanhaém do mar olha para a terra, porque a exuberante foz do rio os morros de que de um lado e de outro do rio existem acomodando pequenas e belas praias em forma de baía, costões de pedras se antepondo ao mar, Área a frente do morro Itaguassú onde hoje situa-se o Convento, formam razões mais que óbvias sob todos os enfoques, para o estabelecimento de vilas e aldeias.

Name: ABRA - Academia Brasileira de Arte
Description: Desde a sua fundação, em 1987, a ABRA mantém um postura profissional que tem como premissa o respeito e a transparência para com seu público. Toda a equipe da ABRA não mede esforços para oferecer as melhores condições de ensino, por meio de pesquisas de exigências do mercado, métodos sempre atualizados, sistema de ensino que se adéqua ao perfil do aluno, professores com experiências nas suas respectivas áreas de atuação, equipamentos e instalações adequadas e ambiente propício ao desenvolvimento das aulas. A ideia de valorizar o indivíduo além da técnica, surgiu porque sabemos que cada ser humano possui suas particularidades e que é impossível transmitir qualquer tipo de ensinamento sem antes estabelecer um relacionamento com o aluno.

Name: Arte Revide
Description: Somos uma escola, uma comunidade. Somos uma reação. Chegamos aqui com a vontade de fazer diferente, afinal de contas, cuidamos dos nossos.

Name: l'Accademia di Belle Arti di Cuneo
Description:
Accademia di Belle Arti di Cuneo integra nella sua offerta formativa una ampia ed approfondita preparazione teorica ad una specifica ed attenta preparazione tecnica, nella convinzione che gli allievi debbano saper padroneggiare gli strumenti tecnici e tecnologici richiesti dal mercato del lavoro, ma soprattutto debbano sapere plasmare le idee in nove forme d'arte per essere flessibili e propositivi anche nel mondo del lavoro. 

In quest'ottica l'Accademia di Belle Arti di Cuneo accompagna i propri allievi in un percorso parallelo e complementare agli studi, un percorso di stage, mostre d'arte, sfilate, partecipazioni a progetti sul territorio...

Name: Starving Artists Opportunities
Description:
Welcome to Starving Artists – the UK’s ultimate hub for art opportunities, designed to free up your creative time. We search the internet for every commission, award, grant, residency, and more, so you can focus on creating rather than endlessly browsing. With hundreds of opportunities tailored to help you gain recognition, support your artistic journey, and keep your career moving forward, we’re here to make forging your path as an artist easier.

Our mission is simple: help artists build sustainable, fulfilling careers. At Starving Artists, you’ll have access to a world of opportunities at your fingertips, all updated daily by a team of artists who understand the struggle. We’re passionate about making the search for art-related opportunities simpler, faster, and more effective for artists at all stages of their careers.

With over 350 live art opportunities available at any one time, and 50-80 new listings added each week, there’s always something new to discover. Our filtering tools allow you to tailor your search results to fit your creative practice, whether you're looking for your first award, a residency, public art commissions, or community workshops. We’ve got opportunities designed to take your practice to the next level.

For three years, our all-artist team has been dedicated to finding the best opportunities, not just for ourselves, but for you, too! We also put together a weekly newsletter featuring our handpicked highlights, ensuring you never miss a great opportunity. With our real-world experience, we know how to spot the best opportunities and weed out the rubbish!

Whether you’re just starting out or looking to take your art career further, Starving Artists is here to help you navigate the world of art opportunities with ease. Our platform supports artists in building careers that are not only successful but also sustainable and fulfilling. Join our community and start accessing the opportunities that can take your art to the next level.

Name: Best Art Awards
Description:
BEST ART AWARDS
Welcome artists, dreamers and innovators! Are you ready to showcase your talents and get a chance to win amazing prizes? We are pleased to invite you to join us in this exciting competition. This is your opportunity to showcase your creativity and show the world your unique vision. Do you prefer to draw with a pencil or paints, pens or charcoal? We are open to all mediums. What about the awards? With our generous prizes, you can take your art to the next level. These prizes will give you the freedom to experiment and express yourself with new materials, and of course you will get the satisfaction of being recognized for your work. So don’t miss this opportunity – it could be your big step forward! Get inspired, brush up on your skills and make sure your competition entries showcase your best work. We want to see what you have, so don’t be afraid to show off your talent. We are also confident that our competition will be a great opportunity for you to showcase your talent to collectors, curators, gallery owners and other art industry professionals. It’s time to show us what you can do. Good luck!

Name: OnFire Animation
Description:
Desde 2010, a OnFire anima sonhos e forma a próxima geração de animadores 3D, preparando profissionais para brilhar no mercado nacional e internacional. Mais do que ensinar técnica, cultivamos uma paixão pela arte de animar, garantindo que cada aluno encontre sua voz criativa e alcance a excelência.

Em 2020, demos mais um passo com a criação da nossa frente de consultoria e supervisão de animação. Aqui, colaboramos com estúdios e projetos, elevando a qualidade da animação brasileira e trazendo um toque de maestria a cada produção.

Com uma equipe apaixonada e antenada nas últimas tendências, transformamos ideias em arte que se move, sempre com um olhar humano em cada frame. Na OnFire, acreditamos que a animação não é apenas técnica — é poesia em movimento, é paixão em cada frame, arte em cada passo.
Com uma equipe experiente e conectada às mais recentes tecnologias e tendências do setor, a OnFire Animation se orgulha em transformar ideias criativas em realidade, mantendo a essência artística humana em cada frame.

Name: Art Gate
Description: Art Gate is the leading platform for immersive art events and exhibitions that connect galleries, artists, students, collectors, and audiences worldwide. Our virtual technology removes the barriers of location, cost, and accessibility, enabling anyone, anywhere to experience and showcase art like never before. Whether you’re an artist seeking global exposure or an institution reimagining how art is shared, Art Gate empowers you to create meaningful connections and unforgettable exhibitions in the digital realm.

Name: Syn Studio : École d'art - Art School
Description:
At Cestar Collège - Syn Studio, we specialize in teaching concept art and illustration for the entertainment industry. We believe that strong fundamentals in figurative drawing, painting and sculpture are the foundations of high-level digital artistry. This belief is shared by all of our teachers, friends and advisers which include top art directors, producers, lead and senior artists in Montreal, Los Angeles and San Francisco’s games, film and animation industries.

For over five years, we have been helping industry professionals as well as young and amateur artists take their art to the next level. Our alumni include art directors and lead artists as well as rising stars in concept art, illustration and matte painting in games, film and animation companies such as Ubisoft, Electronic Arts, Eidos, Gameloft, Cartoon Network, Mokko Studio and many more. Our most successful students are incredibly passionate about art and learning, intensely curious and open-minded, humble and eager for critique, share and work well with others and possess a very strong work ethic. If this sounds like you and you want to see yourself learn and grow with us, then whatever your current level, we would love to take your hand and guide you on the journey to artistic mastery.

Name: Barcelona Academy of Art
Description:
The Barcelona Academy of Art opened in September 2013 and aims at teaching drawing, painting, sculpture and digital art using a full curriculum and teaching methods derived from classical-realist tradition. Its methodology originated in the Renaissance and was revived by the major academic Ateliers of the late XIX (especially by great painters such as Jean-Léon Gérôme, Léon Bonnat and Carolus-Duran).

In the Barcelona Academy of Art we consider the classic academic approach not as an end but as a tool that students can use to build their own personality and artistic language.

The training program at the Barcelona Academy of Art offers regular courses in drawing, painting and sculpture, which are complemented by workshops, seminars and intensive courses (Easter and Summer). These provide students with an intensive learning of methods, procedures and techniques from the best professional artists.

Name: Kaliber
Description:
Kaliber is een van de grootste aanbieders in cultuureducatie in Nederland. Voor alles op het gebied van muziek, dans, theater en beeldende kunst moet je bij ons zijn. Het hele jaar door kan jong en oud, beginner of gevorderde, zich creatief uiten. 

We zijn en blijven een maatschappelijke instelling zonder winstoogmerk die opereert op de schaal van de regio Twente, met een focus op de gemeenten: Almelo, Enschede, Hellendoorn, Oldenzaal, Tubbergen en Wierden. We bieden een breed aanbod voor particulieren, scholen en bedrijven en adviseren overheid en onderwijs met betrekking tot educatiebeleid.

Name: ARTSHINE - ARTS4ALL
Description:
At Artshine, we’re driven by the belief that creativity can change lives.

Founded by artist and entrepreneur Paul Field, Artshine’s mission is to bring the joy and transformative power of art to every corner of Canada and beyond.
Through our innovative mobile art school, after-school programs, and art-in-a-box subscriptions, we’ve reached over 350+ schools…

And inspired over 216000+ students.
Children, adults, and educators alike.

Paul’s Vision: Art as a Lifeline

A brief look at Paul Field’s journey to founding Artshine and Arts4All:
Paul’s journey began in the field of social work…
Where he saw firsthand how art could be a lifeline for those struggling with life’s challenges.

Paul used art to create safe spaces for healing and growth.

However, he quickly realized that consistent funding for art programs was always in short supply.
That’s why Paul founded Artshine—to create a sustainable model that would keep these essential programs alive; Arts4All.

Paul’s Vision: Expanding Access to Creativity Through Arts4All:
Arts4All, Artshine’s nonprofit initiative, brings free art programs to underprivileged communities across Ontario and Québec. Our social enterprise model has provided over $1 million in free and subsidized art programs since our start.

Our impact:
- 216000+ students inspired in 350+ schools
- 32,400+ children and youth given free scholarships
- Programs in English and French

Why it matters:
- Art provides healing, growth, and self-expression
- Builds critical life skills and self-confidence
- Creates safe spaces for connection and empowerment

Join us in making creativity accessible to all, transforming lives one brushstroke at a time.

Name: Associação Brasileira de Gestão Cultural - ABGC
Description:
A ASSOCIAÇÃO BRASILEIRA DE GESTÃO CULTURAL – ABGC

É uma ONG que atua desde 2005 na formação profissional e de conhecimento acadêmico junto aos setores de Produção e Gestão Cultural, Social e Ambiental, através da realização de ações voltadas à qualificação profissional e à divulgação das profissões afins junto ao mercado de trabalho, mediante parcerias e convênios com instituições públicas e privadas.
A ABGC tem como prerrogativa reunir pesquisadores, professores e profissionais das áreas da produção de bens culturais e do gerenciamento em cultura, museus e meio ambiente, propondo-se a realizar cursos de capacitação em formatos diversos – corporativos, de extensão e de pós-graduação, além de pesquisas e publicações.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Public Arts Trust of India
Description:
The Public Arts Trust of India works to democratise arts and culture for all. 

In India, where philanthropy, patronage and state support for the arts is limited, Sana Rezwan founded PATI in 2022 to recentre the country’s current market-led scene and create a more balanced arts ecology.  

Based in the Indian state of Rajasthan (between Jaipur and Jodhpur), PATI’s initiatives foster a more holistic growth of arts and culture through artist residencies, commissioning, curating, education and professional development programmes and community exchange, reinforcing creativity as an important part of everyday life regardless of a person’s association or generation. 

This work is achieved through innovative collaborations with like-minded local and global luxury brands, non-profit institutions, galleries and individuals who share PATI’s ambitions. To date, this has included the department of Tourism, Archaeological Survey of India, Jawahar Kala Kendra, Jaipur Rugs, Frozen Music, Institut Français, Prameya Art Foundation and more. 

All PATI’s programmes provide free access to the arts, including the Jaipur and Jodhpur Art Weeks which maintain a multi-layered approach to give the same gravatas to the work of non-artists and emerging contemporary artists as it does to those of an international standing. 

Currently operating on a peripatetic structure, PATI will ground its work by establishing two new art centres in Jaipur and Jodhpur in 2024. These spaces will create a positive impact through art connecting local, national and international visitors with each city’s unique cultural context to create a deeper impact on the lives of those it works with.

Name: Ecole Pivaut Nantes-Rennes-Montréal
Description:
Fondée à Nantes en 1985, l’École Pivaut est une école Supérieure Technique Privée spécialisée  en Arts appliqués et Dessin narratif. 
Son implantation géographique attire des étudiants de la France entière, et elle se place en région au rang des établissements d'enseignements supérieurs indépendants, en arts appliqués et en dessin narratif, les plus importants en termes d'effectif.
Elle compte actuellement plus de 750 étudiants répartis en 6 filières de formations professionnelles, encadrés par une équipe pédagogique de 80 enseignants et intervenants professionnels de renom. 
Nos formations :

ARTS APPLIQUES :
- Motion Design Graphique
- Illustration 
- Décoration peinte

DESSIN NARRATIF :
- Bande Dessinée 
- Cinéma d'Animation 2D
- Concept art

L' École Pivaut propose également aux futurs étudiants d'intégrer une année préparatoire de mise à niveau, facultative, soit en arts appliqués soit en dessin narratif, à Nantes ou Rennes.

Enfin, depuis septembre 2017, l'École Pivaut a ouvert un second établissement à Montréal : la Campus Pivaut. Spécialisé dans le Cinéma d'animation 2D et le Concept art, le Campus Pivaut propose des formations accessibles dans le but de préparer les professionnels de demain.

Name: Art Elixir
Description: Art Elixir is an art academy based in Ahmedabad, offering courses designed in-house in painting, drawing, sketching and creative as well as utility crafts for kids and adults alike.

Name: Label des CREATIFS
Description:
Le label des créatifs est né de la volonté d’un passionné de l’image et du design graphique voulant promouvoir celles-ci via un label indépendant, promulguant les arts graphiques, la photographie, le motion design, les métiers du Web etc. 

Un cadre qui formes des jeunes à l’éducation et à la discipline artistique sous forme de mentoring. 
Qui consiste à partager des aptitudes à des personnes moins expérimentées. 
(Accompagner, conseiller, soutenir, et à aider le mentoré a se développer puis s’imposer de façon professionnel).

Description:
INNOVATION CREATIVE SPACE :

Cada empresa é uma ideia que assume a forma de ser, as virtudes e a essência das pessoas que a constituem. 

Somos artistas compartilhando inspirações, técnicas e visão profissional. Somos pessoas que promovem boas virtudes e visam ressaltar o protagonismo necessário para próprio desenvolvimento do ser.
A ICS é uma idéia, uma semente em crescimento. Queremos dar bons frutos. Por isso, nada permanece estático por aqui. Estamos sempre em movimento para expressar a nossa própria singularidade.
Devemos muito a cada artista, estudante, amigo e colaborador que deixou um pouco de si para contribuir com o nosso desenvolvimento.

Name: ZCCE Zurich Centre for Creative Economies
Description: We aim to anchor the creative economies as an impulse-giving topic and field of action at the interfaces between culture, economics, education, politics and society. Value creation and new approaches to creation, production and commercialisation play just as much a role as national and global dynamics.

Name: YALLAA ART LAB
Description:
Revolutionizing children's artistic and scientific education! 

At YALLAA ART LAB, we firmly believe that every child is a creator at heart. Our mission? To combine art and science to awaken the creativity and ingenuity of children aged 5 to 16.  Our unique workshops provide an environment where exploration, curiosity, and innovation are at the core of learning. Whether it’s painting, robotics, or color chemistry, we stimulate an inventive and critical mindset, essential for tackling the challenges of the future.

 Small groups: Only 10 children per session, ensuring personalized attention and tailored support for each child.

Why choose YALLAA ART LAB?

- Interdisciplinary Methodology:Integrating art and science for a comprehensive learning approach.
- Structured Program: Clear objectives for each activity, ensuring balanced development.
- Innovation and Creativity: Preparing children to think creatively and solve complex problems.

We are much more than just a workshop. We are a laboratory of ideas and an incubator of talents, where every child can become a future innovator.

Join us and give your children the opportunity to fully develop their creative potential. Together, let's shape the leaders of tomorrow!

Name: ABA UD Accademia di Belle Arti G.B. Tiepolo Udine
Description:
L’Accademia di Belle Arti GB Tiepolo nasce a Udine con lo scopo di offrire alla nostra regione una nuova opportunità culturale: avere la prima Accademia di Belle Arti in Friuli Venezia Giulia. 

La nuova proposta, accolta con favore dalla Provincia e dal Comune di Udine oltre che dalle maggiori associazioni di categoria, ha ottenuto il decreto di approvazione dell’ANVUR (Agenzia Nazionale di Valutazione del Sistema Universitario e della Ricerca del Ministero dell’Istruzione) nell’aprile del 2015 ed il Decreto Ministeriale di Riconoscimento firmato dal Ministro della Pubblica Istruzione Stefania Giannini nel maggio del 2016.

Description:
Since 1982, Paint Creek Center for the Arts has been dedicated to promoting the arts and artistic excellence through a full range of cultural programs including exhibitions, studio art classes, outreach programs, community involvement projects, our Art Market, and the Art & Apples Festival.

Paint Creek Center for the Arts’ (PCCA) mission is to build on our rich heritage of leading creativity in our community by providing opportunities for all to learn, create, experience and appreciate the arts.

Name: Let’s Be Artsy!
Description:
Art for Fun!  Step by step art and crafts for the fun of it! Bring your friends, family, wine and snacks! All your art and craft supplies are provided!

We offer space for birthday parties, bachelorette parties, Team Building events, and more!

Want a private lesson on how to paint with oils, acrylics, watercolors and more...call us!

We are a full learning center!

Name: Les Fioretti
Description:
Les Fioretti, c’est ton blog dédié au dessin d’illustration botanique !   Mais encore ?

Une fenêtre ouverte sur la nature, qui viendra progressivement enrichir ta pratique tout en renforçant ton lien avec le vivant.

Où nous suivre ?
 Abonne-toi à la Lettre Botanique, que je t’envoie chaque trimestre ! Tu y découvriras les nouveautés, et tu recevras un lien direct pour ta prochaine leçon.
 Tu peux aussi me retrouver sur mon site internet, dans la section Blog, où je partage un regard, un exercice ou un geste créatif pour nourrir ta passion.

Mais qu’est-ce que Les Fioretti ?
 « Les Petites Fleurs » : ce sont ces petites histoires et anecdotes qui racontent la vie et les enseignements de Saint François d’Assise, célèbre pour son amour inconditionnel de la nature et de toutes les créatures vivantes. 

Rejoins-moi pour cette aventure artistique à travers le prisme de ces leçons ! 

 contact@stephanieschouvey.com

Description:
ART is the key to opening children’s creative imagination, and ART BONBON is the new paradigm of digital art education.

There are 4 fundamentals to describe ART BONBON
1. The world's first real-time online art education platform.

Name: The Art Detectives
Description:
Founded in 2016 in upstate NY by artist & educator Adam Kritzer, the Art Detectives develop & implement personalized art & arts integration programming for student-artists of all ages & abilities.  

But what is arts integration? Arts integration is a way of utilizing the artmaking process in service of academic, social & emotional learning (SEL).  Some people want to pursue a career in the arts, but others just want to enjoy making art while working towards complimentary goals in their lives.  We have classes for both the aspiring professional & the hobbyist.

We facilitate singular creative opportunities for individuals to become better artists while developing SEL skills such as teamwork, motivation, goal-setting, optimism & communication.  We are flexible in terms of curriculum, scheduling & delivery of service to meet the specific needs of each & every artist & family.  

Each artist has unique interests, needs & goals.  We believe in emergent, student-centered programming that sprouts naturally & evolves from the artist's blossoming curiosities. We think learning should be challenging & fun. We treat our artists seriously & with respect. We are co-learners & collaborators.  

Some Art Detectives are painters.  Others are yoga enthusiasts.  Some are interested in working with cameras or learning a musical instrument. Others are experimenting with screenwriting & digital art.  Some artists focus on one artform & others work with several.  If you can dream it, we can do it!  

Classes are offered virtually across the US and Canada. Please reach out today to learn more about our programming and philosophy or to sign up for a free brainstorming session.

Name: FLUX: School of Arts
Description:
FLUX stands for a state of constant change. In 2019, FLUX came into existence to fill a gap in the art ecosystem in Bangalore – as a space that operates out of compassion, collaboration and accessibility.

FLUX offers a range of unique and consciously curated programs to help you reconnect with your body, mind and spirit. X-sense is the flagship contemporary dance program along with Aerial Yoga, Theater, Natural Fitness, Bollywood Dance, Kids Club, Retreats, Women’s Circle, Healing and performances.

X-Sense, the flagship professional contemporary dance course at FLUX is a regular course and new batches always keep starting as soon as the previous ones are over. Admissions are always open.

Bollywood dance classes at FLUX are to learn all the rhythmic and energetic steps of Bollywood. It immerses us all in the expression of love and life.

Acting classes at FLUX are not run of the mill traditional acting classes. We emphasize as much on the movement training as we do on the voice training.

FLUX offers awesome regular yoga and aerial yoga classes. In fact, we have been the pioneers in introducing aerial yoga aka anti-gravity yoga in Bangalore.

Professional photography course at FLUX is a regular course and new batches always keep starting as soon as the previous ones are over. Admissions are always open.

Creative Writing Course at FLUX has been designed to challenge writers with sophisticated literary references and writing tasks that push their expression.

Inside Out, a therapeutic wellness program, offers insightful dance movement therapy (DMT) dealing with psychological trauma.

Women Circles at FLUX fully empower women where they share their experiences to arrive at an existential resolution. 

Kids Club at FLUX offers yearlong kids activities in Bangalore. It is a question of developing real intelligence for our kids into what they learn in school. We also keep organizing Summer Camps for kids every year.

Name: Sultana's Imperial Art Galleries & Studios
Description: Welcome to Sultana's Imperial Art Galleries & Studios – a vibrant hub for creativity and innovation. Nestled in the heart of the city, our space is dedicated to fostering the talents of artists and art enthusiasts from around the globe.

Name: Access Arts School of Service
Description:
School of Service began in 1971 and has grown steadily since, evolving into the thriving Access Arts program of today. Our mission is to provide creative learning experiences for everyone. We offer instruction in a variety of art media, with an emphasis on serving those who are underserved. From the beginner to the advanced artist, all are welcome in our studios.

We pursue this mission in various ways, in order to reach as many as possible.  Some of these ways include:
• More than 200 classes scheduled weekly throughout the year in a range of media, including clay, fibers, painting, drawing, sculpture, photography and jewelry-making
• Programs for people of all ages, financial circumstances, ability levels, and backgrounds
• Scholarships or fee subsidies for those otherwise unable to attend classes due to financial hardship
• Multiple workshops offered throughout the year, at our facilities and other locations throughout the community
• Free art demonstrations at area events and local art festivals
• Summer Camp and School’s Out Programs for school-age children
• Accessible studios and specialized equipment for those with special needs

Description: We are a Downtown Modesto, CA open craft studio/makers’ space.  The public is welcome to come in to use a wide variety of crafting tools to make whatever they’d like. Or, sign up for a guided workshop and meet friends and make something at the same time!

Name: Chaitanya Srujana
Description: Previously known as Campus Decoration Committee (CDC) , has been renamed as Chaitanya Srujana - The Arts & Crafts Club of CBIT . Responsible for decoration during college fest along with honing art and craft skill in members of the club. Successfully conducted 30+ events since founding year 2019.

Description:
Szkoła prowadzi programy muzycznej edukacji wczesnodziecięcej oraz programy nauki gry na instrumencie i śpiewu. 
Przy szkole działa impresariat muzyczny.

Name: Collective WEBS
Description:
WEBS stands for Weaving Educational Biomimetic Systems. Our work recycles from species that, long before humans, practised sustainability to safeguard their future. Through biomimetics, our collective seeks to re-know and re-embody practices of change to challenge hegemonic narratives and unsustainable global structures of exploitation. 

Convinced by the power of education and micropolitics, WEBS promotes horizontal spaces to share, grow and engage in political reflections. We view this journey as a communal process of spiritual and collective healing that enables us to learn and unlearn, unshape and reshape our belief systems and relationships while expanding our ways of feeling, thinking and knowing together. 

Our educational and artistic projects integrate diverse and plural perspectives, including decolonial and horizontal methodologies. Along them, we wish to contribute to imagining shared futures for all, composed of healthier relationships with others and the world.

Name: Brookline Music School
Description: Brookline Music School, a private, nonprofit community school for the arts, is Brookline's oldest and largest cultural institution. Founded in 1924 by the Public Schools of Brookline, the School became a private organization in the 1940s and was incorporated as a private, nonprofit school in 1967. In 1994, following a successful capital campaign, the School moved into its permanent home in the Kennard House. Brookline Music School's original purpose was to enhance the Public Schools of Brookline orchestras by providing music lessons to the children of Brookline after hours on school premises. Brookline Music School’s mission is to awaken and nurture the joy of learning, playing, and listening to music and to create a welcoming musical community for all ages, abilities, and interests.

pintura, aquarela, desenho, modelo vivo, desenho de observação, escultura, argila e muito mais.

Our primary goal is to organize some interactive workshops and events that inspire and nurture the artistic talents of students. Whether you may be a seasoned artist or just beginning to dip the brush into the world of colors, Palette welcomes everyone to embark on a journey of self-expression and creative growth.

We provide easy-to-follow art classes, beautifully illustrated books, quality materials, and step-by-step YouTube tutorials that make learning art fun for all ages. We’re more than an art brand—we’re a creative family helping you learn, create, and celebrate your imagination.

Name: KITA Anak Negeri
Description: Lembaga Pendidikan Musik KITA Anak Negeri (Komunitas Ilmu Tata Nada untuk Anak Negeri) merupakan wadah bagi pemerhati, penikmat dan pelaku seni musik untuk mengembangkan, memajukan dan melestarikan musik sebagai karya seni yang tidak terpisahkan dari perjalanan masyarakat menuju peradaban yang maju. Name: CUYAHOGA VALLEY ART CENTER
Description:
About Cuyahoga Valley Art Center:
Nestled in the heart of historic downtown Cuyahoga Falls, the Cuyahoga Valley Art Center (CVAC) has enriched lives through the visual arts for over 90 years. Founded in 1934, CVAC is Summit County’s oldest nonprofit visual art organization and the only art center of its kind in the region. Our mission is to foster a greater understanding of the visual arts through education, exhibition, and community engagement — but what truly defines us is the creative community that brings this mission to life.

Each year, we welcome 1,300+ students to explore their creativity through 150+ classes and workshops in painting, drawing, ceramics, sculpture, and more. Our dedicated faculty and staff create a welcoming environment where learners of all ages — from 2nd graders to retirees — can discover and grow. Thanks to our Vibrant Palette Scholarship Fund, supported by the PNC Foundation and community donors, CVAC helps bridge the gap for students who might otherwise be unable to participate due to cost, expanding access to the joy of creative learning.

CVAC’s gallery exhibitions are a cornerstone of our work, attracting over 550 artists to submit work from across Ohio and beyond. These exhibitions draw 14,000+ visitors and serve as cultural touchstones where artists and art lovers connect, learn, and celebrate creativity together.

Collaboration is central to our mission. We partner with the Cuyahoga Falls Library, Cuyahoga Falls City Schools, and Akron Art Museum, and lead the CreativeCONNECT network, uniting local membership-based art groups— fostering collaboration and collective visibility for the visual arts.

At its core, CVAC is a home for creativity — a place where beginners take their first brushstroke, professionals refine their craft, and neighbors connect through the shared language of art. Whether you join a class, attend an exhibition, or support a scholarship, you become part of a vibrant legacy nearly a century in the making.

Name: Club de Artes Plásticas UP (CAPUP)
Description: Hola! Esta OE tiene como objetivo la creación y difusión de contenido artístico de alumnos UP. Si te interesa o tienes experiencia, escríbenos .

Valorizamos a criatividade como ferramenta de impacto e acreditamos que a arte pode inspirar e conectar pessoas

Name: Sanatbaz
Description:
Biz Kimiz?
  2013-2014 yılında açılış hazırlıklarına başlayan kurumumuz 2014 yılı itibariyle Sanatbaz olarak faaliyete geçmiştir. Anlatı tiyatrosu, drama ve diksiyon atölyeleri, resim atölyeleri, enstrüman ve dans dersleri ile eğitimin yürütüldüğü kurumumuzda  amaç bir yandan estetik, empati, demokratik düşünme ve iletişim becerileri gelişmiş sanat takipçileri ve  bir yandan da sanatı meslek olarak düşünen bireyleri yetiştirmektir. Sanatbaz'ın genel amacı ise anlatı tiyatrosunun Türkiye’de tanınması, gelişmesini sağlamak ve uluslararası arenada da anlatı geleneğimizi temsil eden bir okul olmaktır.
Sanatbaz, öğrenci merkezli eğitim anlayışını öykü ve masalların büyülü dünyasıyla birleştirmektedir. Bu nedenle anlatı tiyatrosunu bir yöntem olarak bütün sanat eğitimi derslerinde kullanmaktadır. Böylece drama, piyano, keman, yan flüt, bale, modern dans, resim, heykel gibi derslerin bir yandan eğlenceli diğer yandan da kalıcı olması sağlanmaktadır.
	Sanatbaz,sanat eğitim programları ile yaratıcı,eleştirel düşünen, empati kurabilen bireyler yetiştirmeyi amaçlamaktadır.

Name: Majal Design School

Based in Beirut, Lebanon, we are a design school empowering you to grow with skill-first education in: Jewelry Making, Textile Design & Business Growth.

Name: Kriti: The Fine Arts Society of SSCBS
Description:
The concept of peace is an immobile one - a concept that is too calm at its core to inspire, move or create anything. It only sustains and strengthens the one point it inhabits.
However, at Kriti, we wish to put this peace in motion. We would like to see a change in the way which creative arts are seen by a majority- how 'Art' is an increasingly significant part of a number of disciplines and crucial for their growth; how it is a hub for all flows and ideas that are at the core of a sustainable organization.

Follow our page for regular updates.

Name: Grand View Christian School
Description: World Class Christian Education on the East Side of Des Moines, Iowa.

Name: Pikes Peak Artist Collective
Description: Pikes Peak Artist Collective is a 20 year old art school nestled in downtown Colorado Springs, CO. We are a boutique art school offering classes for children, teens and adults. Lessons are offered weekly and purchased as monthly memberships, as well as workshops taught by a wide variety of local artists in a broad array of mediums. All classes are small in size ranging from 1-17 people. Our studio space is outfitted with a gallery space, library, lounge area with a fire place, class area, clay class area, kitchen, bathroom, private parking and views of Pike Peak and the surrounding mountains. The culture of this small school is what makes it truly unique; we provide a supportive and dynamic community where one can feel comfortable and invigorated in the learning process! Check out our website for more details, pricing and event schedules.

Name: Atelier TLV
Description:
Atelier is a unique art school that blends deep study of classical visual art traditions with a fresh, contemporary approach to creativity.

We offer small group classes with personal attention in a welcoming, fully equipped studio space. Our faculty is made up of accomplished artists, each bringing their own individual style and professional experience.

Right next to the school, you’ll find the Atelier Art Supply Store — a curated shop for high-quality, professional art materials. Every item is carefully selected by our team of artists and sourced from top manufacturers around the world. These are the same tools we and our instructors use and love.

Whether you’re joining one of our courses or workshops, or working independently, you’ll find everything you need to support your creative journey.

Located in the heart of Tel Aviv’s art scene, in Kiryat Hamelacha, Atelier serves artists from across the country.

Name: Kunstforteller
Description: Kunst forteller, er en frivillig bevegelse og formidler prosjekter innen kunst-, design- og håndverksfag

Name: Centre d'art de Préville!
Description:
Centre d’art de Préville est un organisme à but non lucratif axé sur la musique, l’art et l’éducation dans la communauté de la Rive-Sud de Montréal et au-delà. Préville offre une éducation musicale, artistique, scientifique et technologique, et culturelle pour enrichir la vie des familles et des apprenants de tous âges et de tous horizons dans un cadre bilingue. Nous nous engageons à offrir un enseignement de qualité, accessible et à un prix abordable.

Conformément à notre déclaration de mission, la bourse de bienfaisance Belva Thomas offre une aide financière aux étudiants qui n’auraient pas autrement les moyens financiers de fréquenter le Centre d’art de Préville. La bourse de bienfaisance Belva Thomas vise à donner aux enfants âgés de 5 à 16 ans qui ont des besoins financiers, la possibilité de découvrir, d’explorer, de créer et d’inspirer d’autres personnes dans les domaines de la musique et des arts, des sciences et de la technologie.

Name: Autorska Szkoła Muzyki Rozrywkowej
Description:
Autorska Szkoła Muzyki Rozrywkowej to innowacyjna szkoła muzyczna, w której nauka oparta jest o autorski program opracowany na podstawie wieloletnich doświadczeń, badań nad edukacją muzyczną, prowadzonych warsztatów dla różnych grup wiekowych: dzieci, młodzieży i dorosłych, będących na różnych stopniach rozwoju muzycznego. 

Jeśli:
- szukasz nauczyciela, który w jasny i miły sposób przekaże Ci swoją wiedzę z zakresu nauki gry
na instrumencie?
- chcesz zacząć przygodę jako instrumentalista, ale nie wiesz od czego zacząć?
- potrzebujesz podszkolić nabyte umiejętności?
- brakuje Ci motywacji do poznawania nowych technik i stylów muzycznych?
- nie jesteś zadowolony ze swojego obecnego nauczyciela?
- chcesz rozpocząć naukę gry, a nie posiadasz instrumentu?

Doskonale trafiłaś/eś. Tu z pewnością znajdziesz to czego szukasz ;)

Name: Musikhøjskolen, Frederiksberg Musik- og Kulturskole
Description:
Musikhøjskolen er landets ældste musikskole. Skolen er grundlagt i 1931 som musikskole og har siden tilføjet flere kulturretninger, så der nu er undervisning i musik, sang, dans, billedkunst og film.
Der er undervisning for børn, unge og voksne i alle aldre. Undervisningen foregår i egne lokaler på Frederiksberg og på alle kommunens folkeskoler.

Musikundervisning for børn og unge 0-25 år er under Musikloven, aftenskoleundervisning for voksne under Folkeoplysningsloven, samt undervisning under Musikalsk Grundkursus (MGK), der er 3-årigt og hvortil der er optagelsesprøve.

Name: Art Edge Center
Description: Art Edge is a center that brings artists together to offer developmental courses in the arts, while also providing a space where artists can enjoy and thrive.

Name: Taller de Arte Mauro
Description:
Taller de Arte Mauro, un espacio dedicado a la enseñanza de las Bellas Artes.
Desde el rigor del Dibujo Artístico en su vertiente más académica, hasta incontables estilos pictóricos y técnicas: Pintura al óleo, Acuarela, Acrílico,Modelado...
No solo nos centramos en la enseñanza, también realizamos obras por encargo incluida la Monumental,
sirva como ejemplo la estatua de "La Regenta" situada ante la catedral de Oviedo

Name: Académie des Beaux-Arts de Kinshasa
Description: L’Académie des Beaux-Arts de Kinshasa est une émanation de l’Ecole Saint Luc de Gombe Matadi, créée en 1943 dans la province du Congo-centrale par le révérend Frère Marc Stanislas Wallenda, missionnaire belge de la congrégation des Frères des Ecoles Chrétiennes.

Name: Atelier de Brésoles
Description:
Founded in 2003, we provide intensive training in figurative art to students in the Montreal area. We also offer online classes to students from around the world.

Our program is based on the academic tradition. We begin with drawing methods that teach students to draw accurately from observation and achieve a realistic effect in their work. Once students have mastered the fundamentals of drawing, they have several options: drawing from the live model, painting in oil, artistic anatomy, or continued study of historical techniques of drawing or painting.

Our skilled instructors welcome students of all levels in a small-group setting. New students are welcome to begin anytime throughout the year.

Name: Brentford Nudes L'Atelier
Description:
Team building art events and workshops in London 

 Curated 'Sip & Draw' costume life drawing events with whimsical art models. 
 Bespoke still life 'Sip & Paint' Events.

Instagram: @brentford.nudes

Hosted by artist Angela Chico and photographer Felice Gioia 

#art #events #teambuilding #fun #party #sipanddraw #sipandpaint

Name: The University of Arizona School of Music
Description: The University of Arizona School of Music is a premier university experience in an environment of musical excellence!

Name: Académie de Meuron
Description:
L'Académie de Meuron, école d'arts visuels à Neuchâtel, propose un cursus pluridisciplinaire sur deux ans aux personnes désireuses de se lancer dans le domaine des arts visuels et appliqués.

Sa formation de deux ans à plein temps permet d'acquérir des compétences solides dans les disciplines de la création visuelle (dessin, photographie, peinture, graphisme, etc.)
L'Académie prépare ses étudiant·e·s à aborder la suite de leur parcours de formation avec confiance et ambition en leur donnant les outils pour développer une démarche artistique cohérente et de qualité. 

Parallèlement, l'école offre un panel de cours ouvert à toutes et tous. Ces ateliers permettent aux enfants, ados et adultes d'ajouter une dimension créative à leur quotidien tout en développant un apprentissage technique dans la discipline choisie.

Name: JoyRise Art, LLC
Description:
Founded in 2025 by Dr. Mai Chao Duddeck, EdD, JoyRise Art is a creative space where people connect and feel joy rising, because we believe art is medicine.
In a world that rarely slows down, it’s easy to feel exhausted, stressed, and disconnected. JoyRise Art offers a welcoming space for individuals and communities to reconnect, create, and rediscover joy through the arts.

Our Mission
To inspire joy, connection, and well-being for everyone through the arts.

Our Vision
For everyone to experience the joyful power of creativity.

What We Offer
1. JoyRise Art Boxes: Creative kits designed to inspire joy.
2. Weekly Art Classes: Learn new skills, explore themes, and connect through creativity.
3. Artful Gatherings & Conversations: Creative circles that nurture reflection and connection.
4. Artful Journaling & Poetry: Expressive writing to process emotions and spark insight.
5. Consulting: Support for professionals and organizations using the arts to promote engagement, belonging, and community well-being.

At JoyRise Art, we value creativity, belonging, and community wellness. We make the arts a joyful experience because art is more than expression; it’s medicine for the soul and community health.

Name: duCret Center of Art
Description: The duCret Center of Art’s mission is to provide a space for creativity, collaboration, and exploration for people of all ages to experience and appreciate art in its many forms. We strive to create an inclusive art environment that fosters creative expression and encourages meaningful dialogue on art, culture, and the creative process.

Name: Espace Khazna d'Art
Description: Espace Khazna d'Art est un centre culturel et artistique fondé en 2018 et situé à Khaznadar, Bardo, Tunis qui propose des cours et des ateliers d'arts plastiques, de théâtre, de musique, de danse et de méditation. De même, Espace Khazna d'Art organise des évènements culturels et artistiques.

Name: The Visual Arts Center of Punta Gorda
Description: The Visual Arts Center serves Charlotte County and beyond, with three major galleries, 6 classrooms, jewelry, glass, pottery & technology studios, an extensive arts library, Gift Gallery, Art and Supply Store and VAC logo items. Our 12,000 square foot facility provides the best art classes, instructors and exhibit opportunities for the community. Our courses are designed for all ages and skill levels, and we offer classes and workshops in a variety of arts media throughout the year.

Name: Studio Kusi
Description: Pottery studio | Offering pottery workshops and clay parties for kids and adults

Name: ECoS (Espacio Común Sur)
Description: ECoS (Espacio Común Sur) es un espacio donde el aprendizaje artístico se transforma en acción. Ofrecemos cursos, talleres y charlas para explorar el arte contemporáneo, conectándote con una comunidad creativa. Aquí no solo aprendes, sino que también puedes adquirir obras de artistas locales, apoyando su trabajo mientras enriqueces tu colección personal.

Name: Children's Art Classes - Woodbridge, VA
Description: At Children's Art Classes (CAC) - Woodbridge, we offer a curriculum based art education for children ages 3-18. Our programs are available for homeschooling and co-op education, summer art workshops, birthdays and private events, and an after school and weekend art instruction. Our art classes are dedicated to providing children with engaging activities that keeps them busy and gives them a foundation in the arts. As a life long skill, art helps children adopt new hobbies while developing career skills, building confidence, social skills and an appreciation for nature. At CAC - Woodbridge, we offer painting, drawing, design, printmaking, sculpture, ceramics, and much more. Art is the first language and at CAC - Woodbridge, we enhance that language.

Name: Studio H Fine Art
Description: Studio H Fine Art was founded by Iris Heffes, Orange County based artist who is committed to create an atmosphere that fosters imagination and nurtures creativity. Each student is recognized as a unique artist with unlimited potential, and each given profound respect in the studio. The relaxed, open and comfortable environment offered at Studio H Fine Art is the perfect place to grow and earn appreciation for art. A wide range of classes and workshops are offered here so that children, teens and adults may explore endless artistic possibilities. We offer: * Holiday/ weekend workshops   * After school classes for children * Morning and evening classes for adults * Birthday parties/events * Assistance in building an artistic portfolio / Online Art classes / Online Summer Art Csmp / Online Digital Media

Name: The Clay Studio Maldives
Description: Discover your inner artist at The Clay Studio Maldives! Pottery classes and workshops for all skill levels. Solo sessions, team-building events, and more. We also offer handcrafted ceramic ware for purchase. Join us for a fun and creative experience.

Name: FICA Oficina Criativa
Description:
A FICA é uma oficina criativa para criar à mão. Funciona como um espaço criativo onde vários ofícios têm lugar.

Oficinas Dentro da Oficina:
Dentro da oficina criativa, dedicamo-nos principalmente a três ofícios manuais: Cerâmica, Serigrafia e Marcenaria.
Os ofícios da casa, no mesmo espaço, lado a lado.

Feito Aqui:
Na FICA as produções são de pequena escala. Local e manual, à escala da mão.

Oficina de Pequena Escala:
As nossas produções assentam em processos de construção manual e de baixo impacto.
Tendemos a contrariar a velocidade da produção em série, respeitando o processo natural inerente a cada ofício e matéria prima.
Feito à mão, por nós e aqui.

Aprende na FICA:
A FICA é uma oficina para aprender a fazer. Nos nossos workshops pões as mãos na massa.

Aprender e fazer por ti, garantem o perpetuar do saber fazer. Abrimos o portão da oficina para ensinar os processos e técnicas de diversos ofícios.
Na oficina, para além dos workshops mensais de Cerâmica, Marcenaria e Serigrafia, podes aprender outros ofícios.
Na FICA também podes continuar a fazer por ti, no Ginásio de Ofícios.

Team Building:
Para além das formações agendadas, também fazemos workshops privados / team building com os nossos principais ofícios: Cerâmica, Serigrafia e Marcenaria.

Vais conhecer algumas das técnicas básicas, ferramentas manuais e/ou máquinas e metodologia de trabalho inerente ao ofício que escolheres. É adequado para quem não tem conhecimentos prévios e é ideal como primeiro contacto com a técnica.

Segunda a Sexta-feira em Laboral e Pós-Laboral: excepto terça-feira.

Name: Dais Contemporary
Description:
Dais Contemporary is an art consultancy practice based in London. We specialise in procuring, commissioning and curating contemporary art for corporate, public and private spaces in the UK and internationally.

Drawing on over a decade of experience in the art world we work with a wide network of artists and galleries.

At Dais we believe contemporary art can inspire individuals and transform the spaces we inhabit. We work with architects, designers, public and private bodies, alongside whom we help to shape environments that stimulate and support creativity.

Name: Bela Oficina
Description:
A Bela Oficina é um projeto de aprendizagem criativa que ganha vida em diferentes contextos, promovendo a experimentação e a autoexpressão através das artes plásticas, têxteis e outras práticas manuais.

Sou Anabela Teixeira Marques, artista e formadora, e criei este projeto para partilhar saberes, inspirar criatividade e proporcionar momentos de descoberta e conexão com os materiais e as técnicas. Acredito na importância do tempo, do processo e do fazer manual como caminho para o crescimento pessoal e o bem-estar.

Mais do que ensinar, a Bela Oficina é um convite à experimentação livre, ao prazer de criar com as próprias mãos e à alegria de transformar ideias em algo único e autêntico.

Aberta a colaborações e projetos criativos!

Name: L'École(s) du Sud
Description:
Le réseau L'École(s) du Sud est une association qui vise à construire et valoriser la coopération des établissements membres dans les domaines de l'enseignement, de la recherche, de l'accompagnement de la création et de l'insertion professionnelle des jeunes diplômés. Il a également pour objectif de renforcer le rayonnement des écoles en région, au niveau national et international, d'accroître leur visibilité auprès des professionnels et du public, de développer une communication commune, ainsi que de proposer un ensemble d'actions et d'outils mutualisés.

Il est constitué de huit écoles membres : 
- École des Beaux-Arts de Nîmes
- École nationale supérieure de photographie d’Arles
- École supérieure d’art d’Aix-en-Provence
- École supérieure d’art d’Avignon
- École supérieure d’art et design Toulon Provence Méditerranée
- Beaux-Arts de Marseille - Campus art Méditerranée
- Pavillon Bosio, Monaco
- Villa Arson, Nice

Name: LeClu Music and Art School
Description: We provide art education and make it available and affordable to everyone who has the desire to learn.  Piano, guitar, ukulele, violin, singing, drawing and painting, music productions, dance and more.

Name: xBekran | پلتفرم جامع هنر | بکران
Description:
ما به هنرمندان، کیوریتورها، محققان و علاقهمندان به فرهنگ و هنر کمک میکنیم تا به موقع از رزیدنسیها، گرنتها، نمایشگاهها، بورسیهها، ورکشاپها معتبر جهانی باخبر شوند.

در دنیایی که اطلاعات پراکنده و پیچیدهاند، بکران تلاش میکند پلی باشد میان هنرمندان فارسیزبان و نهادهای هنری جهانی. مأموریت ما فقط اطلاعرسانی نیست؛ بلکه ساختن یک جامعه آگاه، جسور و جهانیشده از هنرمندان است که بتوانند مسیر خود را حرفهایتر، بینالمللیتر و مستقلتر پیش ببرند.

Name: Liceul de Arte „Corneliu Baba” Bistrita
Description: Liceul de Arte Corneliu Baba reprezintă locul unde se promovează valori, unde se apreciază creativitatea, originalitatea, este refugiul din calea rutinei, a uniformizării și a kitsch-ului.

Name: Art'njoy
Description: We make a piece of art and enjoy it.

Name: Fondazione Il Bisonte
Description:
La Fondazione Il Bisonte è una realtà storica fiorentina fortemente radicata nel territorio e tra i maggiori protagonisti della scena artistica del Novecento a Firenze. Fondato nel 1959 da Maria Luigia Guaita, Carlo Ludovico Ragghianti e Enrico Vallecchi, Il Bisonte rappresenta un unicum nel campo della grafica d’arte a livello nazionale e un’eccellenza artistica riconosciuta in tutto il mondo. Soffici, Carrà, Severini, Maccari, Pomodoro, Scanavino, Carmassi furono tra i primi artisti invitati da Maria Luigia Guaita a realizzare le proprie opere in edizioni litografiche, a cui seguirono Moore, Calder, Arroyo, Matta, Picasso e molti altri.
La Fondazione si estende su una superficie di circa 700 mq distribuiti su tre edifici nel centro storico di Firenze e attualmente si articola in: una scuola internazionale dotata di 8 laboratori tecnici, una galleria d’arte, una biblioteca specializzata, l’archivio storico e l’archivio corrente delle donazioni.
La scuola internazionale, erede delle attrezzature, della tradizione e dello spirito della stamperia omonima, opera dal 1983 nel quartiere di San Niccolò formando allievi in grado non solo di applicare le tecniche e i processi incisori ma anche di insegnarli a loro volta e gestire un laboratorio di stampa.
Ad oggi la Fondazione Il Bisonte ha ampliato la sua offerta configurandosi a tutti gli effetti come un hub culturale e creativo, spazio generativo di formazione e produzione artistica in grado di coniugare l’arte del “saper fare” artistico con le istanze espressive più contemporanee.

Name: ATELIER D'ART
Description: Somos un espacio conformado por artistas mexicanos con más de 30 años de experiencia. En 2017 nos consolidamos como un colectivo cultural, enfocado en promover el desarrollo artístico de la comunidad a través de la educación, la creación y la difusión de diversas formas de arte.

Name: Pudgy's Place
Description:
At Pudgy's Place, we're reimagining art education and community involvement: We offer pottery classes, clay workshops, paint nights, studio membership, and more! 

Our studio is more than just a place to create; it's a haven where innovation, collaboration, and self-expression come together.

Art classes involve not only unlocking the fundamental drawing skills of your child but also improving your child’s handwriting with drawing exercises, exploring the creativity and guiding the child to use his own imagination to create beautiful drawings

Description: La Fondation Mablé Agbodan a à coeur d’améliorer les conditions de vie socio-économique des jeunes et des femmes, voire la communauté à la base en générale, par la promotion des métiers des arts, du design et de l’artisanat.
