Name: Austin Arts Academy
Description: We change Music, Art, and Dance lessons from rigid or boring to fun and engaging — an experience students will love! Private and group lessons are offered in Austin, TX, for a variety of instruments, art mediums, and dance styles.

Name: Sahab for Art | سحاب للفنون
Description: Sahab is an NGO that founded by 5 talented people from different backgrounds related to the arts. We are developing our local community and supporting young artistic talents through workshops, exhibitions and other artistic activities in Libya. We also work to provide the supplies that young people need in order to make their art.

Name: sundays in la
Description: We believe that incredible things happen when creatives from diverse thought backgrounds come together. Makers, artists, filmmakers, researchers, founders, unconventional thinkers movers, and shakers are dispersed throughout USC with few things tying them together. One thing they each share in common is that on Sundays, they're working on the things that excite them. We built a home for them to come together as a collective. To learn, grow, and pursue - together.

Name: Hamilton Craft Studios
Description: Hamilton Craft Studios is a company based out of 121 Princess Street 2nd & 3rd Floors, Hamilton, Ontario, Canada.

Name: MACTA
Description: MACTA is here to accompany our children on the journey of searching for the true meaning of life, through Creativity and Art

Name: Atelier School of Art and Design
Description: Atelier School of Art and Design started its journey in 2018 and since then it has been successfully training students of different age groups in Fine Arts (Drawing, Painting, and Digital Art) and providing entry test preparation classes for different art schools in Pakistan and abroad.

Name: Quest Art School + Gallery
Description: Quest Art provides an inspiring and creative hub for all ages and skill levels in the community. As a community gallery and art school, our mission is to "Inspire, Create, Explore and Innovate" and to reach as many community members as possible. We are an open, friendly and a comfortable space for everyone from beginners to professional artists and are proud to offer the space and resources to enable all demographics to create at their own pace and comfort level.

Name: Breraut Restauri SRLS
Description:
Servizio di restauro artistico.
Specializzazione nei settori lapideo, pittorico e cartaceo

Name: Divine English School & Junior College Kalher
Description: Divine English School & Junior College, located in Kalher, is an esteemed educational institution offering comprehensive primary and junior education.

Name: Umpqua Valley Arts Association
Description:
Umpqua Valley Arts (UVA) is a cultural organization in the heart of the rural Umpqua Valley. Supporting regional art and artists, UVA provides the community with opportunities to receive quality education in lasting techniques and share their work with others. Our campus houses six gallery spaces, separate clay and multimedia studios, and a gift shop featuring local handcrafted items.

UVA is a community organization that operates with a mission to create and foster a climate that supports arts appreciation, participation, and education. The generous support of those it serves through annual membership, individual donations, business sponsorships, program fees, and public and private grants, is what keeps UVA’s vibrant program alive.

Name: MUMA
Description:
MUMS + Art
Members Club / MUMS & Contemporary Art for Cool Kids

Name: Me(n)talize Joias
Description:
Transforme suas ideias em joias exclusivas!

Na Me(n)talize, oferecemos cursos especializados em modelagem de joias em cera, onde o processo criativo e o aprendizado técnico se encontram.

Name: Rising Voices Arts Community
Description:
MISSION
We are an inclusive and affirming arts community that welcomes all and intentionally empowers disenfranchised, underrepresented, marginalized, and underserved communities by teaching students to find and amplify their voices through theatre and the arts.  

VISION
We provide a self-sufficient and enduring community that prepares students to use their voices to navigate an unknown and challenging future. 

We address the challenging issues relevant to our students and communities, providing a space that allows respectful discourse through art, even when that discourse is difficult.

DIVERSITY STATEMENT
We believe there is strength in diversity; therefore, we reject discrimination of any kind. We actively affirm and include all people in our community. 

Diversity is represented throughout all areas of our organization, including our staff and board members. 

We do not engage in typecasting, including but not limited to sexual orientation, gender identity, and ethnicity.

We select plays written by and representing diverse perspectives.

We intentionally select plays that reflect our current student population.

Name: Castle Arts
Description:
At Castle Arts our mission is to inspire artistic growth and learning in our students. We prioritize the fundamental principles of art and encourage students to explore their imaginations and create unique, innovative works that reflect their personal narratives and connections to the world.



The classes offered by Castle Arts include group and mixed-level courses, taught by teachers who hold degrees in the arts and have extensive experience working with children of all ages. All of Castle Arts' teachers are currently practicing artists or current teachers in the Ontario School Board.



Our curriculum focuses on developing students' artistic techniques and nurturing their creativity through a variety of drawing and painting projects. Additionally, students have the opportunity to experiment with new mediums, such as sculpture and craft projects, during holiday art projects.



Alongside our standard classes, we provide art camps, workshops, and opportunities to exhibit artwork outside of the facility, creating a community-building environment.

Our ultimate goal is to help our students enhance their artistic techniques and foster their creative skills, ultimately leading to a confident and positive outlook towards visual arts!

Name: ethereal
Description:
Ethereal studio i akademija predstavlja spoj vizualne magije i stručnog znanja u oblasti arhitektonske vizualizacije. Oslanjajući se na najnovije tehnologije i inovativne pristupe, pretačemo vaše ideje u stvarnost, dajući im život kroz impresivne, pritom realistične rendere i 3D modele. S ponosom predstavljamo našu Akademiju vizualizacije u arhitekturi, mjesto gdje budući talenti mogu oblikovati svoje vještine i postati lideri u svetu vizualizacije. Ukoliko težite izvrsnosti i želite da vaš projekat zablista u najboljem svjetlu, Ethereal je vaš partner u ostvarivanju te vizije.

Ethereal studio represents a fusion of visual magic and expert knowledge in the realm of architectural visualization. Harnessing the latest technologies and innovative approaches, we transform your ideas into reality, breathing life into them with stunning renders and 3D models. We're proud to introduce our Academy of Architectural Visualization, a place where future talents can hone their skills and rise as leaders in the world of visualization. If you strive for excellence and wish your project to shine in its best light, Ethereal is your partner in realizing that vision.

Name: College of Fine Arts - Wichita State University
École La Voix Chantée
Description: Venez découvrir tout le potentiel de votre voix chantée. L'école La Voix Chantée enseigne le chant pop et lyrique à travers ses programmes, ses cours, ses sessions de coaching et ses bilans vocaux destinés aux chanteurs et chanteuses de tout niveau en plus d'offrir un accompagnement en gestion de carrière musicale.

Name: ART HUB ATX
Description:
ART HUB ATX is an Art studio and gallery featuring over 140 artists. 
We are open to the public Every Second Saturday for our open studio. 
We have an Art school with art classes fit for all ages, ideas, and experience levels.
The MUSE gallery is open every Third Thursday for our gallery showcase. We are by appointment during normal business hours. 
The MUSE Gallery is available for rent through Peer Space."

Name: Clayworx: Ceramic Arts Learning Centre
Description: As a charitable arts organization, Clayworx offers exceptional education programs in ceramic arts for all ages, an open clay studio for artists, and exciting community-building experiences with clay.

Name: Chester Art Centre NS
Description:
The Chester Art Centre was founded in April 2007 to enhance and encourage artistic opportunities in the Municipality of Chester, Nova Scotia.
 
The Chester Art Centre offers a wide range of exhibits year-round in a classic Chester cottage which features a main floor exhibition space, accessible bathroom and is fully licensed ; the upstairs is the Art Centre office. The Chester Art Centre Annex at 5 Pleasant street offers a varied and experiential range of classes and workshops for children and adults. We also offer art experiences throughout the community.

The Chester Art Centre sponsors the hugely successful Chester Creates, an exciting free two-day festival highlighted by a featured month-long exhibition, stimulating demonstrations and art experiences, live music, and a chance to meet local and regional artists and buy their works.

We finance the Art Centre and our educational efforts through art classes, the art fair and festival, and the generous contributions of supporters, sponsors and various government programs.

We partner with the Recreation Department of the Municipality of Chester and have co-ventured on programs with the Chester Playhouse, Chester Elementary School, Chester Area Middle School, the Chester Municipal Heritage Society, the Ross Farm Museum, Our Health Centre and more.

Name: Radius Art Studio
Description:
Radius Art Studio is a creative community offering ceramics workshops, clay studio memberships, and a handmade retail shop. Our vision is to offer work space and ceramics education for all skill levels in a fun and supportive environment.

We believe that creativity is power, and our vision is to provide opportunities for everyone to explore that power within themselves. We are artists, makers, and friends who welcome the contributions and perspectives of all people.

We also partner with other artists and art organizations to cross promote art events and workshops beyond the medium of clay.

Radius began in an apartment in 2002, with a simple mission of offering art classes to the local community. This mission continues today under the vision and stewardship of Korin Noelle. Korin joined the studio as an artist in 2008, and became owner/operator of this iconic Portland establishment in 2014.

In October of 2021, Radius Art Studio moved from our Morrison studio and our Burnside Annex shop and opened up the current studio space located at 2324 SE Belmont St.

Name: Glassworks Studio
Description:
Glassworks Studio, in Downtown Morristown, NJ, was the first walk-in all glass fusing studio open to the public, novice and artist alike. Since then, Glassworks has grown, transitioned, improved and refined the experience.

No experience is necessary and all ages are welcome. The trained and friendly associates will teach you all that you need to know to get started. Glassworks is a great space for people to gather and to spend quality time together - and you will create a wonderful glass product. Glassworks hosts groups, team events, birthday parties, and more, as well as offering open studio time, and creating custom commission pieces.

Name: K's Art Genesis
Description:
K’s Art Genesis is where creativity knows no bounds — for kids and adults alike! 

Whether you're picking up a paintbrush for the first time, diving into a corporate team-building art workshop, or looking for a unique commissioned piece, we’re here to help you unleash your inner artist. Our art classes and workshops are designed to bring out the childlike joy in every participant, sparking imagination, exploration, and fun in every stroke.

We offer:

- Art Workshops for Adults – Tap into your creativity and discover a new hobby.
- Art Classes for Kids – Fun, interactive classes that inspire young minds.
- Corporate Art Workshops – Team-building experiences that encourage collaboration and creative problem-solving.
- Custom Commissioned Art – Unique artwork created just for you.

At K’s Art Genesis, we believe that everyone has an artist inside waiting to be discovered. So come on in, get messy, and let your creativity run wild!

Join us to create, learn, and rediscover the joy of art, no matter your age!

Name: Lux Escola de Teatro
Description: Lux Escola de Teatro is an e-learning company based out of Rua Nova Cidade, São Paulo, Sp, Brazil.

Name: KalaKeerti Art Studio
Description: Welcome to KalaKeerti Art Studio, led by artist Vaishali Agrawal. We offer a welcoming space for people of all ages and abilities to explore art.

Name: AJ Acoustic Muisc
Description:
At AJ Music, our curriculum is designed to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of music theory, history, and performance. We believe in fostering a well-rounded education that not only enhances musical skills but also instills values such as love, kindness, and respect towards others.

Through our engaging programs, we focus on developing social etiquette, personal style, and essential skills in the music world. Our goal is to empower students to express themselves through music while cultivating a deep appreciation for the art form.

Join us in our mission to inspire the next generation of musicians and foster a vibrant musical community!

Name: Megan Adams Fine Art
Description: Megan's artwork is a reflection of life experiences and the cultural context that fits into.

Name: Institute for the Creative Arts - Fort Smith, AR
Description:
Welcome to the first Performing & Visual Arts High School in Arkansas! We combine a rigorous college prep program with pre-professional training in the arts. ICA offers programs in dance, film, music, theatre, creative writing, culinary, and visual art.

Our students spend half of their school day in art classes and half of their day in academics.  Professional artist-teachers work daily with the students to train, coach, and prepare each student for the next level and beyond. Not only are students becoming excellent artists, they are also building life skills such as discipline, teamwork, communication, and time management, all within a nurturing, creative, and safe environment. 

What is the result of all of this?

This kind of school produces students who love to be there, do well in their grades, and virtually all of them graduate from high school. Many students go on to Broadway, television, film, dance, art, and other major arts fields, while some become doctors, lawyers, or corporate leaders.

This is a special place indeed! So, come on!  Join us for the most wonderful high school experience you could ever imagine!

Name: Feagin's Fretboard
Description: Feagins Fretboard is a Music School based out of the Civano Neighborhood in Tucson, Arizona.

Name: Niños que Dibujan
Description:
Clases de arte y dibujo online para niños y jóvenes
Motivamos a los niños de 6 a 18 años a aprender nuevas técnicas y usar todo su poder creativo en los proyectos que más les apasionan
La Aventura de Crear

Name: Moving Forward Teaching Academy
Description:
A Moving Forward Teaching Academy é uma academia de formação direccionada para o ensino de professores de dança.
Disponibiliza um curso orientado para professores de dança, no qual os alunos se preparam devidamente para os seus exames de Pré-Associate, Associate, Level 4 diploma, Licentiate e/ou Fellowships.
Os cursos ministrados pela academia são reconhecidos pela IDTA - International Dance Teachers Association - e dão acesso aos exames desta instituição.

Name: LACA | Art Academy
Description:
LACA is a Singapore-based Art Academy, specialising in fine arts courses. We hope to make quality fine arts courses accessible to everyone.

We welcome hobbyists, art enthusiasts, and serious learners to pursue the craft of drawing and painting with us.

Through our lessons, we hope our students can leave with confidence in their skills.

Di edisi ke-15 ini, kami mengusung tema "Feel the Same" untuk merayakan kekuatan seni dalam menyatukan, membangkitkan empati, dan memungkinkan kita berbagi rasa serta pengalaman yang serupa. Our vision at Shiny Colors is to offer a robust platform for artists to express themselves and to support their development and promotion within the art community. To achieve these objectives, we engage in various activities:

Name: Prosjektskolen Kunstskole
Description:
Prosjektskolen er en 1-/2-årig kunstskole i sentrum av Oslo som er drevet av aktive samtidskunstnere og tilbyr et bredt spekter av gjestelærere. Etablert som Norges første kunstskole med fokus på det tredimensjonale, kombinert med nyere medier og eksperimentelle uttrykk.

Prosjektskolen er en toårig kunstskole drevet av aktive samtidskunstnere, og tilbyr et bredt spekter av gjestelærere og foredragsholdere. Skolen, som ble etablert i 2005, tilbyr en unik undervisningsmodell innen kunstfag, hvor kunstens muligheter fremfor begrensninger står i sentrum. Utdanningen gir inngående kunnskap og forståelse av kunst, med hovedtyngde på samtidskunsten. Elevene gis rom til å utvikle sin egen originalitet og selvstendighet, derfor står eksperimentering og samtidskunst i fokus, fremfor klassiske øvelser og fastlagte stilretninger.

Noen kurs fokuserer på metoder, så som installasjon, scenografi, video, lyd og performance. Andre kurs tar for seg mer innholdsmessig betonte temaer som politisk kunst, stedsspesifikk kunst, bodyart, teori og filosofi osv. I tillegg har vi kurs som tar for seg kunstretninger som
surrealisme, konseptualisme og postmodernisme. Det er også kortere kurs i forskjellige skulpturelle teknikker og innføring i bruk av verksteder, mørkerom og datapark.

Hvert kurs starter med en felles innføring i det aktuelle tema via foredrag, billed- og filmfremvisning, presentasjon av relaterte kunstnere og utstillinger, oppgaver og diskusjoner. Relatert til det aktuelle tema jobber studentene selvstendig med eget prosjekt frem mot en intern utstilling, og felles gjennomgang som kursavslutning.

Fundada em 23 de março de 2024, o objetivo da Liga é pesquisar de forma autônoma entre os discentes de Artes e devolver, de alguma forma, para a comunidade nosso estudo com oficinas, workshops, palestrar e aulas abertas.

Name: Metropolitan Youth Ballet of Indiana
Description: Metropolitan Youth Ballet of Indiana is a pre-professional ballet school dedicated to developing dancers to their fullest potential as both artists and community members. Our academy environment is one of inclusivity and mutual support, and the studio is a place for dancers to learn, connect, and be inspired. Our highly qualified professional faculty offers training to dancers of all levels, ages 3-18, in ballet technique, pointe, pas de deux, character, contemporary, and jazz. Additional programming includes Boys Ballet, Day Program, Soloist Initiative, Summer Camps and Summer Intensives. All students are offered outstanding performance opportunities annually, including two full-length classical ballets, a student showcase, and community outreach performances.

Name: OU Helmerich School of Drama
Description: The University of Oklahoma Helmerich School of Drama, the second oldest in the nation, offers performance-centered, professional programs designed to prepare students to successfully move forward to the next level of their career development.

Name: Livyatan - לווייתן
Description:
Livyatan is an institute for arts and creative development operating at Beit Avni in the Noga district of Tel Aviv–Jaffa, offering a living space for inquiry, creation, and discovery. We believe that artistic learning is not merely technique or content, but a human process of observation, connection, and transformation-both personal and communal.

Livyatan is a home for people who create and those who wish to create: artists, learners, beginners and experienced makers, lovers of craft and culture, and anyone who feels that artistic practice nourishes their inner life. The institute nurtures a learning community of art, body–mind practices, traditional crafts, technologies, culture, and hands-on “do-it-yourself” skills-a community that places practical work and human encounter at its center.

We offer a range of interwoven learning formats: daily sessions, short workshops, long-term courses, and multidisciplinary learning journeys. All of these unfold through movement, attentiveness, reciprocity, and the belief that meaningful learning happens when we allow the encounter itself to guide us.
Our program spans visual arts, live performance, screen-based media, music, movement, craft preservation, new technologies, body-mind practices, wellbeing, and broad cultural exploration. Alongside open learning environments, we offer personal guidance that helps each participant shape a deep, individualized learning path.

Livyatan operates through a non-academic approach: there is no hierarchy between teachers and learners-everyone is an equal participant in the shared space. We view creativity as a healing force, community as a resource, and collaboration as a way of life.
Our work aims to cultivate a space that embraces high and low art, ancient traditions and new technologies, critical thinking and practical action-all held within a human, gentle, and attentive ethos, enabling people to create, breathe, think, and meet one another.

Name: Love Art Studios
Description:
Love Art Studios offers a diverse range of creative freedom art sessions in rural locations in Mid Sussex, catering to individuals of all ages and backgrounds. Our approach is person-centered, focusing on providing a therapeutic and safe environment where participants can build confidence and connect through art.

Operating from a portable artist studio stocked with a wide variety of quality art materials, we offer highly skilled and passionate facilitators who share their expertise with our participants. Our services include:

Primary school after-school and holiday clubs

Small in-person group sessions for home education or those out of school

Art sessions in care homes for individuals living with dementia

Adult painting, drawing, and printing classes

Youth club activities for organisations like Brownies and Guides

1:1 support for individuals with special educational needs and disabilities (SEND)

Annual fundraising events for local community initiatives, such as the Hassocks food bank and Ditchling school

We also provide whole or half-day arts weeks in schools, enrichment activities in secondary schools and well-being events focused on promoting mental wellness through creative expression. Our goal is to create a safe space where people can connect, learn new techniques, and share ideas, with as much or as little support as needed.

Love Art Studios is committed to fostering intergenerational work and is open to creative collaborations and opportunities to expand our reach and impact within the community. Join us at an art session to explore the transformative power of art and building meaningful connections through creativity.

Description:
Welcome to Kitsap Art Center!
For more than 23 years, Kitsap Art Center has been the premier provider of art education on the Kitsap Peninsula, empowering students of all ages in our community to discover their personal artistry and expression. We provide high-quality fine art instruction in a variety of media, welcoming all skill levels with the goal of bringing the community together through creativity.

Kitsap Art Center is a based out of Silverdale, Washington, United States.

Name: IIFA - International Institute of Fine Arts, Modinagar
ArtWave
Description:
Welcome to ArtWave!
Our mission is to foster a sense of community through the exploration of creativity.

ArtWave was established in Johannesburg, South Africa, by young designers Tariro Kandawasvika and Jolene Forlee. Both of us come from a formal background in Architecture. It gave us the skills to explore and execute fearlessly anything we wanted. Our collective history and experiences slowly transitioned from traditional to digital art, graphic design, fashion design, photography, and 3D game asset design. 

This itch for creativity and our sudden transitions into exploring more digital creative mediums led us to start ArtWave. We believe that art-making is the foundation for building our creativity, personal growth, and self-expression. What better way to do it than as a community with us?

We currently provide art workshops, and hosting private art events. We welcome both beginners and experienced artists. It can boost a sense of community, and they can experience how freeing art-making can be.

We're excited to share our love of art with you and invite you to join us at ArtWave. Let's create something beautiful together!

Name: Rèunion Freetown
Description:
We are a registered art organization based in Freetown, Sierra Leone, and  part of a global network of independent artist-run spaces. 

We promote self-reliant and financially independent youths in the visual arts sector by identifying local artists, profiling, branding, and commercializing their crafts, whilst promoting the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) through arts.

Name: Ladislav Sutnar Faculty of Design and Art, University of West Bohemia, Pilsen
Description:
The Ladislav Sutnar Faculty of Design and Art is part of the University of West Bohemia in Pilsen.
We are a creative and academic community where art meets design, theory meets practice, and tradition meets innovation.

Named after visionary designer Ladislav Sutnar, we build on his legacy with courage, openness, and a strong focus on relevance and impact.

We offer degree programs in 21 art and design studios and support interdisciplinary, international, and research-driven collaboration.

Name: Escola de Artes do Spanta
Description:
Espaço sociocultural com o propósito de promover, por meio da arte, novos caminhos à cidadania para crianças e adolescentes da Favela Santa Marta. Criada em 2009, a Escola de Artes do Spanta oferece aulas de música, expressão corporal e artes cênicas, além de atividades complementares e socioeducativas como rodas de conversas, acompanhamento psicossocial e orientação vocacional.

O projeto, que já atendeu mais de 700 crianças e adolescentes, realiza, anualmente, campanhas de solidariedade como Spantando o Frio, que entregou agasalhos, meias e vestuário em geral a moradores da comunidade; e Spantando o Corona, que vem distribuindo cestas básicas a famílias do Santa Marta, além de materiais de limpeza e de higiene pessoal.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Meraki-Fine Arts Club,ICT Mumbai
Description:
The Fine Arts Club of ICT Mumbai is open to all individuals, regardless of their skill level or background in the arts. Whether you are a seasoned artist or just starting your artistic journey, our club provides a welcoming and nurturing space for you to explore your passion for the arts.
IIf you have a love for creativity and a desire to be part of a dynamic artistic community, we invite you to join the Fine Arts Club. Together, let's celebrate the transformative power of art and unleash our imagination to create something truly extraordinary.

Name: St Germain des Arts
Description:
École d'arts tous niveaux et tous âges au cœur du quartier St Germain des Prés à Paris. Stages enfants et ados pendant les vacances scolaires.

Name: Edmond Fine Arts
Description:
Edmond’s nonprofit community arts organization offering educational enrichment in visual and performing arts for adults and children.

EFA provides quality arts experiences that educates, raises cultural awareness, makes art accessible and exciting, offers entertainment, cultivates stable resources, and advocates in the community so everyone can discover their talents and expand their appreciation of the arts.

Name: Centre d'Art Ygrec-ENSAPC
Description:
Ygrec est le centre d’art de l’École Nationale Supérieure d’Arts de Paris-Cergy. Après vingt ans d’existence à Paris, Ygrec ENSAPC a ouvert ses nouveaux espaces à Aubervilliers. 

En 2000, l’École nationale supérieure d’arts de Paris-Cergy se dote d’un lieu d’exposition intitulé « La Vitrine » situé à Paris, dans le 11ème arrondissement, rue Moret. Le projet élit ensuite domicile rue Louise Weiss dans le 13ème arrondissement où il prend le nom de Ygrec (soit « Cergy » à l’envers). A l’été 2016, Ygrec s’installe au cœur du laboratoire urbain et social des Grands Voisins, projet d’occupation temporaire du site de l’ancien hôpital Saint-Vincent-de-Paul, avant d’inaugurer, début 2020, un nouvel espace d’exposition à Aubervilliers. L’action du centre d’art se déploie également à l’occasion de projets hors-les-murs, en partenariat avec de nombreuses structures et événements.

Ygrec accueille les formes actuelles de la création contemporaine. Sa programmation s’articule d’une part autour de propositions artistiques développées en collaboration avec les enseignant.e.s, les étudiant.e.s et les diplômé.e.s de l’ENSAPC et d’autre part d’expositions et d’évènements élaborés à partir d’invitations adressées à des artistes et commissaires d’exposition venu.e.s de tous les continents.

Name: Ohio Northern University Art & Design
Description:
Ohio Northern has a rich history of academic excellence. The art & design program offers the Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Fine Arts degrees with several major programs of study including graphic design, art education, studio arts, and pre-art therapy. ONU students gain practical experiences through internships, exhibitions, student teaching, study abroad, workshops, conferences, and practicums that provide hands-on learning.

The art and design program also offers students engagement in a number of student organizations, including pre-professional groups, domestic study opportunities, outreach events, gallery exhibits, and portfolio reviews. Students and alumni have won the AICUO Excellence in the Visual Arts Award, the NACU Student Excellence Award, AIGA [Re]Design Award, American Graphic Design and Advertising awards, the American Advertising Federation ADDY awards, a Bluetooth Breakthrough Award finalist, Art Teacher of the Year awards, Kappa Pi scholarship winners, numerous juried show awards, and Twice Ten awards.

Name: Tierra Agencia

Une dizaine de disciplines y est pratiquée : peinture, gravure, sculpture, céramique, dessin, photographie, techniques mixtes, bande dessinée…

Name: Peters Valley School of Craft
Description: Peters Valley School of Craft is a nonprofit, tax-exempt organization located in the beautiful Delaware Water Gap National Recreation Area of New Jersey. Founded in 1970, the school offers immersion learning workshops for adults and youth in blacksmithing, ceramics, fibers, fine metals, photography, woodworking, printmaking, and special topics. In addition, Peters Valley supports artist residencies, outreach programs, public lectures, and gallery exhibitions, and continues to be a national thought leader in the field.

Description: Para quem gosta de música e deseja que ela faça parte de sua vida, aqui é o lugar certo. Aulas individuais ou em grupo em uma estrutura com salas acústicas, formação de bandas e produção artística dos alunos.

Name: Den Kreative Skole Silkeborg
Description: På Den Kreative Skole i Silkeborg brænder vi for, at børn, unge og voksne må møde de kreative fag. Vi ved nemlig, at det er et springbræt for både livsenergi og menneskelig udvikling at få mulighed for at lukke op for kreativitet og musiske udtryk! Derfor har vi et stort udbud af forskellige fag inden for kunstarterne musik, dans, billedkunst og teater.

Name: Rooster Studios Tattoo
Description:
After the loss of a close Army buddy, I turned to what truly drove me to become a better person and fulfilled my spiritual needs: ART. Over the years, my artistic journey has evolved, taking me from oil painting and acrylics on canvas to crafting custom alpaca rugs and needle-felting figurines. Friends and supporters have fueled my passion by buying my pieces, inspiring me to create even more.

This artistic exploration eventually led me back to something I started many years ago: tattooing. I never imagined it would take off the way it has. Leaving the corporate world behind, I chose to focus on individual people, one person at a time, changing lives through ink therapy. 

Rooster Studios Tattoo is just the beginning of this incredible journey, and I'd love for you to join me on this adventure. If you're ready to transform your life through art, give me a call and schedule your session today.

Stand out. Be bold. Let's shake things up together.

Name: Passion Art Gallery for Teaching & Selling Fine Art
Description:
Passion Art Gallery, founded by sisters Bayan and Mariam AlQassab, is where creativity meets collaboration.

We specialize in providing corporates with unique experiences that bring teams closer, inspire innovation, and create lasting connections. Through the power of art, we help organizations strengthen employee relationships, support CSR and ESG initiatives, and foster a culture of creativity and wellbeing.

Our Services include:
Corporate Events & Team-Building – interactive art sessions designed to enhance collaboration and communication
CSR & ESG Initiatives – creative projects that align with corporate values and community engagement
Customized Art Experiences – tailored workshops and private sessions that fit your team’s needs
Fine Art & Commissions by Mariam AlQassab – exclusive artworks that add meaning and character to corporate spaces

At Passion, we believe art is a powerful tool for connection, and we partner with top-tier corporates in Bahrain to make every project impactful and memorable.

Name: Ilustrasee
Description:
JADILAH ILUSTRATOR PROFESIONAL!
Kembangkan hobi menggambarmu menjadi karir yang menghasilkan lewat sekolah ilustrasi dan koneksi komunitas ilustrator.

Name: Pinaki Palette
Description:
Art is powerful. A painting can take you to different places and can make you feel strong.
I am a Passionate artist specializing in landscape and seascape paintings.  Transforming emotions into vibrant art.  Available for commissions and delighted to share my artistic journey with you. Explore the beauty of nature through my Art.

Name: Sara Elizabeth Centre
Description:
At the Sara Elizabeth Centre (SEC)we provide inclusive art-based programming for young adults with special needs that highlight the unique talents of all our participants in a welcoming, friendly and safe environment.

We offer a variety of fun, creative, inclusive, and interactive art-based programs that focus on everyone’s abilities… not their disabilities. All our programs are designed to minimize barriers, increase awareness within the community, celebrate individual success and promote the overall well-being for each participant.

At SEC, we help to assure the families that they are not alone in this journey of raising a child with special needs.  We work together with our parents and collaborate with SEC support personnel to design individualized educational arts-based programs for the young adults who cannot attend post-secondary programs or access employment opportunities.

Name: LIKHANG BATA CREATIVITY CENTER
Description:
Established in 2010, LIKHANG BATA started as an independent summer art workshop curriculum organized by Art Teacher and homeschooling mother of four, Teacher Dindi Besinga-Manlapaz. 
Likhang Bata eventually evolved into a Creativity Center that provides a year-round art appreciation curriculum for toddlers to pre-teens. At present, we also organize Art events with various family-oriented business establishments and educational institutions and coordinate charity-oriented projects dedicated to Visual Arts.

Name: Artísticamente Art Academy
Description: Artisticamente Art Academy es una academia de artes plásticas para adultos y niños a partir de 4 años, situada en el barrio de Sevilla Este. Aprendemos las técnicas más relevantes, impartimos cursos especializados, talleres familiares y damos rienda suelta a la creatividad. Artistas del pasado y del presente servirán de inspiración y aprendizaje. Sean ustedes bienvenidos!

Name: AtelierMCL
Description:
Découvrez l’Atelier MCL !

Votre partenaire pour transformer vos espaces de vie en véritables œuvres d’art ! Dès maintenant, l’atelier propose un service à domicile de création de fresques murales sur mesure, afin de rendre vos espaces uniques et inspirants. Spécialisé dans les fresques murales personnalisées et le conseil en architecture d’intérieur, l’Atelier vous accompagne pour concevoir des intérieurs qui vous ressemblent. Fusionnons art et design pour donner vie à vos idées. Contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui pour concrétiser vos projets d’aménagement !

Name: Sementeira - histórias em transformação
Description:
A Sementeira é uma iniciativa social que cria espaços intencionais para pessoas contarem - e aprenderem a contar - histórias. Pra isso criamos e oferecemos experiências artísticas e pedagógicas ao redor das histórias e ao fazer isso oferecemos a possibilidade de que pessoas, comunidades e empresas:

- se conectem e se encantem com suas próprias histórias de passado, presente e de futuro.
- se comuniquem com mais clareza, assertividade e criatividade.
- se sintam confiantes e inspirem confiança.
- escutem com atenção e profundidade
- percebam vieses (os seus e de outres)
- criem e comuniquem visões inspiradoras para conduzir mudanças.
- colaborem e lidem melhor com conflitos.
- fomentem a diversidade e a inclusão.
- façam boas perguntas.
- se percebam interconectadas com tudo que há e por isso, cuidam de si, das pessoas à sua volta e do planeta.

Name: Kalakriti NIET
Description:
Kalakriti is the official fine arts and paint club at NIET that provides a platform for students to explore their creativity and artistic talents. The club offers a variety of activities and events, including art exhibitions, workshops, competitions, and cultural performances. Kalakriti is open to all students, regardless of their artistic experience or skill level. 

 Our objectives are:
• To encourage and promote fine arts among the students of NIET.
• To provide opportunities for students to learn and develop their artistic skills.
• To organize and conduct various art events and activities.
• To create a platform for students to showcase their artistic talents.

 Kalakriti organizes a variety of events and activities throughout the year, including:
• Art exhibitions
• Workshops
• Competitions
• Art walks

 How to Join
To join Kalakriti Club, simply contact the club president or any of the executive members. You can find their contact information on the club's social media pages.

Let's Unleash our inner artist together

Name: By 2 sisters workshops
Description:

naai workshops, workshops schilderen op canvas en workshops kaarsen beschilderen.

Wij zijn Lianne en Carola, twee zussen met een passie voor creativiteit en het delen van onze kennis. Samen organiseren wij een reeks inspirerende workshops, waar jij je creativiteit kunt ontdekken, ontwikkelen en tot leven kunt brengen!

Of je nu een beginner bent of al ervaring hebt, onze workshops zijn voor iedereen die graag wil leren en experimenteren in een gezellige, ondersteunende omgeving. Van schilderen en naaien tot andere creatieve projecten: wij bieden een gevarieerd aanbod waarin je je kunt laten inspireren en uitdagen.

Wat kun je verwachten?

Leer van de experts: Wij delen onze jarenlange ervaring en geven je praktische tools en technieken.

Gezelligheid en persoonlijke aandacht: Omdat we in kleinere groepen werken, krijg je de kans om vragen te stellen en direct feedback te ontvangen.

Creatieve vrijheid: Ontdek je eigen stijl en durf buiten de gebaande paden te denken.

Plezier: Onze workshops zijn niet alleen leerzaam, maar ook ontzettend leuk!

We kijken er naar uit om samen met jou aan de slag te gaan. Schrijf je snel in voor een van onze workshops en laat jouw creativiteit stromen!



Aan het eind van de workshop neem jij jouw kunstwerk fijn mee naar huis!
Heb je al een plekje op de muur uitgezocht?

Name: Pro Art Academy
Description:
Pro Art Academy: Nurturing Young Creative Minds with Visual Arts Services

Pro Art Academy is a dynamic art school dedicated to fostering creativity and artistic growth for all ages. Our mission is to provide professional drawing courses and a rich artistic experience that goes beyond the canvas.

The academy provides visual arts services, encompassing a wide range of art forms, such as realism, surrealism, impressionism, modernism, and abstract art. Our curriculum is thoughtfully designed to provide a well-rounded education in the arts, allowing students to explore various styles and techniques.

In addition to hands-on drawing and painting techniques, we offer academic instruction covering different types of painting, art techniques, and insights into renowned artists and their biographies. This comprehensive approach ensures that our students not only create beautiful artwork but also gain a deep appreciation for the world of art.

We understand the transformative power of art in fostering focus, meditation, and self-expression. To enhance the creative journey, we accompany our sessions with soothing music, which helps increase concentration and allows our young artists to dive into their work. Our professional instructors provide step-by-step guidance, ensuring that each art piece is a testament to their growing skills and boundless imagination.

At Pro Art Academy, we aim to create a positive and nurturing environment where children can unleash their creativity, develop their artistic talents, and build essential life skills. Join us on this exciting journey of artistic exploration and growth.

Unlocking Potential, One Stroke at a Time.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/proartacademy_/
Contact us: (+961) 70241677
Location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/Gh1dvANCa7tQxKQ38

Name: Wilde Kunst
Description: Wilde Kunst is een inclusieve kunstschool voor kinderen en jongeren met én zonder beperking. Ons uitgangspunt is dat kinderen leren door te ervaren. Professionele kunstenaars nemen de kinderen mee in muziek, beeldende kunst, dans en theater!

Name: Culture Scholar Corporation
Description:
Culture Scholar Corporation: Empowering communities through arts and music education"

Location: San Francisco Bay Area

Website: www.culturescholar.org

Overview:
Culture Scholar Corporation is an organization dedicated to providing therapeutic  fine arts education to underserved and disabled individuals. We believe in the healing power of cultural education and socializing, utilizing the arts as a means to combat depression, loneliness, promote social justice, and support those in reentry to society. Through private and group lessons in music and the arts, we empower our students with valuable skills while fostering a sense of community and personal growth.

Services:
At Culture Scholar Corporation, we offer a diverse range of programs and courses designed to unlock the creative potential of our students. Our curriculum focuses on cultural and historical creative concepts, enabling individuals to explore their artistic passions in a supportive and enriching environment. Our services include:

Music and Art History: Comprehensive study of the historical and cultural significance of music and art, providing students with a deeper understanding of their artistic roots.

Instrumental and Vocal Lessons: Expert instruction in a variety of instruments, including violin, viola, fiddle, guitar, and singing. Both private and group lessons are available, tailored to the unique needs and aspirations of each student.

Music Theory and Humanities: Engaging courses that delve into the theoretical aspects of music, enhancing students' musical comprehension and critical thinking skills.

Music and Art Appreciation: Immersive experiences that expose students to diverse genres, styles, and forms of artistic expression, fostering a lifelong appreciation for the arts.

Performance Classes: Opportunities to showcase talent and build confidence through regular performance classes, encouraging self-expression and artistic development.

Social Impact & Community Involvement

Name: Jana Art Home Academy
Description:
Professionelle Live-Online-Akademie für Kinder und Jugendliche, die das Malen lieben. So einfach wie ein Zoom-Gespräch.

Description: Nature Inspired Art program is a comprehensive art curriculum offers a wide range of 21 courses covering art mediums, techniques, the fundamentals of visual arts, and creativity improvement skill set.

Name: Bologna International Opera Academy Cyprus
Description: BIOA Cyprus is a boutique-style training and career development program that offers the following: daily master classes; one-on-one coaching from world-renowned opera singers, voice teachers, opera directors and coaches; and the opportunity to be immersed in the surroundings of Paphos. BIOA’s curriculum is carefully designed to build the proficiency and discipline that will facilitate success for those seeking a professional singing career, as well as exposing participants to professional-level opera auditions early in their careers.

Name: Applaus Arte Y Alma
Description:
Produzimos peças teatrais, palestras, treinamentos, projetos que levam cultura e educação socio-emocional para as pessoas em busca de um mundo melhor.

Nossa Missão: Promover cultura e conteúdos que agreguem para o desenvolvimento humano e de uma sociedade mais positiva.

Valores: Humanismo, Honestidade, Ética, Educação, Liberdade, Lealdade e Responsabilidade.

Name: SparkNet CLG
Description: SparkNet is a community-based creative education hub. We run inclusive workshops and art classes that promote well-being, skills development, and connection across generations. We are building a vibrant, welcoming space where people can learn, create, exhibit, and share work.

Name: Sxedio Sxedio
Description:
Προετοιμασία για Αρχιτεκτονική | Ελεύθερο & Γραμμικό Σχέδιο | Δημιουργούμε τις βάσεις για το μέλλον.

Με τρία φροντιστήρια στην Θεσσαλονίκη και ένα στην Λάρισα

Με πάνω από 23 χρόνια εμπειρίας, το φροντιστήριό μας εξειδικεύεται στο ελεύθερο και γραμμικό σχέδιο, προετοιμάζοντας με συνέπεια και αγάπη εκατοντάδες επιτυχόντες για τις αρχιτεκτονικές σχολές. 

Με γνώση των απαιτήσεων των εξετάσεων και πολυετή εμπειρία στον χώρο, στηρίζουμε κάθε μαθητή να αναπτύξει τεχνικές δεξιότητες, να καλλιεργήσει την αισθητική του αντίληψη και να εκφράσει την προσωπική του ματιά μέσα από το σχέδιο.

Κάθε χρόνο, βλέπουμε τους κόπους των μαθητών μας να ανταμείβονται με επιτυχίες και εισαγωγές στις σχολές των ονείρων τους κι αυτό είναι η μεγαλύτερη μας επιβράβευση.

Name: 235 Studio HK
Description:
Overlooking Victoria Harbour, our light-filled space is where art meets inspiration, wellness, and play. Whether you’re here for Art Jamming with friends, a mindful workshop, or a curated creative event, we make art accessible, relaxing, and joyfully personal.

Dive into guided painting, themed workshops, or simply create freely with the sea as your view. Here, art is not about perfection – it’s about reconnecting with yourself, finding calm, and celebrating creativity in the moment.

Come breathe, create, and find your own art moment with us.

Name: Scuola Internazionale di Comics Padova
Description:
La Scuola Internazionale di Comics di Padova nasce nel 2008 e dal 2016 è stata ampliata con una nuova area interamente dedicata ai videogame!
L'edificio in cui si trova, è una vecchia fabbrica del 1919 perfettamente ristrutturata: tetti alti, travi a vista, il tutto in contrasto con una tecnologia sempre aggiornata.
Dalla sua apertura ad oggi la scuola ha continuato a crescere e a migliorare le proprie proposte didattiche, grazie all’inserimento di corsi innovativi e all’impegno e alla professionalità dei propri docenti che trasmettono le loro competenze artistiche sul modello delle botteghe artigiane, mirando a sviluppare l'aspetto creativo dei suoi studenti attraverso un lavoro di ricerca espressiva e di sperimentazione tecnica.
Il risultato è una padronanza di strumenti e di metodi che permetta agli allievi di esprimere al meglio il loro talento e che faccia da trampolino di lancio per il loro futuro professionale.
La scuola dispone di 10 aule moderne e luminose, 7 delle quali attrezzate con Mac e Pc di ultima generazione, complete di tavolette grafiche Wacom e di connessione internet per i corsi legati alle arti digitali/videogame, e le altre utilizzate per le arti figurative dotate di ampie postazioni per lavorare al meglio, di monitor collegati ai Visual Presenter per seguire passo dopo passo le dimostrazioni pratiche dei docenti.
Inoltre tutti gli studenti possono utilizzare, in relazione al corso frequentato, lavagne luminose, scanner e tavolette grafiche.

Name: Private Art Lessons KL
Description:
Private Art Lessons KL provides art lessons to kids, adults & senior citizens. We deliver cutting-edge art tuition so that students can learn from the comfort of their own home, at their own pace, and learn skills to achieve their creative milestones one lesson at a time. 

Our pedagogical approach pulls from fine arts and craft where students not only make artwork but learn how to think about art, art history, critique, and why are we making art to begin with! Our private art classes are taught by a team of experienced art teachers who come from strong academic backgrounds and are award winning artists.

Name: Arte con Maria Santacecilia
Description: Cuidado  descubrirás consejos para desarrollar tu carrera en el arte de la mano de una artista con más de 30 años de carrera

Name: École de musique Alain-Caron
Academia Red Panda
Description: Academia Red Panda es un centro de formación que oferta cursos de ilustración digital y cómic. Ofrecemos formación presencial o 100% online para futuros dibujantes e ilustradores.

Description: நாம் திருகோணமலையில் எம்மால் முடிந்தளவு தமிழர் பாரம்பரிய  கலை வகுப்புகளை நடாத்துவது

Name: Rise Escola de Artes Digitais
Description:
Assim como um avião decola ao superar seu peso com uma força avassaladora, nós impulsionamos você para voos inimagináveis!

Somos uma escola digital voltada para o ensino de artes digitais, elevando o nível de nossos alunos e direcionando para o mercado.

Venha decolar com a Rise.
Juntos, decolamos.

Name: Departamento de Artes Visuales U. de Chile
Yamaha Music School Rivas
Description:
Yamaha Music School Rivas es un centro oficial de enseñanza musical avalado por Yamaha, ubicado en Rivas-Vaciamadrid. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer una educación musical de alta calidad, adaptada a todas las edades y niveles, desde los primeros pasos musicales en la infancia hasta la formación instrumental avanzada para jóvenes y adultos.

 Formamos parte de una red internacional de escuelas con presencia en más de 40 países, y seguimos una metodología propia que combina creatividad, práctica en grupo y desarrollo auditivo, cultivando no solo habilidades técnicas, sino también la expresión artística y el disfrute por la música.

 Nuestro equipo está conformado por profesores titulados y apasionados por la enseñanza, que utilizan tecnología moderna y recursos didácticos exclusivos de Yamaha para asegurar un aprendizaje dinámico, progresivo y motivador.

 En nuestras instalaciones, los estudiantes pueden aprender piano, teclado, guitarra, batería, violín, canto, producción musical y mucho más, en un entorno profesional y cercano, donde cada alumno es protagonista de su propio camino musical.

 Descubre el poder de la música con nosotros en Yamaha Music School Rivas!
#YamahaMusicSchool #EducaciónMusical #MúsicaParaTodos #RivasVaciamadrid

Name: Brush and Sketch, LLC
Description: Brush and Sketch is an art studio that not only produces commissioned and gallery works, but also provides art opportunities for all skill levels.  We offer classes and workshops for children and adults.  Our staff are professional artists who are passionate about creating art and sharing their artistic and creative skill.

Name: HUB Amarelo
Description: HUB de arte para artistas independentes.

Name: Les Maîtres du Monde
Description: Idéalement située entre Genève et Lausanne, les Maîtres du Monde, école de Motion Design, Effets spéciaux et Mondes Virtuels est la première école Suisse d’arts numériques qui propose des formations dans ces trois domaines de pointe. Parrainée par John Howe, le directeur artistique du Seigneur des anneaux, les Maîtres du Monde ouvre les portes des nouvelles technologies à une future génération d’artistes numériques. Basés sur une pratique intensive, les cours, donnés par des professionnels ayant entre autre collaboré à des grosses productions telles que Call of Duty, The Hobbit ou Harry Potter sont à la pointe de l’industrie vidéo-ludique actuelle.

Name: Harmona Vocal
Description:
O Harmona Vocal é muito mais do que um centro de educação musical; é um espaço onde a paixão pela música se transforma em uma jornada de descoberta, aprendizado e inclusão. Fundado por Malu Ribeiro, uma renomada professora de música e canto, o Harmona Vocal surgiu da necessidade de simplificar o ensino musical, tornando-o acessível e inovador para todos que buscam se capacitar musicalmente. 

Atualmente, oferecemos cursos de formação de arranjadores vocais, cursos de canto com atendimento fonoaudiológico conjunto e cursos de teoria musical.

Name: Palak StudioInk
Description:
Palak StudioInk is my professional paint classes studio that teaches art and customizes pieces, located in Calgary, Canada. Here, I teach sketching, drawing, and painting to kids and adults. I provide several workshops and virtual instructed classes designed to teach various kinds of art including canvas painting, pencil colors, sketching, acrylic/watercolors - I teach it all! 

I love to make beautiful art pieces for customers; and at the same time, show my students how to create truly unique art spaces that they can be comfortable in.

Name: Art Time Studio Garner NC
Description:
Welcome to Art Time Studio! Our art studio offers high-quality acrylic painting and drawing classes, watercolor workshops, and paint parties. Our sessions are 2-hours long, allowing you to immerse yourself in your art and achieve your creative goals. Bring a friend or come solo and join our community of art lovers! Our mission is to inspire and empower you to create your masterpieces, even if you are a complete beginner.

At Art Time Studio, we know how to have fun! Our studio is all about creativity and excitement, where you can express your ideas and let your imagination run wild. We offer a wide variety of events that are sure to get your creative juices flowing. Come join the party and see what all the fun is about.

Name: Creamik
Description: Ceramics and pottery school offering professional training as well as online classes in French and English.

Name: Fayoum Art Center
Description: Founded in 2006 by the renowned Egyptian Artist, Mohamed Abla, Fayoum Art Center connects local artists with the regional and international art scene through various annual programs like the annual Winter Academy. Located in Tunis Village, the Fayoum Art Center has numerous facilities including large studio spaces, an art library, living areas, and a communal dining space that offer artists the space to create works in an inspiring atmosphere.

Name: Salisbury University Art Department
Description: At Salisbury University’s Art Department, you’ll join a rapidly expanding community where small-class, studio-intensive learning is at the heart of everything, giving you direct access to dedicated professional faculty and exceptional hands-on facilities. From the only on-campus hot-glass studio in Maryland to a full suite of sculpture labs with foundry, 3-D scanning and digital fabrication, the program blends traditional craft, contemporary media and design in a uniquely integrated way. With 12 focus tracks—from graphic design and new media to ceramics and photography—students pursue depth in their discipline while also engaging broadly across fields, preparing for professional internships, gallery-level work, and global study experiences.

Name: Zen Ceramic
Description: We provide ceramic pottery workshop

Name: MaxArt Foundation
Description:
The MaxArt Foundation for the Support and Development of Contemporary Art was founded in 2021. Fund's main programs: art residences and grants for Russian artists, organization of group site-specific exhibitions with the participation of artists of different generations, working with different genres and media. Such projects are focused on a non-standard place of exposure and allow you to go beyond the space of the white cube, which gives rise to a completely different experience of the viewer's interaction with art. MaxArt is a young cultural institution that offers an individual approach to working with artists and collectors. MaxArt is a concentration of creative energy, multiplied by the expertise and professionalism of the foundation team.

Фонд поддержки и развития современного искусства MaxArt основан в 2021 году. Основные программы фонда: арт-резиденции и гранты для российских художников, организация групповых site-specific выставок с участием художников разных генераций, работающих с различными жанрами и медиа. Подобные проекты ориентированы под нестандартное место экспонирования и позволяют выйти за пределы пространства белого куба, что рождает совершенно иной опыт взаимодействия зрителя с искусством. MaxArt — молодая культурная институция, которая предлагает индивидуальный подход к работе с художниками и коллекционерами. MaxArt — это концентрация творческой энергии, умноженная на экспертизу и профессионализм команды фонда.

Name: Children's Art Classes St. Pete/Seminole Florida
Description: Children’s Art Classes offers nine-month programs of study that include painting, drawing, design, printmaking, sculpture, ceramics, and much more. Students ages 3 and up will experience over 40 different areas of art to feed their passion and enhance their skills.

Name: Lafayette College Art Galleries
Description: The Lafayette College Art Galleries present works of art ranging from today's most exciting artists and creative practitioners to historically significant collection pieces.

Name: the medela school
Description: The Medela School is a UK based visual arts platform that delivers art classes and workshops to help people improve their emotional and mental well-being,  nurture creativity and promote expression. Our services include paint parties, art & well-being workshops and art tutoring for children, young people and adults.

Name: Art Classes Group
Description: Visual art studio for all ages in slough and champion centre award winner 2022 by Trinity college and appeared @bbcsouthnews #LetsCreate

Name: FedeMorgana Atelier & Academy
Description:
Da oltre 10 anni ci occupiamo di Sartoria Artistica ed organizziamo corsi di formazione individuali e di gruppo sia in presenza che online
Abbiamo sviluppato (e registrato) un metodo di taglio che permette di realizzare cartamodelli su misura in maniera semplice ed intuitiva mediante una tavola di modellistica e correlata dispensa.
Creiamo un percorso personalizzato in base al livello di partenza ed agli obbiettivi che ogni alunno vuole raggiungere.
Abbiamo strutturato dei pacchetti lezioni da 1 ora, 6 ore, 10 ore o il pacchetto completo da 48 ore da calendarizzare in base alle esigenze ed alle disponibilità.
Creiamo cartamodelli e kit sartoriali disponibili per velocizzare il lavoro dei sarti ed hobbisti.
Organizziamo corsi intensivi in gruppo, focalizzati su argomenti specifici come ad esempio il corso intensivo sulla Corsetteria 1700.
Per maggiori informazioni e dettagli, contattaci al 3383730334 o sul sito fedemorgana.com

Name: Ballet Academy of South Texas
Description: The Ballet Academy of South Texas is the premier source of dance training in the Golden Crescent, offering classes in ballet and other dance disciplines for students of all ages. An inspiring and highly qualified faculty share their knowledge and love for the art of dance in a positive and nurturing environment. Academy students experience a structured and age-appropriate curriculum where, through the study of dance, they learn discipline, artistry, problem solving, goal setting, cooperation and creative thinking. Developing these skills benefit students wherever their lives take them.

Name: Spanda, Dubai - Classes for Bharatanatyam, Carnatic Music, Kerala Mural Painting & Indian Arts
Description:
Spanda is one of the leading and fastest-growing fine arts company in Dubai that offers true-to-the-roots Indian arts and culture experiences through Bharatanatyam, Carnatic Music, and unique Indian art styles, including clay modelling.


A forerunner committed to sharing authentic Indian fine arts experiences in Dubai, all creative programs abounding in tradition and technique are customised to suit beginners to advanced level art enthusiasts, seekers, and practitioners of all ages and cultural backgrounds.


All programs and workshops run throughout the week at Spanda's centres in Al Nahda and Al Quoz. Art experiences and artwork are commissionable for special occasions

Name: Atelier Saramello
Description:
O Atelier Saramello é um espaço criativo voltado para o ensino e a prática das artes visuais. Oferecemos cursos e oficinas de desenho e pintura para todas as idades.
Através da ilustração e do design gráfico, também desenvolvemos projetos criativos para Arquitetura de Interiores, Muralismo, Publicidade, Cenografia, Editorial, Moda e Animação de forma autêntica, lúdica e original. Nosso trabalho é feito minuciosa e manualmente através das ferramentas tradicionais e também digitais de desenho e pintura.
Vem com a gente causar a transformação através da arte!
Materializamos ideias, damos vida a sonhos.

https://www.saramello.com
https://www.instagram.com/saramello/
ateliersaramello@gmail.com

Name: Instituto Arlequim
Description:
Através do "Trilhas de Cultura", fortalecemos ideias culturais que já existem em projetos viáveis para editais. Nosso objetivo é democratizar o acesso ao fomento, aumentando a diversidade entre os proponentes e garantindo que territórios historicamente excluídos tenham maior participação.

Conecte-se à nossa visão para um mercado cultural em São Paulo mais diverso, acessível e sustentável.

Name: Power of Paint Art Academy & Management
Description: Power of Paint Art Academy & Management is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit supporting children and families in honoring their autonomy, creativity and voice through art while implementing therapeutic approaches.

Name: The Artists Business Lounge
Description:
I help visual artists streamline the business of art, and facilitate strategies for creative success.
As a practising artist, with 20+ years of business experience and with coaching experience, I have a range of knowledge and skills to support artists to take their careers further.
Through group coaching programs, individual coaching, online courses and workshops I cover the things you don’t learn at art school. My model of Mindset/Skillset/Toolset helps to identify the best course of action for each artist.

From strategy, exhibiting, marketing, websites, and tech to save you time, to pricing, revenue planning, working with galleries, to dealing with overwhelm and resistance. Whatever you need, I am here for you. Together we can craft your path to more success.

Name: Instituto Emunah | Projeto Social | Rio de Janeiro
Description:
O Instituto Emunah foi fundado em Outubro de 2018, quando  Silvana, CEO do Instituto, se deparou com todos os obstáculos que uma mãe solo, moradora de comunidade, enfrenta em relação criação de seus filhos. 

Além das dificuldades de não se ter acesso a uma educação de qualidade e de não ter com quem deixar as crianças para trabalhar fora, a falta de acesso à saúde e serviços públicos em geral, foram os  incentivos que contribuíram para a criação do Instituto.

Baseado no que ela viveu, e ouvindo relatos de outras mães na comunidade, foi que nasceu o desejo de criar um espaço para acolher crianças que estavam passando por essa mesma situação.

O Emunah, atende atualmente mais de 205  crianças e adolescentes com atividades como: Jiu-jitsu, Teatro, Apoio Escolar, Escrita Criativa,  Dança, Programa Sócio emocional e Libras. 

O Instituto também conta  com a parceria da Escola de Música da Rocinha, onde são ministradas aulas de Canto, Coral, Musicalização, Flauta, Violão e Violino após o turno escolar. 

Reconhecemos em nossas atividades um grande potencial educativo capaz de contribuir com a formação da cidadania, combate a violência, respeito aos direitos humanos, e inclusão social. 

Venha fazer parte você também. Juntos somos mais fortes!
Location: Vargem Grande, RJ, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Sicily Artist Retreats
Description:
Sicily Artist Retreats is an international art school in Western Sicily, dedicated to world-class instruction in oil painting, sculpture, charcoal, graphite drawing, watercolor, and other media.  

Founded in 2021, Sicily Artist Retreats offers workshops at our studio, with students staying at a nearby boutique resort hotel, Baglio Custera. All workshops include organized excursions, either to paint en plein air along Marsala’s stunning coastline or to visit local museums. 

Our faculty has included luminaries like Dionisio Cimarelli, Steven Assael, Dan Thompson, and Patrick Byrnes, to name a few, as well as up-and-coming instructors like M. Tobias Hall, Ritchie Carter, and Samantha Stover. All participants get equal, personal attention from our instructors.


An average day might begin with a demo that leads into a work period, a break for lunch, resume individual work in the afternoon, and conclude with a glass of wine by the Baglio Custera pool. Every workshop has its own focus, but the Sicily Artist Retreats studio is equipped to accommodate all media, from oils to watercolors and clay. Students work with professional life models and they can bring their own materials or rent what they need, as they need. 

The studio sits in sight of the Mediterranean, with a view of the celebrated sunsets over the Egadian Islands. We take enormous pride in our mostly plant-based lunches we prepare in the kitchen on-site, too, and students are welcome to enjoy our library and gallery between sessions as they please.

Sicily Artist Retreats also works with local artisans and archaeologists to expose students to the dense artistic history of our region: Greek and Roman sculpture from the 5th century BC, civic architecture from the Gothic Middle Ages and the Spanish Golden Age, and local crafts like ceramic ware.

But more than a school, Sicily Artist Retreats is a family, and we are always delighted to see an alumnus sign up for a new course — as they frequently do.

Name: Shyamala School of Art
Description: Shyamala School of Art is a leading institution based in Colombo, Sri Lanka that focuses on education in the arts for children and adults. The school specializes in teaching interdisciplinary art to children between the ages of 3-15 yrs, Pearson-Edexcel IGCSE and GCE Art & Design students, adults, and children with special needs. As a result, the SSA prioritizes creating an environment that nurtures mindsets, encourages creative expression, celebrates diversity and facilitates the growth of well-rounded individuals. Our team of experienced writers and designers can help you with everything from developing your brand message to creating and executing your marketing campaigns. We also offer a variety of services to help social enterprises and NGOs communicate more effectively with their target audiences.

Name: GUS | Original Gus Giordano Dance School
Description:
GUS, founded by jazz dance legend, Gus Giordano. Gus Giordano Dance School (GUS) established in 1953 is a destination for dancers from all over the U.S. and abroad. “I am honored to continue my father, Gus, and mother Peg’s legacy of not only providing the best dance education, but also teaching skills that will carry into all facets of life,” says daughter and owner Amy P Giordano.

GUS provides high quality year-round classes to dancers age 2 to professional in ballet, Gus Giordano jazz, contemporary, hip hop, commercial jazz, modern, musical theater, tap & more. Summer Intensives for pre-professional dancers include Ballet Intensive, College & Professional Intensive, Contemporary Intensive, Hip Hop Intensive, Leaps & Turns Intensive, Musical Theater Intensive, Pre-Professional Intensive, Tricks & Turns Intensive, and the only ALL Jazz Intensive.  Summer programs for children starting at age 2 include GUS Camps and Tiny Tots. GUS loves training dancers of all ages & levels.

Name: Bem-estar com Arte
Description:
Oficinas de Bem-Estar e Criatividade Corporativa | Bem-estar com Arte

Em um cenário corporativo cada vez mais dinâmico, investir no bem-estar dos colaboradores é fundamental para a saúde organizacional e a produtividade. 
A Bem-estar com Arte oferece workshops de artes manuais customizados para empresas, projetados para promover um ambiente de trabalho mais saudável, criativo e colaborativo.

Nossas sessões são uma pausa revigorante na rotina, utilizando atividades como pintura, desenho e outras artes manuais para:

Reduzir o estresse e a ansiedade:
Através da concentração e do foco nas atividades artísticas.
Estimular a criatividade e a inovação: 
Despertando o potencial criativo individual e coletivo.
Promover a integração e o team building: 
Criando um espaço leve para a interação e o desenvolvimento de novas habilidades.
Melhorar a saúde mental: 
Oferecendo uma ferramenta de expressão e relaxamento.
Os workshops da Bem-estar com Arte são adaptáveis às necessidades e objetivos de cada empresa, proporcionando uma experiência única e memorável que contribui diretamente para o bem-estar geral da equipe.

Invista no capital humano da sua empresa!

Entre em contato para saber como podemos levar mais bem-estar e arte para o seu ambiente de trabalho.

Name: National Council of Arts Administrators
Description:
The National Council of Arts Administrators is an organization whose primary purpose is to provide a forum for the exchange of ideas, the identification of problems, and the generation of shared solutions to the multitude of issues that confront arts administrators in higher education today.

This exchange is focused to address the following:

1. Create a safe space for complex conversationsfor arts administrators in higher education.
2. Support advocacy for impactful art leadership.
3. Mentor leaders in the field.

Name: Parque Cultural Casa do Governador
Description:
Localizado na Residência Oficial do Governo do Estado, o Parque Cultural Casa do Governador foi inaugurado em maio de 2022, com o propósito de valorizar a produção cultural local. Hoje, é reconhecido como a maior galeria de arte a céu aberto do Espírito Santo, abrigando 32 obras de arte, entre permanentes e temporárias, incluindo esculturas, instalações e obras site-specific. 

Com uma área de 93 mil metros quadrados, o parque conta com uma infraestrutura gerida em conjunto pela Secretaria de Estado da Cultura (Secult) e pela Secretaria do Governo (SEG). O espaço, de visitação gratuita, promove uma interação única entre arte contemporânea e natureza, organizada em três eixos temáticos: ambiental, histórico e artístico.

Name: New Song School of the Arts
Description:
Founded in 1999 by Todd and Heather Parks, New Song School of the Arts (NSSOTA) is based in Argyle, Texas, and has grown from its humble beginnings into a thriving institution serving much of North Texas. Our reach extends from Argyle to students in communities such as Gainesville, Rockwall, Dallas, and Ft. Worth. As a trusted name in these communities, NSSOTA is renowned for providing exceptional customer service and offering instruction from experienced, degree-holding, and professional instructors. Our vision is that people everywhere may experience the beauty of the arts, and we are committed to nurturing creativity, talent, and excellence.

NSSOTA is home to three specialized schools: the School of Music, the School of Theater, and the School of Visual Arts. Our mission is to equip, enrich, and inspire our staff, faculty, families, and students of all ages to develop their God-given gifts in these disciplines. With a 25-year legacy of providing outstanding fine arts education, NSSOTA has become a cornerstone in the North Texas community, enhancing the lives of our students and their families.

Name: Casa de Arte e Cultura Luiz Januário
Description:
A Casa de Arte e Cultura Luiz Januário é um equipamento cultural localizado na Tijuca, zona norte da cidade do Rio de Janeiro, que tem como objetivo promover o acesso, o ensino e o consumo dos diversos segmentos artísticos, se tornando mais um pólo cultural carioca.

Nossa missão é oferecer as mais variadas linguagens artísticas em um só local, para que dessa maneira a Casa se torne um ambiente autossustentável, onde você encontra tudo o que deseja ou precisa artisticamente, reunido no mesmo espaço.

Para além de uma instituição de aprendizado, com aulas, oficinas, cursos, workshops e palestras, a Casa está aberta para o público geral com uma programação completa, passando por contações de histórias, apresentações musicais e teatrais, exposições, performances, rodas de debates dos mais diferentes temas, etc.

A Casa de Arte e Cultura Luiz Januário conta com a parceria da Oficina de Desenho Daniel Azulay, unidade Tijuca, a qual, após 6 anos de funcionamento na praça Saens Peña, agora funciona dentro do espaço, sendo a responsável por todas as modalidades de curso do segmento artístico “desenho e pintura”.

Ambas instituições estão sob a direção de Vânia Januário e gestão de Bruno Januário, seu filho.

Venha nos visitar e conhecer um pouco mais da nossa proposta!
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Kayt Cultural Hub
Description:
Kayt Cultural Hub was founded in 2014, though the team has come across the Armenian traditional culture even before. The ideology of Kayt Cultural Hub is based on the provision of this circulation of traditional culture, creating an appropriate environment for its development, presentation, and implementation in everyday life. As a result, people will be as familiar with their culture as they are with their native language.
We strive for a better future, where every Armenian is the bearer of traditional culture, passes it to generations, and ensures its natural reproduction. We are trying to make the traditional culture available and acceptable for everyone.

Name: COVert Arts
Description: COVert Arts is an artists’ collective that is committed to shine light on Coventry and Warwickshire hidden works of art. We aim to partner with like-minded businesses in easily accessible locations that are excited to showcase the exceptional art of Coventry that often remains out of view. Through this effort we will create opportunities and foster a sense of inclusivity and togetherness for all communities of Coventry by cherishing everyone’s artistic input.

Name: PYROS KARE

Name: The Painted Cloud
Description:
Philosophy: The Painted Cloud is an art studio that practices community-minded experimentation in the arts. Through experimental processes, we develop foundations that change our perspectives, help us become more open-minded, and help us gain autonomy. Experimenting in a group setting broadens our perspectives of what is possible within ourselves, our peers, and our communities. Gaining confidence in trying new things allows us to have more open minds toward our own intuition and creativity, that of our peers, and that of our communities. Understanding our power and ability to contribute to our own well-being and the well-being of our communities gives us autonomy without losing sight of our responsibility to our studio mates and those we collaborate with regularly. Community-minded experimentation is responsible, ethical artistic development and adventure. 

The Painted Cloud offers an invigorating environment for young and maturing artists to learn, grow, and develop their desire to experiment with materials while expanding their skill-sets and broadening their perspectives. 

Process and dialogue are at the heart of our activities and experimentations.

We place an emphasis on process to support all forms of creativity, offering a space for artists of every age to foster free-thinking, to engage in conversation, and to build self-confidence. Teaching artists map projects for young and maturing artists to work both independently and collaboratively over the course of the session series. Engaging in independent work allows young and maturing artists to develop foundational tools and harness their intuitive decision-making abilities. Participating in collaborative work prompts young and maturing artists in finding their individual roles within their The Painted Cloud community, linking to their pursuits of finding their roles in their greater communities beyond their time working with The Painted Cloud.

Our mission is to inspire and nurture the creative spirit of all ages while fostering communication, collaboration and critical thinking. Everyone has the potential to be creative and to make positive contributions to our Global Community.

Description: We believe that incredible things happen when creatives from diverse thought backgrounds come together. Makers, artists, filmmakers, researchers, founders, unconventional thinkers movers, and shakers are dispersed throughout USC with few things tying them together. One thing they each share in common is that on Sundays, they're working on the things that excite them. We built a home for them to come together as a collective.
