Description:
We think. We question. We create. We design. We struggle. We collaborate. We try. We solve. We invent. We reflect. We learn. We TEACH.


Be it Dance, Drawing, Vocal Music, Musical instruments, Theatre or Personality development we will be the one-stop site for all your learning mandate!

Name: Tc Meb Özel Gala Güzel Sanatlar Kursu
Description: Tc Meb Özel Gala Güzel Sanatlar Kursu is a company based out of Yaşamkent Mahallesi 3066. Sokak No:17, Çayyolu, Ankara Province, Turkey.

Name: Azgour Art Group
Description:
Azgour Art group provides a rich educational program of engaging live discussions, professionally edited video demonstrations, relevant content, flexible creative work, an interactive community space, and just the right amount of structure to help artists build and maintain a fruitful art-making practice and to create consistently strong paintings.

Designed for artists – regardless of medium, style, and experience level.

We dive deep into concept development and process twice a month during live Class Meetings on Zoom, using examples from art history and member posts to illustrate concepts of focus. 

The main focus of our group is our Creative Work – Projects, Assignments, Exercises, and Challenges. If you’re diving into a Project (a group of paintings), the seven-unit structure assists you in the process of reflecting on previous work, proposing a new project, taking pieces to completion, and evaluating results – all within your own scope and timeline. 

In the Forums spaces, members interact by sharing their creative work and exchanging feedback, resources, and ideas in a safe space. Every Project post receives instructor feedback and we often discuss member submissions during the Class Meetings. 

Critiques give members the opportunity to discuss their projects and receive instructor feedback.

Content, consisting of a growing library of articles, video demonstrations, and external resources, is available to all active members. 

We have a wonderful opportunity here. Through the versatile format of the web, we can interact in ways that would be impossible in the traditional studio classroom.

Michael Azgour, Founder and Instructor, draws upon his experience as a professional artist and university lecturer for fifteen years in creating Azgour Art Group -- a flexible learning platform and interactive community designed to help artists take their paintings to the next level.

Name: Spiritual in art
Description: Spiritual in Art is an ongoing research, exhibitions and experiences platform, curated by Marina Bortoluzzi, that explores the intersection of the spiritual and metaphysical in art.

Name: El Niu Manualitats
Description:
El Niu Manualitats és on pots desconnectar de l’estrès diari i submergir-te en l’apassionant món de les manualitats, tant adults, com adolescents com nens i per a EMPRESES.
Crec fermament que tots tenim un poder creatiu únic, i el meu objectiu és ajudar-te a descobrir-lo i donar-li vida a través de les teves pròpies mans.

Name: LA MIRABILE FUCINA
Description:
La Mirabile Fucina è più di una scuola: è un'officina creativa dove l’arte si forgia giorno dopo giorno, con disciplina, passione e meraviglia. Con sede nel cuore del Bovisa Art District, offriamo un percorso formativo intensivo e altamente specializzato, incentrato sul disegno dal vero, lo studio dell’anatomia artistica, la composizione e la padronanza dei mezzi tradizionali. 

 Cosa ci distingue
Approccio laboratoriale e accademico, ispirato ai grandi maestri del passato.

Attenzione alla tecnica figurativa, alla forma e alla sostanza dell’immagine.
Un ambiente di studio immersivo, dove ogni artista viene seguito nel suo percorso personale di crescita.

 A chi ci rivolgiamo
Artisti in formazione, illustratori, aspiranti disegnatori, pittori e scultori.

Professionisti che vogliono riscoprire le basi solide del disegno.
Appassionati d’arte che desiderano cimentarsi in uno studio serio e appassionato.

Name: Rebels Kunstplatfom Man OverBoord (MOB)
Description: Rebels kunstplatform voor jongeren en kunstenaars. Samen schoppen we de wereld een geweten, met kunst als reddingsboei in ons hand. Na school en mét school. Je vindt ons in Vlaanderen, Brussel en over de grens.

Name: Karmavesh
Description:
Karmavesh is the oldest and most renowned cultural community of Babu Banarasi Das. The word “Karmavesh” is derived from two words: ‘कर्माय ’ and ‘अवेशित:’ and it means doing your ‘karma’ in the right direction with persistent determination. The motto of Karmavesh is ‘The Zeal to Create’. Its emblem has an oil lamp which symbolizes enlightenment and prosperity; the book and the ‘veena’ symbolize the cultural aspect of the community; the different colors used in the logo are also significant. This community mainly focuses on its members' overall personality development and empowerment by organizing various activities and PDPs.

Karmavesh was established in 2002 with the noble intention of empowering students through various means. The community did not just focus on a single domain, instead, it expanded itself to welcome people of different fields of interests so that they can discover their hidden talents too. Even though the community has been giving equal importance to all sectors (like cultural, technical, and social) it is officially known for its Literary and Fine Arts. The community students also have exclusive access to various events across
India which even leads to them bringing laurels for the college. For the past 21 years, Karmavesh has been reaching new heights and this wouldn’t have been possible without the brilliant brains behind the management of the community.

Name: Palácio das Artes BC
Description: Uma escola focada no aprendizado de música, dança e teatro. Casa do Coro e Orquestra Filarmônica de Balneário Camboriú.

Name: Empowered Music
Description:
Who we are:

The philosophy of Empowered Music is that ALL students are welcome, celebrated, and encouraged to express their authentic selves through music. Everyone, regardless of perceived “musical ability,” can get started - get better - and keep going! By setting short-term and long-term goals, and evaluating them along the way, you get to define what success looks like for you! We are honored to help you reach your goals.

What we offer:

We are music professionals who provide exceptional, highly-personalized instruction to engage and inspire students of all abilities and ages. Whether your goals are in wellness, performance, or learning something new, we’re excited to support your journey in the classroom and beyond.

Performance opportunities are available for students who are willing and ready to experience “on-the-gig” training in a professional and supportive environment with our passionate music mentors.

We host space for workshops and trainings from music industry topics to health and wellness.

Name: Piano Lab
Description:
Piano lessons shouldn't be a source of anxiety for kids.

They should be fun, upbeat, and engaging.

Your child should be able to look forward to lessons every week!

We are committed to teaching in a way that each child feels safe, desired, and supported.

Our lessons are aimed toward growth, improvement, and learning from mistakes.

We help students feel proud and confident about their piano skills.

Name: Ballet Lenita Ruschel
Description:
Há mais de 60 anos, ensinamos o Ballet Clássico e o Jazz, utilizando a metodologia da Royal Academy of Dance. Somos referência na formação de bailarinas de todas as idades através de conceitos como disciplina, regularidade e performance.  

Os espetáculos são anuais, com todos os alunos da escola e com participação em Festivais e premiações nacionais e internacionais com mais de uma centena de conquistas em grupo e individual.

Description:
Welcome to Creative Workshops Amsterdam, where we transform team dynamics through the power of art. Our turnkey workshops are designed for companies in the Amsterdam area, offering a unique, hands-on approach to inspire creativity, foster innovation, and strengthen collaboration within teams of 7 to 20 people.

Art workshops can offer transformative benefits for both groups and individuals, making them a powerful tool for team leaders who want to cultivate positive change. Here’s how they can enhance group dynamics and individual growth:

For Groups
Enhanced Collaboration:
Working on creative projects together encourages teamwork, mutual respect, and open communication. Teams learn to value diverse perspectives, leading to more cohesive collaboration.
Strengthened Team Spirit:
Shared creative experiences build trust and camaraderie, creating lasting connections among team members in a relaxed, fun environment.
Improved Problem-Solving Skills:
Art workshops challenge teams to think creatively and find innovative solutions, which can translate to better problem-solving in the workplace.
Stress Reduction:
A hands-on, artistic activity provides a break from daily stress, allowing teams to recharge and return to work with renewed focus and energy.
Better Conflict Management:
Exploring creative tasks together teaches teams how to navigate disagreements constructively, fostering a healthier, more understanding work environment.
Reimagine Team Building
Our workshops go beyond traditional team activities, offering an unforgettable experience that leaves lasting results. Whether you’re seeking to celebrate the holidays or invest in your team’s long-term growth, we’re here to help.

Name: Kyla Artist Prize - ASSOCIATION DE LA LUEUR ÉCLAIRANTE DE L'ART-
Description:
In 2023, Taiwan’s DE Global Art Agency collaborated with Germany’s Eniziart Gallery to establish the Kyla x Eniziart Gallery in Mannheim, Germany. The goal of this partnership was to promote cultural exchange between East and West, celebrating the richness of both traditions. Over the next two years, the gallery successfully participated in art fairs across Germany and Asia, providing an international platform for emerging and established artists to showcase their works.



By 2024, with the increasing digital transformation of the art market, Kyla Art Gallery made a pivotal shift: ending its partnership with Eniziart and transitioning into a virtual international gallery. This transformation expanded the gallery’s global reach, allowing it to participate in art fairs worldwide without physical limitations. At the same time, Kyla continued to promote the Kyla Artist Prize, which includes categories such as visual arts, performing arts, and design arts. The prize offers artists from around the globe the opportunity to showcase their talents and fosters cross-cultural dialogue in the art world.



As a gallery with a strong commitment to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), we combine art with environmental and ethical principles, actively supporting responsible capitalism and cultural growth. Through exhibitions, events, and international collaborations, we present diverse works of art while championing sustainability in the global art market.

Name: Vidhyalaya Dancespace
Description:
Vidhyalaya: Preserving Tradition, Inspiring Art

Welcome to Vidhyalaya, a cultural hub dedicated to nurturing and promoting the rich heritage of Bharatnatyam, Carnatic music, traditional arts, and Yoga. Founded with a vision to create an inclusive space for individuals of all ages and backgrounds, we offer structured and high-quality training programs that celebrate discipline, creativity, and cultural values.

At Vidhyalaya, we believe in the transformative power of the arts and wellness practices to build confidence, instill discipline, and foster team spirit. Our offerings include:

Bharatnatyam Dance Classes: Learn the essence of this classical dance form with carefully designed lessons covering Adavus, Margam, intricate techniques, and storytelling through mudras and expressions.
Carnatic Vocal Music Lessons: Explore the timeless beauty of traditional Carnatic music, from basic Varisais to advanced Keerthanams and Varnams, under the guidance of experienced instructors.
Yoga Classes: Experience the holistic benefits of Yoga, from physical strength and flexibility to mental clarity and emotional balance, through tailored sessions for all skill levels.
Workshops and Performances: Engage in enriching workshops and live performances that bring our students closer to the roots of Indian art and culture while building their confidence on stage.
We take pride in fostering a supportive learning environment that prioritizes inclusivity and quality education. At Vidhyalaya, financial challenges will never hinder a student’s access to learning—our goal is to empower every individual to embrace the arts and wellness practices wholeheartedly.

Through a combination of traditional values and modern teaching methods, Vidhyalaya aspires to preserve the cultural essence of Bharatnatyam, Carnatic music, and Yoga for future generations while encouraging creativity, innovation, and well-being.

Join us at Vidhyalaya to celebrate the timeless beauty of art, tradition, and culture.

Name: Salemi School of Ceramics SRL
Description:
Salemi Ceramics is a creative studio in Western Sicily dedicated to exploring contemporary ceramics through immersive one- and two-week wheel-throwing courses, as well as special programs such as wood firing, kiln building, and artist residencies.

Our school brings together artists, makers, and curious beginners from around the world to experience the rhythm of Sicilian life while deepening their connection with clay. Surrounded by rolling hills, vineyards, and the historic charm of Salemi, participants learn traditional techniques alongside modern approaches to wheel throwing, hand building, and glaze experimentation.

We believe in slowing down, creating with intention, and finding inspiration in community, culture, and craftsmanship. Every course is hands-on, guided by talented ceramic artists who share not just their skills but their passion for the process.

Salemi Ceramics is part of Leatherback Travel, a family of creative travel experiences that celebrate learning, connection, and the joy of discovery.

Name: Lisbon Drawing Club
Description:
Lisbon Drawing Club is a community of live model drawing lovers who meet regularly to draw and have a good time. Based on the principles of Community, Inclusion, Practice and Fun, we organize weekly meetings in different cultural/social venues in Lisbon since May 2021. We believe that drawing together is a great way to get to know each other better and also to get to know ourselves. Drawing can be a vehicle for emancipation, belonging and awareness.

Lisbon Drawing Club is interested in working with a diversity of models that mirror the richness of our social heritage and stimulate a practice of empathy, working with a diversity of bodies, gestures and identities represented by professional models, artists, folk groups, migrants, seniors, etc. Once a month, sessions are dedicated to trans and non-binary models in cooperation with Queer Art Lab. Regular drawing classes (masterclasses) with guest artists are also organised.

Since 2021, Lisbon Drawing Club has already organised more than 100 drawing sessions and masterclasses with more than 3000 participants, having collaborated with more than 40 social and cultural organisations in the city of Lisbon

Name: Antonio Menchón
Description:
Antonio Navarro Menchón: Arte, Luz y Paisaje 

Antonio Navarro Menchón es un pintor español nacido en Alcantarilla, Murcia, aunque reside en Roquetas de Mar, Almería. Es reconocido por su maestría en la representación del paisaje y su dominio del uso de la luz y el color. Su obra destaca por su capacidad para capturar la esencia de la naturaleza mediterránea, con una técnica que combina realismo e impresionismo.

Trayectoria y Estilo

Desde temprana edad, Navarro Menchón mostró un talento excepcional para el dibujo y la pintura, lo que lo llevó a formarse de manera autodidacta y a perfeccionar su técnica a lo largo de los años. Su trabajo se ha centrado en retratar la belleza del paisaje andaluz, especialmente sus playas, atardeceres y escenas naturales que transmiten tranquilidad y profundidad emocional.

Su pincelada precisa y su uso magistral del color lo han convertido en un referente en el mundo del arte contemporáneo, participando en numerosas exposiciones en España y Europa. Además, su estilo se distingue por una fusión entre el hiperrealismo y el impresionismo, logrando un equilibrio único que le permite capturar la luz y la atmósfera de sus composiciones con una sensibilidad especial.

Obras y Colecciones Destacadas

Entre sus colecciones más representativas se encuentran:

 "Luz Mediterránea": Captura la calidez y el resplandor característico del sur de España. Inspirada en la luz y los colores del Mediterráneo, esta serie muestra atardeceres vibrantes, reflejos dorados en el agua y la riqueza cromática de la costa andaluza.

 "Horizontes Eternos": Una serie de paisajes costeros que transmiten serenidad y vastedad. Esta colección destaca por sus horizontes amplios y cielos dinámicos que evocan una sensación de infinito y libertad.

Name: Vórtice Cultural
Description:
Vórtice Cultural is an independent artistic initiative with full curatorial autonomy, dedicated to the training, professional development, and internationalization of artists, as well as to the dissemination of contemporary erotic art.

Founded and led by artists Leonardo Maciel and Paulo Cibella, Vórtice strengthens the cultural ecosystem through multiple fronts. Throughout its trajectory, it has collaborated with more than 400 artists across nearly 30 exhibitions, establishing itself as a hub for emerging talent, circulation, research, and experimentation. The Vórtice Community brings together over 160 artists in an active environment of daily exchange and collaboration. The Vórtice Library preserves and provides access to a collection of more than 300 rare books on erotic art. The Vórtice Festival, dedicated to contemporary art, celebrates eroticism, diversity, and love — expanding the visibility of marginalized artists alongside established names, creating a space of resistance and uncensored expression. Completing this ecosystem, the Vórtice Gallery operates as Brazil’s first exclusive marketplace for contemporary erotic art, connecting artists with new audiences and broadening the reach of erotic production in the country.

Name: Programa Aprendiz Musical
Description:
O Programa Aprendiz Musical é o maior programa de musicalização em escolas públicas do país, ensinando música desde 2001 em Niterói - RJ.

Tem como premissa a ideia de que a Educação Musical é um caminho para a transformação, o exercício da cidadania e a realização de sonhos. Seus valores incluem a transformação, o compromisso, a afetividade, a integração e a qualidade.

O Aprendiz Musical está presente em 100% das escolas de nível fundamental da Rede Municipal de Ensino, onde cerca de 10 mil alunos têm aulas de musicalização, instrumentos de sopros e cordas ou canto coral, e ampliam a vivência cultural de variadas formas.

Além das unidades de ensino, o Aprendiz Musical funciona na Casa Aprendiz e no Conservatório de Música de Niterói - CMN, promovendo o ensino de música para crianças, adolescentes e jovens até 24 anos de idade, e oferecendo variadas atividades complementares que auxiliam no desenvolvimento dos alunos.

O Programa Aprendiz Musical é mantido pela Prefeitura de Niterói, através da Secretaria de Economia Criativa e Ações Estratégicas (SECAE) em parceria com a Secretaria Municipal de Educação.

Name: Iconic International School
Description:
A Montessori school established to aid your child's academic performance and to train your ward. We are located in Ghana, Dodowa, behind the Forestry Hotel.

Our classrooms are peaceful, happy places designed to meet the developmental needs of each child in every stage of life. All items in the environment are scaled to the child’s size, including furniture, shelves, utensils, dishware, cleaning implements and the Montessori materials themselves. There is no focal centre to the classroom; this reflects that the teacher is not the focus of the children’s attention, but that they are all one community together. Bright and attractive colours, natural materials, fascinating cultural objects and interesting pictures on the wall all offer the children complex sensory and intellectual experiences. When children first enter our environment, there is an immediate and touching moment when they realize that this place is for them.

In our classrooms, children are taught how to regulate their own social interactions. Through fun role-playing activities and appropriate modelling, the teacher demonstrates the best way to respond to arguments or new situations, giving the child the ability to act confidently and pro-socially when the actual problem arises. The result is a self-regulating classroom, in which natural social tensions are resolved mostly by the children themselves.

Children move freely throughout the environment, choosing activities that interest them, or working with the teacher, individually, or in small groups. Their movement is unrestricted by the teacher unless it endangers themselves, other people, or their surroundings. Outdoor environments are important in Montessori schools, and offer opportunities to engage with the natural world.

Name: SUP de SUB Mark Hubbard
Description:
L’action-école Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard est établie la première fois à Aix-Marseille-Provence en 2012, pour 20 jeunes adultes de la cité du Bois de l’Aune, par LFKs - La Fabriks - groupe international d'artistes, de chercheur·euse·s et ingénieur·e·s rassemblé·e·s depuis 1990 autour d’un usage de la création artistique de haut niveau en tant qu’instrument d’actions à visée sociale directes et concrètes.
En 2018, remarqué pour ses innovations et ses résultats en la matière, LFKs est encouragé à proposer Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard au ministère du Travail dans le cadre de l’appel à projets 100% Inclusion lancé par le ministère et son Haut commissariat aux compétences.
2019. Lauréat en mai, Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard passe alors à l’action à l’échelle nationale en septembre, développée et augmentée, orientée vers un public jeune en grande difficulté, dans un cadre expérimental de 3 années défini avec la DGEFP et la Caisse des dépôts et consignations.
Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard est aujourd’hui (2022-2023) un programme évolutif de 35h/semaine durant 10 mois pour des jeunes adultes (17-25 ans) qui partent de loin – grande pauvreté, QPV, SDF, sans soutien parental, foyer… et de très loin – vie à la rue, isolement, délinquance… ou avec un handicap – addictions et dépendances, maladies mentales, traumatismes complexes, maladies dégénératives, handicaps physiques, et pour quelques-un·e·s, simplement un décrochage et une grande démobilisation.
10 mois d’art à haute dose pour se réinventer, apprendre à échanger, à œuvrer collectivement, augmenter ses capacités pour un libre choix, dessiner un projet professionnel quel qu’il soit, comprendre sa responsabilité individuelle et l’engager, savoir en somme faire sa vie, comme une œuvre.

Name: Irfan Ajvazi Fine Arts
Description:
Irfan Ajvazi (born 2001) is a Kosovan painter he received a Diploma in Graphic Design from Great Learning Academy in 2022.

Ajvazi is, a figurative painter, crafts tender scenes that expose the intricate subtleties of life. Through his skillful compositions, he conjures a realm filled with unspoken narratives, intimate moments, and romantic 
gestures.

He is interested in creating work that frame the moments of our life in which this idea reveals itself to ourselves. 

Ajvazi is best known for his interior and exterior scenes, Ajvazi also paints still lifes, landscapes, figures and interior scenes. 

Alongside painting, Ajvazi makes incredibly detailed colored pencil drawings, in an all-consuming process of mark making. Unlike his paintings which transform throughout the making, the challenging medium calls for the compositions to be decided beforehand. 
Ajvazi puts a modern spin on figurative painting traditions. As an autodidact, he draws inspiration mainly from the Dutch Old Masters, who have proven to be his most consistent teachers. Ajvazi’s distinctive style began to take shape as he spent more and more time in front of the canvas.

Ajvazi draws from personal photographs, film stills, and references to art history.

Ajvazi has also worked in collage and drawing, often using colouring pencils.

Ajvazi has presented work in solo and group exhibitions internationally.

Irfan Ajvazi’s artworks can be found in major international collections, including the Fundacion Maceta, PiecePiece, Apricus Art Collection, The New Rebellion Art, Public Art Exhibit, Edelina Gallery, Tree Art Gallery.

He has participated in more than 10 group exhibitions and some solo exhibitions worldwide since 2020, including at VB Contemporary, Circular Art Space, The Holy Art Gallery, Dodomu Gallery, V-Art Union, Pearview Gallery, V-Art Union, Sfumato Art Gallery, PiecePiece, Omnibus Gallery, Make Art Gallery, Apricus Art Collection.

Name: Ar.Co - Centro de Arte e Comunicação Visual
Description:
Founded in 1973 as an independent art school, Ar.Co is dedicated to the experimentation, training and divulging of arts, crafts and visual communication.

From early on in the school’s history, the alternative nature of the pedagogic project has consisted mainly of bringing together a strong emphasis on practice, a daily multi-disciplinary atmosphere and a view of artistic training as a service that should “make a difference” for a public with the most diverse objectives.

The main training areas – Drawing, Painting, Photography, Jewellery, Ceramics, Illustration/Comics, Cinema/Movement Image, Art History and Theory, Individual and multi-disciplinary projects – offer complete professional programs, as well as topical opportunities for an introduction to a particular technical/aesthetic area, or for professional recycling. The therapeutic dimension of the training in the arts is, likewise, not forgotten.

As part of the overall training program, Ar.Co frequently promotes conferences and informal meetings with specialists in a number of different areas and organizes public exhibitions of the students’ production and, eventually, of national or international production in one or more areas connected to its departments’ activities.

Ar.Co collaborates regularly with other schools and institutional or private entities, both national and international, promoting initiatives relevant to the school’s objectives and voccation.

Ar.Co is a non-profit cultural association of public utility.

Name: DJARFOGO INTER. FILM FESTIVAL
Description:
The DjarFogo International Film Festival was founded in 2019 by award-winning filmmaker and film and visual media professor Guenny K. Pires and Txan Film Productions & Visual Arts members, which brings hundreds of films and filmmakers to Cape Verde annually. It is a seven-day film and culture celebration event held on the island of Santiago and Fogo, Cape Verde, from November 6 to 12, 2023. It incorporates an International Film Festival, Visual Media Education, and Academic and Cultural Exchange to improve the historical and cultural relationship between the archipelago of Cape Verde, Africa, and the Diaspora, including Europe, C.P.L.P., Canada, the United States, and Global South.

DIFF has its headquarters in Los Angeles and Cape Verde Islands. Our five-year plan is to create the first Cape Verdean International Film School to educate disadvantaged young Africans in visual arts and Cinema, thus contributing to reducing poverty, appreciating African culture, and promoting tourism in the country.

DIFF is a nonprofit exempt from federal income tax under Internal Revenue Code (IRC) Section 501(c)(3). Donors can deduct contributions they make to you under IRC Section 170. DIFF qualifies to receive tax-deductible bequests, devises, transfers, or gifts under Section 2055. 2106, or 2522. The Employer ID number IS AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.

DIFF's mission works tirelessly toward developing, exposing, and celebrating Cape Verdean culture and the entire Africa and Diaspora.

DIFF aims to educate, entertain, encourage, and inspire disadvantaged youth to join in African Cinema, visual arts, and world cinema, thus reducing poverty, appreciating African culture, and promoting visual storytelling.
DIFF offers free visual arts and filmmaking education programs for all ages, with learning opportunities available to filmmakers, aspiring filmmakers, and festival attendees.

DIFF seeks to showcase independent Film and culture, contributing to a better global understanding and f

Çift, ortak hayalleri ve idealleri doğrultusunda, öğrencilerini ilgi duydukları alanda kariyer ve meslek edinebilecek bir donanıma eriştirmeyi; sanatın, toplumun her kesimiyle buluştuğu ve arzuya dayalı bir hobiden öte, gelişim ve ilerlemenin anahtarı olduğunu göstermeyi amaç edinen bir vizyonla önemli ilklere imza attılar. Ayrıca pek çok farklı branşta ve başlıkta kurumsal eğitimler, workshoplar ve atölyeler de Arsu Akademi bünyesinde devam etmektedir.

Arsu Güzel Sanatlar Anaokulu

Arsu Anaokulu’nun eğitim anlayışının temelinde; öğrenmenin bir zorunluluk değil, zevk olduğunu aşılamak yatıyor. Bu nedenle Arsu'da, çocuklarımız devamlı olarak bilginin kaynağı olarak gördüğümüz doğayla temas ederek ediyorlar.

Arsu Sahne
Ataşehir'in en keyifli noktalarından birinde yer alan Arsu Sahne, genç yetenekler ve büyük üstatların sesi müziğe dönüştüren yorumlarının keşfedildiği, ufuk açan samimi sohbetlerin dillendiği, sanatseverin sanata ve sanatçıya temas edebildiği butik konser salonu ile sanatın kalbinin attığı sımsıcak bir mekân.

Arsu Sahne, sanatseverlere sadece bir konser zevki değil, sanatçıyla temas kurup, sohbet edip, bambaşka bir pencereden dünyaya bakabildikleri farklı bir konser deneyimi sunuyor.

Name: ContraLuz
Description:
Entre a Cordilheira dos Andes e a floresta amazônica, entre o mar Caribe e a região do Chaco, a América Latina é um território rico e diverso nas suas paisagens, culturas e histórias. Com o desejo de refletir sobre esse território, surgiu ContraLuz, uma plataforma de estudo e ensino focada na discussão de arte e imagem. Queremos entender as contradições do lugar onde habitamos, de onde viemos e suas complexidades a partir das práticas artísticas. As lutas políticas, as violências cíclicas, os golpes de Estado, as obras de arte, as revoluções… tudo isso é parte do que chamamos América Latina. 

ContraLuz quer, portanto, romper as fronteiras nacionais e os desafios da língua para ser um espaço virtual de encontros, discussões e troca de conhecimento.

Fique de olho na nossa programação!

Name: Light Mosaics
Description:
Mosaici Leggeri:
Tecnica artistico-artigianale contemporanea basata sull’utilizzo di frammenti di testo (parole, numeri, segni, ritagli tipografici) come tessere di mosaico. I frammenti vengono sottoposti a processi di tonalizzazione (riscaldamento controllato, pigmentazione, patinature) e organizzati su supporti leggeri come tela o legno mediante adesivi o resine a bassa densità.
La costruzione segue la metodologia del mosaico tradizionale — studio del soggetto, definizione della palette, posa a ritmo costante — ma reinterpreta completamente il materiale base e il valore semantico dell’opera. Il risultato è una superficie a lettura differenziata, dove la microstruttura verbale genera una macro-immagine visiva.

English – Technical Definition

Light Mosaics:
A contemporary artistic–craft technique based on the use of text fragments (words, numbers, symbols, typographic cut-outs) as mosaic tesserae. The fragments are processed through toning methods (controlled heating, pigmentation, patination) and arranged on lightweight supports such as canvas or wood using low-density adhesives or resins.
The construction follows the methodological structure of traditional mosaic — subject analysis, palette definition, systematic placement — while completely reinterpreting both the base material and the semantic value of the artwork. The result is a dual-level surface where the verbal microstructure generates a visual macro-image.

Name: Escuela de Artes y Creación de La Sergio
Description:
La Escuela de Artes y Creación es la unidad académica y proyección social de La Sergio que acoge las artes y cultura. Cuenta con una historia de más de 40 años en el sector en Colombia, esto debido a que su Programa de Música nació en el Centro de Formación Musical Mauricio Cristancho, entidad que se integró a La Sergio en el 2007.

La oferta de formación actual de la Escuela incluye dos programas profesionales: música (con énfasis en producción musical, interpretación, composición/arreglos y canto popular) y teatro musical; a nivel de posgrado, una Maestría y Especialización en gestión cultural y creativa. En el 2026 abriremos una maestría en música con líneas en interpretación, educación musical y música colombiana.
Igualmente, la Escuela también ofrece cursos y certificados dentro de su propuesta de educación continua en diferentes áreas. La Escuela, liderada por el maestro Julián Montaña, es también una unidad de producción artística y ha gestado diferentes festivales y encuentros en las áreas artísticas y creativas.

Name: River Art Works
Description:
River Art Works began in August 2018 with a bold vision of establishing a comprehensive art and creative technology retreat/campus, complemented by education in the business aspects of art. Our own research backs up the need to build a hub, a campus, that supports artists and art organizations alike. 

Self-sustainability will be in the form of tourism. Opening the galleries, gardens, sleeping quarters, performance areas, and commissary to the public for income is the goal.

We continuously work toward accomplishing this goal.

Acknowledging the significance of investing in future generations,  in 2020 we directed our efforts towards establishing connections with youth, recognizing them as the future artists and leaders. We developed ArtTEK for TEENS, a high school level program that centers on creative tecchnology education:

3D Print, Drone and Video editing, Holograms

Established Westmoreland Arts Coalition

2023 exposed a dire need to quickly begin strengthening the arts community as a whole. After the “hub” was abandoned, Westmoreland and surrounding areas lost 30% of art organizations with two more on the verge of extinction. Our artists are not keeping up with international trends. Colleges that teach the arts are not requiring any business classes. Yet, 34% of artist are entrepreneurs. This needs to reverse.

That is the goal of River Art Works.

Name: Efeito Parallax
Description: Apaixonados por inovação, solução de problemas e storytelling, Carlos Zardo e Rafael Yamaga desenvolveram a teoria do Efeito Parallax | Como Decisões [Aparentemente] Geniais Afetam Negativamente as Empresas durante seu tempo no podcast GuitarHomeCast. Esta teoria surgiu da observação das decisões empresariais e do background nerd dos dois, inspirada nos Lanternas Verdes da DC Comics. O Efeito Parallax ilustra como decisões aparentemente oriundas de Ideias Geniais podem ter consequências desastrosas devido à forte presença da Impureza Amarela, que as transforma em Ideias de Jerico, destacando a importância de uma visão crítica e estratégica nos negócios.

Name: Scholastika
Description:
Formujeme kreativní osobnosti v komunitním prostředí. Díky profesně aktivním vyučujícím získává studentstvo přímý vstup do praxe i cenné profesní vazby.

 Co je Scholastika? 
Kreativní vzdělávací centrum, které nabízí výuku výtvarného a užitého umění široké veřejnosti. Vysokou úroveň výuky a přímý vstup do praxe zajišťují aktivní profesionálové*ky z oboru s vazbami na českou i mezinárodní kreativní scénu. Studentstvo má k dispozici adekvátně vybavené prostory v centru Prahy, které slouží jako tvůrčí i komunitní prostředí vhodné pro formování kreativní osobnosti.

 Historie Scholastiky 
Scholastika zahájila svou činnost v roce 2012 prezenčními kurzy pro veřejnost. Zakladatelé Ondřej Brody a Evžen Šimera usilovali o vytvoření kompaktního vzdělávacího prostoru s důrazem na praktickou výuku i osobní přístup. Po třech letech své existence získala Scholastika akreditaci jako soukromá Vyšší odborná škola vizuální komunikace, která tuto vizi dále rozvíjí.

 Vyšší odborná škola 
Scholastika poskytuje od roku 2015 akreditované tříleté pomaturitní studium s denní formou v oborech Grafického, Motion a Game designu. Důležitou součástí výuky je spolupráce s kreativními průmysly a možnost absolvovat profesní stáže v ČR i zahraničí. Po úspěšném dokončení a složení státní závěrečné zkoušky získávají absolventi*ky titul DiS spolu s Europassem, který slouží jako dodatek k diplomu pro uplatnění v evropském prostředí.

 Kurzy pro veřejnost 
Centrum celoživotního vzdělávání Scholastika pořádá tvůrčí kurzy v oblastech výtvarného a užitého umění, digitálních nástrojů a teoretické přednášky zaměřené na historii umění, designu a architektury. Přestože výuka od počátku probíhá formou odpoledních kurzů, její kvalitu dlouhodobě zajišťují renomovaní tvůrci*kyně a teoretici*čky. Absolventi*ky mohou na vyžádání obdržet certifikát o úspěšném dokončení kurzu.

Name: Diamond Dog
Description:
Our story: 
Diamond Dog provides professional coaching services and public speaking training for artists.

The vision of Diamond Dog is that artists fall in love with public speaking as an art form through which they can present themselves authentically and fearlessly.

Conceived by artist, educator and coach Cian Donnelly, Diamond Dog works closely with artists to coach and train a radical and rich approach to public speaking.

The services provided by Diamond Dog draw both on Cian’s distinctive practice as a performance artist, coupled with his extensive experience coaching and training in public speaking, presentation skills, and effective communication.

Our training:
We have designed our coaching and training to empower artists by deepening their knowledge, practice, and love of public speaking skills.

The training is supportive, practical, and tailored to the unique demands of presenting yourself publically within the art world.

We offer one-day workshops  and one-to-one training, delivered virtually or in person.

The training covers many aspects of public speaking, from dealing with nerves and anxiety, to managing pace, pause, emphasis, delivery, to shaping content, improvising, to speaking instinctively and fearlessly.

Our clients:
We have founded Diamond Dog for artists, gallerists, curators, and educators, who are motivated to improve their public speaking skills.

We have provided training for artists presenting artist talks, curators and gallerists delivering presentations to the public, and educators speaking at seminars and conferences.

Diamond Dog also designs specialised coaching for individual artists working with spoken word, vocal performance, and writing for voice.

Name: Kujjana Art School
Description:
At Kujjana Art School, we are proud to offer a fully online learning environment that promotes creativity and artistic expression. Our classes are conducted through Zoom, providing flexibility and accessibility for students of all ages.

Workplace:

1. Virtual Learning: Our classes are held online, allowing students to learn from the comfort of their homes. This setup facilitates a balanced learning experience, accommodating diverse schedules.

2. Experienced Faculty: Our tutors are BFA and MFA Fine Arts graduates with extensive experience in their fields. They bring a wealth of knowledge and passion, ensuring high-quality education and mentorship for every student.

3. Diverse Age Groups: We cater to a wide range of students, offering programs for kids, juniors, and seniors. This inclusive approach helps foster a supportive community where everyone can thrive.

4. Variety of Art Services: We offer a range of art classes, including pencil drawing, watercolor, acrylic, and digital paintings. This diversity enables students to explore different mediums and discover their unique artistic voice.

Benefits of Our Online Structure:

1. Flexibility: Students can attend classes from anywhere, allowing them to balance their studies with other commitments.

2. Personalized Learning: Small class sizes facilitate personalized attention, ensuring that each student receives guidance tailored to their needs.

3. Accessibility: Our online format makes art education accessible to a broader audience, breaking geographical barriers.

At Kujjana Art School, we are dedicated to inspiring creativity and helping our students achieve their artistic goals in a supportive and engaging online environment.

Name: 60Seconds Festival
Description:
Experience Urban Art at 60Seconds Short Film Festival

Welcome to the unique world of 60Seconds Short Film Festival, where we celebrate the art of silent, 60-second films set against the backdrop of urban spaces in and around Copenhagen.

About the Festival:

    60Seconds is the only festival of its kind, where silent 60-second films and their projection in an urban setting are integral to the festival's concept.
    We invite all artists and video creators to submit their 60-second videos with no sound, exploring the interaction of art within an urban context.

Selected Films:

    The festival will showcase the top 10 films, carefully selected for their creativity and vision.
    These films will be projected at urban locations in Copenhagen, Frederiksberg, Køge, and Helsingør during the festival week.

Submission Guidelines:

    Create a one-minute original film with no sound.
    Omit opening and closing credits.
    The theme is open-ended, allowing you to explore your creative vision.
    Format: MP4 with a 4x3 aspect ratio.

Join us in celebrating urban art and the power of concise storytelling. Submit your one-minute silent film today and be part of this distinctive cinematic experience.

Name: Mimsanat Akademisi
Description:
Mimsanat Akademisi temel faaliyet alanı SANAT olan kuruluştur.

‘Yaşama Sanatla İz bırakın’

Mimsanat Akademisi , Ord. Prof. Dr. A. Süheyl ÜNVER Hocamızın yolunda ilerlemeyi hedef edinirken Türk Süsleme Sanatlarını tanıtmak, aktarmak ve yaygınlaştırmak amacı ile 2011 yılında kuruldu. Hedefimiz bünyemizde bulunan Türk Süsleme Sanatları alanındaki ve plastik sanatlardan Resim branşındaki sanatçıları, kültürel birikimleri, yenilikçi tarzları ve eserleriyle sanatseverleri bir araya getirmek olarak belirlenmişken, kuruluşunun onuncu yılı olan 2021’de, bünyesine müzik eğitimlerini de dahil ederek çalışma alanını Görsel Sanatlar – Duysal Sanatlar çizgisine taşıyıp, ülke ve dünya sanatına hizmet amacını genişletmiş oldu.
Location: İstanbul, Ihlamurkuyu Mah. Bülbüldere Cad. Çırçır Ormanı No:49 Ümraniye / Istanbul

Name: Dera Soars Art Gallery
Description:
Dera Soars Art Gallery is a registered virtual gallery dedicated to showcasing diverse artistic expressions while fostering creativity, healing, and empowerment.

Through exhibitions, community projects, and educational workshops, we connect artists, children, and communities to the transformative power of art. Our work spans across painting, mixed media, craft, and digital exhibitions, with a special focus on integrating art into conversations around education, health, and social change.

We also run the De Art and Craft Therapy Initiative (De A.C.T Initiative) — an outreach program that uses creativity as a tool for healing, confidence-building, and community development.

 Our Vision: To be a leading platform where art becomes a catalyst for social impact and global dialogue.
 Our Mission: To advance creativity, empower communities, and support artists through innovative, accessible, and meaningful artistic experiences.

Name: FOLUKE CULTURAL ARTS CENTER INC
Description:
FOLUKE CULTURAL ARTS CENTER INC is a community based organization based in Cleveland Ohio, whose focus is to strengthen and support underprivileged communities by providing access to performing arts, visual arts, and arts education. Our focus is at-risk Children, Youth, and Teens, and older adults.
The GOAL is to provide positive alternatives to negative behaviors by instilling discipline, self-pride and boosting self-confidence through self-expression and self-discovery, in addition to promoting academic achievements, socio-economic development, and community enhancement.
VISION: To provide multi-generational arts education services to the Greater Cleveland Area with a special commitment to the Cedar-Central 'Promise' Neighborhood.  To implement arts and culture activities that will develop positive community 'norms' through the belief that it takes a village to raise a child, and that the older people are keepers of the culture and must remain dynamic members of society to provide younger generations positive role models.

Name: SVA Artist Residency Programs
Description:
SVA's Artist Residencies in New York City offer emerging and mid-career artists time, space and a supportive community in which to develop ideas and focus on their artistic direction.

In addition to our time-honored studio residencies, a variety of innovative professional immersion programs provide opportunities for artists to explore new areas of social and technological practice.

A unique combination of creative and professional resources provides a rich environment for growth and opportunity in the current vibrant art scene.

Affordable housing is available, as are opportunities to display work.

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Early application is highly recommended. Please see individual program listings for application due dates.

For further information or questions regarding SVA's Artist Residency Programs please email residency@sva.edu.

Name: Mission: Renaissance Fine Art Classes
Description:
We teach the basics of drawing and painting to children, teens, and adults in a fun & safe art studio environment. Using The Gluck Method, a step-by-step, results driven art training program.  Students attend weekly drawing and painting classes where they can acquire all of the skills needed to become a proficient fine artist.

With over 45 years as the world’s leader in fine art instruction we provide the best in fine art education. With 14 fine art studio locations in California and Texas, and students attending virtual classes from around the world, Mission: Renaissance currently teaches thousands of students each week.

We are dedicated to helping you attain your goals as an artist.

Name: Gogi Studios
Description:
Gogi Studios is an art studio, which gives innovative visual approaches to projects. Gogi studios was started in a modest manner by Nigar Nazar in the seventies. She initiated comic strips for the press. It was the first ever comic strip in the Pakistani setting. The comic strips featured Pakistani culture and problems in a humorous way. With decades of cartoons featuring the central character of Gogi, the comics gained popularity among women who related to this female character. It became a household name. People are receptive to message advocated by Gogi and this is used to launch many social advocacy campaigns.
Gogi studios has successfully completed many commissioned projects dedicated to the issues of human rights. Gogi Studios has worked on various campaigns using different mediums to raise awareness on issue of children rights, environment and sexual harassment.
Nigar Nazar is the first woman cartoonist of Pakistan and of the Muslim world .Her character, Gogi has not only appeared in different newspapers and magazines but four children’s hospitals in Islamabad and Rawalpindi have been decorated with Gogi cartoons and health messages. Nigar has also authored and illustrated 27 books for children. . She was nominated by BBC for “100 Global women who have made a difference in 2014” NHK ,largest TV channel of Japan has produced a 28 minute documentary which was aired on February 19 and 20,2015.Recently the President of Pakistan launched her book on Corruption.

Name: Sequential Artists Workshop
Description:
A non-profit organization dedicated to the prosperity and promotion of comic art and artists, offering comprehensive instruction in comic art, graphic novels and visual storytelling. In luscious Gainesville, Florida. 

Mission Statement

The Sequential Artists Workshop (SAW)'s mission is to nurture and educate tomorrow's generation of visual storytellers, to support creative investigation, exploration and excellence in cartooning and comic art, and to promote literacy in sequential and comic art in today’s culture.

Through its school(s), SAW's goal is to provide quality education to students dedicated to challenging themselves and learning interdisciplinary visual storytelling. Where its school(s) are located, SAW aims to educate and promote comics literacy in our local community(s).

In addition, we aim to provide work spaces, teaching residencies and distribution/publishing resources for practicing sequential artists.

Finally, through its national outreach program dedicated to publishing and promoting curious, intelligent, and visionary works we aim to integrate sequential art and artists into the broader cultural landscape.

Name: KatArtSys art studio
Description:
Ми - арт студія про малювання, кайф від процесу, відпочинок від рутини на сміливість нанести перший мазок фарби на полотно. 

Ми проводимо професійні арт тімбілдинги від 5 до 75 гостей та перетворюємо мистецтво на структурований, чіткий та ефективний інструмент розвитку команд і людей.

Наші продукти — це баланс між творчістю та системністю.
Ми спеціалізуємося на створенні корпоративних майстер-класів, творчих тімбілдингів та артбоксів, які допомагають компаніям покращувати командну взаємодію та знижувати рівень стресу серед співробітників.

Що ми робимо:
- Корпоративні арт-івенти для команд будь-якого розміру
- Персональні артбокси та творчі набори
- Спеціальні знижкові пропозиції для співробітників компанії

оффлайн/онлайн
українська/англійська


Для кого ми працюємо:
Для компаній, які цінують wellbeing і розвиток талантів.
Для HR-команд, які шукають нові інструменти командної взаємодії.
Для людей, які хочуть зупинитися, перепочити та отримати простір для натхнення.

Ми віримо, що кожна людина може творити, а кожна компанія може будувати культуру, де творчість стає джерелом енергії, продуктивності й командної сили.

Творчі майстер-класи підходять для всіх! без обмежень! У нас малюють і хлопці, і дівчата, і підлітки, і дорослі чоловіки

Name: Change The Art
Description:
Change The Art is a brand owned and created by artist, Krystle Marriott. The products have been designed out of a desire to see people recover their sense of wonder, awe and joy and to draw out their own sense of creativity.
Our products are created with the goal of helping you revive your inner child by stirring up your imagination through our art collection. Our most popular collection is based off of the artworks from Krystle's Faith Like a Child series.
We hope to leave you inspired to keep the childlike faith, believing in yourself, God and others. 

Krystle Marriott is a visual artist based in Hamilton, Ontario. She works mainly in acrylic medium and has been painting actively for about 10 years now. She began her works as an artist while taking foundational art studies at the Living Hope Creative Art Studio. Her love for art began as a child where she became interested in drawing images that communicated messages of inspiration. Art has always been a way for Krystle to escape the noise of life and find comfort and healing.
Her motivation for creating art is to inspire others to have faith in God, themselves and each other. She uses her painting to display children in postures of joy, humility and boldness. Krystle hopes to leave a mark on the hearts of those who view her work that will revive their inner child as well as awaken their inner artist. Through her paint parties, Krystle partners with God to help people get set free of their inhibitions and have fun in the creative process.

We provide enriching experiences that empower our young artists with a strong sense of confidence, accomplishment, and overall identity that they can carry with them outside the studio and throughout life…all while having fun!

Name: Express Yourself Studios, LLC
Description:
Express Yourself Studios | Mobile & Virtual Art Workshops | Fine Art & Creative Wellness

Founded in 2008, Express Yourself Studios has grown into a mobile and digital creative arts hub, bringing art workshops, team-building experiences, and fine art to schools, corporations, healthcare organizations, and community groups. Led by Simone Anthony-Brown, a professional artist and educator, we specialize in offsite creative workshops, virtual art programs, and curated fine art collections featuring both established and emerging artists.

Our mission is to make art accessible, inspiring, and impactful for all, whether through in-person corporate wellness sessions, arts education for students, or therapeutic creative programs for healthcare spaces. Our interactive workshops encourage self-expression, innovation, and connection, making them ideal for schools, businesses, and wellness initiatives.

Beyond workshops, Express Yourself Studios also offers a curated fine art collection, including original paintings, mixed media collages, and limited-edition prints. Our online store features DIY art kits, digital guides, and pre-recorded courses, making creativity accessible to all, no matter their location.

We also engage with a global audience through our YouTube art channel, providing free tutorials, behind-the-scenes insights, and creative inspiration. Whether you're looking to book an art experience, add original artwork to your collection, or explore your creativity through online learning, Express Yourself Studios is here to bring art without limits to you.

Serving clients nationwide with offsite workshops and a global audience through virtual experiences. For more information about the studio visit www.expressyourselfstudiosllc.com.

Name: Maha Art
Description:
At our online art school, we bring the ancient wisdom of Indian traditional art to the modern world. Led by Maha, our esteemed faculty member with over 16 years of experience and a follower base of 75,000 on Instagram, we specialize in teaching Shilpashastra — the intricate and spiritual art form deeply rooted in Indian heritage.

Why Choose Us? Our unique pedagogy, based on the Taalamaana Paddati, offers a structured approach to mastering Shilpashastra. Whether you're a beginner eager to start your journey or an artist looking to deepen your skills, we have something for everyone:

7-Month Course for Beginners: Lay a strong foundation in the principles and techniques of Shilpashastra.
Advanced Course: Elevate your artistry with in-depth studies and practice.
Special Workshops: Learn to draw full deities and bring divine figures to life with precision and grace.
Meet Maha With a Bachelor’s in Fine Arts from Chitra Kala Parishat, Bangalore, and a Master’s in Fine Arts from Bangalore University, Maha’s passion and expertise shine through in every lesson. Her friendly and spiritually enriching teaching style makes learning both enjoyable and deeply rewarding.

Join Our Community Visit our website to see the inspiring testimonials and incredible results achieved by our students. Embark on a transformative journey of art and spirituality today!

Name: AndreGACKO
Description:
Avec assurance et dextérité, le sujet jaillit de ses mains. Vous verrez apparaître des animaux, comme un dragon, un cheval, un lion, un rapace, un chien, un taureau.. mais aussi, des personnages comme Don Quichotte, Sancho Pança, Arthur Rimbaud, un matador, un picador, des artistes de cirque, des héros de la mythologie grecque, des lutteurs sénégalais, les massais, le Père Noe....
Vous verrez précisément les muscles saillants, l'œil, les cheveux, la crinière flottant au vent, les sabots, les ergots, les serres crochues, une multitude de détails qui donnent vie à des sculptures toujours en mouvement et animent l'œuvre de l'artiste.
Autodidacte, son centre d'intérêt est porté vers une considération de l'homme.

À l'aide de papier de cahier d'écolier, de papier blanc, de papier aluminium, il froisse, triture, chiffonne le matériau jusqu'à lui donner la forme désirée et s'inscrit ainsi dans le mouvement de la figuration narrative. Le résultat obtenu révèle une sculpture en papier de 10 centimètres à 2 mètres de haut offrant une pièce unique pleine de poésie.
Le papier d'un grammage spécial, travaillé de façon sauvage, non conformiste en plus d'une résine solidifiant, offre la résistance nécessaire à la bonne tenue de la sculpture. dans le temps
A 6 ans, au jardin d'enfants de Dakar, GACKO, dès ses premières sensations, utilise la pâte à modeler, la résine, le fil de fer, l'argile pour reproduire des animaux.
Nourri d'émissions télévisuelles, il aime à construire des vaisseaux, des personnages fantastiques qui le guideront ensuite vers le matériau à sa disposition: le papier, maintenant sa matière de prédilection.
Ainsi, GACKO valorise un matériau quotidien, banal et nous invite à voir par un prisme nouveau le papier qui entre ses mains devient une oeuvre.
Il expose sur divers thèmes, dans de nombreux lieux et de salon international d'art contemporain.

Name: Ordained Canvas
Description: rdained Canvas is a Louisiana Veteran-owned Art Studio that will cater to children who have a Mental Health diagnosis. However, it will be available to everyone. Our mission is to help children overcome mental & emotional trauma through art while our motto is Using Art to bring mental & emotional healing to the soul. We will offer prophetic art classes for adults, art activities for children, mental health events, and more beginning in Spring  2023. There will be an emphasis on helping children ages 7 to 14 overcome mental roadblocks focusing on those who are autistic and suffer from selective mutism, anxiety disorders, OCD, and PTSD.

Description:
Ai Molti Tesori è un luogo ampio e luminoso nel cuore di Mendrisio, pensato per accogliere e coltivare il potenziale creativo racchiuso in ognuno di noi. 

Si organizzano molteplici i laboratori esperienziali di arte individuali e di gruppo che vengono rivolte sia a adulti che bambini.

Promuove l'arteterapia nelle sue molteplici declinazioni: 
- 𝗟𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗶 𝗲 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗼𝗿𝘀𝗶 𝗱𝗶 𝗔𝗿𝘁𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗶𝗮
Tramite i materiali artistici a disposizione e al processo creativo si entra in contatto con i propri vissuti emotivi profondi, dandogli forma, colore, volume sperimentando un qui e ora in sintonia con il vivere emozionale del momento. 
Esprimere la propria esperienza interna permette anche di riconoscerla, comprenderla, condividerla.  
Si attivano così risorse personali latenti, migliorando il proprio benessere psicofisico.

- 𝗟𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝗿𝗼𝗿𝗶 𝗱𝗶 𝗙𝗼𝘁𝗼𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗶𝗮
Fotografia e arte terapeutica si fondono in un percorso nel quale l'immagine fotografica è l'elemento dal quale partire per strutture la relazione d'aiuto.

𝗔𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗼 𝗮 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗶 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 a 360° accoglie idee e progetti dandogli spazio e implementando sinergie.
- Organizza, accoglie e promuove 𝗰𝗼𝗿𝘀𝗶, 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗽, 𝘀𝗲𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗿𝗶, 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘃𝗲𝗴𝗻𝗶, 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲𝘀, 𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶, 𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝘀𝗶𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗶, 𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗶 𝗱𝗶 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗴𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗶 𝗰𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗹𝗶 e sociali finalizzati al dialogo, alla conoscenza e allo sviluppo di risorse e del benessere personali e collettivi
- Offre uno 𝘀𝗽𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼 𝗰𝗼𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗰𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗲 𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗼
- Offre uno 𝘀𝗽𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼 𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗼 - 𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗮, 𝗹𝘂𝗼𝗴𝗼 𝗱'𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼 𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 
- Si occupa del 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗶𝗼 𝗱𝗶 𝗼𝗴𝗴𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗶 𝗱'𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗲, artigianato, interior design, complementi d'arredo, libri, oggettistica etnica, accessori per la meditazione ed il benessere.

Nuestro objetivo es que tus días se llenen de creatividad.

Name: Sugar Land Art Center & Gallery
Description: Sugar Land Art Center & Gallery is a Non-Profit Organization that believes in developing and enhancing the creativity in young and established artists.  We believe in reaching out to everyone in the community to enhance their understanding and appreciation of art.

Name: DOMIN Poznan
Description:
Rysunek i malarstwo to nasza pasja, którą zarażamy wszystkich naszych uczniów. Każdemu uczestnikowi naszego kursu poświęcamy maksimum uwagi, tak aby postępy  były widoczne po każdych zajęciach, a nauka dawała satysfakcję i motywację do dalszej pracy.

DOMIN Poznań jest oparty na bazie ponad 20 letniego doświadczenia w nauczaniu rysunku i malarstwa. Nasi absolwenci są obecnie studentami na uczelniach architektonicznych i artystycznych w całej Polsce, a wielu z nich obecnie jest doświadczonymi projektantami, artystami, architektami czy wykładowcami.

Te sukcesy to nie przypadek, pracownia DOMIN jest zbudowania na pasji, ambicji i energii założycieli i prowadzących zajęciach.

Te cechy wzbogacone indywidulanym podejściem i doskonałą atmosferą zajęć sprawią, że każdy kto chce realizować swoje rysunkowe pasje znajdzie u Nas doskonałe miejsce do rozwoju.

Sprawdź co mówią o Nas nasi absolwenci, a najlepiej przekonaj się sam i dołącz do Nas na zajęciach!

Do Zobaczenia Na Kursie
Łukasz

Name: Halftones Escola de Desenho
Description: Escola de arte focada em Desenho Artístico, Comics & Mangá, Ilustração, Pintura Digital e Análise & Montagem de Portfólio

Name: Living Museum Madrid
Description: Asociación sin ánimo de lucro para el apoyo de artistas plásticos con diagnósticos en salud mental, discapacidad intelectual o del desarrollo.

Name: Larkhall Art Club
Description: As the lark delivers its extravagant songs in flight, we too create and share art freely to break the day

Name: Pencil Studio
Description:
Pencil Studio is an innovative, fun, and cozy art studio opened since 2013. We offer exciting arts and craft learning experiences for kids, adults, corporate parties and families.

Our teachers and staff are youthful, energetic and down-to-earth who are passionate to provide an enjoyable learning experience and a sustainable interest in Art.

Name: VODO ARTS SOCIETY AND LAB LTD
Description: Vodo Arts Society and Lab is a Ugandan artists’ collective that was founded to create opportunities for artists through providing tools and networks leading to access to digniﬁed employment by building connections to various spaces in the private sector, civil society and government. Vodo envisions that through this continued engagement, the value of artistry can be recorgnised on a greater scale to increase support for the industry. This feeds into our goal of having artistic discourse at the center of social and civic interaction. With a range of creatives stretching across various disciplines of the arts, we have created a top name in the market with a reputation for excellence in service and delivering superb products.

Name: CooCircular
Description:
Nuestra misión en CooCircular es difundir, reivindicar y conservar los oficios manuales tradicionales y contemporáneos, contribuyendo a la valorización del trabajo artesanal y el conocimiento cultural que estos representan.

En CooCircular, creemos que los oficios manuales son una parte vital de nuestro patrimonio cultural y una fuente invaluable de creatividad y autoexpresión. Nos esforzamos por mantener vivos estos oficios, adaptándolos al mundo moderno y asegurando que sigan prosperando en el futuro.

Name: Pitter Painter
Description:
Forged from  a childhood of doodling and the  hands-on experience of motherhood, Pitter Painter merges two great loves!  The first for art and the second for children.

Pitter Painter art classes are exemplified by a cozy atmosphere where budding artists get the individual attention they need.   Projects are creatively-themed and developmentally- appropriate.  Painting classes and lessons in art fundamentals are hands-on and disguised as something playful. All in a nurturing space where kids have fun and personal creativity is applauded.

Fueled by tireless teaching energy and contagious creativity,  Pitter Painter art classes are now spreading color  in various locations in Hong Kong.

Name: Maniera-The Fine Arts Society Of KMV
Description: 'Maniera,' which means "mannerism in style" in Italian, is a genuine attempt to showcase the students' creative endeavors. It is a first step towards ensconcing the creative corner amidst the monotonous study environment.

Name: Village Pottery Studio
Description: Our mission at Village Clay Studio is to cultivate an inclusive and diverse community where individuals from all backgrounds can learn, grow, and master the art of ceramics in a safe and creative environment. We are committed to breaking down barriers and introducing ceramics as a viable career path, particularly to youth from cultures where art is not traditionally seen as a professional option. By fostering creativity and providing opportunities, we aim to inspire the next generation of ceramic artists and empower them to pursue their passion.

Name: Nova Academia Lisboa
Description: Escola de Artes em Benfica: Aulas para Crianças, Jovens, Adultos e Séniores de Dança, Música, Teatro, Desenho e Pintura em Benfica.

Name: Noua Arts and Culture Center
Description: We aim to develop the art scene in Kuwait to meet the highest standards. We support art and artists and provide every aspect that helps artists to thrive.

Name: Seapunk Studios
Description: Seapunk Studios is a research-and-imagination collective and community interested in fresh solarpunk-inspired imaginaries for Southeast Asia.

Name: Kursy Artystyczne
Description:
Nasze zajęcia kierujemy do osób, które tak samo jak my kochają sztukę. 

Kursy Artystyczne w Katowicach zostały stworzone z myślą o Tobie, tak abyś mógł poznać i doskonalić swoje umiejętności plastyczne, rozwijać swoje zainteresowania, pasję do sztuki.

Jeśli chcesz szlifować swój warsztat artystyczny i zdobyć wiedzę o technikach to dobrze trafiłeś. Powołaliśmy to miejsce, aby łączyło ludzi we wspólnym działaniu podczas kreatywnego spędzania czasu.

Każdego uczestnika naszych zajęć uczymy indywidualnie, ponieważ każdy z nas jest inny, każdy ma swoją osobowość twórczą. Dla nas liczą się przede wszystkim Twoje pomysły.

Pracujemy w dużej, dobrze oświetlonej przestrzeni w małych, kameralnych grupach. 
Nasze artystyczne miejsce znajduje się na 1 piętrze pięknej modernistycznej kamienicy. 

Uczymy młodzież i dorosłych. 
Nasza oferta to:

KURS RYSUNKU I MALARSTWA

Prowadzimy kursy hobbystyczne dla pasjonatów oraz dla osób początkujących.

Przygotowujemy kandydatów na studia artystyczne, projektowe i architektoniczne. 

WARSZTATY ARTYSTYCZNE

Oprócz kursów organizujemy również warsztaty z grafiki artystycznej i warsztaty introligatorskie.

Name: Ateliers Bôar
Description:
Ateliers Bôar, école d'arts à Genève.
Cours de dessin et peinture semi-privés.

Nous proposons des cours de dessin et de peinture semi-privés de 5 participants pour adultes et adolescents dans notre atelier à Genève.

Name: KC Clay Guild
Description: KC Clay Guild was founded in 1988 in the home of potter, Michael Smith.  Soon after, KCCG began meeting in Vanderslice Hall on the campus of the Kansas City Art Institute.   By then a group of approximately 70 artists from the Kansas City area were getting together to educate, purchase materials in bulk and socialize with each other.  Over the years KCCG has grown and evolved.  In order to offer classes to the community, KCCG rented a building near 39th and Southwest Trafficway for several years.  KC Clay Guild purchased our current building at 200 West 74th Street in the Waldo Neighborhood of Kansas City, MO in the early part of the century.

Name: Throw Clay LA
Description:
A connected space in Downtown LA perfect for team building events for up to fifty people. Discover, learn and inspire through the art and craft of pottery. Offering classes, memberships and custom events.

Drop by to check out the studio and talk to us about your group. We'll work with you to develop an event that accomplishes your team goals while making sure everyone has fun.

Name: Art Cafe
Description: Art Cafe is a child-led process & sensory art studio for kids ages 2-10. Kids can follow their curiosities, take risks, and get messy as they dive into sensory-rich materials and bring their own ideas to life. While they create, grownups can kick back in our cozy coffee bar or grab a brew to-go.

Name: ARTificial Hub
Description:
Inspire, Dare, and Stand Out!

At Artificial Hub, we believe AI skills are for everyone! Information is scattered, and finding reliable sources can be tough. Many platforms require time and learning before you can create effective AI-assisted content.

After Artificial Hub's courses, you'll understand each feature and tool, and apply them flexibly across various tasks. You'll be able to create versatile, high-quality content that meets your and your clients' needs.

Create, Have Fun, and Succeed!

AI adoption is booming, making AI skills more crucial than ever. Use what you learn to boost your business or skills and create innovative solutions.

Our courses offer top tips and tricks for using AI efficiently, saving you time with all relevant info in one place.

Experimenting with AI is a rewarding, fun way to express yourself! Challenge yourself to explore AI with an open mind and create captivating content for your audience.

Unleash Your Creativity with Artificial Hub!

Innostu, uskalla ja erotu!

Me Artificial Hubissa uskomme, että tekoälyosaaminen kuuluu kaikille! Tieto on hajallaan ja luotettavia lähteitä on vaikea löytää. Monet alustat vaativat opettelua ennen kuin tekoälyavusteinen sisällöntuotanto onnistuu.

Kurssiemme jälkeen hallitset tekoälyn ominaisuudet ja osaat soveltaa niitä monipuolisesti eri tehtävissä. Opit luomaan korkealaatuista sisältöä, joka vastaa omia ja asiakkaidesi tarpeita.

Luo uutta, pidä hauskaa ja menesty!

Tekoälyn käyttö kasvaa jatkuvasti, ja sen taitaminen on tärkeämpää kuin koskaan. Hyödynnä oppimaasi liiketoimintasi tai osaamisesi kehittämiseksi ja luo uusia, luovia ratkaisuja.

Kursseiltamme saat parhaat vinkit tekoälyn tehokkaaseen hyödyntämiseen ja säästät aikaa, sillä kaikki tarpeellinen löytyy yhdestä paikasta.

Tekoälyn kokeilu on palkitseva ja hauska tapa toteuttaa itseään! Haasta itsesi tutustumaan tekoälyyn avoimin mielin ja luo lumoavaa sisältöä kohdeyleisöllesi.

Vapauta luovuutesi Artificial Hubin kanssa!

Name: SPECTRA - The Fine Arts Society of Daulat Ram College
Dweba School
Description:
DWEBA is Africa’s online art school for the digital generation. It’s your creative home, built to develop bold new skills in the tools and technologies shaping tomorrow.

At DWEBA, you don’t just learn, you connect, collaborate, and grow with a community of young, ambitious digital artists like you. Together, we’re shaping a movement where African creativity meets global opportunity.

This is where talent meets technology.

Name: Academy of Dance, Music & Theatre
Description: At Academy of Dance, Music & Theatre we are dedicated to providing the tools necessary for children to grow, learn and succeed through a love of the arts. We've been a leader in Arts Education for Palm Beach County students for over 15 years, providing quality training that is always fun!

Name: A Diversidade de Todos Nós
Description:
O projeto de extensão “A Diversidade de Todos Nós” tem o objetivo estimular o acesso e o consumo de obras audiovisuais ligadas à diversidade cultural, seja na apresentação do tema em seu conteúdo ou que integre sua origem e/ou produção realizadas em núcleos sociais diversos. Ao propor a realização de ações integradas entre a comunidade unespiana e a sociedade, acreditamos que o audiovisual seja um importante e estratégico agente de sensibilização, conscientização e transformação social.

Trabalhamos com o desenvolvimento de conteúdos que pretendem gerar engajamento e conscientização social por meio do consumo audiovisual, combatendo comportamentos sociais dissonantes ao cumprimento dos Direitos Humanos, como extremismo, radicalismo e violência nas diversas instâncias sociais. Estão em pauta em nosso debate a diversidade manifesta em culturas, credos, gêneros, raças, deficiências etc, buscando, assim, gerar transformações benéficas voltadas para os grupos sociais mais vulneráveis.

Como resultado, acreditamos que a relação de diálogo entre a universidade e a sociedade civil, respeitando o modo de ser e existir de cada um, especialmente os singulares e diversos, possa servir de referencial e estímulo para outras ações futuras de diálogo, produção, pesquisa e construções científicas que contribuam para o desenvolvimento social e humano de maneira respeitosas e construtivas, inclusive por meio de idealizações de políticas públicas que possam ser inspiradas a partir dos resultados alcançados.

O projeto teve início no segundo semestre de 2023 e conta com a colaboração de professores, alunos de graduação e pós-graduação, além de parceiros externos, como a Cinemateca Digital Bauruense.

Name: The Art Beat LLC
Description:
Here at The Art Beat, we have made it our mission to spread creativity through the community we love since 2005! We believe through art, we gain experiences that will last a lifetime.
We love what we do, and we work together as a team; we think of our team as our little family. We are fun, friendly, and easy-going. What makes us stand out from the rest is our customer service. Our customers feel like they know us, and we know them as more than a customer, we care about your experience, and we care about you.

Name: AFO CASTRO Projects
Description:
AFO (American Friends Of) CASTRO is the 501(c)(3) organization that supports the ongoing operations and expansion of CASTRO - a unique contemporary art project in Italy that offers radical education in the arts at a global level. Built by artists for artists, CASTRO provides opportunities for emergent talents in Rome. 

CASTRO’s vision is to foster a vibrant and inclusive artistic community where creativity thrives and boundaries are pushed. Through their innovative programs and collaborations, CASTRO aspires to shape the future of contemporary art in Italy and beyond. CASTRO offers a diverse range of educational programs, workshops, and residencies that encourage artistic growth and experimentation. 

Through fundraising efforts, cultural events, and partnerships with institutions in the United States, American Friends of CASTRO Projects aims to provide additional support for artists participating in the program and foster dynamic transatlantic dialogue and collaboration in the arts.

Name: SEA Strokes Studio
Description:
For the love of art, stories & connection. 

SEA Strokes Studio was born from a dream — to create a place where art isn’t just taught, but felt.  
This isn’t only about techniques and tools.
It’s about expression. Healing. Joy.
It’s about building a vibrant community where every creative soul feels at home.

Whether you’re picking up a brush for the first time or finding your way back to it —
 You’re welcome here.
 You’re enough.
 You belong.

Let’s create magic together.

Name: Vocal Leadership
Description: Vocal Leadership is the innovative method for choir leading that has been developed by Jim Daus Hjernoe in Denmark over the last ten years. Since September 2015, a wide selection of courses is being offered at Codarts Hogeschool voor de Kunsten Rotterdam.

Name: Escola de Artes Visuais
Description:
A Escola de Artes Visuais online é parte de um projeto que eu (Professor Marcos) venho idealizando desde que iniciei minha licenciatura em Artes Visuais. Sempre pensei em um dia abrir uma escola voltada para o estudo, prática e democratização das artes visuais com a possibilidade de atender pessoas de todas as idades e qualquer nível social.

Enquanto não é possível a fundação da escola em local adequado para aulas presenciais, vamos começar no formato de Ensino à Distancia via internet com as primeiras aulas adaptadas dos meus estágios na etapa final de minha graduação.

Ficarei muito feliz em interagir com você aqui na página ou na escola virtual no endereço www.escoladeartes.org

Marcos Antonio
Professor Arte Educador

Name: Kharkiv State Academy of Design & Fine Arts
ARTCO Escuela de Arte y Diseño Contemporáneo
Description:
Con más de 7 años de experiencia en el ámbito artístico y educativo, nos destacamos por ofrecer una formación integral que combina aprendizaje, creatividad y compromiso con la identidad cultural. Contamos con un equipo de docentes e instructores altamente capacitados, apasionados por la enseñanza y el desarrollo artístico.

Brindamos una amplia variedad de cursos, talleres, capacitaciones, conversatorios y conferencias dedicadas al arte y la cultura, adaptadas a diferentes niveles y necesidades. Además, somos la única escuela de arte que integra directamente los espacios históricos y culturales del país  en su metodología, proporcionando una experiencia de aprendizaje única, inmersiva y enriquecedora.
