Name: ISTITUTO di MODA BURGO INTERNATIONAL FASHION AND ARTS ACADEMY, QATAR
POT LA
Description: The first pottery studio in the US that is owned, operated by, and focused on serving BIPOC communities. We run two pottery school locations, and a third space for community engagement.

Name: Aqabawi Art & Culture Studio
Description:
Aqabawi collaborates with local communities in southern Jordan to enhance cultural tourism experiences, preserve coastal heritage, and train local guides as culture experts. By offering unique services that highlight each community's culture, environment, and cuisine, Aqabawi promotes genuine cultural exchange and safe engagement with locals. Aqabawi’s vision includes developing a vibrant Red Sea Food, Art, and Environment Cultural Hub, integrating the region's rich heritage, artistic expressions, and environmental sustainability. This hub attracts locals and tourists to engage with the Red Sea's unique ecosystem, culinary traditions, and artistic contributions. We empower women, promote cultural exchange, and foster sustainability, creating a lasting positive impact on the community, environment, and economy. Through inclusive and educational projects, Aqabawi ensures long-term benefits for all stakeholders, enhancing pride in Jordanian heritage and providing economic opportunities through a sustainable business model and high-quality services.
Since 2019, Aqaba has made significant strides in fostering the participation of women and young girls in the arts and handicraft tourism sector, effectively dismantling societal barriers to female engagement in this burgeoning field. The initiative has resulted in over 100 local women and girls benefiting from these opportunities.

Name: Missouri Drone Academy
Description: Not everyone follows a straight path. At Missouri Drone Academy, we celebrate those who carve their own way—the artists, the builders, the growers, and the innovators. For those who know that college isn't the only route to success, we're here to provide the tools and training to take your ambitions to the skies. From capturing the world through a lens to shaping communities or fields of agriculture, we’re more than a program—we’re a launchpad for the trailblazers, visionaries, and doers of tomorrow. Because the future isn't waiting; it's yours to take.

Name: ArtEZ Artisteducator in Theatre & Media
Description:
Bij ArtEZ Docent Theater Zwolle ontwikkel jij je tot een artisteducator in theater en media met een brede blik op theater: van installaties en performances tot film, gespreksvormen en voorstellingen in het theater en op locatie. Anderen ‘raken’ met jouw kunstenaarschap is jouw kracht. Jij bent de makende, multidisciplinaire student, die vanuit een maatschappelijke betrokkenheid en als ambassadeur van de kunsten het werkveld verovert.

Niveau: bachelor | Locatie: Zwolle | Studieduur: 4 jaar | Taal: Nederlands

Name: Paintiza LLC
Description:
We help your create amazing abstract masterpieces by exposing you to the wonderful world fluid art.

In particular, we help corporations and small businesses unleash the creativity within their employees to improve overall work performance and boost morale through our team building art events!

Our mission is to provide wholesome entertainment and an outlet of uniquely, creative expression through our abstract painting classes and parties for various types of groups, for any occasion. Our core values are integrity, innovation, and customer satisfaction. We strive to execute as the experts in providing the ultimate painting experience!

When you participate in one of many types of events that we provide, you will leave with a beautiful, one of a kind painting and an unforgettable experience!

Schedule your fun TODAY!

Name: Pinot's Palette Jeffersonville IN
Description:
Pinot’s Palette – Jeffersonville | Paint. Drink. Have Fun.

Pinot’s Palette – Jeffersonville is Southern Indiana’s newest destination for unforgettable paint-and-sip experiences. Conveniently located in downtown Jeffersonville, our studio blends creativity, entertainment, and community—offering a vibrant space where guests can relax, celebrate, and make memories together.

We host public painting classes, private parties, corporate team-building events, mobile offsite events, kids’ classes, and fundraisers, all led by professional local artists who guide guests step-by-step through each masterpiece. Whether it’s a girls’ night out, date night, family celebration, or corporate retreat, we make creativity accessible and fun for everyone.

Our studio features:

Welcoming, modern art space designed for social creativity

A curated painting library with hundreds of options

Professional instruction for all skill levels—no experience required

Wine, beer, and cocktails available for purchase

Flexible private event options, including mobile events at homes, offices, hotels, or venues

As part of the Pinot’s Palette family, we bring a national brand’s quality together with the heart of the Jeffersonville community. We’re proud to partner with local organizations, nonprofits, and businesses to create experiences that inspire connection and creativity throughout Southern Indiana and the Louisville metro.

Paint. Drink. Have Fun. — now in Jeffersonville.

Name: Ms Orange Academy of Art
Description: We offer a wide range of classes to help you express who you are and what you dream about. Every art class is uniquely created for you with true enthusiasm and care. We welcome every age and artistic level in our art classes.

Name: Arts & Crafts Amsterdam
Description:
Amsterdam House of Arts & Crafts offers creative group events & workshops for businesses. Are you looking for a hands on workshop, getting the crew out of their heads, work on some teambuilding? Than we've got the workshop for you. 
We offer our own set of workshops: Clay, Painting, Making sneakers, Recycling, Mosaïcs and more. Would you like something special? Amsterdam House of Arts & Crafts offers creative workshop to measure. Like a mosaïc art piece for your company garden wall, a big picture, a table top, a recycling workshop using materials your company produces or uses, or even a joint art piece to hang on your company wall.
Situated in the center of Amsterdam we are easily accessible by public transport. Our workshop and atelier space offers that creative atmosphere that will get your teams creative vibes going. 
And afterwards you can eat at one of the many good restaurants in de area. 
Would you like more information? Contact us via email at info@amsterdamhouseofartsandcrafts or visit our website for more information.

Name: Vefa Fotoğrafçılık ve Görsel Sanatlar Komitesi
Infinite Music School
Description:
Infinite Music School – Where Passion Meets Excellence in Music
Founded in 2024, Infinite Music School is more than just a place to learn music—it’s a gateway to a world of limitless possibilities. Affiliated with Trinity College London, we uphold the highest standards of music education, ensuring our students receive internationally recognized training that empowers them to thrive in the global music industry.

At Infinite Music School, we cater to all skill levels, from absolute beginners to seasoned musicians looking to refine their craft. Our expert instructors provide top-tier training in:



 Guitar – Beginner to Advanced

 Keyboard – Beginner to Advanced

 Vocals – Beginner to Advanced

 Music Production – Beginner to Advanced



But we don’t stop at just teaching—we create careers. Our Talent & Acquisition Team scouts and nurtures exceptional artists, offering them professional management and exclusive career opportunities both locally and internationally. Through our artist development program, we help aspiring musicians turn their passion into a lifelong profession, connecting them with industry-leading mentors, recording opportunities, and performance platforms across the world.



Whether you're looking to master an instrument, refine your voice, produce chart-topping music, or take your artistry to the next level, Infinite Music School is your bridge to success. Join us, and let’s turn your musical dreams into reality.

 In-Person & Online Classes Available

 Unleash Your Potential. Elevate Your Music.

Name: São Mateus Em Movimento
Description: 18 ANOS MOVIMENTANDO A QUEBRADA

Name: Waterside Metal Art
Description: Waterside Metal Art offers artistic blacksmithing experiences courses ranging from beginner level through to master classes run by experienced and qualified persons. Memberships are also available to studio graduates allowing flexible creative exploration in metal art in a supportive and inclusive environment.

Name: ESSE Academy - Art and Painting courses
Description:
At ESSE Academy, we set ourselves apart from other art courses in the Netherlands by adhering to the time-honored traditions of academic art. Unlike contemporary programs that often dilute technical skills with speculative theories and socio-political discourse, our curriculum is grounded in centuries-old principles that provide a robust and methodical approach to visual arts education.

The range of Art courses we offer are based on professional training and fundamental fine arts disciplines: Drawing, Painting and Composition. Our programme and methods primarily aim to lay the basis for fundamental academic knowledge and visual literacy, nurture a refined sense of artistic expression, cultivate a creative mindset and elevate our followers' aesthetic taste.

Name: Artistori 意言社
Description:
Creativity and Originality
This is our core belief. Our approach connects children together through Inquiry-based methods, defining projects that expresses imagination, ideas and creativity. We believe in a vibrant class that is full of life and happiness. Every individual will be interested and educated in every project topic. We bring the world to them through story-telling, presentations and discussions that leads on excitement, inspiration, interests and understanding, generating tons of ideas as a community. Art is a journey, it never stops. Their own ways, their own stories and their own desire to create, leading them with the application of art, beginning with discoveries, tries, mistakes, solutions, mix mediums, techniques, aesthetics and the eagerness to complete and eventually, Artistori wants to share with the world about their creative journey and their very own masterpieces!

Artistori's Missions
Through art, we nurture children, teenagers to adults to become planners, critical thinkers, big picture thinkers, creative problem solvers, determined and disciplined individuals who can focus and concentrate on methodical approaches. We inspire individuals to become artists, expressing new ideas, imaginations and feelings through art as a medium, in all art disciplines, in all forms of creativity, style and language, digitally and physically where originality and uniqueness is valued in all masterpieces. We aim to make the world know about every artists presence and art works on an international level, through online and offline means.

Artistori's Vision
• We strongly believe art can take a person to a better and greater level defining lifelong skills and distinguished personalities.
• Teaching approaches are constantly improved, re-invented.
• Creativity has no limits.
• Aspiring art teachers and art educators are trained here to drive our mission and follow our vision.
• The most interesting and creative curriculums are originally produced.

Name: ARTIVIAN
Description:
Artivian offers unique team-building art-workshops. lunchtime and after-hours expreriences that promote creativity, stress relief, and deeper connection—all from the comfort of your workplace or our list of chosen venues.

Whether it’s the calming flow of Watercolour, the minimalist focus of Sumi-e ink painting, or the powerful symbolism of Kintsugi—repairing broken pottery with gold—our workshops offer a meaningful, hands-on experience that enhances well-being and team dynamics.

Name: FraMakesArt
Description: Art experiences and watercolor courses for adults and kids, individual and groups. Available in main Europe capitals as Milan and Venice, Paris and London.

Name: Academia de las Artes.es
Description: En nuestra academia de arte formamos artistas de todas las edades, combinando técnicas clásicas y creatividad contemporánea. Enseñamos dibujo, pintura y expresión artística en un espacio donde la pasión por el arte renace cada día.

Name: UNM College of Fine Arts
Description: The College of Fine Arts at the University of New Mexico aims to be a leader in the arts, preparing artists, scholars, and educators in evolving disciplinary and professional practices while preserving tradition—locally, in the Americas, and globally. CFA aspires to serve as a model for inclusivity, justice, and a healthy global future where the arts are recognized and supported as foundational to society and its well-being.

Name: TLMusic - aulas de música
Description: instituição especializada em ensino de música.

Name: CIANÓ
Description:
A Cianó nasceu em 2020, idealizada por Dalton Filho e Miriã Urbano, com o objetivo de explorar a fotografia de forma experimental por meio da cianotipia, um processo de impressão fotográfica do século XIX.

Proporcionamos experiências únicas de criação, estimulando o desenvolvimento artístico por meio da fotografia.

Colaboramos com instituições educacionais, culturais, áreas criativas, estúdios de design e artistas visuais, conectando a cianotipia a diferentes contextos e ampliando seu potencial como ferramenta artística e educativa.

Somos um Laboratório Criativo de Cianotipia que respira arte, ciência, natureza e educação.

Name: Government College of Art and Craft, Calcutta
Description: Government College of Art and Craft, Calcutta is one of the oldest and premier institutes of art education in India. Boasting about 159 years legacy, the college has always been a seat of academic excellence. GCAC is a co-educational seat of learning and affiliated to University of Calcutta. Currently the institution follows the Choice Based Credit System (C.B.C.S.) for its undergraduate programmes. From 2005 the institution has also commenced the doctoral degree programme (Ph.D.) in Fine Arts. It is the only fine arts institution in the country to offer a specialized course in Painting indian style. The institution has received an ‘A’ from the NAAC accreditation committee in 2007.

Name: I Congresso NA-VI
Description:
O congresso tem por objetivo reunir "Narrativas Virtuais" como histórias em quadrinhos, animações, jogos, entre outras, que sejam realizadas no mundo Atlântico. Ou seja, tudo o que é produzido virtualmente no continente Americano.

O NA-VI contará com oficinas, apresentação de trabalhos científicos através de pôsters, rodas de conversa, entre outras atividades. Além disso, buscará expor narrativas pouco lembradas e/ou esquecidas pelas mídias tradicionais.

Name: Quanta Academia de Artes
Description: Bem-vindo à Quanta! Nossa escola é dedicada, há mais de quinze anos, ao ensino do artes gráficas de maneira ampla, e ligada a esse universo, como Desenho, Pintura, Ilustração, Histórias em quadrinhos e Arte digital, entre tantas outras.

Name: Kontundente
Description:
KONTUNDENTE – Gestión Integral del Arte – es una empresa consultora de carácter curatorial e interdisciplinar comprometida con la sostenibilidad del artista y del sector cultural.  

Ofrece asesorías, mentorías, proyectos, eventos e investigación para la innovación del mercado del arte, la gestión de la cultura, la gerencia de la industria cultural y de la economía creativa. 

Y en su línea de especialidad para el circuito de las Artes Visuales, ofrece un programa curatorial donde la exposición se convierte en una exploración para la integración del artista con el ecosistema creativo.

Kontundente abre puertas entre el mundo del arte y otros espacios, interconecta formas de pensar, experimenta entre regiones del mundo y acompaña el crecimiento de las ideas de proyecto y de las organizaciones culturales.

Name: Music Teacher LA
Description:
Unleash Your Child's Musical Superpowers with MUSIC TEACHER LA! 

Hey there, awesome parents!  Are you ready to ignite a lifelong love for music in your kids?  Look no further than MUSIC TEACHER LA, where we're turning musical dreams into reality since 1991! 

 Voted the Best in Los Angeles, we're not your average music school. We're the ultimate groove zone for your little rockstars, offering Quality In-Home or LIVE Online Music Lessons for kids (ages 4 and up) and adults.

 Piano? Yep, we've got the magic keys!  Violin? We'll make your hearts sing!  Guitar? Strumming good times ahead!  Drums? We're all about those epic beats!  Singing? Let those vocals soar high! 

 Our instructors? They're not just awesome; they're AMAZING!  With over a decade of teaching experience and serious musical chops, they're the mentors your kids will look up to.  Plus, they're super friendly and hold degrees (Bachelor in Music or higher) from top-notch institutions.

Ready to dive into the groove? Enroll now: (310) 220-0405 or check us out at MusicTeacherLA.com. Let's make music magic together! 

 Proudly serving Los Angeles, Santa Monica, Marina del Rey, Beverly Hills, Calabasas, and beyond. Your kid's musical journey starts here.  #LosAngeles #SantaMonica #MarinadelRey #WestLA #pianolessons #inhome #guitarlessons #singinglessons

Name: Art Beat
Description:
Art Beat – Bangalore’s 5-Star Rated Art Studio

Located in HSR Layout, Art Beat is a vibrant art academy & Studio offering a wide range of workshops and courses for both adults and children. From canvas painting and resin art to pottery and decoupage, there’s something for everyone. Whether you’re a beginner or looking to refine your skills, Art Beat provides a welcoming space to explore your creativity.

Name: Ottawa School of Art
Description:
The Ottawa School of Art (OSA) is Ottawa’s hub for creativity and learning. For over 140 years, OSA has provided high-quality art education for students of all ages and skill levels.

With campuses downtown and in Orléans, OSA offers:
• Fine Arts Diploma and Arts Fundamentals Certificate programs
• Adult general interest courses and workshops
• Children’s and teen programs
• Summer and March Break art camps
• Online courses and flexible learning opportunities
• Community outreach initiatives
• Professional exhibitions in our galleries

As a non-profit organization, OSA is more than a school—it’s a creative community. Where practicing artists teach and inspire the next generation in the studio.

Learn more about our programs and join our community: artottawa.ca

Name: EBA Educadores
Description:
O EBA Educadores, abreviação de Esportistas, Brincantes e Artistas Educadores, é uma empresa que tem por objetivo levar para escolas outras possibilidades de se desenvolver a relação de ensino e aprendizagem, das quais o ensino formal muitas vezes não consegue abraçar.
Desta forma, investimos cada vez mais em espalhar práticas metodológicas para que os aprendizes possam ampliar seu conhecimento e suas maneiras plurais de se perceber o mundo, sua cultura e sua comunidade e, a partir disso construir tantos quantos universos forem necessários e possíveis para a formação de cidadãos melhores!

Sobre a metodologia EBA
É importante salientar que nossas práticas educativas envolvem a construção da brincadeira. Os participantes, junto dos educadores irão apresentar a desenvolver a construção da brincadeira, estimulando sua criatividade e cognição, além de outros aspectos que são relevantes para esse processo de aprendizado, como por exemplo, a socialização.

Name: Café Comité

Name: Centre des arts visuels | Visual Arts Centre
Description:
Avec son école d’art, la plus grande école d’art bilingue, indépendante et sans but lucratif au Canada et sa galerie, la Galerie McClure, un lieu d’exposition dynamique, le Centre des arts visuels vous offre une communauté bien vivante d’artistes, de professeur.e.s et d'étudiant.e.s. Nous faisons partie de la fibre artistique montréalaise depuis 1946. Nos cours sont ouverts à tous ceux et celles qui ont le désir d’apprendre et ils s’adressent à tous les niveaux. Nous avons des classes pour tous les âges et ce, toute l'année. Nous vous invitons à vous joindre à nous pour un cours, un atelier, une exposition, une ruche d'art ou un évènement !
.
.
.
With our School of Art—Canada’s largest bilingual independent art school—and our McClure Gallery—an exciting exhibition venue—the Visual Arts Centre offers you a thriving community of artists, teachers and students. We’ve been part of Montreal’s artistic fabric since 1946. Our courses are open to anyone with a desire to learn. We teach all levels, all ages, all year round. Take a course or workshop, attend a gallery exhibition, seminar or artists talk.

Name: Crooms Academy of Information Technology
Description: Crooms Academy of Information Technology is a company based out of 2200 W 13TH ST, SANFORD, Florida, United States.

Name: Anozero - Bienal de Coimbra
Description:
Anozero - Bienal de Arte Contemporânea de Coimbra é uma iniciativa proposta pelo Círculo de Artes Plásticas de Coimbra, organizada em parceria com a Câmara Municipal de Coimbra e a Universidade de Coimbra, que assume como objectivo primordial promover uma reflexão sobre a classificação da Universidade de Coimbra, Alta e Sofia como Património Mundial da Humanidade pela UNESCO.
 
A Bienal, que teve a sua primeira edição em 2015, propõe um confronto entre arte contemporânea e património, explorando riscos e múltiplas possibilidades. 

Entre bienais, o Anozero produz uma exposição monográfica de um artista de reconhecimento internacional. Em 2023,o Mosteiro de Santa Clara-a-Nova receberá uma exposição monográfica do islandês Ragnar Kjartansson.

The possibility of creation from paper is infinite, So Connect and join the world of Creativity

Description:
A Fine Arts school that provides structured art education for 15+ years. Holding 3 prominent art schools in Bangalore. 

Pencil & Chai, Sampratishta School of Fine Arts and Junior Pencil And Chai. Managed by Fine Artists with the guidance of India’s Veteran Artists. 

Offering Diploma Courses in Fine Arts, Fine arts foundation courses, professional sketching courses, professional painting courses, and fine arts workshops mentored by India’s best artists. 

Inspiring and artist in you

Name: Wine Gogh team building
Description:
Os presentamos Wine Gogh: donde el arte se mezcla con el vino para un team building inolvidable. 

¿Buscas una actividad única de team building que mejore la creatividad y el trabajo en equipo de tu empresa? En Wine Gogh ofrecemos la mejor experiencia de pintura acompañada de un buen vino en Barcelona, Madrid, Valencia y Sevilla

Nuestro equipo de expertos en arte guiará a tu equipo en una experiencia única de pintura y vino que nunca olvidarán. Además de fomentar la colaboración y la comunicación, nuestros eventos de team building te permitirán mejorar en la creatividad y liberar el estrés.

Únete a nosotros para reír, pintar y desatar tu lado artístico, mientras trabajas en equipo. Prepárate para una experiencia única! 

No pierdas la oportunidad de reservar un evento con nosotros para tu empresa y ofrecer a tus empleados una experiencia que nunca olvidarán. Contáctanos para más información!

Name: r
Description: n/a

Name: Muzelinck
Description:
Muzelinck is een maatschappelijk gedreven culturele organisatie. De kern bestaat voor ons uit de stimulering van cultuur en het leggen van verbindingen tussen cultuur en andere domeinen. 

Muzelinck maakt samen met inwoners van Oss en Bernheze van jong tot oud, op school, na school of in de vrije tijd kunst. We stimuleren culturele ontmoetingen waar verbeelding centraal staat. Maak muziek, maak een schilderij, maak het samen! Door te maken, raak je de ander.

Waarom doen we dat? Omdat Kunstbeoefening bewezen positieve gezondheidseffecten heeft zoals vermindering van stress en verbetering van de geestelijke gezondheid. We bevorderen het sociale leven en maken kunst en cultuur meer toegankelijk voor de inwoners van Oss, ongeacht hun achtergrond.

Name: Société de l'Histoire de l'Art Français - SHAF
Description: La Société de l’Histoire de l’Art français (SHAF), fondée en 1870 et active depuis 1872, est une des plus anciennes sociétés savantes consacrées à l’histoire de l’art. Elle a pour devise « Artibus Patriae », c’est-à-dire « Aux Arts de la Patrie ». La Société de l’Histoire de l’Art français est reconnue d’utilité publique depuis 1927.

Name: Aswathi's Classical Gems
Description: Classical Gems is an exquisite art school in the heart of the vibrant city of Calicut! Envisioned as a sanctuary for art enthusiasts, Classical Gems is founded by Kalamandalam Aswathi Prakash and Co-founded by Athul Prakash a dynamic Brand Manger and Marketing Strategist. Kalamandalam Aswathi is a distinguished artist with qualifications ranging from BA in Mohiniyattam & Bharathanatyam from Kerala Kalamandalam, and an MA in Bharatanatyam from Sree Sankaracharya University, Kalady. Aswathi's profound love for the rich Indian classical arts, coupled with her desire to create a nurturing space for artistic expression, became the driving force behind the establishment of this art school.

Name: Beo Art House - BAH
Description: Hobby center for creativity development. We started as a simple school for people who enjoy the art as hobbyists, and today we offer our services to people and companies, such as wall painting, mosaic, big and small scale models for promotional and other purposes. Also, we include web-shop providing artistic materials for all types of arts we have in our offer, as much as all types of original handmade products.

Name: BrushBox Art Academy
Description: brushbox art academy, based in ahmedabad, india, is a creative art space offering art & craft classes for kids, along with fine art & digital art training for adults. our programs are designed for both hobby learners and those aspiring to build a career in visual art. we also host art & craft workshops, parties & events.

Name: Escola Artística de Soares dos Reis
Description:
A Escola Artística de Soares dos Reis comemora este ano letivo 140 anos a servir o país no ensino das Artes. Oferece atualmente um conjunto de 5 cursos gratuitos, entre cursos de Ensino Artístico Especializado nas áreas das Artes Visuais e dos Audiovisuais, bem como, um curso de Ensino Profissional de Animação 2D e 3D. Ambas as ofertas de formação são de nível secundário, de dupla certificação no nível 4. 

Cursos de Ensino Artístico Especializado: Produção Artística, com especializações em Cerâmica, Ourivesaria, Realização Plástica do Espetáculo, Têxteis e Gravura/ Serigrafia; Design de Comunicação, com especializações em Design Gráfico e Multimédia; Design de Produto, com especializações em Cerâmica, Equipamento, Ourivesaria/ Joalharia e Têxteis; e Comunicação Audiovisual, com especializações em Cinema e Vídeo Fotografia Multimédia.

Curso Profissional: Técnico de Animação 2D e 3D.

Name: Work-Shop
Description:
Work-Shop is a crusader for all things creative. We run a wide range of quirky and affordable short courses that broaden horizons and unveil potential.

Mission
Work-Shop provides a broad range of affordable short courses in arts, crafts, and skills that can be utilised in everyday life. We promote and support local artists and industry experts.

Name: HBK Braunschweig
Description: Die Hochschule für Bildende Künste Braunschweig ist eine der führenden Kunsthochschulen Deutschlands und die einzige staatliche Kunsthochschule in Niedersachsen. Hier werden Kunst, Design und Wissenschaft unter einem Dach vereint. Das Studienangebot an der HBK umfasst ein breites Spektrum von Kunstwissenschaft und Kunstpädagogik, über Darstellendes Spiel und Freie Kunst bis hin zu Medienwissenschaften, Visuelle Kommunikation, Transformation Design und weiteren Studiengängen. Forschung und Lehre, digital wie analog, sind an der HBK äußerst vielfältig und bieten den Studierenden Abschlüsse als Bachelor of Arts, Master of Arts oder Master of Education, sowie den Diplom- und Meisterschüler*innen-Abschluss.

Name: Art Square Academy
Description:
Art Square Academy is a professional art education center in Egypt that provides all varieties of art courses for adults and kids, we are the only place where you can learn, practice and have fun.

We deliver high quality of academic education in all art fields including Fine Arts, Fashion, Photography, Accessories and Interior Design and special courses for kids.

We recruit professional instructors with practical field knowledge to ensure the best material and experience is delivered to our students, we also offer flexible timings and payment options for your convenience.

Name: G Star School of the Arts
Description: G Star High School of the Arts is a tuition-free public charter high school with a focus in film, animation, and performing arts and A+ academics in International Baccalaureate and Cambridge AICE programs.

Name: Dansk Talentakademi
Description:
Dansk Talentakademi er et unikt tilbud til unge i alderen 16 - 25 år indenfor kunstnerisk talentudvikling. 

Vi tilbyder grundkurser indenfor flere kunstarter, har et unikt tværfagligt miljø og et godt og trygt socialt sammenhold og fællesskab på tværs af linjerne med mulighed for at flytte ind i vores boenheder i Campus eller i dele-lejligheder centralt i Holstebro.

Vi har seks linjer:
- Dans
- Film
- Forfatter
- Kunst & Design
- Musical & Teater
- Musik / MGK (Musikalsk grundkursus)

På hver linje bliver elevholdene undervist af professionelle og engagerede undervisere, hvilket er med til at skabe vores høje niveau. Udover undervisningen får man som elev tilbud om at arbejde projektbaseret og deltage i sociale arrangementer.

Vi udfordrer eleverne til at udfolde deres kunstneriske udtryk, vi styrker deres netværk og deres muligheder for at etablere sig med og udvikle egen kunstneriske praksis.

Dansk Talentakademi griber ud i verden og sætter sit præg på omverden; både som en form for kunstnerisk magnet i Holstebro, der tiltrækker kunstnere og professionelle fagfolk fra hele Danmark og udlandet – og gennem de løbende udadvendte projekter, vi deltager i.

Name: SPAO: Photographic Arts Centre
Description: School of the Photographic Arts: Ottawa is an independent, not-for-profit photographic visual arts school. We house the only two-year photographic arts college diploma in Canada. Our mandate is to provide an intensive and collaborative learning experience and to enrich the photographic and visual arts culture of Ottawa and beyond.

Name: RASALAYA SCHOOL OF FASHION STUDIES
Description: Rasalaya film and art institute is dedicated to foustering creativity, talent and passion in the fields of film and arts. Established with a vision to create vibrant space for aspiring film makers, artists and creative professionals. our institute offers a platform where ideas are nurtured, talents are horned and creativity thrives at Rasalaya, we believe in a hands-on, immersive approach to learning. Our state-of-the-art facilities and expert faculty members, who are industry leaders in their respective fields, ensure that students receive world-class training in the nuances of film production, visual arts, and other creative disciplines.

Name: Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain
Description:
The Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain is a private, non-profit organization with a mission to provide exceptional multidisciplinary arts experiences that develop individual talent and inspire a lifelong passion for the arts. Since 1977, the Oklahoma Arts Institute has recruited nationally renowned artists to teach a fine arts program for talented Oklahoma youth and a series of continuing education workshops for adults. All programs are held at the Quartz Mountain Arts and Conference Center in Lone Wolf, Oklahoma.

The Oklahoma Summer Arts Institute is an intensive, two-week academy in the literary, visual, and performing arts for Oklahoma’s most artistically advanced high school students. Students are selected through a statewide competitive audition process, and all accepted students automatically receive a full scholarship to the program, worth over $4,200.

The Oklahoma Fall Arts Institute is a series of four-day weekend workshops for educators and adult artists of all ability levels, including true beginners. Instruction is offered in the literary, visual, and performing arts, including workshops tailored to educators, who can receive full scholarships to the program. Over 50,000 Oklahoma public school children are reached each year through their teachers’ attendance at the Fall Institute.

The Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain is funded through a unique public/private partnership. Major funding is provided by private donors secured by the Oklahoma Arts Institute, with matching funds from the Oklahoma State Department of Education and additional support from the Oklahoma Arts Council and the Oklahoma Tourism and Recreation Department.

Name: MOVIES – Moving Images Arts
Description: Iuav University of Venice postgraduate specialisation course on the moving image as an expressive medium in contemporary art and as a means to activate relational spaces for the arts. It offers an interdisciplinary approach with a programme that intersects visual and performing arts, graphics, architecture and curatorial studies.

Name: 18frames
Description:
18 Frames er en 3-årig uafhængig og alternativ filmuddannelse med base på Fyn. Uddannelsen består af 18 medlemmer pr. årgang fordelt på seks faglinjer: instruktør, producer, manuskriptforfatter, fotograf, klipper og tonemester.

18 Frames er en forening med en flad struktur uden topstyring, hvilket vil sige, at medlemmerne selv leder og former deres egen uddannelse. 18 Frames er altså både en filmuddannelse og en forening. 

For at være uafhængig modtages der ikke penge af Uddannelsesministeriet, hvorfor skolen i stedet er finansieret gennem støtte fra samarbejdspartnere, herunder særligt Nordisk Film Fonden, Det Danske Filminstitut, FilmFyn og Producent Rettigheder Danmark, og via medlemmernes egenbetaling.

Name: Plataforma IMPROV
Description: Na Plataforma IMPROV somos dedicados à arte do improviso teatral e interdisciplinar. Formações, espetáculos, partilha e uma comunidade criativa pronta para jogar contigo.

Name: Collectief Koppig
Description:
Wij zijn een verzameling van kunstenaars, sociaal werkers, studenten en educatoren.
Zelforganisatie, experiment, ontwikkeling en een meerstemmig geluid staan centraal in ons collectief.

Wij bieden een platform voor verschillende kunsten in de vorm van tentoonstellingen, evenementen en educatie in de vorm van non-formeel leren. Makers en deelnemers kunnen naast en met elkaar hun talenten ontwikkelen in onze (zeefdruk)werkplaats en de ateliers.

Studenten/stagiaires werken bij ons onder de noemer Vak Apart. Ze ontdekken de brug tussen sociaal en artistiek. Er vind uitwisseling plaats met docenten en studenten van uiteenlopende opleidingen van kunstacademie tot speciaal onderwijs. Wij vinden het belangrijk om educatie aan te bieden buiten het klaslokaal en in de wijk, maar komen ook naar scholen toe.

Daarnaast doen we vooral veel samen met en DWARS door elkaar heen: van randprogrammering op je festival, interactief decor op je feestje tot het helpen organiseren van je lievelingsbuurtfeest. 

Dit doen wij meestal vanuit Presikhaaf waar wij sinds januari 2023 in een nieuw pand zijn neergestreken. Ons hoofdwartier huisvest een aantal vaste werkplekken, een expo- /projectkelder, een werkplaats, een gedeeld atelier en een zeefdrukkerij.

Name: FOACAL Artesanía CyL
Description:
La Federación de Organizaciones Artesanas de Castilla y León, (FOACAL) nació en 1987 con el objetivo de impulsar, promocionar y defender la artesanía (no alimentaria) de Castilla y León. 

Es una organización sin ánimo de lucro de ámbito regional que aglutina a las asociaciones de artesanos y profesionales. 

Ofrece formación permanente de oficios artísticos en CEARCAL, su sede en Valladolid.

Name: MTSU Art and Design Department
Description:
About the Department of Art and Design

Chaired by Associate Professor Michael Baggarly, the Department of Art and Design offers a BS degree in art education, a BA degree in art history, and BFA degrees in graphic design and studio art. More than 300 art majors and 1,000 non-majors enroll each semester in our classes taught by twenty permanent faculty members. Our Department is proud of its many opportunities for Art and Design students to use technology. With state-of-the-art computer labs and over ten master classrooms, every teaching area has technology at their fingertips.

Name: Belger Arts
Description:
Belger Arts encourages viewers to explore, question, create and deepen their understanding of art and the world around them.  
Belger Arts has 3 Kansas City locations:
Since 2000, Belger Arts Center (2100 Walnut St., KCMO 64108) has staged over 70 large-scale contemporary art exhibitions, drawing upon the extensive John and Maxine Belger Family Foundation Collection, as well as a rich variety of local, national, and international artists. 
Belger Crane Yard Studios (2011 Tracy Ave., KCMO 64108), an arts complex dedicated to providing studio and exhibition space for artist, opened in 2013. A range of programming in ceramics education, in addition to the Red Star Residency program and Crane Yard Clay ceramics supply store, has made Belger a center for contemporary art.  
The Belger Glass Annex (1219 E. 19th St., KCMO 64108) opened in 2021 and is the first public glassblowing studio in Kansas City of its scale and scope.  With state of the art glassblowing equipment and tools, a furnace that holds 300 pounds of molten glass, and three work stations, it’s an ideal location for teaching classes and hosting visiting artists.  The Belger Glass Annex is primed to be a Midwest hub for glass art, education and appreciation, strengthening Kansas City’s reputation as an arts destination.

Name: Glen Echo Park Partnership for Arts and Culture, Inc.
Description: Glen Echo Park Partnership for Arts and Culture is the management entity for Glen Echo Park,which offers children's theater, puppetry, social dance, exhibitions and arts education programs in historic former amusement park buildings owned by the National Park Service

Name: NeuraBloom(not-for-profit)
Description:
Neurodiverse Fine Art Programme

Empowering neurodiverse children through fine art, helping schools, local organisations, and communities build confidence, connection, and creativity locally and globally.

NeuraBloom is a not-for-profit delivering the Neurodiverse Fine Art Programme to enhance personal growth and community engagement. Using fine art, we help participants develop expression, social skills, emotional regulation, and creativity. Guided by our values - Empathy, Creativity, Development, Inclusion sessions are offered in-person or online across the UK, UAE, USA, China, India, Japan, Australia, Canada, Brazil, Germany, and South Korea.

Our Neurodiverse Fine Art Programme uses creative practice as a catalyst for learning, connection, and growth. Designed for children and adults, it supports:
- Expression & Communication
- Social Skills Development
- Emotional Regulation
- Creativity & Imagination
- Sense of Accomplishment
- Fine Motor Skills
- Cognitive Development
- Community Involvement
- Exploration of Interests
- Cultural Awareness

We collaborate with schools, educators, SMEs, PLCs, healthcare providers, and local community organisations to create inclusive, strengths-based workshops. Participants explore creativity safely, develop skills, and connect with peers. Operating in 11 countries, we offer flexible in-person and online options for broad participation.

NeuraBloom is looking for local Charity Partnerships to support local communities in Q1 ,Q2-2026. Schools, SMEs, PLCs, and healthcare providers interested in contributing or partnering are encouraged to contact us to express interest.

Name: Siena Art Institute
Description:
The Siena Art Institute (SART) is a non-profit arts & sustainability organization based in the heart of Siena, Italy.

Since 2010 we lead a unique study abroad experience for Undergraduate or Post-Baccalaureate art, writing, sustainability, museum studies, political sciences and art history students. We also host artist residencies, Project Fellowships, sustainability experts residencies and a visiting artist program. For the local community, we offer art & sustainability courses, training and volunteering opportunities, talks and events.

We manage a space for horticultural, beekeeping and permacultural experimentation, "Ortoaperto". Classes and artist studios are hosted in our headquarters, a building part of the former psychiatric hospital architectural complex called Il Punto|The Point.
In 2022 the Siena Art Institute helped creating Art Cloud Greece, its sister organisation based in Athens (Greece). The organisation involves SART alumni and former resident artists and promotes workshops, training opportunities, art projects and exhibitions.
In 2024 we inaugurated our "Hidden Garden", a small grove in the shadow of Siena's medieval walls. The space, open to all - students, artists and visitors - is sustainably managed and accessible to blind, deaf and deaf-blind people.

Since 2025 the Siena Art Institute manages The Peace Room project, developed thanks to a grant from the Region of Tuscany and Giovanisì for Toscanaincontemporanea2025.

Name: Pencils n Brushes artworks
Description:
Set up in 2010, Pencils n Brushes artworks is a Visual art and design service company in the arts and crafts industry in Nigeria.  The company was officially launched in 2011. Pencils n Brushes artworks was created to be a safe haven for artist and creative minds to create the most spectacular art form seen in the country. 

Thus the company searches for the best hands, teaches and employs disciplined and creative artists with potential. A present dissatisfaction with the situation of visual artist and visual art in their immediate environment and this partly prompted the creation of the company. 

Overtime the company has created a mark in the art industry, changing the face of art one art at a time. It has also hosted mini exhibitions with its main exhibition in the G.E.M.S.T.O.N.E  leadership center, interviewed by Afro art media and has been recognized as a company poised to change the views about art in the country. 

Pencils n Brushes  is currently involved in Project Raise which seeks to empower young minds. The project is in partnership with G.E.M.S.T.O.N.E leadership center (owned by Fela Durotoye) and targets students in Primary schools, inspiring them and teaching them to balance their talents with their education. 

Pencils n brushes artworks is trusted by clients like : Wema Bank Plc, Enyo retail and Supply, Chocolate city Group, Guinness Nigeria Plc, 2706 Events, Bella Naija, LAFARGE, Stanbic IBTC, British American Tobacco, Wedding Guru etc.

Name: Politecnico delle Arti Bergamo - Accademia Belle Arti G. Carrara
Description:
Fondata nel 1796 per volontà del conte Giacomo Carrara, l'Accademia di Belle Arti G. Carrara di Bergamo è una delle più antiche accademie italiane.
Dal 2023, insieme al Conservatorio di Musica G. Donizetti, costituisce il Politecnico delle Arti di Bergamo: il primo innovativo polo di Alta formazione artistica in Italia. Un punto di riferimento d’eccellenza riconosciuto dal MUR (Ministero dell'Università e della Ricerca) e parte del sistema AFAM (Alta Formazione Artistica, Musicale e Coreutica).

Name: Flower City Arts Center
Description:
Flower City Arts Center is a community-based not-for-profit organization that educates, encourages, and inspires all people to create and enjoy the visual arts, design, and media. We embrace the fact that the arts elevate humanity, are naturally therapeutic, and provide tools for expression in the language of the heart in a world that needs healing. Flower City Arts Center strives to create social change through arts, education, and creative entrepreneurship. We provide high-quality arts programs to the most in-need people in our community.

The Flower City Arts Center celebrated 50 years in 2020. Established in 1970, The Flower City Arts Center is housed in a historic firehouse constructed in 1895-1905. We are the only community visual arts center conveniently located within the City of Rochester. In 1974, the Arts Center was incorporated as a 501(c)3 not-for-profit educational institution. In addition to our staff and board, we have up to 20 artists-in-residence and many instructors, studio artists, volunteers, and interns.

What We Do: Art for All People!
We offer foundational arts in Printmaking & Book Arts (PABA), Fine Arts, Ceramics, Photography and Digital Arts. Additionally, Flower City Arts Center runs specialized classes and inclusive programs for a wide array of people with varying physical and mental abilities. In recognition of our LGBTQIA+ community members and their allies, we are part of the Safe Space Alliance. We offer creative healing and therapeutic arts, studio space rental, three galleries with rotating public exhibits, workshops, lectures, classes, entrepreneurial projects, and memberships for the Greater Rochester Area.

Name: Academy of Visual Arts, Frankfurt
Description:
WE ARE
the Academy of Visual Arts, Frankfurt. As a state-recognized institution, we practice interconnected working across the classical disciplinary boundaries. This makes us unique in the German university landscape. Together with artists, humanities scholars, computer scientists, architects and natural scientists, our students work on aesthetic, philosophical and technological issues and develop innovative design solutions.

»COMMUNICATION DESIGN« STUDY PROGRAM
The eight-semester full-time study program focuses on the application of communication design in the fields of Textiles and Fashion, Law and Politics, Art and Culture, Society and Social Affairs as well as Economy and Business. We combine teaching with research tasks and develop new fields of application for communication design in the context of social issues.

OUR DIDACTIC GOAL
is the formation of communicatively oriented designers who, through the teaching and development of scientific, technical and design skills, see themselves as critically reflective »authors« in socially relevant communication processes.

DEGREE
The bilingual study program concludes with a state examination.
For graduates, career entry is correspondingly diverse: In addition to the classic fields of employment in agencies, publishing houses and media companies, there are promising opportunities in institutional leadership positions in culture, art and media work, as well as at the municipal, federal or EU level.

OUR HISTORY
began in 1957, when the painter and graphic artist Carlo Ruppert founded the Westend Art School, which later became the "Academy of Visual Arts, Frankfurt". Modeled after the Bauhaus, the Academy has established itself both nationally and internationally. In close cooperation with partners from culture and business, it has since been making a fundamental contribution to the growing importance of design.

Name: Scuola Internazionale di Comics Napoli
Description:
Napoli, città d’arte e cultura millenaria, ospita una delle prestigiose sedi dell’altrettanto storica Scuola Internazionale di Comics.

Il fermento artistico partenopeo ha permesso, oltre alla già ampia offerta formativa della Scuola Internazionale di Comics, l’apertura degli esclusivi corsi di Scultura, Fotografia e Pittura; discipline che avvicinano gli allievi a: Cinema, Effetti Speciali, Grafica, Foto-Moda, Videogames.

L’ampia Sala Cinema 4K, che ospita workshop e conferenze di ogni genere, l’Aula di Scultura, in cui si plasmano i talenti dei giovani professionisti, l’eccezionale Studio 8, che vanta l’unico limbo fotografico del centro storico e in cui cinema, fotografia, tecnologia si fondono all’avanguardia della tecnica, rappresentano il fiore all’occhiello della struttura.

L’intento è di soddisfare la richiesta di un mercato che pretende versatilità e competenza. Fumetti, Grafica, Illustrazione, Animazione e Intrattenimento Digitale rappresentano un unico filone creativo a cui interfacciarsi con un attento intreccio interdisciplinare. La nostra missione è costruire un background sufficientemente solido che faccia da trampolino di lancio per gli allievi/futuri professionisti.

 Situata nel cuore del Centro Storico, in un edificio del 1600, tra i più antichi e monumentali della città, la sede vanta una ampiezza di oltre 600 metri quadri ed è ben collegata a tutte le principali reti di trasporto urbano / extraurbano.
E' accreditata dalla Regione Campania (2016.083378722/12/2016) e certificata ISO-9001.

Name: The Art Blend
Description:
At Art Blend, we are dedicated to transforming the way artists and clients interact, ensuring that the world of creativity is accessible to all without the barriers typically imposed by traditional platforms. Our brand was born from the desire to support both budding art students and seasoned painters, offering them a seamless way to connect with clients, display their talent, and ultimately build a stable career in the art world.

 In an industry where commissions and intermediaries often cut into an artist’s earnings, Art Blend stands out by promoting a zero-commission model. We firmly believe that artists should have full ownership of the value they create. At Art Blend, every painter, whether a student or a professional, can register, build a profile, and exhibit their work to potential clients without worrying about hidden fees or deductions. This ensures that the creative minds behind each piece are justly rewarded for their efforts, helping them to sustain and grow their practice. 

Our platform is designed with simplicity and functionality in mind, allowing artists to craft detailed profiles that showcase not only their artwork but also their unique journey. Each artist has the opportunity to present their personal story, philosophy, and inspiration behind their creations, giving clients a deeper understanding of the artist’s perspective. This holistic approach fosters meaningful connections between artists and clients, allowing them to go beyond mere transactions and form lasting relationships based on mutual appreciation for art.

Let’s create something meaningful together.

Name: Women's Studio Workshop
Description:
Since 1974, Women's Studio Workshop (WSW) has been a thriving visual arts organization with specialized studios in printmaking, hand papermaking, silkscreen, ceramics, letterpress, photography, and book arts. 

Our mission is to operate and maintain an artists’ workspace that encourages the voice and vision of women and trans, intersex, nonbinary, and genderfluid artists. We provide professional opportunities for artists at various stages of their careers and promote programs designed to stimulate public involvement, awareness, and support for the visual arts.

WSW has substantially advanced the careers of more than 700 artists through this program. WSW also creates professional opportunities for young artists through its internship program; has the highest rated visual arts education program in New York State; hosts cultural tourists through 20+ Summer Art Institute workshops; runs year-round ceramics classes for the local community; and is the largest publisher of handmade artists’ books in North America, having published more than 240 limited-edition works.

Afan is a youth-driven art collective founded in Jordan in 2024. It aims to document Arab art in a contemporary way, creating a safe space for creativity and knowledge-sharing, while raising awareness of visual arts rooted in a genuine Arab identity.

We focus on producing and sharing art content across social media, in addition to organizing events, activities, and both theoretical and practical workshops that enable young artists and the wider community to develop their skills and deepen their understanding of Arab art.

Our Vision: To be a leading platform for contemporary Arab art, connecting artists with society and empowering youth with space for expression and creativity.

Name: Sawtooth School For Visual Art
Description:
Sawtooth School for Visual Art is a non-profit community art and craft school in downtown Winston-Salem, NC. Sawtooth offers classes and workshops in eleven disciplines and fosters creativity through its community outreach programs, including Art + Wellness, serving patients, survivors, and caregivers. 

Since 1945, Sawtooth has been a creative hub for the region, offering high-quality and hands-on offerings for students of all ages, skill levels, and backgrounds. Sawtooth has recently expanded with two wood-fired kilns at the North Carolina Museum of Art, Winston-Salem (SECCA) and two studios at the Intergenerational Center for Arts and Wellness, a new 62,500-square-foot, state-of-the-art community center built in collaboration with 21 partners.

Sawtooth is "your space to create," with hands-on visual art experiences for students of all ages, backgrounds, and skill levels.

Description:

At PLAYDAY, children engage in exploratory projects in an inclusive, diverse, respectful, and positive setting. We inspire children to make ART all while developing a variety of life-long cognitive and emotional skills such as hand-eye coordination, communication, critical thinking, self-awareness, patience, and most importantly self-confidence. 

𝗛𝗔𝗩𝗘 𝗙𝗨𝗡 | 𝗕𝗘 𝗔𝗪𝗘𝗦𝗢𝗠𝗘 𝗶𝘀 𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗺𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗼!

AFTER SCHOOL SESSIONS w/ PICK-UP

ALL DAY CAMPS
WEEKEND WORKSHOPS
OFF-SITE ART CLASSES

From Little Architects, where skyscrapers, cruise ships and, tree houses are designed and drafted, to Dream Weaver, where pattern, line, and texture are explored through hand-weaving and fiber arts, to Stencil Stories, where fantastic tales unfold through Banksy style stenciled narratives, all of our classes encourage kids to find their own unique voice and expressive qualities.

Tamarind is centered on a mission to sustain the art of lithography. Encompassing a workshop, gallery, library, and advanced trainjng program for artisan printers, Tamarind conducts research, trains professional printers, and collaborates with artists of all disciplines to produce and publish original works on paper. Name: JH Academy - École de dessin
Description:
JH Academy est une école privée fièrement ancrée dans le paysage culturel béninois. Elle forme les talents  de demain en Bande dessinée & illustration, Peinture & Sculpture, Animations 2D & 3D, Webtoon, Dessin de mode tout en promouvant l’ouverture sur le monde grâce à des partenariats uniques avec des écoles européennes.

Pourquoi suivre une formation en dessin et illustration numérique ?
Pour permettre aux apprenants de repousser leurs limites créatives et de devenir une perle rare demandée dans le milieu professionnel et entrepreneurial.

Chez JH Academy, on prépare les talents au monde professionnel avec de nombreux projets encadrés par les meilleurs dessinateurs et illustrateurs du moment. Ces projets qu’on crée leur permettent de découvrir les réalités du monde du travail et de les préparer à leur insertion professionnelle dans les structures comme les studios de film ou d’animation, les agences de communication et de publicité, les maisons d’édition de livre et de BD, les groupes de presse et journaux, les usines de fabrication, les cabinets d’architecture...etc

A qui s’adressent les formations payantes en Dessin et Illustration Numérique ?
• Collègiens, bacheliers et particuliers 
• L’admission se fait sur dossier, entretien de motivation et présentation d’un dossier de travaux personnels (dessins, photos, vidéos ou portfolio)
• L’admission parallèle est possible sous certaines conditions (nous consulter). 

EYA EXCELLENCE DESSIN
Grâce au partenariat avec le centre communautaire EYA qui a pour vocation la promotion des talents juvéniles au Bénin, l’école de dessin JH Academy offre dans un cadre d’apprentissage sain et paisible, des formations gratuites en dessin aux enfants du primaire attirés par le dessin et les arts.

Durée des formations : Dessin de mode (1 an), Peinture& Sculpture (2 ans), Bande dessinée & illustrations (3 ans), Films d’Animations (3 ans).

Udover at være en af Det Kongelige Teaters balletskoler, er vi også en almindelig friskole med elever fra 0. - 9. klasse.
Vi tilbyder en skoledag hvor kreative fag, dans og bøger smelter sammen med 
kammeratskab og respekt for hinanden.

De små lærer af de store, og de store lærer at inkludere de små. 
Det, synes vi, er en god værdi at tage med sig, og det er en kæmpe 
fordel, når vi er ude at optræde sammen. 

Man skal selvfølgelig bevæge sig, når man går på vores skole. 
Men man behøver ikke at være verdensmester, når man starter. 
Der skal være plads til at vokse med opgaven, og vi kan godt vurdere, om potentialet er der.  

Vi bor lige midt i Odense, tæt på banegården, og der er altid en voksen 
til at følge vores mindste elever frem og tilbage.

Name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Bari
Description: A public institution for higher education in visual arts, committed to artistic research, interdisciplinary practice, and contemporary cultural production.

Name: Instituto Semiose
Description: O Instituto Semiose é a digital school da nova economia para alunos dispostos a estimular suas ideias e construir sua jornada criativa. Transforme suas ideias em realidade.

Name: Scuola Superiore d'Arte Applicata del Castello Sforzesco
Description:
Una comunità di persone che condividono la passione per le arti applicate. 
Una scuola / laboratorio dove si insegnano e si imparano linguaggi visivi antichi e moderni. Codici espressivi che possono essere utilizzati per esprimersi, per comunicare, per lavorare. Non di rado anche per sognare. Un lavoro paziente che ha per fine il benessere. Un impegno inteso come esperienza umana collettiva. Una scuola aperta, organizzata attraverso laboratori e atelier tematici. Affresco, mosaico, vetrata, pittura, incisione, arazzo, illustrazione, fumetto, grafica: queste le discipline su cui si lavora. Mestieri e linguaggi tradizionali, senza aver paura di misurarsi con l’innovazione.

Un insegnamento senza teoria e lezioni frontali. I fondamenti concettuali delle diverse discipline si apprendono attraverso il lavoro manuale. Imparare facendo. Lavorare assieme, collaborare. Una rete di rapporti, nodi e connessioni. Gli studenti, i docenti, lo staff, gli ospiti. Un gruppo di persone affiatate, disponibili e attente. Una parola chiave è: “gentilezza”. Cura. Cura per il tempo necessario (per realizzare i diversi lavori) e attenta misura (a misura del singolo così come a misura della comunità). 

Una qualità che viene perseguita ponendo il fluire del tempo al centro del nostro lavoro. Una scuola che vive di sera, svincolata dalla frenesia delle ore diurne. Tempo che si dilata e si comprime a seconda dei nostri vincoli e delle nostre necessità. Sera dopo sera, con metodo, con pazienza, imparando a ragionare sui tempi lunghi e lunghissimi.

Genealogie importanti e spesso sorprendenti. Studenti che diventano insegnanti, trasmettere e tramandare i saperi artigianali di generazione in generazione. Una comunità impegnata in un lungo viaggio iniziato con un Regio Decreto, il 2 luglio 1882. Qualche nome passato di qui? Carlo Carrà e Adolfo Wildt. Giuseppe Palanti, Pino Tovaglia e Piero Fornasetti. Senza dimenticarci di Sergio Toppi fino a Paolo D’Altan, le sorelle Durante, Stefano Turconi.

Name: Delhiartworkshop
Description: We take printmaking workshops at our own studio and  various different studios in and around Delhi.

Name: Kalakriti Fine Arts
Description: Art speaks where words are unable to explain.

Name: aManolab
Description:
aMano is a creative laboratory that seeks to tell the stories behind artisan objects and connect the skills and knowledge of artisans with people interested in the manual world.
We have 7 years of experience in teaching craft techniques to different populations. We design courses and craft products according to the needs of each of our clients.

Name: PaintDraw MNL
Description: We give learners young and old access to art classes curated and taught by professional artists.

Name: Wheyham
Description:
Discover the captivating world of the Nok Culture, a fascinating and mysterious civilization that thrived over two thousand years ago in what is now Jaba Local Government, Kaduna State, Nigeria. 

 Join us on this enlightening adventure as we celebrate the Nok Civilization and its significance. Let the Wheyham Documentary inspire and captivate you, fueling your curiosity and expanding your understanding of our shared human history.

Name: PenArt
Description:
PenArt is a nonprofit arts education and exhibition center in the heart Door County, Wisconsin. Founded in 1965 by visionary Chicago filmmaker and artist, Madeline Tripp Tourtelot, PenArt has been operating as an independent 501(c)3 nonprofit organization since 1992. It has supported the creative growth of novice to advanced artists from across the country, made a tremendous impact on the creative health of the Door County community, and supported the careers of many established local, regional, and nationally known visual artists. Over the years PenArt has grown from a small local arts center into a staple and beloved destination for thousands of visitors and students, and hundreds of working artists on an annual basis.

PenArt’s goal is to foster a creative, inclusive, art-making community, providing access to quality education, and professionally equipped studios, as well as high-caliber exhibitions and engaging events for everyone. It promotes the joy and transformative power of art and actively supports individual creative growth and arts appreciation. PenArt looks to serve as the premier resource for visual art education and artistic development, widely known and celebrated for its high-quality programs, accessibility, and inclusivity.

Name: Accademia del Disegno
Description: Un'Accademia di Belle Arti completamente online per seguire corsi live con insegnanti oppure in streaming da guardare dove e quando vuoi.

Name: Harfun Studio
Description: Founded in 2020, Harfun Studio emerges as a haven for emerging artists, conceived and nurtured by creatives with a shared passion for fostering artistic expression within the community. Within the confines of our studio, we extend an invitation to individuals seeking respite from the monotony of everyday existence, encouraging them to unearth the latent wellsprings of childlike creativity. Through immersive encounters with diverse artistic mediums, participants are empowered to craft their own unique artworks, thereby embarking on a journey of self-discovery and creative rejuvenation.

Name: Ceruleum - School of Visual Arts
Description: Ceruleum is an Art school founded in 1980 in Lausanne. we propose a foundation class, two bachelors ( one in Illustration and Comics, the other one in traditional character animation ) and a Master in animation. We also propose a lot of different workshops in painting, drawing, etching and more...

Name: Eco Art Gallery
Description:
EcoArt Gallery, as the first joint art gallery of these ten countries " Turkey, Azerbaijan, Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan,Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Afghanistan, Pakistan and Iran "
is about to gather all these shattered pieces together  and present the whole picture of the art and cultural commonalities of these historical countries as a big mirror collects and displays a complete mirror and with this cultural method smooths the path of peace and friendship.
Eco Art Gallery has now opened its first branch in Ferdowsi World Trade Center in Tehran and plans to establish other branches in the near future, first in the capitals of ECO member countries and then in some other countries with the goal of focusing on the art of this historical land.

Name: Dormi Arts
Description:
Dormi Arts: Where Art Meets Solutions

Dormi Arts is your one-stop shop for artistic expression and social impact. We create, promote, and celebrate art in all its forms, using its power to tackle society's challenges and inspire positive change. Join us as we turn art into essential solutions for a better tomorrow. #arts #socialimpact #innovation

Name: Dirección Musical de Sonido/ISA-Cuba
Description:
El Departamento de Dirección Musical de Sonido de la Facultad de Música de la Universidad de las Artes, ISA, fue fundado en el año 1990 con el propósito de formar a los profesionales del sonido del país. Importantes figuras de este ámbito profesional han formado parte del claustro, el que, a lo largo de los años se ha nutrido de egresados con destacada trayectoria. 
Desde su fundación, la carrera se ha concebido bajo el principio de que el sonido es un arte y su hacedor es un co-creador del producto artístico, sea fonograma, sonido en vivo, restauración; quien participa como miembro del equipo en las decisiones técnico-artísticas que dan sentido y coherencia al concepto estético y artístico de la obra.
Como parte del concepto de formación se articulan saberes artístico-musicales y humanísticos que sirven de soporte culturológico, con otros que son más específicos del ejercicio profesional, tales como el dominio y comprensión de equipamiento, recursos y soportes para el desarrollo de los diferentes procesos, entendiendo que el dominio técnico es un recurso expresivo en manos del artista de esta especialidad.  Se estimula el desarrollo de habilidades de investigación para la creación que busque asentar como estilo de trabajo la actualización permanente de la tecnología disponible para ejercer la profesión, el estudio de referentes sonoros y musicales, la exploración y experimentación en función de la búsqueda de la sonoridad deseada.
Todo esto se articula en la práctica a partir de la búsqueda permanente de la relación teoría-práctica, desde la vinculación de los estudiantes a los proyectos artísticos que desarrollan sus maestros y desde la realización de trabajos de clase en los que apliquen y sistematicen las habilidades profesionales que se persiguen.
A lo largo de estos años  se han formado alrededor de 70 profesionales del sonido, muchos de los cuales han tenido carreras muy destacadas y reconocidas en los más importantes espacios profesionales de Cuba y el mundo

Name: Escuela de Arte Dionisio Ortiz EADO
Description:
Centro público dependiente de la Junta de Andalucía donde se imparte formación en Ciclos Formativos de Grado Medio y Superior de Serigrafía, Encuadernación, Orfebrería, Platería, Cómic, Cerámica, Moldes y Reproducciones, Escultura y Ebanistería. 
Además, contamos con un Bachillerato especializado en Artes.

Name: Corvin Rajziskola
Description: A Corvin Rajziskola 1994 őszétől organikusan fejlődő, az aktuális piaci igényekhez, szakmai elvárásokhoz igazodó, képzőművészet és design oktatásán alapuló művészeti bázis, ahol mindenki megtalálhatja a saját érdeklődésének megfelelő képzést vagy kurzust. Az iskola fő profilja a vizuális művészetek oktatása. A diákok itt lehetőséget kapnak arra, hogy kibővítsék művészi készségeiket és megértsék a design világát. Az iskolában dolgozó oktatók és művészek magas szintű szakértelemmel rendelkeznek, és segítik a diákokat a kreativitásuk kibontakoztatásában. Az iskola szoros kapcsolatot tart a művészeti közösséggel és gyakran szervez kiállításokat és más eseményeket, amelyeken a diákok bemutathatják munkáikat és kapcsolatokat építhetnek a piaci szereplőkkel. A Corvin Rajziskola híres az itt tanuló diákok sikereiről - a végzett hallgatók gyakran válnak elismert alkotókká, sokan vesznek részt nemzetközi projektekben is.

Name: Cultural Institute CircoLar
Description:
The Institute promotes the exchange of knowledge and skills, valuing the individuality and artistic potential of each participant, while encouraging the training of new artists and the continuous development of professional artists.

Our activities include professional training in circus arts, as well as recreational options and the production of circus events for the general public.

With multiple successful branches across Tanzania, Zambia and Rwanda, KTI blends professional instruction with character development, using music as a tool for empowerment, creativity, and social change.

Name: Eden Mohila College - ইডেন মহিলা কলেজ
Description:
Eden Girls' College originated from a school for Brahmo girls established by Shubha Sadhini Sabha (a philanthropic society) in Dhaka in 1873. Initially, the classes of the school were conducted in a private house at Farashganj. In 1878, the school was merged with another private girls' school to form Dhaka Female School. The same year the school administration took the initiative to bring it under government management and proposed it be called Eden Girls' School after the Lieutenant Governor Sir Ashley Eden. Given its new status, it started functioning at a new location at Laxmibazar.

Eden was the first government girls' school in Bengal. In 1896-97, it had 130 students. It was recognized by the government as an 'excellent high school' of the provinces of Eastern Bengal and Assam. When the school building was damaged in the earthquake of 1897, it was temporarily shifted to a private house. Sometime later, it was again shifted to one of the big business houses of Portuguese merchants at sadarghat. Intermediate classes (grades 11 and 12) were introduced in the school in 1926. Since then it got the name of Eden Girls' High School and Intermediate College. A.K. Fazlul Huq (Sher-e-Bangla) in his capacity as the Education Minister shifted the school to a new building on Abdul Ghani Road, later known as Eden Building. In 1947, the government decided to establish its Provincial Secretariat in this building and the college got a new temporary address in a part of Curzon Hall. Frequent shifting put the college into an uncertain situation and with an intention to merge with Quamrunnesa School and College, it shifted to the premises of the latter. In 1958, the college sections of these two institutions merged and formed Eden Girls' College. The new college was located at Bakshibazar. The school sections of the two colleges were merged to form Quamrunnesa School at Tikatuli. Campus and Facility The current campus of Eden College were developed in 1962.

Description: Since 2006, we have positively impacted thousands of students. We continue to be at the forefront of using music education as a medium through which to build community, increase confidence and self-esteem in individuals, and provide an empowering creative space for people from all walks of life.

Desenvolvimento de conteúdos na area da biologia, artes e design

Name: RAZ Land
Description:
RAZ Land is an innovative cultural arts program dedicated to empowering children and families through hands-on creativity, storytelling, and global cultural exploration. We believe that art is a universal language - and when paired with narrative and cultural connection, it becomes a powerful tool for education, empathy, and personal transformation.

Our programs are designed to nurture creativity, build confidence, and inspire a deeper understanding of the world. Through our proprietary RAZ Method, we integrate storytelling with visual arts in a way that’s developmentally meaningful, emotionally enriching, and accessible to all learners. From seasonal camps and after-school programs to open studio sessions and community workshops, we offer immersive experiences that spark imagination and build real-world skills.

Key Offerings:

- Art & storytelling-based camps (summer, winter, spring, single-day)
- After-school classes and weekend workshops
- Open Studio access for independent creative exploration
- Custom-themed birthday events and celebrations
- School & community partnerships
- Original books, media, and cultural content

RAZ Land stands apart by placing cultural wisdom and creativity at the center of education. Our approach helps participants turn vulnerabilities into strengths, build emotional intelligence, and become active contributors to a more compassionate and connected world.

We don’t just teach art - we foster creators, thinkers, and change makers.

Name: Metalwerx Studio & School
Description:
Metalwerx is an innovative school and community studio for jewelry making and metal arts, located in Waltham, Massachusetts. We are dedicated to providing a welcoming, creative, and well equipped environment where outstanding instructors, inquisitive students, and dedicated practitioners can inspire each other in the pursuit of jewelry and metalworking skills.

Our classes and workshops are cutting edge and varied, with offerings tailored to every skill level. We offer onsite and virtual classes, workshops, and events year-round. 

Metalwerx is also home to twenty-two full and part time Studiomates - a group of passionate amateurs, bench jewelers, and professionals - who form a vibrant and active community. Members of the Metalwerx community work as teacher’s assistants and school ambassadors, ensuring that every experience is productive and memorable.

Name: Latin American Psychoanalytic Hub (LAPH)
Description: The Latin American Psychoanalytic Hub (LAPH) sprang to life from the minds and hearts of two friends, one from Brazil and the other from Chile, who met on UK soil. It was here, amidst the shared memories and a mutual longing for our homeland, that the idea for LAPH was born. Astonished by the realization that little was known on the other side of the Atlantic about the vibrant intellectual and cultural contributions from Latin America, we felt compelled to act. Our aim with LAPH is to bridge this gap, to bring over, share, and translate the rich psychoanalytic traditions, the innovative thinking, and the creative expressions of Latin American analysts, writers, poets, and musicians. This project is, for us, a way to keep alive the traditions, innovations, and contributions of our homeland, and perhaps, a step towards de-colonization. Being Latin American, in our view, encompasses yearning, feeling deeply, and sharing that passion with others. LAPH is our channel to distribute, share, and bring to life the vibrant contributions of Latin American psychoanalysts to the UK. We recognize psychoanalysis in Latin America as more than a therapeutic approach; it has become a lens through which life itself is understood, blending with the rich textures of Latin American culture, from the spices and flavors to the vibrant life of our barrios and communities. This blend has fostered innovative and creative ways of being, and unique interpretations of the political world around us. LAPH is our heartfelt attempt to weave the rich tapestry of Latin American psychoanalytic thought into the broader fabric of global understanding. It's about much more than translating words; it's about conveying the essence of a culture that thrives on deep emotional connections, innovative thought, and a passionate engagement with life.

Name: Applaus Creators
Description:
Nossa atuação é centrada em oferecer suporte a produtores de conteúdo em níveis 1 e 2, que possuem referência ou são autoridades reconhecidas em seus respectivos temas. 

Nossa abordagem estratégica envolve a construção cuidadosa do ecossistema do criador/produtor de conteúdo, incluindo posicionamento mercadológico e de comunicação, gestão eficaz das redes sociais, desenvolvimento de produtos digitais e presenciais, além do planejamento, execução e gerenciamento de todas as etapas de cada projeto. 

Estamos aqui para ajudar você a alcançar seus objetivos e maximizar seu impacto no mundo digital.

Nossa missão: Promover cultura e conteúdos que agreguem para o desenvolvimento humano e de uma sociedade mais positiva.

Valores: Humanismo, Honestidade, Ética, Educação, Liberdade, Lealdade e Responsabilidade.

Name: Artsy Bugsy Studio
Description:
Artsy Bugsy is a leading boutique art studio for children in Singapore.

Our programs are designed to help students develop their imagination and explore their creativity.

Art can help develop your child's confidence. Through our art classes, we will work with each child and their ability to express their inner creative worlds.

By seeing their own progression from one week to the next, students will thus develop a solid confidence in themselves and their art.

We offers classes for kids, workshops for adults, and we're also an AWESOME partner for private parties and events. We can host your event in our beautiful studio or head out to a venue of your choice.

Name: Create CIC
Description: A new contemporary crafts facility for the people of Cornwall, specialising in glass, ceramics and small metals. Open to everyone. Providing workshop space and equipment hire to independent artists, and workshops, courses and masterclasses for artists and the wider community.

Description: Klasik eğitim anlayışlarından uzak, yaratıcı eğitim süreçleri ile Müzik ve sanat eğitimlerinin yanı sıra, farklı eğitim konularını sanat ile işlemeyi hedefliyoruz.

Name: People’s Center for Cultural & Contemporary Arts
Description: "PCCCArts is a not for profit arts education organization that provides Chicago youth & adults quality art programs and experiences through community partnership."

Name: الشبكة اليمنية للثقافة والفنون
Description:
“الشبكة اليمنية للثقافة والفنون”، وهي منصة تفاعلية تجمع المؤسسات والمبادرات الثقافية والفنية اليمنية، بهدف تعزيز التعاون والتشبيك، وتوحيد الجهود للنهوض بالقطاع الثقافي والفني.

Name: DAYSPRING ARTS & EDUCATION
Description: DAYSPRING ARTS & EDUCATION is a School of the Arts, and a Hybrid Accredited School for PreSchool thru High School. We are approaching our 30th anniversary year beginning in July. Classes in the Arts are for all ages. We are located at 2500 METRO BLVD, MARYLAND HTS, Missouri, United States.

Name: Grand Marais Art Colony
Description:
The Grand Marais Art Colony is a nonprofit organization dedicated to aesthetic inquiry, artistic experimentation and art in the Great Lakes Region. We were established in 1947 and will be celebrating 75 years in 2022.

The Art Colony is open year-round, offers over 100 classes from beginner to advanced, provides studio access to artists-in-residence, organizes several events - such as our Annual Arts Festival - and exhibits. 

Our facilities include a ceramics studio, eco-friendly printmaking studio and four additional multipurpose studios.
