Description: O Núcleo de Educação Cidadã tem como missão oferecer uma formação musical holística a jovens estudantes de música sinfônica, com abrangência de atuação desde a fase inicial à profissionalizante. Tem em sua estrutura a administração da Orquestra OVO.

Name: accademia d'arte
Description:
villa d'arte is a total immersion in an art environment  with the authencity of an italian village at the border of french Cote d'azur and Italian riviera
People from all over the world have been coming in the artists residencies in order to create and attend art workshops of highest quality in a very unique seaview art studios

Name: Académie de la Grande Chaumière
Description:
Une histoire dans l’Histoire...

C’est en 1904 que Martha Stettler (1870-1945), artiste peintre suisse, crée l’Académie de la Grande Chaumière, atelier dédié à la peinture et à la sculpture d'après modèle vivant pour les femmes artistes dans le quartier de Montparnasse. (biographie complète ici)

À l’époque, ce dernier sort de terre : la vie commence, les logements sont abordables. Il y a de la place pour s’installer.  Depuis quelques siècles déjà, la jeunesse aime à se délasser dans ce qui est un village à la campagne avec ses nombreux bals et jardins. Dans leur sillage, des gens de milieu modeste y viennent aussi parce qu’ils trouvent à s’employer dans de nombreuses petites fabriques.

L’Académie de la Grande Chaumière, indissociable dès lors de Montparnasse,  est la seule institution qui, au début du XXème siècle, ouvre la voie à l’Art Indépendant, laissant s’exprimer toutes les formes ou techniques, libérant ses visiteurs et ses artistes des tendances académiques contraignantes artistiquement, mais aussi intellectuellement. Elle sera, en quelque sorte, un lieu de résistance et de création pure.

Name: Yeryüzü Sahnesi
Description: Yeryüzü Sahnesi, çocukları sanat ve sürdürülebilirlik ile buluşturan yenilikçi bir platform olarak dikkat çekiyor. Doğanın bir parçası olduğumuzu hatırlatan tiyatro oyunları, atölyeler ve interaktif etkinliklerle çocuklara eğlenceli ve öğretici bir deneyim sunmayı hedefleyen bu oluşum, geleceğin liderleri olan çocukları çevre bilinci yüksek, sorumluluk sahibi ve doğa dostu bireyler olarak yetiştirmeyi amaçlıyor.

Name: Royal University of Fine Arts
Description:
The Royal University of Fine Arts (RUFAs the leading public university specialized in culture and fine arts. It has five faculties and a research center. All five faculties are: Faculty of Archaeology, Faculty of Architecture and Urbanization, Faculty of Choreographic Arts, Faculty of Fine Arts Arts and the Faculty of Music.

The Faculty of Fine Arts has main 5 majors: Interior Design, Graphic Design, Painting and Sculpture. The Faculty of Choreographic Arts has 2 main majors: Directing and Writing.

Name: Everest Film Academy
Description: Everest Film Academy offers a one-year intensive filmmaking course led by industry professionals and experienced academicians. The curriculum blends theory with practical exercises to ensure students master the craft and enter the industry prepared. Faculty members are accomplished graduates from renowned institutions worldwide, supplemented by workshops with international professors and industry experts. EFA provides specializations in Acting, Direction, Cinematography, Visual Editing, and VFX, making it an ideal destination for art enthusiasts seeking specialized skills. With Nepal's film industry flourishing and reaching global audiences, joining EFA offers a timely opportunity to contribute to this thriving sector. The academy emphasizes reality-based knowledge and fosters creativity through a project-based curriculum.

Name: Det Fynske Kunstakademi
Description:
Det Fynske Kunstakademi uddanner billedkunstnere på højeste niveau og arbejder engageret for at udbrede kendskabet til samtidskunsten. Vi er et anerkendt kunstakademi i Nordeuropa med stærke rødder i Odense og et aktivt bidrag til det lokale og nationale kulturliv.

Vores vision er at tilbyde en ambitiøs, nærværende og internationalt orienteret kunstuddannelse, hvor faglighed, refleksion og kreativ udvikling går hånd i hånd. Vi tror på værdien i at være et lille akademi med plads til forskellighed og nære relationer – et sted, hvor man kan vokse som kunstner og menneske.

Siden vores etablering i 1944 har vi været i konstant udvikling. Med vores placering i den tidligere museumsbygning i hjertet af Odense har vi fået en markant ramme om vores kunstneriske virke. Herfra arbejder vi målrettet med at styrke undervisningen, dyrke et åbent og kritisk læringsmiljø og skabe forbindelser til både lokale og internationale samarbejdspartnere.

Vi ønsker at uddanne kunstnere til et meningsfuldt arbejdsliv og være en synlig, aktiv institution i byens kulturliv. Gennem udstillinger, arrangementer og samarbejder inviterer vi offentligheden ind og viser, hvad vi kan – og hvem vi er.

Kernen i vores identitet er den høje faglighed, de store ambitioner og et tæt fællesskab. Det er dette, der former sjælen i Det Fynske Kunstakademi – og det, vi ønsker at blive kendt for.

Name: HANDFUL Ceramics
Description:
HANDFUL stands for creativity, tactility and a conscious process with clay. We help people feel more inspired, focussed and alive. We offer online workshops, clay meditations as well as clay kits for your company. Connect your team members with their creative potential. Let the hands do the thinking. 

#employerbranding #culture #growth #inspiration #tactility #mindfulness #teambuilding #creativeprocess

Name: TMDS AFRICA FOUNDATION
Description:
The idea to give to our youth through art, craft,
design and leadership started in 2018 at
Varsity by Themba Mantshiyo. TMDS AFRICA
FOUNDATION was registered in 2022, our
programs started operating since 2018. We
have trained people from the ages of 12-46
years. Our mission is to focus more on the
youth from 18-35 years of age.
Social Creative Education, entrepreneurship &
Leadership Project, a TMDS AFRICA
FOUNDATION project with the aim to create
future leaders through art, craft, design,
entrepreneurship and leadership. The future
of Africa is on the youth, it is important to
invest in youth. This is a holistic program that
helps young people to learn more about
themselves, to respect other people and the
environment. Through this Initiative we are
able to identify, recruit and train talented
individuals.
Through this different projects we aim to
create opportunities for young people in the
creative industry, such as jewelry, furniture,
fashion, fine art, music, dance, graphic design,
photography but not limited to. As a creative
foundation we believe that art has the
potential to transform lives. Therefore we have
made it our mission to change people’s lives
through the arts.

Name: Wine and Art Experience
Description:
We do Private Events and Team Building, Unique, Original and tailored, Fluor Paint while you drink Wine.
If you are looking to unite and motivate the members of your company, we offer you a unique Fluor Event for the senses. Our artists will guide you to bring out the artist in you, we will propose fun activities to encourage collaboration and communication in your team. In addition, we will give free rein to your creativity to make a Brain Storming with Fluor paint.

Write to us so that we can organize your customized private event, and offer your team an experience they will never forget.

  Contact us for more information!

Name: MY Art Studio SS2 & TTDI
Description:
MY Art Studio SS2 provides an interesting art and craft space for your children. Our classes are being conducted in such a way to allow artistic freedom of expression and choice. While the direction is carefully given on specific themes and topics, children find inspiration mostly from their own experiences and things they like.

The cosy ambience in MY Art Studio SS2 ensures conducive learning environment for your children. MY Art Studio offers various interesting art courses such as the Children Creativity Development Course (CCDC) (for children aged 3-7 years) and Children Graphic Course (CGC) (for children aged 8-12 years) & Children Fine Arts (CFA) (for children aged 10-15 years)

The courses mentioned above are carefully designed to provide children with the proper platform to express themselves through art. Our fun “Holiday Programs”, art events and competitions also make MY Art Studio SS2 the ideal expressive learning centre for your children.

Name: Pinot's Palette St. Matthews
Description: Welcome to Pinot's Palette, the premier destination where brushes, palettes, and the finest of beverages converge to offer you an exquisite evening of artistic creation and relaxation.

Name: LEXINGTON ARTS AND CRAFTS SOCIETY INC
Description: LexArt is a non-profit organization of artists with nine guilds having their own specialized work area and equipment thus enabling members to work in a community of artisans with similar interests, sharing ideas and expertise. We also hold exhibits in our Gallery providing an opportunity to exhibit or sell work free of charge to the public. LexArt also offers classes in various disciplines to the public.

Name: ESPAI CULTURAL JACOMART
Description: Hem creat un punt d'encontre cultural al cor del barri de Torrefiel a València. Es diu Pintor Jacomart i es troba al carrer del mateix nom al núm. 28. La nostra intenció és realitzar un co-working artístic i fer exposicions, presentacions literàries i al voltant del món de l'Art.

Name: Grande Masse des Beaux-Arts
Description:
La Grande Masse des Beaux-Arts est l’association des élèves et anciens élèves des écoles nationales supérieures des Beaux-Arts, d’Architecture et d’Art.

Créée en 1926, l’association a pour objectifs d’établir et d’entretenir des 
échanges et de la solidarité entre ses membres.

Ces principes nous ont valu d’être reconnus d’utilité publique en 1932 et animent notre énergie et volonté d’aider les élèves, jeunes diplômés et professionnels du monde de l’art et de l’architecture.

L’enjeu est de réaffirmer au public l’utilité de ces métiers, les défendre et montrer la valeur ajoutée qu’ils apportent au quotidien. Les activités de l’association permettent de nouer le contact entre ces professions et le plus grand nombre.

Name: Ujedinjene umetnosti
Description:
Dobrodošli u Likovnu školu Ujedinjene umetnosti u Novom Sadu, mesto gde se razvija kreativnost!

Naš program obuhvata:

     - Likovnu školu za decu od 5 do 7 godina i stariju od 8 godina, sa kursevima crtanja, slikanja i vajanja.
     - Pripremne časove za upis u srednju umetničku školu, sa fokusom na crtanje, slikanje i vajanje.
     - Pripreme za Akademiju umetnosti i druge umetničke fakultete, uključujući crtanje ljudske figure, polufigure i izradu mape.
     - Časove crtanja za studente neumetničkih fakulteta, uključujući mrtvu prirodu, figuru i pejzaž.

Pridružite nam se i otkrijte svoj kreativni potencijal u našoj prijateljskoj i podsticajnoj atmosferi. Kontaktirajte nas da saznate više o našim programima i kako se možete pridružiti Ujedinjenim umetnostima.

Name: Atelierbreda
Description:
Atelierbreda, realiseert werk in opdracht zoals, portretten in brons, keramiek, monumentale opdrachten en beelden  in natuursteen.
Atelierbreda, wil met beeldhouwkunst mensen inspireren, er worden algemeen beeldende-, beeldhouw-,boetseer-, pottenbak-, brons-,cursussen en workshops verzorgd op maat voor jong en oud, scholen en bedrijven.

Name: Edinburgh Gallery Society
Description:
Welcome to the Edinburgh University Gallery Society! 

Founded in 2020 in order to bridge the gap between student artists and those interested in gaining work experience in the art world. 

We are proud to have created a society that aims to deconstruct the elitist stereotypes of the art industry, and create a community that is welcoming environment that expresses all creative endeavours. 

Find us on instagram @edigallerysociety

Name: Professional Artist Association
Description:
Inspiring stories & tactical advice to grow your art career
Listen to our podcast 
FREE Instagram Challenge for Fine Artists ↓

Name: SEFFIRU
Description:
Ayudo a empresas a mejorar el bienestar y la conexión de sus equipos a través de talleres de pintura realizados directamente en la oficina.

Talleres de Acuarela y Acrílico, con todos los materiales incluidos y proyectos listos para pintar. Perfectos para actividades de integración, celebraciones, días de bienestar, cierres de año y team building.

Name: Ankeny Art Center
Description: Ankeny Art Center is Community Art Center this is run as a non-profit organization based out of the heart of Ankeny, Iowa.

Name: Linden Fine Art Studio
Description:
We are a boutique Fine Art Painting Studio specialising in spreading the love of Fine Art through our highly specialised recreational Oil painting classes in primarily 1-to-1 or small group classes designed and customised with you in mind.

We provide a semi-professional group and private studio within the heart of Marymount situated in front of Bishan Park. 

With a thorough understanding of the therapeutic effects of painting as a therapy and new age new skill for the modern men or women, we do conduct private 1-to-1 classes for kids as well as private lessons with the same high quality materials hand delivered right to your home.

Look no further for face to face or private consultation over phone call with Ms Gabrielle.

We always love to know our clients better, hence first consultations lasting up to 1.5 hours are complimentary with any purchase.

Soon to be launched services include commissioned portraits. Do hit us up if you are already interested.

Name: Oficina de Arteiros
Description:
Bem- vindo à OFICINA DE ARTEIROS, uma escola de teatro e dança que estimula o potencial de crianças e adolescentes de uma forma divertida, despertando capacidades naturais do ser humano, como expressão oral, a criatividade, consciência corporal, a autoestima e a inteligência emocional.

 Surgiu com o sonho de duas pessoas em mudar o mundo, ou pelo menos começar pela base: crianças e adolescentes, o nosso futuro! Jéssica e Greg resolveram, então, se aventurar neste desafio: inaugurar uma escola de teatro onde o seu maior objetivo é formar indivíduos melhores e preparados para a vida! Unir a formação acadêmica em psicologia com a vivência no teatro, na televisão e a vontade de transmitir todos estes conhecimentos, seria perfeito. Nasce então a OFICINA DE ARTEIROS, uma escola de teatro que desperta capacidades naturais de crianças e adolescentes, coloca os alunos em contato com os diferentes tipos de expressões artísticas que, hoje em dia, dificilmente são exploradas como deveriam. Estimula o potencial da criança de uma forma divertida, devolvendo à elas, o direito de brincar e aprender ao mesmo tempo. A escola nasceu, cresceu e hoje com mais de 300 alunos, seus idealizadores percebem que podem sim mudar o mundo. Basta começar!

Name: Fn Khana
Description: A safe space for Iraqi artists to display, produce, teach, and sell audio, visual, and kinetic arts , مساحة آمنة للفنانين العراقيين لعرض وإنتاج وتعليم وبيع الفنون الصوتية والمرئية والحركية

Name: artSPARK Creative Studio
Description:
Empower Artistic Expression and Thought: artSPARK classes are different because we teach kids how to think creatively and critically to solve problems and express themselves through art. We combine serious art practice with playful exploration in every class, workshop, camp, and party.

Learn to Make and Think Like an Artist: artSPARK classes, workshops, camps, and parties combine artistic techniques and critical thinking in fun, hands-on activities. Whether you want a fun art activity for the day, the structure of a formal workshop, or an end-to-end birthday party, artSPARK has something to offer.

Art Works: We help kids hone their artistic skills no matter their experience or background with discovery-based teaching strategies and artist-approved techniques. Art ignites something unique inside of us, and artSPARK gives kids the supportive guidance they need to bring their artistry to life.

Name: Dharamkot Studio
Description:
We’re a Community art space and Ceramic studio. It’s a place to learn, to practice, to share and to celebrate art. Art enthusiasts can take art retreats, workshops and courses in ceramic/pottery medium.
Professional ceramic artists and other medium artists can use the studio space, materials or accommodation.
The studio is located in Dharamkot Village, Dharmshala, Himachal Pradesh, India.

Name: Flamenco with Maika
Description:
Flamenco, Sevillanas and Spanish Dance Classes. 
Group classes, private lessons, and workshops for schools, events, and companies. 

Founded by Maika Jiménez Blanco. 
Maika is a flamenco and Spanish dance teacher with more than 17 years of experience, teaching adults and children in Spain, the United States of America, Mexico, Canada, and the UK. She also led flamenco classes at Rey Juan Carlos University from 2013 to 2018.

Born and raised in Madrid (Spain), she began studying ballet and Spanish dance at the tender age of nine.

Maika studied at Karen Taft Dance Academy and Flamenco Centre “Amor de Dios”, majoring in Spanish Dance at the Conservatory of Dance in Madrid. In 2003, she was awarded a certificate in Teaching Methodology Applied to Spanish Dance and then focused her career on dance education. Maika has continued her professional training alongside teachers including Antonio Canales, La Lupi, Alfonso Losa, María Juncal, and Rojas y Rodriguez.

Maika co-founded the company Spanish Flamenco Tour, based in Miami (USA), a business dedicated to promoting flamenco and Spanish culture, to a local audience.  Adding more strings to her bow, Maika embarked on a Master´s Degree in Leadership and Management of Cultural Projects at the Institute of Dance “Alicia Alonso”, Rey Juan Carlos University. Her final master’s project was based on the promotion of Spanish dance, and receiving a First-Class Degree.

Name: The Madeleine Choir School
Description: The Madeleine Choir School, a mission of the Roman Catholic Bishop of Salt Lake City and a service of the Cathedral of the Madeleine, is an elementary school for children in PreKindergarten through Grade Eight. Established in 1996, the school continues the cathedral tradition of preparing young people to engage the culture with the Catholic intellectual, artistic, moral and religious tradition. The Choir School pursues rigorous academic curricula in the humanities, mathematics and sciences, and the arts.

Name: FineArtsSociety - NIT Jalandhar
Description: Welcome to Fine Arts Society, where creativity meets community. We are a collective of passionate artists, curators, and enthusiasts dedicated to nurturing the arts in all its forms. Our society is a vibrant hub for collaboration, inspiration, and growth, offering members the opportunity to explore diverse artistic disciplines, showcase their work, and connect with like-minded individuals. Whether you're an established artist or just beginning your creative journey, Fine Arts Society is your space to innovate, inspire, and be inspired. Join us in shaping the future of art together.

Name: CEA Cooperativa de Ensino Artístico
Description: Privately own, non-profit organization devoted to teaching fine and performing arts - Visual Arts, Drama and Theatre, Music and Dancing.

Name: Malaysian Indian Horseback Archery Alliance
Description:
Rubentheran is the Founder of Malaysian Indian Horseback Archery Alliance (MIHAA) which established since year 2019.

Rubentheran is the First Indian Horseback Archer and a national athlete under the Malaysian Horseback Archery team.

MIHAA aims to provide assistance and training to the young talents in horseback archery field.

MIHAA compromise of a team of experienced trainers involving training of horseback riding, archery and horseback archery.

Name: Significação: Revista de Cultura Audiovisual
Description:
A Significação - Revista de Cultura Audiovisual publica artigos e resenhas voltados ao estudo dos meios e processos audiovisuais e dos sistemas digitais. Com periodicidade semestral, aceita trabalhos originais e inéditos de doutores e doutorandos em sistema de fluxo contínuo.
O periódico é dedicado à comunidade acadêmica interessada nas diferentes formas de expressão da cultura audiovisual, pensada em sua dimensão histórica e de maneira interdisciplinar.

Name: LoudPen Cultural Center
Description:
LoudPen Cultural Centre is a creative community space in Ahmedabad where art, music, language, and culture come alive.

We host hands-on workshops, monthly programs, and spontaneous jam sessions across disciplines—from painting and sculpting to drumming and storytelling. Whether you're looking to learn something new, take a creative pause, or just meet like-minded people, LoudPen is your cultural home.

Built around the idea of slowing down and reconnecting—with yourself and with others—we're all about cozy vibes, bold expression, and joyful learning.

 Art.  Music.  Language.  Expression.  Community.
Step into the creative side of life.

Name: Centro Cultural Facultad  de Artes UdeA
Description:
Somos un espacio para el arte y la cultura ubicado en el barrio Carlos E. Restrepo de la ciudad de Medellín. Nuestro propósito es ser un puente entre el arte y la comunidad.

Nuestros espacios están abiertos para la creación y proyección de proyectos artísticos. También ofrecemos talleres y cursos del Centro de Extensión de la Facultad de Artes.

Name: Trupe Ortaética de Teatro Comunitário
Description: A Trupe Ortaética de Teatro Comunitário é um coletivo cultural guarulhense com 21 anos ininterruptos de atividades em pesquisas artísticas e socioculturais, pautado pelos direitos humanos. Com um elenco inclusivo, o coletivo tem relevante representatividade e característica intergeracional.

Name: Escola São Paulo de Cinematografia
Description:
Método
A Escola São Paulo de Cinematografia adota o Método Alziro Barbosa, ABC, que tem como objetivo aprofundar o entendimento da imagem cinematográfica de forma clara e objetiva. Através do domínio de técnicas, equipamentos e conceitos, sempre focando na construção da imagem narrativa. O método reflete a formação e experiência de Alziro Barbosa, que tem graduação e mestrado em direção de fotografia pelo renomado Instituto Estatal de Cinema Russo, a escola de cinema mais antiga do mundo.

Com mais de 100 filmes no currículo, entre longas-metragens, séries, publicidades, documentários  e animações stop-motion, Alziro oferece um conhecimento prático sólido. Esse método foi desenvolvido ao longo de 29 anos como professor, palestrante e consultor, sendo adaptado para atender às diferentes realidades do mercado cinematográfico e audiovisual brasileiro.

Name: My Little Caravan
Description:
We are a creative education partner that brings structured, hands-on Art & Craft programs directly into schools.

Our mission is clear — to nurture creativity, focus, and confidence in every child through engaging, skill-building artistic experiences. Every session follows a STEAM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Art and math)-integrated approach, blending logic, observation, and hands-on exploration with creative expression — making learning more meaningful and multidimensional.

Name: Arteincampo
Description: Arteincampo è un’associazione culturale senza scopo di lucro nata nel 2009, che promuove attività legate alla produzione ed alla conoscenza artistica. Offre diversi corsi in varie discipline artistiche legate al disegno, all'insegnamento delle tecniche pittoriche e alla figura disegnata.

Name: Dante Art School
Description: The educational program is based on modern approaches. The purpose of the school is to educate both intellectually and aesthetically of teenagers and to form their taste correctly. The school's team of professionals constantly develops innovative approaches, which are as much as possible focused on the interests of children and their parents, as well as young people and people of any age, and the quality of teaching. Age of listeners: unlimited (from 4 years old)

Name: Ars Magna
Description:
Boas vindas à Ars Magna, uma livraria especializada em ficção científica e fantasia nacional. Nós somos apaixonados por histórias incríveis que desafiam a imaginação e levam o leitor a mundos desconhecidos e emocionantes.

Nosso objetivo é promover e incentivar a leitura de autores brasileiros de ficção científica e fantasia, oferecendo uma ampla seleção de livros e um ambiente acolhedor e amigável para os amantes desses gêneros. Na Ars Magna, você encontrará desde os clássicos da literatura fantástica até as mais recentes publicações de autores independentes.

Aqui você também tem a oportunidade de participar de eventos e encontros conhecendo e conversando com os criadores de suas histórias favoritas.

Na Ars Magna, acreditamos que a ficção científica e a fantasia são mais do que meros entretenimentos; elas são instrumentos poderosos para explorar ideias e questões importantes que nos ajudam a compreender melhor o mundo em que vivemos. Por isso, convidamos você a explorar as nossas prateleiras e descobrir novas histórias e mundos maravilhosos.

Venha fazer parte da nossa comunidade de leitores apaixonados por ficção científica e fantasia nacional!

Name: Art House Atelier - Art School Prague
Description:
Prague art school, Art House Atelier offers great drawing and painting courses for kids and adults, beginners, and advanced artists. Join us and start living your dream! 

You will meet new friends, relax, and drink coffee or a glass of wine. Art House Atelier has a great team of professional and friendly lecturers. We will provide you with all art material. Don't hesitate and sign up for your free trial lesson!

Name: KÉPESVAGY
Description:
Cégek számára kreatív csapatépítő festéseket, és olyan konzultációkat tartunk, mellyel a cég ideális jövőképét alkotjuk meg képként.

Magánszemélyek részére személyes és online élményfestéseket, rajz és festőtanfolyamokat tartunk.
Több, mint 10000 résztvevőnk visszajelzése alapján bátran jelenthetjük ki, hogy a legnagyobb eredmény, amit a festéssel elérünk, az nem csak magának a képességeknek a visszaszerzése, de a festés elsősorban rendkívül feltöltő, és kikapcsolja az ember agyát, eltávolít a mindennapi gondoktól. Ezáltal kerül az ember magasabb érzelmi állapotba, és lesz képes cselekvőbb lenni az életében.

Képenként viszünk közelebb az önbizalommal teli, tudatos, boldog élet megteremtéséhez!

Name: Bhairavi Design & Skill Academy
Description:
At Bhairavi Design & Skill Academy, we bridge the gap between Institutions and Industries through creative, skill-based education. Founded by Bhairavi Siva, an industry expert with international experience across Singapore, Malaysia, and India, the academy focuses on Product Design, Tool & Die Design, and Product Development training.

We specialize in coaching aspirants for India’s top design entrance exams — NID, NIFT, IIT-CEED, AIFD, NATA, and Fine Arts — with students now pursuing successful design careers across the world.

Our learning approach blends art, engineering, and innovation, nurturing young minds to become design thinkers, innovators, and creators. We believe in education that connects imagination with practical innovation, empowering every learner to design with purpose and impact.

Name: Lubba | Arte, Design & Cultura Visual
Description: Oficina de Aprendizagem em Artes Visuais e Design Gráfico. Canal de Informação, Inspiração e Cultura Visual. Espaço criativo para ensino e pesquisa. Name: ART-LI
Description: ART-LI bietet kreative und inspirierende Malkurse in München an. In der LIA Galerie können Teilnehmer unter der Anleitung der Künstlerin Laura Isaza ihre eigenen Kunstwerke schaffen. Die Kurse richten sich sowohl an Anfänger als auch an Fortgeschrittene und umfassen verschiedene Techniken, darunter Acrylmalerei und die Arbeit mit Texturpasten für dreidimensionale Bilder. Malparties sind eine besondere Attraktion, bei denen in geselliger Atmosphäre mit Musik und Getränken Kunstwerke entstehen. Name: Cure Nailhouse
Description:
Cure Nailhouse is an experimental artist residency and studio that redefines nail technology as an artistic medium through education, craftsmanship, and an inclusive art, fashion, and beauty community. 

Nailhouse, our creative studio, aims to celebrate and uplift our nail artists in residence by providing material resources for ephemeral sculptures, interdisciplinary dialogue, and a hybrid exhibition space to elevate their practice. 

Craft, our educational platform, unites established artists from diverse mediums with emerging nail artists in an interdisciplinary exchange. Through learning, mentorship, licensing pathways, and masterclasses, participants refine their techniques and elevate their practice to position nail art as a recognized fine art form.

Name: Kunstschule Berlin
Description: Die Kunstschule Berlin ist eine renommierte Bildungseinrichtung, die sich der Förderung künstlerischer Talente widmet. Gelegen im Herzen der pulsierenden Hauptstadt Deutschlands, bietet die Schule ein breites Spektrum an Ausbildungen, Weiterbildungen und Kursen in verschiedenen Kunstdisziplinen wie Malerei, Illustration,Tattoo-Design, Kunsttherapie und neu auch Theaterpädagogik und Multidisziplinäre Performance. Mit einem Team von erfahrenen Dozenten, die selbst aktive Künstler sind, legt die Kunstschule Berlin großen Wert auf praxisnahen Unterricht und individuelle Förderung. Die Schule ist bekannt für ihre inspirierende Lernumgebung, in der Kreativität und Innovation im Mittelpunkt stehen. Regelmäßige Ausstellungen und Projekte ermöglichen den Studierenden, ihre Werke einem breiten Publikum zu präsentieren und wertvolle Erfahrungen in der Kunstszene zu sammeln.

Name: The PAC Foundation
Description:
Stichting PAC is in het leven geroepen ter bevordering en stimulering van diversiteit en samenwerking op cultureel, artistiek en kunstzinnig gebied. Denk hierbij aan kunstprojecten met kinderen en jongeren in diverse wijken van Den Haag, evenementen als de PAC kunst Award, workshops en cursussen op scholen en in bibliotheken en exposities waaronder in het Atrium Den Haag.
Kunstprojecten Kinderen en jongeren
Stichting PAC inspireert, motiveert en ontwikkelt, in samenwerking met onze partners en scholen, talenten van kinderen en  jongeren op het gebied van beeldende kunst om ze de mogelijkheid te bieden de beste versie van zichzelf te laten worden. Kortom Stichting PAC wilt iedereen die niet of beperkt deelneemt aan kunst- en cultuuractiviteiten de kans geven en stimuleren om zelf kennis te maken met verschillende kunststijlen waaronder Graffiti en Street-Art. Jarenlange ervaring en betrouwbaar
Al meer dan 15 jaar verzorgen wij een heel breed aanbod aan kunstprojecten, workshops en cursussen op maat op veel verschillende scholen en locaties in en rond Den Haag. Wij werken uitsluitend met ons leuke team van docenten en tevens kunstenaars die een passie hebben voor les geven.

PAC wil het culturele platform in Den Haag ondersteunen daar waar ondernemerschap, creatieve initiatieven, inclusie en ontplooiing worden gestimuleerd, gecreëerd en gefaciliteerd. De stichting wil alle lagen van de bevolking (jong, oud, arm en rijk etc.) stimuleren, laten samenwerken en de mogelijkheid bieden om hun creatieve ideeën vorm te geven en uit te kunnen voeren.

Doelen anno 2023
Stichting PAC werkt op dit moment aan meerdere projecten die allemaal een rol spelen in de culturele wereld van dit moment.

Projecten Kleurkunst in je Wijk! 
Peace Art Culture Award (PAC Award) 
YUTAA (Young Urban Talent Art Award)
Street-Art Murals
KinderKunstAward 2023

Name: Double Elephant Print Workshop
Description: Double Elephant Print Workshop is a CIC based in the heart of Exeter, Devon. We offer open access printmaking to members, alongside courses and printmaking events and activities in the wider community.

Name: Alankrita - The Art & Craft Club of JIMS Kalkaji
Description: Official page of Art & Craft Club of JIMS Kalkaji

Name: Tryon Arts & Crafts School
Description:
TACS is a year-round nonprofit craft school promoting both contemporary and heritage artmaking practices. The school offers education and public programs with established artists visiting from across the United States, as well as ongoing opportunities with a roster of regional instructors. 

The school's main facility is housed in a retrofitted public school building, with a regional artist shop, multiple exhibition spaces, and advanced technological studios in fiber arts, glass, lapidary, ceramics, jewelry, and wood. Separate facilities on TACS' campus house a welding and flame-work studio (new in 2019/2020) and a traditional blacksmithing forge.

Polk County Community Foundation provides grant support to TACS and community partners to provide educational outreach for youth and adults throughout Polk County, NC.

Name: International Fashion Fusion Academy
Description:
At IFF, we’re dedicated to revolutionizing fashion education with a mission focused on enhancing lifestyles, creating job opportunities, and promoting self-dependence and confidence. Our innovative approach encourages learning and earning simultaneously, empowering individuals to create and explore new styles while building a sustainable career in fashion.

Explore our affordable and accessible short courses in styling and discover how IFF is redefining the future of fashion education for everyone.

Name: Visual Arts Academy and Studio
Description: Visual Arts Academy and Studio is a local Louisville KY business that aims to provide creative visual art classes to individuals of all ages and skill levels. Our studio will offer a wide range of art courses, including drawing, painting, cartooning, comics, still life drawing, and more. As well as providing weekly studio space for those who wish to create regularly without having the space to do so. We believe in fostering artistic expression, skill development, and a sense of community among our students and members. Additionally, we will showcase art created by our students/members and provide a limited selection of art supplies for purchase. Highly trained and skilled instructor lead courses will ensure that our students receive the highest quality art education and mentoring.

Name: XENAKI ceramic art&design
Description:
Welcome to XENAKI Ceramic Art & Design Studio!
We specialize in handmade ceramic lighting and decor that combines natural inspiration with modern aesthetics. Each piece is crafted to transform spaces into works of art, adding warmth and uniqueness to interiors.

Our work is perfect for:

Interior designers seeking custom ceramic solutions.

Architects looking for bespoke decor to enhance their projects.

Businesses aiming to elevate their spaces with unique artisan pieces.


Let's create something extraordinary together. Contact us to discuss your next project!"

Name: Washington Studio School
Description:
Washington Studio School's (WSS) mission is to offer exceptional visual arts learning opportunities to District and Washington-area residents of all skill levels in a welcoming, inclusive and focused environment. We teach skills of observation, critical analysis, and material technique in the time-honored disciplines of drawing, painting, mixed media, and sculpture. WSS encourages the use of these skills and techniques by students and workshop attendees as a catalyst for producing work that is personal, relevant, and contemporary. 

The WSS vision is twofold: to be a recognized and accessible cultural center for studio-based programming and an incubator and contributor to the District's vibrant arts community. WSS makes available regular free participatory public programs, exhibits, and artist talks of local and nationally recognized artists; affordable drop-in figure drawing sessions; artist studios; and programs that engage, connect and enrich District residents and visitors.

Name: Kijiji Sanaa
Description: Community arts organization and artist residency

Name: Mosaic Art Studio
Description: Art school with the believe to nurture children since young through art. Wants children seeing the world tru making arts.

Name: La Tijera Colectiva
Description:
Iniciativa cultural y creativa colombiana que promueve la técnica del collage como una herramienta artística propicia para la introspección, la creación de comunidad, el fortalecimiento de la creatividad y el pensamiento crítico con enfoque de género. 

Promovemos y visibilizamos el trabajo de artistas del collage de distintas partes del mundo a través de la elaboración de retos creativos, procesos editoriales, pedagógicos y de construcción de comunidad
en torno a la técnica.

Name: VICTORIA ACADEMY OF BALLET
Description:
Victoria Academy of Ballet (VAB), Western Canada's leading dance school, offers specialized dance instruction for young dancers through to professional level. Under the leadership and direction of Bleiddyn Del Villar Bellis, FCSC-CICB, the Academy established program areas for professional as well as recreational ballet and dance training.  Internationally acclaimed artistic faculty, administration, and musicians, support the continued commitment to EXCELLENCE while nurturing a supporting and engaging environment for students to learn, thrive and succeed.

VOCATIONAL DIVISION
VAB's Vocational Division offers training programs for students who wish to train in an intensive atmosphere. The Professional Training Program and Post-Secondary Bridge Program develop dancers who are prepared technically, artistically, and personally for a professional career. These dancers engage in various performance opportunities including group and solo work in domestic and international competitions and festivals and perform in VAB’s shows. The Bridge Program is a three-year diploma program designed for students who are not yet established in the professional field of dance but have graduated from their high school academic and dance training programs. The program holds Designation status with the BC Ministry of Post-Secondary Education and Future Skills, Private Training Institutions Branch as well as Education Quality Assurance (EQA) status, both under the umbrella of the BC Ministry of Education BC.

OPEN DIVION
This Division instills a love, joy, and passion for dance. Classes are offered for the full year, September to June, as well as in sessions running for 6 to 12 weeks long. Students ages 2 to adult are nurtured in a supportive, welcoming, and rewarding learning environment where they are inspired to reach their greatest potential. The full-year students participate in an annual year-end recital.

Name: Ooze Studio - A Division of Humm Creative
Description:
Ooze Studio is a community-driven art studio oozing inspiration and contagious creativity. At Ooze we understand the fragility of creative expression. When strict parameters or emphasis on technical perfection is the focus, natural creativity can easily turn into conformity. We prefer to open minds and empower our Oozers to connect with themselves through their own artistic process, using their imaginations to lift their creativity to new heights and build humble confidence within.

We enjoy many different mediums of art and design through a variety of workshops for kids, teens, adults & seniors, special needs and neurodiverse communities, and organizations looking to build team culture. 

Ooze Studio was founded in January 2020 by Mia Temple, after she volunteered as the Head Art Docent at her children's elementary school for two years. The first year of Ooze was free to all via live zoom sessions during COVID-19's first shelter-in-place. Quickly after, Ooze moved to Monterey Peninsula, where Mia began working in-person at Santa Catalina, Tularcitos, remotely and in the studio. doing private sessions and summer camps. This next year will bring many new offerings!

Name: Miami House of Creative Arts LLC
Description:
Miami House of Creative Arts LLC (Miami HofCA) was founded in 2022 with the intent to design a musical education that feels the way home should feel like, no matter the location. 

We understand the music industry can be rather competitive. Our priority is to provide high quality instruction and equip students with the necessary tools to succeed, while also instilling a love for music that overcomes the boundaries we set on one another and on ourselves as human beings. We believe in our students and want them to not only grow professionally, but also to learn to believe in themselves. 

We offer music lessons and music therapy services in piano, guitar, voice, cello, percussion, trombone and trumpet, in the areas of South Miami, Coral Gables, Coconut Grove, and Pinecrest. Our teachers are hand picked by us and highly qualified with university degrees specializing in the field they lead.

We take a holistic approach to music education, looking at the whole individual rather than just their set of skills. Part of our approach when designing instruction is asset-based, focusing on what the student can do and building on those strengths so that they can feel confident and reach their full potential. We take a child-centered approach and encourage students to become agents of their own learning, while providing the guidance and professional support they need. 

Visit our website to learn more. We are open for registration and hiring!

Name: Govt. College Of Art & Design Aurangabad
Description:
The institute very soon grew into a full-fledged art College and today conducts specialized B.F.A. Degree Courses in Painting, Applied Art & Textile Design. Art Teachers Diploma & about 350 students are receiving art education under the able guidance of about 25 most efficient and expert art teachers. The College has its own adequate library along with the most up-to-date facilities in departments like the computer Lab, Animation Studio, Photography, Screen Printing, and Printmaking Department. The College has been affiliated with Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, Aurangabad and Degree Courses in (1) painting and (2) Applied Art have been introduced since 1981 & Textile Design Degree Course has been introduced in 2011. Above all courses except Art Teachers Diploma Course are approved by All India Council for Technical Education, New Delhi. During the period of last 41 years number of students from this College have been awarded prizes and honored in many Exhibitions at State & National level. The staff members of the College are also very active in the field of art and have been participating and winning awards and honors in major art exhibitions at the state, National & International levels. Today the Art College is forging ahead with its short but prosperous background for its mission. This Institute is affiliated with Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, Aurangabad.

Marathwada region has a very rich and glorious background of Art and literature since the golden age of Gupta Empire, Marathwada can very rightly be called the land of Art culture as it is the land which proudly possesses the World's famous monuments of Art like AJANTA and ELLORA. It was here that great saint like Dnyaneswar was inspired to write commentary of Bhagwat Geeta which is known as DNYANESHWARI. This was the land where great Empires came in existence and made history.

Name: Axárquica Espacio Creativo
Description:
Axárquica es un espacio creativo proyectado para la enseñanza, producción y divulgación cultural en y desde la Axarquía malagueña, con sede en Vélez-Málaga. 

Taller de producción artística especializado en técnicas de grabado y estampación artesanales y contemporáneas.

Nuestro espacio es inclusivo y accesible, diseñado para acoger a todas las personas, y potenciar su capacidad creativa y su sensibilidad cultural. 

Paula Salido Segovia, como promotora del proyecto, ha recibido una subvención de la Consejería de Empleo, Empresa y Trabajo Autónomo de la Junta de Andalucía, financiada por la Unión Europea con cargo al Programa FSE+ Andalucía 2021-2027, para el fomento del trabajo autónomo en Andalucía. Línea 2 de subvención para inicio de actividad económica o profesional, destinada a mujeres trabajadoras autónomas menores de 35 años. 

El proyecto Axárquica Espacio Creativo, dentro del Programa "Innovactiva", ha recibido la subvención a personas jóvenes andaluzas o residentes en Andalucía, para poner en funcionamiento proyectos empresariales en Andalucía, de la Consejería de Inclusión Social, Juventud, Familias e Igualdad de la Junta de Andalucía, a través del Instituto Andaluz de la Juventud.

Name: I.I.S Adolfo Venturi
Description:
L'Istituto Statale d'Arte "Adolfo Venturi" sorge in seguito alla trasformazione degli Istituti e delle Accademie di Belle Arti, ai sensi del Regio Decreto II n. 3123 del 31 dicembre 1923, e si è formato su ciò che rimaneva dei precedenti istituti artistici, che avevano avuto vita in Modena fino a quel momento, trovando nel florido artigianato cittadino un substrato favorevole.

Nel 1923 sorge quindi l'Istituto d'Arte di Modena, intitolato all'ex studente Adolfo Venturi da un quarto di secolo professore di Storia dell'Arte presso l'Università di Roma. 

Dal 2010, con la nuova Riforma riforma scolastica, l'Istituto d'Arte Venturi si trasforma ancora una volta, cambia denominazione e diventa Istituto Superiore d'Arte A. Venturi...

Name: Bash and Design Gallery
Description: Bash and Design Gallery is an art studio located in Las Vegas, Nevada that offers fine art programs for kids and adults. Our team of experienced instructors is dedicated to helping students discover their artistic potential through a variety of courses and programs that cater to both kids and adults. We host elevated paint and sip workshops, where participants can enjoy good company, delicious bites, and wine while learning about the creative process firsthand from our talented artists. Recycled art is one of our unique specialties- we take old materials destined for the landfill and turn them into beautiful pieces of functional art. Our exhibitions provide a platform for our artists to share their talents with the community and receive feedback and recognition for their hard work. We believe that everyone has an innate creativity waiting to be unleashed- come join us at Bash and Design Gallery!

Name: Newbiggin Arts Centre
Description: We provide painting & craft clubs and classes in a safe, friendly, supportive and non-judgemental environment, open to all members of the community irrespective of gender, race, age, disability or religion

Name: Aadim Art Studio
Description: At Aadim Art Studio we offer a holistic learning experience that blends fine art with personal expression, empowering students to discover their artistic voice, from anywhere in the world.

Name: this is a test school page
Pittsburgh Center For Arts & Media
Description: Pittsburgh Center for Arts & Media cultivates a thriving arts community by bringing people together through education, exhibitions, and experiences.

Name: Escola Joso Sabadell
Description:
Escola Joso és un centre docent especialitzat en còmic, fundat per l'humorista gràfic Joso. Compta amb dues seus, a Barcelona i a Sabadell, i està considerada com la degana de les escoles de còmic a Espanya. 

Escola Joso neix el 1982 a Barcelona i el 1993 a Sabadell. El nostre centre disposa d'un equip de professors format per dibuixants, il·lustradors i dissenyadors professionals de gran renom internacional, reflex de l'excel·lència i l'actualitat de la professió.

Name: Le Laboratoire, atelier de création
Description:
Le Laboratoire – Atelier d’art et de transmission à Lyon

Depuis 2010, Le Laboratoire est un atelier artistique indépendant situé à Lyon 1er, à la croisée des chemins entre création contemporaine, design, et transmission.

Fondé et dirigé par l’artiste plasticienne Marie Anglade, le Laboratoire propose :

Des stages et ateliers artistiques pour enfants, adultes et entreprises,

Des résidences ponctuelles pour artistes,

Un espace de recherche et de production autour des formes plastiques, du corps, et du sensible.

Nous développons également une offre à destination des entreprises (RSE, QVT, intelligence collective), autour de formats créatifs innovants mêlant art, design et bien-être.

Le Laboratoire est un lieu humain, vivant, agile, où l’expérimentation créative reste au cœur de chaque projet.

 Basé à Lyon – Quartier des pentes de la Croix-Rousse
 contact@coursdepeinturelyon.com

 www.coursdepeinturelyon.com

 Instagram : @_le_laboratoire

Name: Loop Music Academy
Description: Turning your passion into perfection. Whether you’re a beginner or looking to refine  your skills, we’re here to guide you.

Name: ACTING LINE STUDIO
Description:
Acting Line Studio est une école de théâtre et cinéma en Suisse. 1 studio à Genève, 1 studio à Lausanne.

Nous formons nos élèves à réaliser leur rêve d'être acteur; avec un parcours d'enseignement professionnel ou des ateliers amateurs.
Notre pédagogie se veut respectueuse de l'acteur en personnalisant le coaching, mais surtout humaine et bienveillante.
Nos coachs sélectionnés avec soin son reconnus à l'internationale.

Les cours sont complétés par des workshop et masterclass exclusives abordant des sujets précis tels que le casting, les cascades par exemple. Les intervenants sont des professionnels du métier de renom.

Nous mettons un point d'honneur à préparer et accompagner nos élèves dans leur insertion professionnelle, pour promouvoir un succès à la hauteur de leur travail!

Name: Onsite Gallery
Description: Onsite Gallery exhibits professional artists, designers and digital media makers, serving the OCAD University community and the general public.

Name: Revolvision Academy
Description: Training the Next Generation of Digital Creators

Name: Rogerio Fernandes Art
Description:
MUITO PRAZER, ROGÉRIO FERNANDES
 Piauiense radicado em Minas Gerais, expresso minha arte em muralismos, telas, gravuras, esculturas e apresento um estilo com grande influência da xilografia nordestina, com tons de
realismo fantástico.
Algumas vezes estabeleço conexões e diálogos que interagem com a história da arte mundial e seus ícones, numa junção da arte contemporânea com personagens do imaginário popular.
Minha formação é em Design na Fundação Mineira de Artes (FUMA), Publicidade e Propaganda na PUC Minas, Gravura na Fundação de Memória Gráfica – Minas Gerais, Pintura a óleo/acrílico na Escola Panamericana de Artes – São Paulo, Ilustração para livros infantis na Central Saint Martin, em Londres, Inglaterra.
Nas redes sociais, você pode encontrar um pouco mais sobre minha história e parte do meu acervo, em fotos e vídeos registrados ao longo de duas décadas.

Name: Milan Academy of Art
Description:
Nella Milan Academy of Art crediamo fermamente che il disegno e l'educazione all'osservazione siano la base di tutte le discipline artistiche. Ogni corso si concentra sull'affinamento delle competenze necessarie per rappresentare ciò che si vede attraverso il linguaggio figurativo.

Il nostro metodo si ispira alle tradizionali botteghe d'arte, enfatizzando la pratica quotidiana delle tecniche espressive del realismo e dell'arte figurativa. Gli studenti affinano la propria sensibilità artistica immergendosi nell'esperienza pratica e apprendendo diverse tecniche di rappresentazione.

Privilegiamo il confronto e il dialogo con il mondo circostante e la sua immediata rappresentazione. Gli studenti imitano modelli dal vero, lavorando su disegni, rappresentazioni bidimensionali e sculture dal vivo.

Unisciti alla Milan Academy of Art e scopri il potenziale del tuo talento artistico. Esplora le tecniche classiche di disegno, pittura e scultura per creare opere d'arte che lasciano il segno nel mondo contemporaneo. Iscriviti oggi stesso ai nostri corsi e inizia il tuo viaggio nell'universo dell'arte classica figurativa.

Name: M2E Ecole Polytechnique
Description: M2E Ecole Polytechnique c’est une formation 100% pratique en Génie Civil, Génie informatique et réseau, Science agronomique, Science de l’information et de la communication, Nutrition, Gestion des Ressources Humaines, Télécommunication, Science juridique, économique et Gestion.

Name: Elmwood Healthcare Training Institute
Description: Elmwood Healthcare Training Institute offers a range of professional healthcare training programs designed to equip students with essential skills for the medical field.

Name: Lydian Music Studios
Description: Lydian Music Studios is a versatile music making space. We offer high quality music instruction to musicians of all experience levels, ages 10 and up, with a focus in voice lessons, as well as piano and guitar. Other services include performance opportunities, classes/workshops, events, rehearsal spaces, and more. We encourage musicians of all walks of life to join our community!

Name: Northwest Pottery Collective
Description:
Our mission is to provide a welcoming and encouraging space for ceramic artists of all ages and abilities to engage with the ceramic arts and the community.

www.instagram.com/nwpotterycollective/

Name: Toneheim Folkehøgskole
Description: Toneheim Folkehøgskole ligger på Ridabu, nær Hamar, og er en av landets største folkehøgskoler. Vi er en unik musikkskole med lang fartstid, hvor 170 musikkinteresserte ungdommer bor sammen på skolen med mange muligheter til kreativt samspill.

Name: ARTistocracy AUBG
Description:
ARTistocracy is a dynamic student organization at the American University in Bulgaria dedicated to fostering creativity and building a community around the various forms of fine arts. 

At ARTistocracy, we believe in the transformative power of art to connect people, challenge ideas, and create meaningful change. Through exhibitions, workshops, and informal gatherings, we create an inclusive environment where every student, regardless of experience, can find a space to create, learn, and connect. Our mission is to inspire and empower students to explore their passions, collaborate, and contribute to the cultural landscape of AUBG.

Join us to explore your creative potential and be part of a vibrant, artistic community!

Name: International Institute of Fine Art
Description: IIFA is one of India's leading institutes, offering a wide range of courses in visual arts. The institute provides degree programs in Fine Art, including Fashion Design, Textile Design, Painting, and Applied Art. In addition to its permanent faculty, IIFA hosts visiting British educators who deliver an innovative and inspiring educational experience to our students.

Name: Sixth Dimension Studio
Description: Sixth Dimension Studio was founded in 2020 in Calgary. The students would be allowed to learn how to recognize, discover and create beauty through different themes in each lesson. Build artistic thinking, develop practical skills, and gain greater confidence in kinds of class activities. They will be encouraged to use arts to enrich life, have enthusiasm for art and dare to create.

Name: Instituto Multimédia
Description:
No Instituto Multimédia formamos os profissionais criativos do futuro, com cursos que combinam prática intensiva, inovação e uma ligação direta ao mercado de trabalho. Somos uma escola dinâmica, tecnológica e criativa no coração do Porto, onde a aprendizagem é prática e orientada por professores experientes e atentos às últimas tendências.

Cursos técnicos disponíveis:

Fotografia

Audiovisual

Multimédia

Turismo

Programação

Acreditamos que o talento se constrói com inspiração, prática e acesso aos melhores recursos. Se procuras uma formação criativa e queres estar preparado para os desafios reais do mercado, o teu lugar é aqui.

 Junta-te à nossa comunidade e descobre mais em: www.imultimedia.pt

Name: Nuna Ceramics Studio
Description:
“Nuna Ceramics Studio” is a creative space where you can come and relax, get inspired and create something unique and one of a kind. It’s not only a pottery studio, it’s a spacer for learning, meeting new inspiring people and escape from the stressful and fast paced environments. 

I welcome and encourage everyone to try this (at least once) and fall in love with art, ceramics, working with your hands and the environment. 

You can check out my ceramics studio on my instagram under @nuna_ceramics_studio or visit my website where you can sign up for workshops www.nunaceramics.pl

Name: Artgrain Pte Ltd
Description: QUALITY ART EDUCATION FOR CHILDREN, YOUTHS, AND ADULTS

Name: Zambia National Visual Arts Council
Description:
The Zambia National Visual Arts Council (VAC) is a national Zambian visual arts organisation established in 1989. Founded and led by artists themselves, VAC works to promote awareness of the arts and the interests of artists in Zambia.

The Zambia National Visual Arts Council is a platform dedicated to promoting and supporting the visual arts sector in Zambia. Our mission is to foster creativity, encourage collaboration, and advocate for the recognition and appreciation of visual artists across the country. We strive to provide opportunities for professional development, networking, and showcasing of artistic talent.

Name: International University of America (London Campus)
Description:
International University of America (IUA) originally a Californian University established in 1980, founded its campus in London in February 1995. IUA and Its more recent global outlook is an indication of its desire to enhance itself more global offering an Anglo-American style education.


IUA is an independent, coeducational, business and liberal arts international institution of higher learning. As a foreign university in London, IUA is independently administered in accordance to the education reform Act 1988 by Management Education Resources Centre (MERC) incorporated (as a college of higher education) in England and Wales in July 1995.


The university provides an adequate and satisfactory international standard of education and confers diplomas and degree mainly in the business area. The university is a member of European Council for Business Education (ECBE). It is also an approved and accredited centre for the Council for Licensed Conveyancers (UK). IUA, until recently, was a UK registered Education Provider under the auspices and authority of DfES (also known as the Department for Innovation, Universities and Skills) and conformed to the evolving rules, regulations and policies of the Home Office in the UK.

Name: The Art Department Newcastle
Description:
A little story about the awaking that is The Art Department.
Nestled in the heart of Newcastle, Australia lies a creative space like no other. The Art Department is more than just a studio, it's a vibrant community of artists with a passion for clay.

The vision for this unique space is simple - to build upon the small, yet thriving local artist community that has been growing in Newcastle over the years.

Name: Harsh Art Academy Talents
Description: We are an Art Academy based in Vadodara. We offer many courses for a wide range of age group, starting from 6 years old. We also prepare students for the admission test of various Fine Arts Institutes, Designing Institutes, Architecture Institutes and many more.

Description: De plek waar je jouw keramiek product kunt beschilderen met glazuur.

Description: عشرون عاماً من الفن...وَمستمرون

Description: Artz Graine Studio of Kreative Artz is an internet company based out of 2 Pandan Valley, #01 , 203A, 597626, Singapore.

Name: Atelier des Tropiques
Description: Atelier de céramique à Bruxelles

Name: Xpressoo (Zwolle)
Description:
Bij xpressoo kun je op één strippenkaart of abonnement verschillende kunstlessen volgen zodat je je creative kant kan ontdekken.

Onze missie is om hét artistieke prikbord van Zwolle te worden waar verschillende kunstenaars hun passie kunnen delen en zij die opzoek zijn naar hun passie het via ons kunnen ontdekken.

Wij geloven dat expressie nodig is. Nodig om te ventileren. Nodig om op te laden. Kunst biedt daar ontelbare vormen voor. Hoe moet je weten welke kunstvorm bij jou past als je het nooit hebt kunnen proberen? Daarom willen wi je helpenj de stap tot kunstbeoefening te zetten!

Wil je graag op dansles maar weet je niet welke stijl bij jou past? Wil je op muziekles maar weet je niet bij welk instrument jou ligt? Of wil je eens een kijkje nemen wat er nog meer is dan wat je al dacht te kennen? Dan bieden wij de plek voor jou!

Name: Studio Brésoles
Description:
Our traditional program of drawing and painting art classes are for beginners through professionals. Professionals can solidify their traditional skills through our detailed teaching approach.  Many of our professional students are from the fields of video game art, illustration, graphic design, and tattoo artistry.

Beginners can also excel in our art classes, as they learn good drawing habits from the start. For absolute beginners, we offer a Learn to Draw art course. 

Our instructors offer individual instruction and small classes sizes.

Name: The Art Hub
Description:
Welcome to The Art Hub, your home of the best Art Classes in South Delhi for Adults & Kids. If you are looking for art classes that will inspire and fulfil you, look no further. The Art Hub offers art workshops in a creative environment that supports the artistic journey of each student. Our expert team of instructors is qualified from India’s top Art Colleges and specialise in drawing out the artist from within you. 

Are you in the process of creating an application portfolio for a foundation course, certificate, master’s, or undergraduate degree in visual art-related fields? Wondering what should be in your portfolio and how to present it? Looking for the best way to maximize your chances of being accepted by your dream art school? Look no further! At The Art Hub, we provide specialized college counselling and portfolio development services tailored specifically for visual art courses. Our Students in the past have successfully been admitted to some of the top art schools including Parsons School of Design, School of Visual Arts NYC, University of Arts London, California College of the Arts, Savannah College of Art & Design, Goldsmiths, Pratt Institute to name a few.

From Oil Paintings to Acrylic to Watercolour, Abstract Art, Charcoal and Installations-choose a beautiful piece for your home, office or even to gift someone. Our team of Professional Artists, led by our Founder, Bhavna Minocha- has successfully delivered art works to several clients in India and overseas. You can also get artworks customised to match your requirements of size, colour scheme and medium.

Name: Epiphany Neighbourhood Art Studios
Description:
Epiphany Neighbourhood Art Studio has a rich 31-year history of art education. From a single-room studio to a new state-of-the-art facility with a beautiful view, the Studio has classes for all ages. 

The Neighbourhood Art Studio began in 1991 under the creative direction of artist Robert “Bob” T. Barrett. Bob served the Langley-area as an art instructor for 31 years before the Studio transitioned ownership and location in 2022.

Through the Neighbourhood Arts Studio, thousands of children, youth, adults, and seniors have developed a love for art and grown in their technique.

Name: Carving Studio and Sculpture Center
Description: The Carving Studio and Sculpture center is a premier location for stone carving and sculpture. We are a 501(c)3 non-profit that offers workshops, residencies, and internships in stone carving, metal sculpting, wood carving, and more. Check out our site for a list of programming!

Name: DJ BAN
Description:
Fundada em 09/06/2001, a Ban é o único centro de música eletrônica do mundo. Atuamos nas áreas de ensino, comércio, serviços, eventos, produção editorial e audiovisual, sempre voltados ao universo da música eletrônica.

Nossa sede em São Paulo conta com uma loja especializada, três estúdios de produção musical, três estúdios de DJ, um estúdio híbrido para cursos DJ, gravação de vídeo set entre outros, realizamos live streaming, produção de vídeos, temos um museu, uma mini pista de dança e um terraço coberto com capacidade para 50 pessoas.

Name: Akademie Schloss Solitude
Description:
Akademie Schloss Solitude is an international and transdisciplinary artists’ residence, located in
a baroque castle on a hill overlooking the cultural and industrial city of Stuttgart.
For over 35 years, Akademie Schloss Solitude has been offering fellows with different cultural
experiences and expertise professional support and solidarity. It has supported approximately
1,700 young artists from more than 120 countries since opening its doors in 1990 and has developed
into an important global network for the international art scene.

Akademie Schloss Solitude’s wide-ranging fellowship program promotes the interrelationship of art and
science across all disciplines and fields of practice.
The long-term fellowships create time and space for multi-focal learning processes and collective
productions. Residencies at Akademie Schloss Solitude enable fellows to devote themselves to their
research projects under favorable material and intellectual conditions. With the realization of numerous
events and its online presence the Akademie allows international visibility of fellows and their projects
and creates space for new digital projects. Thanks to the diverse range of public events, such as
exhibitions, performances, readings, concerts and symposia Akademie Schloss Solitude provides broad
public access to artistic thought and action and creates important momentum for social transformation.
The unique model affords artists and scientists valuable freedom to develop their work and perform
research in both a physical and digital context. This freedom allows us to question existing knowledge
hierarchies and develop alternative plans for the future.

Akademie Schloss Solitude makes a direct contribution to the internationalization of the region.

Name: BRIZ CERAMIC STUDIO
Description:
BRIZ [BREATH - ˈbɹɛθ] 
Hace referencia a la fonética de respirar en inglés
Una transformación interna a través de la cerámica.

Briz nace en 2022 con el objetivo de ayudar a desconectar del mundo en el que vivimos donde "no tener tiempo" es lo que está de moda. Con ayuda de la cerámica queremos transmitir calma, olvidarnos del estrés, y fomentar la creatividad realizando una actividad 100% manual. 

"Tocar tierra con las manos conecta con la esencia del ser y ayuda a mejorar el bienestar"

Dicen que 3 son multitud, pero para nosotras 3 es el número perfecto, 3 personas formamos el equipo BRIZ. Paula y Carmen, fundadoras de este apasionante proyecto, una experta en Marketing y la otra en Finanzas, amigas y compañeras de trabajo en una multinacional líder de cosmética que se han unido al último vértice clave de este triángulo... Lara, licenciada en Bellas Artes, con ciclo superior de escultura en madera y de cerámica artística y finalizando el ciclo de grado medio de alfarería. Lara será la experta maestra que os guiará y enseñará todo el maravillo mundo de la cerámica y os hará desconectar para reconectar.
Prometemos que nadie sale de una clase de cerámica como llegó. 
Briz nació para dar sentido a muchas necesidades, por un lado ofrecemos servicios de talleres semanales para tener tu momento de calma cada semana. También disponemos de opciones más puntuales para poder tener un primer contacto con la cerámica, los talleres experiencia. Y por último y no menos importante, soluciones creadas para empresas, la mejor forma de hacer equipo, tener 2h solo para vosotros, sin nada en más que pensar, y fomentando creatividad, para ello disponemos de servicio de team buildings.

Name: Spazio Studio
Description:
En Spazio creemos que el arte es una poderosa herramienta de transformación personal y colectiva.
Somos un espacio creado por artistas activos en el medio, con más de seis años de experiencia, dedicados a la exploración y desarrollo de las artes visuales. Nuestro propósito es llevar la sensibilidad, la creatividad y el pensamiento artístico más allá de las galerías y los talleres, para integrarlos en el corazón de las empresas.

Diseñamos experiencias y programas artísticos a medida que permiten a los colaboradores conectar con su creatividad, relajarse y desarrollar habilidades clave como la atención plena, la comunicación, el trabajo en equipo y la innovación.
En un mundo saturado de tareas, pantallas y estrés, el arte se convierte en un canal para recuperar el equilibrio, fortalecer la motivación y generar vínculos más sólidos entre las personas y la organización.

¿Qué ofrecemos a las empresas?

- Talleres de pintura, dibujo y otras técnicas artísticas adaptadas a las necesidades de las empresas.

- Experiencias creativas personalizadas para eventos corporativos, team building o celebraciones especiales.

- Programas continuos que fomentan la expresión y el bienestar de los colaboradores.

Cada sesión combina técnica y expresión libre, guiada por artistas profesionales que inspiran y acompañan el proceso creativo de forma cercana y personalizada. El resultado: equipos más cohesionados, colaboradores más motivados y un ambiente laboral más saludable.

En Spazio, creemos que el desarrollo artístico es también desarrollo humano. Por eso, nuestro compromiso es crear experiencias que transformen, inspiren y dejen huella.

Arte para conectar. Arte para transformar. Arte para crecer.

Name: Mosteiro de Arouca
Description: Documentado desde o século X e assumindo caráter feminino a partir de 1154, o Mosteiro de Arouca adquiriu especial relevância no século XIII com a entrada da Rainha D. Mafalda, tornando-se um dos mais poderosos mosteiros femininos da Ordem de Cister em Portugal. A sua aparência atual resulta de grandes obras dos séculos XVII e XVIII, que substituíram os vestígios mais antigos, ostentando a Igreja (com túmulo da Rainha Dona Mafalda, órgão, e rica talha dourada), coro das monjas, claustros, cozinha conventual, sala do capitulo e um valioso Museu de Arte Sacra responsável pela preservação da história e das tradições monásticas.

Name: Creative Art Studio
Description:
In a world filled with screens and digital distractions, there's a place where creativity knows no boundaries, and imagination takes flight. 

Creative Art Studio is a sanctuary where colors, shapes, and forms converge to create a symphony of artistic expression. Nestled in Limassol, our art school is a haven for aspiring artists of all ages, offering a diverse range of classes and inspiring opportunities to explore, learn, and grow.

At Creative Art Studio, we firmly believe that art knows no age limit. Our curriculum is designed to cater to a broad spectrum of students. Whether you're a budding young artist or someone rediscovering their creative spark, our classes are tailored to meet your unique needs and skill levels.

Beyond the Canvas:
Creative Art Studio isn't just a place for art classes; it's a hub for artistic exploration and community building. We believe that art has the power to bring people together, and that's why we offer team bonding sessions and corporate events that infuse creativity into every interaction. It's not just about the end result; it's about the journey and the connections we forge along the way.

Explore the world of art with us and let your creativity shine! 
 Our engaging art classes for kids spark creativity from a young age. 
 Dive into the world of art with our adult classes, perfect for artists of all levels. 
 Foster teamwork and inspiration through our tailored team bonding experiences. 
 Elevate your corporate events with unique, art-infused activities.

Join us and experience the world of art, where creativity knows no bounds.

Name: HelloMotion High School
Description:
SMA HelloMotion berdiri sejak tahun 2017 di tengah fase kebutuhan masyarakat akan sekolah masa kini yang mengedepankan kreativitas dan berpusat pada kebutuhan peserta didik. SMA HelloMotion berusaha menciptakan lingkungan belajar yang merangsang imajinasi dan memupuk kreativitas. Sebagai sekolah formal, SMA HelloMotion telah menjadi wadah bagi para inovator muda untuk menjelajahi potensi diri, memecahkan masalah dunia nyata, dan meraih prestasi gemilang.

HelloMotion High School merupakan Sekolah Menengah Atas yang mengedepankan kreativitas dan berpusat pada kebutuhan peserta didik. Dengan menerapkan kurikulum merdeka dan menjadi sekolah penggerak dengan mengintegrasikan design thinking, menjadikan HelloMotion High School sebagai wadah bagi para inovator muda untuk menjelajahi potensi diri, memecahkan masalah dunia nyata dan meraih prestasi gemilang.

Keterampilan Abad 21 adalah Landasan. SMA HelloMotion memahami bahwa masa depan menuntut lebih dari sekadar pengetahuan. Di tengah revolusi teknologi dan perubahan global, SMA HelloMotion mempersiapkan peserta didiknya dengan keterampilan abad 21 yang esensial: pemikiran kritis, kerjasama, komunikasi, dan pemecahan masalah. Dalam setiap langkah pembelajaran, kami mendorong pengembangan keterampilan yang relevan dan berkelanjutan.

Sejak langkah pertama kami diambil pada tahun 2017, SMA HelloMotion telah bertransformasi menjadi pusat pendidikan yang mengilhami masa depan. SMA HelloMotion bangga melihat bagaimana kepercayaan dan dukungan dari masyarakat telah tumbuh seiring berjalannya waktu. Ini adalah buah dari hasil bahwa SMA HelloMotion berkomitmen untuk terus memberikan pendidikan yang terbaik bagi putra-putri bangsa.

Pada tahun 2019 Direktorat PSMA menunjuk SMA HelloMotion sebagai Sekolah Kewirausahaan. SMA HelloMotion dinilai memiliki program kewirausahaan yang baik, harapannya mampu menciptakan para pemimpin masa depan yang berani berinovasi. Melangkah menuju tahun 2023, SMA HelloMotion kembali ditunjuk sebagai

Name: Mozart à l'école
Description:
Mozart à l’École est la filiale éducative et artistique de MY STAR SHINE, dédiée à l’éveil, la formation et l’épanouissement artistique des enfants, des jeunes et des adultes.
 Mozart à l’École is the educational and artistic branch of MY STAR SHINE, dedicated to awakening, training, and fostering artistic growth for children, youth, and adults.

 Nous proposons / We offer :

Le Camp "Les P’tits Mozart en Vacances"  : ateliers de musique, danse, arts plastiques et théâtre pour enfants et adolescents, organisés à Noël, Pâques et en été.

“Les P’tits Mozart Holiday Camp” : music, dance, visual arts and theater workshops for kids and teens, held at Christmas, Easter and summer.

Cours collectifs déployés / Group workshops : dans les familles, écoles et entreprises pour stimuler créativité, cohésion et expression artistique.

In families, schools and companies, promoting creativity, team spirit and artistic expression.

Cours individuels personnalisés / Personalized individual lessons : chant, instruments, danse, dessin, art oratoire.

Vocal, instrumental, dance, drawing and public speaking lessons tailored to each learner’s goals.


 Notre mission / Our mission
Rendre l’art accessible à tous, développer les talents et nourrir la passion artistique.
Making art accessible to all, nurturing talent and inspiring passion for creativity.

 Notre vision / Our vision
Être une école de référence en Afrique, formant une génération de créateurs et d’interprètes.
To become a leading art school in Africa, shaping a new generation of creators and performers.

 Valeurs / Values

Créativité / Creativity 

Discipline / Discipline 

Accessibilité / Accessibility 

Épanouissement / Growth
