Name: Bild-Werk Frauenau E.V.
Description:
An open, interdisciplinary exchange between people, media and materials. The Academy attracts artists from all over the world, and enjoys worldwide renown for its creative exchange, atmosphere and unique artistic profile.

Bild-Werk Frauenau is a regional and international forum for glass and visual arts, a stage for music and culture, and a place for border-crossing encounters, in the glassmaking village Frauenau in Bavaria, Germany.
In the International Summer Academy courses and in other workshops at Bild-Werk Frauenau, the principal focus is on artistic and creative work with glass, both hot and cold, both traditional and new creative methods, together with all the visual arts.

Name: Masterclass Art Academy
Description: An Art School dedicated to enrich the creativity of students with group of artist that have over a decade long experience in the field of art. Methodical & Professional approach towards all art mediums is what sets us apart. Apart from teaching, we also work on paintings for commercial and residential interiors.

Name: Levenslust Academie
Description: Levenslust door verbeeldingskracht. Pluspunt en BRUTUS samen op onderzoek naar de graal.

Name: Ailisha Shannon
Description:
Ailisha Shannon is an artist, writer and teacher who offers (online) workshops, courses and artistic coaching to those who wish to (re)discover or deepen their artistic practice. Specialising in visual research, storytelling and mark-making Ailisha's workshops and courses are geared towards supporting and inspiring students to find their artistic voice and confidence, whilst also providing them with the tools needed to build a solid and exciting artistic practice of their own.

Each year Ailisha teaches The Winter Intensive, a medium to advanced online art course that runs through autumn and winter all the way into spring the following year. Students leave this course with a new community and a series of new works in a style all their own. 

Ailisha is also the founder of a scholarship program that offers one full scholarship place for each online course that she teaches to a student with a chronic illness. All those with a chronic illness are welcome to enroll.

Name: Ferdy Steger Art
Description:
Kunstenaar | Schildersworkshops op maat voor bedrijven | voor meer innovatiekracht, creativiteit en vernieuwde perspectieven | Expert in het maken van expressionistische schilderijen en ontwerpen van kunstobjecten.
Als bedrijf wil je dat medewerkers out of the box denken, vaste structuren durven loslaten, buiten de lijntjes kleuren. Dit vraagt om een andere houding, een andere manier van kijken. Dat is precies wat ik met mijn schilderworkshops en ‘pop up museum concept’ stimuleer.

Kunst binnen organisaties draagt bij aan het succes van jouw organisatie omdat het verandering in gang zet. Kunst prikkelt, stimuleert, inspireert. Het zorgt voor verbazing en verwondering. Kunst stimuleert spelenderwijs. Daar hoef je niet over na te denken. Binnen bedrijven vergroot kunst de creativiteit het probleemoplossend vermogen van de mensen. En ontstaat ook nog eens een positieve werksfeer hierdoor.
Met het Popup Museum concept kun je binnen jouw organisatie mensen laten proeven, ruiken, experimenteren en ontdekken hoe kunst onderdeel kan zijn van hun werk en leven. Het resulteert in meer betrokkenheid en vindingrijkheid.

Name: Societa Italiana Di Santos
Description: A Società Italiana di Santos foi fundada em 1897 para prestar assistência aos imigrantes italianos que chegavam ao Brasil pelo porto de Santos, e hoje é uma associação sem fins lucrativos que tem como objetivo divulgar a língua e a cultura italianas. Nossa casa está sempre de portas abertas para reunir não apenas a comunidade italiana na Baixada Santista – cidadãos natos e ítalo-brasileiros – mas também simpatizantes e pessoas interessadas em ampliar os seus conhecimentos sobre a Itália, esse país que desperta paixão pela sua imensa riqueza histórica e cultural.

Name: NCCC AFA Association
Description:
The North Carolina Community College Associate in Fine Arts (AFA) Association was established to help solidify articulation agreements between members of the NC Community College System, the University of North Carolina System, and NC Independent Colleges and Universities. 


Our main objective is to forge and maintain articulation agreements, bilateral agreements, and working partnerships for the benefit of all students.

Name: Taller d'Art
Description:
Taller d'Art es tu espacio. Disfruta y conoce a personas amantes del arte y la pintura.
El espacio ideal donde realizar actividades de team-building, trabajando aspectos como la convivencia, el liderazgo, la perspectiva y la transformación a través del arte.
Cada persona es especial y posee su perspectiva y aspiraciones sobre el arte. Taller d’Art, un espacio de desarrollo, luz y creatividad, se adapta a ti con una técnica de enseñanza personalizada.

Name: JM Atelier
Description:
You don't have to study art to learn how to draw. 
JM Atelier is a hobby art school in Bergen for absolutely everyone.
It's a perfect place for private arrangements like team buildings or birthday parties.

Name: Paint 'n Fun Ceramics
Description:
We are the most FUN place in the NRV to create memories with the special people in your life. For a creative escape where everyone—from beginners to art lovers—can make something beautiful, visit Paint ’n Fun Ceramics or check out upcoming workshops. It’s a fun break from routine, and a place to explore artistic possibilities with friends and family.
Whether hosting birthday parties, walk-in sessions, team building events, or workshops on wheel-throwing and clay-hand building, the studio cultivates a space where fun meets learning. Many patrons return year after year to create with friends and family—a sign of the lasting memories made within its walls.
Unleash Your Creativity in a Fun, Welcoming Space
Located in Uptown Christiansburg (the former New River Valley Mall), Paint ’n Fun Ceramics is a locally owned studio offering pottery painting, clay hand-building, pottery wheel classes, wood sign creation, canvas painting, and more for artists of all ages and skill levels. With over 1,000 ready-to-paint pieces and a broad palette of glazes to choose from, the studio makes art approachable and spirited—even for the creatively hesitant.

Name: MUSICALA SAS
Description:
Musicala is an artistic training school dedicated to teaching music, dance, and visual arts. We offer personalized and group classes tailored to all ages and skill levels, available in in-person, virtual, and at-home formats. Our mission is to provide a unique educational experience where each student can develop their artistic talent at their own pace, whether as a hobby, passion, or professional growth.

We are known for our CREA methodology (Concentration, Speed, Efficiency, and Adaptability), which ensures comprehensive and personalized learning for each of our students. Additionally, we have highly qualified teachers and a creative environment where artistic expression and personal development go hand in hand.

At Musicala, we believe that art transforms lives, and we are committed to offering high-quality classes that inspire and foster artistic growth.

Join our artistic family!

Name: Barkingside Art Club
Description:
Barkingside Art Club is an exciting venture designed to bring us closer together as a community. 

The club provides a supportive space for local creatives, artists and art lovers to meet regularly with one another
 and share ideas. It is a friendly and enriching environment which hosts workshops and exhibitions thereby promoting each individual’s business.

Local creatives will also be given the opportunity to volunteer in helping children with special needs flourish through creative activities. Our artistic approach to teaching and learning is focussed on using art for a good cause. In exchange for their valued time and effort, those who choose to volunteer in this inclusive club will be rewarded through promotion of their own artistic practise.

Name: NTU Art and Business Club
Description:
NTU Art & Business Club (NTUABC) is the first organization in Taiwan dedicated to the intersection of art and commerce. We aim to bridge academia and the global art market by offering hands-on exposure to auctions, art investment, and gallery operations.

Our mission is to cultivate the next generation of art business leaders through professional workshops, industry collaborations, and global partnerships. By connecting emerging talent with collectors, galleries, auction houses, and institutions, we provide a platform for dialogue, research, and career development in the international art economy.

台大藝術與商業研究社(NTUABC)是台灣首個專注於藝術與商業交會領域的學生組織。我們致力於連結學術界與國際藝術市場，透過實務導向的學習讓成員深入了解拍賣流程、藝術投資與畫廊營運等關鍵知識。

我們的使命是透過專業工作坊、產業合作與國際連結，培養具備美學素養與市場洞察力的下一代藝術商業人才。藉由串聯新興人才與收藏家、藝廊、拍賣行及國際機構，我們打造一個涵蓋對話、研究與職涯發展的多元平台，積極推動台灣在全球藝術經濟中的參與和影響力。

Name: Opaque Art Studio
Description: Welcome to Opaque Art Studio, where creativity knows no bounds. We specialize in a diverse range of art, craft, and design activities, including painting, sculpture, digital art, and much more. Our space is a heaven for artists and makers, offering the tools and inspiration needed to bring imaginative projects to life. Join us to explore your artistic potential in a supportive and dynamic environment.

Name: Kunstschule Offenburg
Description:
Die Kunstschule ist eine von drei Bildungseinrichtungen des Bildungsträgers Volkshochschule Offenburg e.V., unter dessen Dach folgende Bildungseinrichtungen tätig sind.

La Kunstschule Offenburg (Ecole d’Art de la Ville d’Offenburg), est l’une des plus anciennes institutions de ce type au Bade-Wurtemberg. Elle fait partie intégrante de l’association Volkshochschule Offenburg e. V.e et propose en continue une éducation culturelle et pratique dans tous les domaines des Beaux-Arts pour tout âge, des plus jeunes aux séniors.

Name: I. K. Karpenko-Karyi Kyiv National University of Theatre, Cinema and Television (KNUTKiT)
Description:
I. K. Karpenko-Kary Kyiv National University of Theater, Cinema and Television (shortly known as KNUTKiT) is one of the leading institutions of art education, whose history goes back more than 100 years (in 2024 the University celebrates its 120th anniversary).

We are an active participant in the overall process of humanitarian development of society, preservation and enhancement of spiritual values, and Ukraine’s integration into the European and world cultural space.

The University trains professional staff in the specialties 021 “Audiovisual Arts and Production” and 026 “Performing Arts” (field of knowledge 02 “Culture and Arts”) in accredited educational and professional, educational and scientific, educational and creative and scientific programs at the first (bachelor’s), second (master’s), third (PhD, Doctor of Arts) levels of higher education.

It includes the Institute of Screen Arts and the Faculty of Theater Arts.

Name: Koç University Ebru Club
Description:
Marbling is a traditional art technique that has been applied for centuries. Special paint colors are distributed on dense water with special brushes and a tool which is named as “biz” is used to create unique patterns, specific shapes, and figures -illustrations of some flowers or a heart shape to name a few-.As Marbling Club we aim to teach all students who want to learn marbling, create a warm atmosphere for our members, and raise awareness of traditional art methods. Professional Ebru artist Mehmet Eray Atay instructs us on technicalities and methods by conducting weekly lessons in our workshop located in the Student Center. He also checks our progression and supports us throughout the semester. In our year-end exhibition, we exhibit our Ebrus for the whole university to see. Regular attendants to classes are also rewarded with a certificate. Simultaneous translation between Turkish and English is supported by both our instructor and students. 

Ebru, kitre adı verilen sıvının üzerine boyaların özel fırçalar yardımıyla dağıtılarak ve biz adı verilen alet ile özel desenler oluşturularak yüzyıllardır yapılan geleneksel bir sanat türüdür. Koç Üniversitesi Ebru Kulübü olarak bu sanatı üniversitemizde ilgisini çeken ve öğrenmek isteyen tüm öğrencilerin öğrenebilmesini, öğrenciler arasında samimi bir ortam oluşturabilmeyi ve geleneksel sanatlara olan ilginin artmasını sağlamayı umuyoruz. Uzman Ebru sanatçısı Mehmet Eray Atay, Öğrenci Merkezi’ndeki atölyemizde dönem boyunca düzenli dersler vererek sanatın tüm teknik detaylarını bizimle paylaşıyor, geleneksel ebru türlerini öğretiyor ve öğrenme sürecimizi yakından takip ediyor. Ortaya çıkardığımız eserler, yıl sonunda Resim Kulübü ile ortak olarak düzenlediğimiz sergimizde tüm okulun görmesi için sergileniyor. Aynı zamanda yıl boyunca atölyemize katılan öğrenciler sertifika alıyor.

Name: ACFI - Suzuki Violin School
Description:
The Accademia Philarmonica is a private music school in The Nederlands and was founded in 1973 by Johannes Lievaart. Since 1983 it has been a school for Suzuki Violin Education.

Johannes Lievaart followed the training of the British Suzuki Institute and continued it with a study at Shinichi Suzuki himself in Japan, where he has been three times for some time. He is a teacher trainer and examiner at the European Suzuki Association.

Suzuki’s goal was much broader than children learn to make music. The purpose of music education at the Accademia is therefore to develop the talents present in all children.

The working method of the Suzuki method means that we have to match the enormous learning ability that very young children all naturally have. It is sometimes stated that children learn more in their first years of life than in their entire life afterwards. But then we have to join the childish world of thought. When we do that, children turn out to be capable of a lot. According to Suzuki, there are three important points:

Start young
Provide a stimulating environment
Provide a good methodical approach

In this way children of four years old, sometimes even younger, can learn to play a musical instrument very well.

Suzuki teachers are specially trained for working with young children and all use the same method and the same repertoire. The Accademia has a number of fixed violin teachers. Sometimes teachers in training assist.

Teachers in the group lessons regularly rotate, which is exciting and familiar for the students, since the method of working and the repertoire is known.

Guest teachers also regularly come from abroad to give a workshop. Because the Suzuki method is the same internationally, that does not cause a language barrier.

Teachers:
Johannes Lievaart - Utrecht
Inki Varga - Utrecht
Hanna Matthijsse - Amsterdam & Utrecht
Marieke de Vos - Amersfoort

More information about our teachers: https://acfi.nl/

A través de talleres presenciales de cerámica y arteterapia, acompañamos a las personas en procesos de expresión, bienestar y encuentro interior. Creemos en el poder del barro como herramienta de presencia, y del arte como puente para socializar, sanar y crear comunidad.

En SOMA combinamos prácticas conscientes, experiencias sensoriales y momentos significativos para quienes buscan algo más que una clase: una experiencia profunda de reconexión.

Por ahora, ofrecemos talleres creativos y espacios para explorar desde la cerámica. Muy pronto lanzaremos clases regulares y nuevas experiencias grupales.

Name: Models Of The Mecca, Inc.
Description:
Founded on January 10, 2018 by Deja Davenport, Peyton Kinchen, and Deante’ Massenburg, Models of the Mecca is a modeling and creative organization on the campus of Howard University. We promote inclusivity in all aspects of fashion through creativity, community, and passion. We strive for excellence, diversity, integrity, and equality, not mediocrity, by having love for others and oneself.

We specialize in print and runway modeling as well as creative 'behind-the-runway' departments. A multitude of our members are signed & published models and creatives, including in Vogue, New York and DC Fashion Weeks, and numerous other publications. We are involved in the community, both on-and off-campus. In addition to our annual showcase welcoming our new members, we hold several creative events throughout the semester, such as walk clinics, fashion and beauty workshops, print photo opportunities, and community service projects.

Description: Artspace is an inclusive art studio aimed at providing a serene and stress-free environment for artist of all ages. Our primary focus is to offer a range of art classes, create commissioned art pieces, collaborate with restaurants for art workshops, partner with gift shops in Nepal and abroad, and organize engaging art exhibitions. By catering to working parents, art enthusiasts, collectors, and individuals/ businesses in need of commissioned art, we aim to become a go-to destination for artistic expression and personal growth.

Name: Iwanson International school of contemporary dance
Description:
The Iwanson International School of Contemporary Dance in Munich is one of the most internationally recognised academies for contemporary dance in Europe and trains contemporary dancers and dance teachers with excellent technical quality and an individual profile. 

We at Iwanson International are united through something fundamental: we are all dancers, through and through. 
This is what drives us, this is what inspires us, this is what we’ve wanted for ourselves throughout our lives. We view our role in this world as professional dancers, and we truly spend our days doing all things dance. 

From training to rehearsals to researching new techniques, we at Iwanson International embody a multicultural group of artists who have bonded together around a common passion: the craft of dance.

Name: Instituto Arte por toda Parte
Description:
O Projeto Arte por toda Parte é um projeto reconhecido e premiado pela UNESCO e pela Fundação Oswaldo Cruz em termos de inovação e que transforma a vida de crianças e adolescentes ao redor do país! 

O Instituto Arte por toda Parte já realizou mais de 1000 oficinas artísticas em sua trajetória pelos Estados da Bahia, Rio Grande do Sul, Paraná, Santa Catarina, São Paulo, Goiás e Espírito Santo, alcançando mais de 21.000 crianças e adolescentes. 

Todas essas lindas memórias foram possíveis porque o Arte por toda Parte é um Projeto que se importa, de verdade, em mudar o mundo através da arte!

Name: The Black Whale - Coworking & Art Gallery
Description:
The Black Whale is a new concept, a combination of an Art Gallery, with a Coworking Space.

Our place is a huge open area with more than 200m2, personal desks with high speed internet connexion for people who want to be a Digital Nomad, a traveling Business man or just want to go out of home and work in a nice and cozy office.

We have 12 personal desks, Cafe area Bar, Chilling corner with sofas, workshop plenty of working tools, and of course the Art Gallery, surrounded by beautiful vintage items and paintings.

This Coworking space is great for people looking for an ocean experience. Direct by the sea, at the famous surfer village, Salinas, at the north coast of Spain.
Join us and enjoy great company, surrounded by salt water, great food, beautiful mountains (Picos de Europa) , and more!

Name: ART CLASSE by Stéphane Ducret
Description:
ONLINE & LIVE PAINTING CLASSES FOR INDIVIDUALS, OR COMPANIES (TEAM BUILDING).

SWISS ARTIST STÉPHANE DUCRET GIVES EASY STEP-BY-STEP INSTRUCTIONS ON HOW TO PAINT LIKE POST-MODERN AND CONTEMPORARY MASTERS.

YOU WILL LEARN HOW TO PAINT AND BUILD A PERSONAL COLLECTION OF SOME OF TODAY'S MOST ICONIC ARTWORKS!

MAY YOU WANT TO EXPERIENCE WITH ART, LEARN MORE ABOUT ARTISTS AND THEIR TECHNIQUES, OR EVEN IF YOU ARE AN ARTIST WHO WANTS TO FIND DEEPER INSPIRATIONS AND DEVELOP YOUR SKILLS : THIS CLASS IS FOR YOU !

Learn how to paint like great postmodern and contemporary artists… even if you never held a paintbrush in your hands!

Hi, I'm Stéphane Ducret
And I am a Swiss professional visual artist with more than 30 years of experience and I come here with a unique and proven step-by-step painting teaching class.

I am a graduate with BFA & MFA at HEAD (Haute école d’art et de design), Geneva and I have been on the board of directors and teacher at ECAL (Ecole cantonale d’art de Lausanne), Lausanne. I also founded two art galleries in New York and Geneva and directed one Lausanne.

In 2016, I created ART CLASSE where hundreds of participants have each successfully painted numerous real « fake » paintings after fantastic famous masters.

Through my online courses, I now would like to give a wider access to my painting tricks and help you build your own collection of masterpieces by painting them yourself by just following my easy step-by-step instructions!

Description: “Το Εργαστήρι Σχεδίου” δημιουργήθηκε από τους Χρόνη Λουλάκη και Γρηγορία Μπαλμπούζη, με ενθουσιασμό και αγάπη  για την τέχνη των εικαστικών, της Ζωγραφικής, του Σχεδίου, της Φωτογραφίας, των εικαστικών δραστηριοτήτων για παιδιά κ.α. Σκοπός του εργαστηρίου  είναι να καθοδηγήσει με τον καλύτερο δυνατό τρόπο όλους εκείνους που θέλουν να αναπτύξουν ή να εξελίξουν τις εικαστικές τους δεξιότητες, από τη ζωγραφική, το αρχιτεκτονικό σχέδιο, την αρχιτεκτονική εσωτερικού χώρου ή το βιομηχανικό σχεδιασμό. Είναι δίπλα σε εκείνους που προετοιμάζονται για τις εισαγωγικές εξετάσεις στην ΑΣΚΤ, τις πανελλήνιες εξετάσεις για τα ειδικά μαθήματα του σχεδίου και τις κατατακτήριες εξετάσεις των Αρχιτεκτονικών σχολών. Σε ότι αφορά στα Πανεπιστήμια του εξωτερικού τόσο για τις προπτυχιακές σπουδές όσο και για τις μεταπτυχιακές, υπάρχει η ειδική κατάρτιση στους συνεργάτες μας που χρειάζεται για όλα τα στάδια της προετοιμασίας των ξένων πανεπιστημίων από την προετοιμασία Portfolio έως την εγγραφή στο Πανεπιστήμιο.

Name: Art Workshops for Animal and Nature Lovers
Description:
Art classes/workshops facilitated by a professional artist on a beautiful green and serene farm just outside of Gaborone, where rescued animals live in harmony. Ideal to relax and get in touch with your creativity and confidence, as well as for team building.  
Jelena is a professional artist trained in Europe and teaches observational drawing and painting. She is passionate about the power of art and creativity and she is able to help people to reconnect with their creativity and work on their self expression.
Beth's house and farm are a peace of art that she designed herself with a lot of  love. It is green and serene; you can see horses, donkeys, chicken, goats, cats, dogs, and all kind of other animals who live in harmony. This amazing ambiance provides ideal inspiration for drawing and painting.
It is ideal for people who need to create ME- time in their busy lives and for team building.

Name: Paintheads
Description:
Based out of Kemps Corner, Mumbai, Paintheads is a one-of-a-kind art studio co-founded by Rushil Sheth (art therapist & former corporate strategist) and Kunj Mehta (gold medalist applied artist) — with over 25 years of combined experience in the fields of art and strategy.

Our Mission is to make art accessible to all - breaking barriers of age, gender, profession or skill level - and to revolutionize how art is taught and perceived.

With a wide range of offerings from Corporate experiences and Art Therapy to Paint parties, weekly sessions for children and adults, masterclasses and custom workshops, we've got all your creative needs covered.

Corporate Experiences:
We believe in the power of playful learning — and unlearning. 
Not every meeting needs slides, and brainstorming sessions shouldn’t leave you drained. 
We offer a creative, energizing alternative designed to leave you fulfilled, inspired, and equipped with meaningful solutions - using art as the medium.

Signature Offerings:
1) Vision Boarding (A Strategy Mapping Experience)
2) Collab Canvas (Team Bonding through Art)
3) The Paint Play (Celebratory Art Experiences)
4) Colour Connection (Therapeutic Art)
5) Creative Cardio (Creative Problem Solving)

We love designing custom experiences aligned to your objectives, team size, and budget. Whether it’s for leaders, large teams, or intimate circles — we bring strategy, soul, and splashes of colour to your workplace.

Name: Taidekoulu Maa
Description:
Vuonna 1986 perustettu Taidekoulu Maa on kannatusyhdistyksen ylläpitämä yksityinen taideoppilaitos. Taidekoulu Maassa voi opiskella kolmivuotisella nykytaiteilijan ammattiin valmentavalla päivälinjalla sekä avoimilla kursseilla. Opiskelijoita koulussa on vuosittain päivä- ja iltalinjalla yhteensä noin 90. Päivälinjalle haetaan valintakokeen kautta.

Maan nykytaidepainotteiseen opetusohjelmaan haetaan aktiivisia nykytaiteesta ja sen sisällöstä kiinnostuneita luovia, kriittisiä ja tiedonjanoisia opiskelijoita.
Projektikeskeinen koulutusohjelma valmentaa opiskelijoita toimimaan nykytaitelijan ammatissa. Projektitöidensä kautta opiskelijat ovat vuoropuhelussa ympäröivän yhteiskunnan kanssa ottaen kantaa, kritisoiden ja esittäen utopioita käyttäen taiteen eri metodeja. Menestyvä opiskelija on aktiivinen osallistuja ja käyttää työssään tarvittaessa nykytaiteen monia eri muotoja. Taidekoulu Maassa opiskelu sopii hyvin myös esim. sosiaalitieteitä, psykologiaa ja filosofiaa opiskeleville.

Taiteen uusien yhteiskunnallisten odotusten edessä Taidekoulu Maa pyrkii etsimään uusia koulutusnäkökulmia muutostilassa olevan perinteisen taidekoulutuksen rinnalle. Valmentava opetus koostuu sisällöllisesti hyvin erilaisista kurssikokonaisuuksista, joihin on opettajiksi kutsuttu Suomessa toimivia aktiivisia ja kansainvälisesti kokeneita nykytaiteilijoita. Opetuksen rungon muodostaa monipuolisen teorian ja käytännön harjoitusten jatkuva vuoropuhelu.

Koulun opetustilat sijaitsevat Suomenlinnan uniikissa miljöössä. Taidekoulu Maan opettajat edustavat monipuolisesti taiteen ammattilaisia ja koululla on elävät kontaktit ajankohtaiseen kansainväliseen ja paikalliseen nykytaiteen kenttään. Maan taustalla päätösvaltaa käyttää Taidekoulu Maan kannatusyhdistys ry:n vuosikokouksen valitsema johtokunta, joka päättää koulun opetussuunnitelmasta, lukuvuosisuunnitelmasta, määrärahojen käytöstä ja henkilökunnan nimeämisestä.

Name: MuzArt East Coast
Description:
MuzArt East Coast was founded in 2018 with the aim of spreading the love for art in the community. Our philosophy is simple. Live in the moment and promote creativity & fun through art. 

At MuzArt, students are taught using heuristic method to develop their artistic potential, with the curriculum specially designed for children between the ages of 3 & 12.

MuzArt Art Classes will cater to your child's intellectual growth based on their age. Every phase of a child introduces a new type of skill they learn. Our art classes aim to fuel the development of both the left and right sides of their brains.  In our art programme, we only encourage our young artists. Though we may guide and assist them in illustrating proportions and techniques, the young creative minds of our students will always be in charge of the direction and emotion of their art. Art is an activity that increases the elasticity of an individual's creativity. The exploration of the mind's limitations.

We also provide corporate & casual workshops for all ages. From resin/jesmonite coasters and trays to scenic terrariums, our workshops are fun for all.  We also conduct Art Jamming sessions, which are free and easy, where you can come in and create your very own artwork  (all materials provided).  Play the music of your choice as you create your masterpiece. We provide a range of packages for workshops and art jamming.

Name: Children's Art Classes of Cary
Description:
We offer studio-based art education programs that include painting, drawing, design, printmaking, sculpture, ceramics, and much more. Students ages 3 and up will experience over 40 different areas of art to feed their passion and enhance their skills. Our programs are available for homeschooling and co-op education, track-out and summer camps, birthday parties, and weekly classes for all ages and skill levels. Our classes are designed to grow with your child.

Tapping into a child’s natural creativity and imagination can give them various benefits that can help them throughout their lives. At Children’s Art Classes in Cary, serving Cary, Durham, Morrisville, Apex, Raleigh, Holly Springs, and surrounding areas, we’re committed to helping parents discover classes that instill a sense of creativity in their children and help them find a passion for art. Our classes explore various types of art to enrich children’s lives and introduce them to creative outlets they can turn to as they go through life.

Name: Fundación Il Posto
Description:
Il Posto es un espacio de arte dedicado a la conservación, estudio y difusión del arte contemporáneo chileno y latinoamericano.

Creemos que el arte y las discusiones en torno a él impulsan el desarrollo de un pensamiento crítico y abren nuevas perspectivas y reflexiones sobre nuestra contemporaneidad.

A través de exposiciones de artistas, investigaciones y contenidos producidos especialmente para estas, Il Posto promueve instancias colaborativas entre artistas, curadores, investigadores y coleccionistas de la región.

Il Posto cuenta con un acervo de más de 300 piezas de arte chileno y latinoamericano producidas desde la década del 70 a la actualidad.

Name: Atelier Arzilla
Description: Embarquez avec moi à la découverte de l'art de la poterie. Après des études aux Beaux-Arts, j'ai exploré les techniques traditionnelles en Corée du Sud avant de revenir à mes propres origines : la terre corse. Des pigments bleus des émaux méditerranéens aux argiles noires des falaises, je vous invite à retrouver l'authenticité et le raffinement du travail du colombin et du modelage.

Name: Artlette Art Studio
Description:
Art education provides students the opportunity to acquire new skills, discover their creativity and the freedom of self-expression. Studies demonstrate the importance of art succeeding in improved self-confidence, positive academic, social and emotional outcomes.

At Artlette specialised fine art studios, our curriculum and teachings balance techniques and creativity, offering the best quality programme, supplies and studio space for the students. During our classes, we nurture students into respectful, responsible and resilient individual.

Our studios offer kids, portfolio preparation, hobbyists classes, curated series of workshops, personalised private lessons, events and parties.

Follow us on Instagram & Facebook @artlettecolours for latest promotions and student works.

Name: University of Kentucky Department of Theatre and Dance
Description:
The Department of Theatre and Dance offers well-rounded programs providing the flexibility to double major or minor in another discipline within a liberal arts education at a Research 1 institution. The department offers a vibrant variety of classes, techniques, performances on and off the stage, and a robust student produced season within an encouraging and nurturing environment. The faculty are accomplished working professionals including actors, dancers, directors, choreographers, designers, technicians, playwrights, and published scholars. Through the thoughtfully curated curriculum and faculty mentorship, students are prepared to have a successful transition from campus to professional life.

The University of Kentucky Department of Theatre and Dance is an accredited institutional member of the National Association of Schools of Theatre (NAST). Visit the NAST website for more information about accreditation.

Name: The Leo Marchutz School of Painting & Drawing
Description:
The Leo Marchutz School of Painting & Drawing is a cultural and educational center in Aix-en-Provence, France that aims to preserve, nurture, and expand the legacy of the school and bring impactful programming opportunities to our international community.

Founded in 1972, the Leo Marchutz School has grown through several iterations. In its 50th year, we are now reimagining the school’s future with the goal of becoming a cultural and educational center in Aix-en-Provence that is a valuable resource in the larger world and a responsible member of the “patrimoine” of Aix-en-Provence that gives back to the local community of which it is a part. We plan to preserve and continue the legacy of Leo Marchutz’s educational philosophy and artistic movement through a combination of exhibitions, educational programming, workshops, residencies, research projects, and more.

We gather with renewed energy at a unique moment in our collective history and invite our community of artists, friends, and supporters to join us on this path forward for this beloved institution.

Name: Maestro Music Professionals
Description: Maestro Music Professionals is a bootstrapped EdTech and professional services startup currently based in southern New England. The company was founded around one simple goal: to increase access to quality and equitable music education. We connect students and organizations with local fine-arts professionals to offer online and in-person classes for a wide variety of instruments.

Name: The Little Biscuit Pottery Painting Studio
Description:
Pottery Painting Studio and Craft Station based in Morley, Leeds.
We provide family pottery painting sessions, adults-only evenings,  themed events,  seasonal workshops and school holiday sessions.

We also work with various schools, charities, and community groups. Our studio seats up to 20 people over 2 floors, or we can come to you.  

We can also provide take-out kits for you to host your own party,  team-building event or night in with family and friends.

Name: Kuverum
Description:
Sie möchten lernen, wie Sie anderen Menschen kulturelle Erfahrungen zugänglich machen. Sie arbeiten in einem sozialen oder pädagogischen Umfeld und möchten den Umgang mit Kultur in Ihre Arbeit einbeziehen. Der berufsbegleitende Lehrgang Kuverum befähigt Sie, Kultur und Vermittlung in Ihrer Tätigkeit professionell umzusetzen.

Am Freiwilligen-Projekt «TiM – Tandem im Museum» des Vereins Kuverum Services sind in der ganzen Schweiz über 120 Museen und mehr als 370 Freiwillige beteiligt. Zusammen ermöglichen wir jedes Jahr vielen Menschen einen niederschwelligen Zugang zu Kultur. Name: The Atelier Studio Program of Fine Arts
Description:
The Atelier Studio Program of Fine Arts focuses primarily on teaching fine draftsmanship and painting skills leading to the creation of well constructed artwork. The Atelier has passed on from teacher to student, a method of instruction which melds formal academic training with influence of the French Impressionists. American art students in the late nineteenth-century European art academies brought this combined education home to pass on to their own students.

The Atelier Studio Program of Fine Arts, lead by Director Cyd Wicker and Assistant Director Laura Tundel, closely follows these original precepts offering students the opportunity to master the fundamental principles in the classical discipline of realistic drawing and painting.

Upon completion of a four-year course of study, the student has a foundation of knowledge and experience to pursue a career as a professional painter.

A portion of The Atelier’s educational lineage is as follows:
Jaques-Louis David (1748-1825) 
Paul Delaroche (1797-1856) 
Jean-Léon Gérôme (1824-1904) 
William McGregor Paxton (1869-1941) 
R. H. Ives Gammell (1893-1981) 
Richard F. Lack (1928-2009) 

Dale Redpath, retired Director Emeritus and Head Instructor, served as Co-Director of The Atelier with Cyd Wicker from 1992 to 2017. Cyd Wicker continues as Director and Head Instructor at The Atelier with Laura Tundel as Assistant Director.

Name: Old Masters New Generation
Description:
Old Masters New Generation eager to research the art market and trends in collecting Old Masters. Please join our community-- it is free- to discuss what is happening in the old masters market
We found that the millennial generation is buying and spending more on art than any other generation. However, their focus is on contemporary art for a variety of reasons, such as: ease of purchase online, perception as less intimidating, less art historical knowledge or connoisseurship required to be confident in purchases, and the ability to relate to and connect with contemporary artists through social media. 
Our goal is to introduce, inspire, and encourage young collectors to look at old masters in a new light. We share ideas and experiences between art market experts, experienced collectors, and aspiring collectors.

Our dedicated team of artisans harmonizes traditional techniques with contemporary sophistication, ensuring each creation narrates a story and embodies the essence of the space it adorns.

Join us on a transformative journey where art becomes an intrinsic part of your surroundings, infusing vibrancy, elegance, and a personalized touch to every space we embellish. Explore the transformative power of artistic expression with MimiNation Arts & Crafts Ltd.

Name: Acanthus
Description: El equipo de Acanthus trata de tener una visión de estudio a priori para detectar  las diferentes patologías presentes en la obra. Se basa principalmente en su respeto como pieza única. Tratamos de actuar con humildad y respeto hacia la obra. Somos conscientes de lo delicado que puede ser nuestro cometido en ciertas ocasiones donde nos enfrentamos con patologías de gran magnitud. Por eso, nos formamos de forma continua para no quedarnos obsoletos en nuestro desempeño como conservadores-restauradores, algo que es de suma importancia en cualquier disciplina, ya se trate de lienzo, escultura, orfebrería, mueble, etc…

Name: Underpaint Academy
Description:
Learn to be the best version of yourself 

Our goal at Underpaint Academy is to help you achieve your personal, sincere artistic voice. Not only is this the best strategy for professional success, but for personal fulfillment as well.

Our instructors share this philosophy: art education should not be about producing a standard, serviceable portfolio identical to a thousand others. It should be about letting your individual passions come through so that you feel connected to your work, and letting that passion and excitement be felt by those who see it.

Description:

O primeiro encontro aconteceu em março de 2015, em São Paulo. Nesses quase oito anos de existência, o clube foi se espalhando pelo Brasil e pelo exterior, com reuniões mensais para discutir livros escritos por mulheres. Atualmente somos mais de 400 mediadoras, em mais de 100 cidades. Caso queira criar o clube na sua cidade, basta nos mandar um e-mail que daremos mais informações. Lembrando que temos apenas um clube por cidade. 

O Leia Mulheres faz parceria com editoras, livrarias e centros culturais. Toda a comunicação deve ser feita com a coordenação, através do e-mail: contato@leiamulheres.com.br

Name: Midland Junction Arts Centre
Description:
Situated in the heart of Midland, 18km north-east of the Perth CBD, Midland Junction Arts Centre (MJAC) is a vibrant visual and performing arts facility managed by Mundaring Arts Centre Inc. with the support of the City of Swan.  

Always acting as a convergent point for community education, the building was first opened as a small school in 1895. The space was then expanded to provide primary, secondary and even tertiary education when the technical college opened in 1904. In the time since, the arts centre acted as a home for Kalla Yeedip Arts in the 1990’s and Midland Opera Studio (2002 - 2008), before reopening under Mundaring Arts Centre Inc. Management in 2017. 

Following an active period of rejuvenation, Midland Junction Arts Centre has been transformed: now delivering a diverse arts education and cultural program to stimulate increased imagination, creativity, skills and knowledge. A curated exhibition program is complemented by regular workshops for all ages, an artist in residence program and a range of cultural events.

This historical venue is available for community hire and offers three galleries, a 142-seat theatre, ceramics and print studios, textiles and drawing rooms, classrooms, a function room as well as a range of work spaces for artists, workshops and meetings. 

We invite you to explore the iconic building, the Midland Junction Arts Centre program and actively engage with the arts.

Name: IHC Academy
Description:
A IHC Academy é uma escola digital de cinema e criatividade.

Na IHC Academy, acreditamos no poder transformador do cinema e na capacidade de cada indivíduo de ser o herói da própria jornada cinematográfica. Nossa missão é desmistificar o processo de criação de filmes, oferecendo um ensino prático, direto e livre de enrolações. Com uma abordagem centrada no cinema independente, proporcionamos aos alunos a oportunidade única de aprender a arte cinematográfica como ela realmente é: desafiadora, gratificante e repleta de possibilidades.

Nosso lema é "cinema independente para mentes empreendedoras", pois reconhecemos que cada cineasta independente é, por natureza, um empreendedor. Na IHC Academy, você não apenas aprenderá a fazer cinema, mas também a navegar pela indústria cinematográfica brasileira.

Entendemos que o cinema independente vai além da técnica; é uma mentalidade. Por isso, na IHC Academy preparamos você para ser mais do que um cineasta: um empreendedor criativo, pronto para transformar desafios em oportunidades.
Location: Curitiba,  Al. Dom Pedro II, 155 - Batel

Name: Indus Art Conservation Services
Description:
Indus Art Conservation Services is a Bengaluru-based art conservation and restoration studio. Mrs Nalini Biluka who is passionate about heritage and its conservation founded this company in December 2023.

At Indus, we possess a combination of artistic skill and scientific precision, as well as the passion of someone who considers art restoration and conservation to be their purpose. Our expertise lies in the restoration and conservation of oil on canvas paintings, painted photographs, paper, textiles, polychrome wood sculpture, antiques, and other works of art, ranging from antique to contemporary styles to a museum-calibre standard.

We are also open to collaborating with museums, local authorities, art galleries, companies and private collectors.

Name: ZURICH FASHION SCHOOL
Description:
We are a contemporary fashion design school in Zurich’s unique Seefeld district, 150 meters from the historic Pavillion Le Combusier. We offer a 1 year Fashion Design course as well as short courses in 6 subjects. For course listings, please see our website to find the right course and level to start to follow your passion for fashion at Zurich Fashion School. 

The Zurich Fashion School provides a rare fusion of creative atelier and academia. Inspired by the Parisian ateliers of the worlds most renowned fashion designers, where the  founder and creative director worked, Zurich Fashion School is the perfect environment to a profound education and nurturing of new skills to pave the way for designers of the future.

Andrea Wolf-Simone is a fashion designer since 2002 working as artistic director in luxury fashion between France ( Balmain and Vanessa Bruno) and Brazil. A teacher of Fashion Design since 2017, stresses to her students the importance of maintaining a historical overview of crafting techniques and bringing to them a hybrid approach by combining them with new technologies. This approach of uniting these rarely-used, forgotten crafting techniques with groundbreaking, unfamiliar technologies is very stimulating for the students as they simultaneously acquire cultural knowledge, new skills, and crafting techniques. 

A Fashion designer since 2002, she learned her way into the fashion business through experiences at Balmain and Vanessa Bruno, in Paris. She graduated in 2007 with her first Masters degree in fashion and design in France at the Université Lumière Lyon II Université de la Mode, Lyon.
 
She pursued her second Masters of Arts in Design at the ZHdK, Zürich. Her curiosity to explore new fashion possibilities using smart materials to embody new perceptive and sensational interactions for the wearer, led her to open minded approaches, and experimental teaching formats.

Name: Choral Phydellius
Description:
O Choral Phydellius foi fundado em 17 de Maio de 1957 e iniciou a sua atividade como Coro Masculino dedicando-se, nos primeiros tempos da sua existência, exclusivamente à interpretação de Música Sacra, até 1961, quando adota uma formação mista.

Em 1975, a Instituição passa a contar com uma Escola de Música, cuja oficialização, em 1993, foi concedida pelo Ministério da Educação; presentemente, está habilitada a ministrar Cursos Oficiais, Básicos e Secundários de vários Instrumentos. Por despacho do Senhor Diretor Regional de Educação, de 10.09.2002, foi homologada a denominação deste estabelecimento de ensino que passou a denominar-se Conservatório de Música do Choral Phydellius.

A par dos Cursos Oficiais, assegura, também, o ensino a Classes Infantis dos âmbitos etários e escolares correspondentes ao Pré-escolar e ao 1º. Ciclo do Ensino Básico, às quais são ministradas disciplinas de instrumentos, classes de turmas de Iniciação/expressão musical e classes de conjuntos corais e instrumentais.

No âmbito da Formação, o Choral Phydellius organizou, com alguma regularidade desde 1981, Cursos de Direção Coral para Diretores Corais, dirigidos por José Robert, com o apoio da Secretaria de Estado da Cultura, assim como workshops e masterclasses variados com pedagogos e instrumentistas conceituados.

Em Novembro de 1988, é criado o Coro Juvenil do Choral Phydellius, constituído apenas por elementos da sua Escola de Música. Hoje, para além de funcionar como classe de conjunto do Conservatório de Música, está também aberto à participação de elementos externos podendo, ou não, terem conhecimentos musicais. Pelas suas características, pelo repertório de nível elevado que executa e pela sua qualidade, o Coro Juvenil do Choral Phydellius é entidade representativa da Instituição e o garante da continuidade do Coro Misto.

Por despacho de Sua Ex.ª o Senhor Primeiro-ministro foi concedido ao Choral Phydellius em 5 Maio de 1989, o estatuto de Instituição de Utilidade Pública.
