Name: Momento Café
Description:
Vanaf november 2024 zijn wij te vinden als pop-up keramiek café bij Brandpunt aan de Reigerstraat 16 in Breda. Bij ons draait het om ontspannen, even genieten van jouw ‘momento’. In twee uur tijd schilder je bij ons keramiek. Je hebt hierbij keuze uit een breed assortiment. Tijdens onze keramiek workshop geniet je van een drankje en eventueel iets lekkers, verzorgd door onze vrienden van Brandpunt. Via onze website kun je eenvoudig een reservering plaatsen voor onze keramiek workshops. Wij zijn geopend op zaterdag en zondag van 10:00 tot 16:00. Of op aanvraag voor groepen groter dan 10 personen. 

Bij Momento draait alles om het creëren van mooie herinneringen en het ontdekken van jouw creativiteit. Ben je op zoek naar een leuke activiteit voor een babyshower, verjaardagsfeestje of een teamuitje? Wacht dan niet langer en reserveer een ‘Momento’ via onze website.

Name: Creative Color Art Studios (CCAS)
Description:
Creative Color Art Studios (CCAS) is a premier art education and event venue located in Scottsdale, Arizona. Since 2010, we have been dedicated to fostering creativity and providing exceptional art experiences for individuals, families, and organizations.

Our mission is to offer a welcoming environment where creativity thrives — whether through our specialized and structured art instruction, engaging adult workshops, or immersive team-building and corporate events. Programs are available for all skill levels, and our curriculum is designed to encourage both personal growth and artistic development.

Creative Color Art Studios has had the privilege of partnering with a diverse array of organizations, including American Express, Nordstrom, Gucci, Kering, Republic Services, Discover, GoDaddy, Henkel, McDonald's, Southwest Airlines, Fairmont Resorts, Vanguard, Perkins Coie, and many others. These collaborations have allowed us to curate unforgettable, art-centered experiences that bring colleagues together and foster team building, client engagement, and connection to something beyond the physical aspect of art.

Our studio offers a wide range of services, including:

• Private Parties: Customized painting parties for birthdays, anniversaries, and special occasions.
• Corporate Events: Team-building workshops, client appreciation events, and company celebrations.
• Art Classes: Weekly classes and private lessons for adults and children, covering various mediums and techniques.
• Summer Camps & School Break Programs: Engaging art camps for young artists during school holidays.
• Specialty Workshops: Themed events like "Paint Your Pet," "Van Gogh Vino," and more.

At Creative Color Art Studios, we take pride in our role as Scottsdale’s leading artistic hub in the community, where we are known not only for our educational offerings but also for our ability to curate and execute exceptional experiences that resonate with our clients and artists alike.

Name: UNG Visual Arts Department
Description: The University of North Georgia’s Department of Visual Arts is a nationally accredited program offering a range of undergraduate degrees (including B.F.A., B.A., B.A.Ed., and more), minors, and a certificate, that combines traditional art training and digital practices to prepare students for creative careers and graduate studies.

Name: Wild City UK
Description:
A small family business with BIG ideas and a fresh approach.
We provide professional creative services and nature inspired community art projects.

"Wild City builds bridges between city folk and
nature, championing local creatives, promoting mental wellbeing,
and scattering seeds of imagination between the cracks in the concrete"

Name: Tinker Art Studio
Description:
Tinker is Boulder's inclusive community art studio where artists of all ages explore, create, and connect. Our classes, workshops, and camps use an arts-integrated approach led by skilled, passionate instructors who prioritize process, curiosity, and confidence alongside technique.

In addition to our primary studio, we are home to Clay Hub, a community ceramics studio offering pottery classes, workshops, and membership options. Clay Hub serves both beginners and experienced ceramicists, providing access to wheels, kilns, glazing, and a collaborative studio environment.

At the heart of everything we do is community. Our team works hard to teach, prepare materials, and maintain safe, welcoming spaces where creativity can thrive. We value inclusion, clear communication, collaboration, and care—for our students, our staff, and our shared studio environments.

Name: Lyme Academy of Fine Arts - Lyme, CT
Description: The mission of the Lyme Academy of Fine Arts is to teach the foundational skills of drawing, painting, and sculpture in the figurative tradition. By its commitment to training students in these skills and an engagement with contemporary discourse, the Academy will empower a new generation of artists. Through its programs, the Academy is committed to enriching the cultural life of the community.

Name: Sukoon Studio Antwerp
Description: Sukoon Studio is a ceramic studio in Antwerp offering a tranquil environment for individuals and teams to explore their creativity.  Our workshops, ranging from introductory sessions to in-depth courses, provide a unique opportunity to unwind, connect, and craft beautiful pieces.

Name: Jaai Creations
Description:
I am a professional artist love to create realistic and abstract paintings. I provide customized paintings and artwork. I provide portrait paintings and pencil sketches. I work in home decor products as well. 
Please connect with me for more details.

Name: Atelier Thibault Barrère
Description:
Atelier Barrère is an international portrait studio led by French realist painter Thibault Barrère, dedicated to creating bespoke heritage portraits for distinguished families, cultural institutions, and private collectors around the world.

Working at the intersection of artistic mastery and legacy preservation, the studio produces museum-quality oil portraits that honour lineage, identity, and personal history. Each work is crafted with uncompromising attention to detail, using classical techniques rooted in the European figurative tradition.

Our collectors include high-net-worth families, private offices, interior designers, and institutions across Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, the United States, Switzerland, and Europe. Every commission is developed through a fully tailored process, ensuring aesthetic harmony with the client’s interior environment, cultural context, and vision.

Atelier Barrère specialises in:
• Heritage Portraiture — large-format portraits that celebrate lineage and family legacy
• Luxury Residential Commissions — artworks designed for prestige interiors
• Institutional & Leadership Portraits — for foundations, universities, and executive offices
• Private Events & Live Portrait Sessions — exclusive cultural activations for high-profile audiences

With a limited number of annual commissions, Atelier Barrère offers a discreet, white-glove experience from concept to installation. The studio collaborates closely with designers, architects, and cultural advisors to integrate each work seamlessly into exceptional environments.

Serving clients who value heritage, craftsmanship, and permanence.
Preserving legacy through portraiture of the highest calibre.

Name: Thogoto Teachers Training College
Description: Thogoto Teachers College was founded in 1949 at Kambui Mission in Kiambu by the Church of Scotland Mission (now PCEA) to train primary school teachers initially who were primary school leavers. The College now trains P1 grade teachers who are form 4 (KCSE) leavers. The College stands on 75 acres piece of land most of which is taken up by buildings (halls and hostels, clases, library and playing felds. The College is a public institution sponsored by the Presbyterian Church of East Africa (PCEA). Thogoto Teachers College enjoys the serene mission area of Kikuyu near the Alliance schools. It is off the Dagoretti Corner-Kikuyu road linked to Gikambura road at Thogoto junction before the University of Nairobi, Kikuyu Campus.

Name: Serunih Art Studio
Description: Serunih.Artstudio is a platform for those who want to learn and experience a different atmosphere of the painting activity. We are collaborating with the venues that will bring pleasure to our customers. Our concept is to bring a pleasant feeling to our customers while creating their art pieces!

Name: High Country Art Center
Description:
Art for Fun!  Step by step art and crafts for the fun of it! Bring your friends, family, wine and snacks! All your art and craft supplies are provided!

We offer space for birthday parties, bachelorette parties, Team Building events, and more!

Want a private lesson on how to paint with oils, acrylics, watercolors and more...call us!

We have an Artsy Kids division! We hold daily classes for after school kids, and homeschool kids!  Get your child/children set up to create with our art educator!

We are a full learning center!

Name: Kalakriti- The Fine Arts Society of IIT Bhubaneshwar
Description:
Kalakriti – The Fine Arts Society of IIT Bhubaneswar was founded by the students to celebrate creativity and provide a platform for all artistic minds on campus. The society promotes art through exhibitions that showcase a wide range of paintings, sketches, and creative works by its members.

Beyond exhibitions, Kalakriti actively organises museum visits, art workshops, wall painting sessions, live sketching, and more — all with the aim of nurturing and spreading the love for art within the IIT Bhubaneswar community.

Name: Holika
Description:
Holika transporte votre enfant dans des univers thématiques minutieusement préparés. Votre enfant y vivra un moment d'amusement et d'émerveillement.

A travers ses ateliers créatifs, Holika offre à votre enfant un espace de création où chacun a sa place et reçoit l'occasion de laisser libre cours à son imagination.

Holika est l'activité fun et amusante pour votre enfant dans l'univers des ateliers créatifs à Mons.

Holika, ce n'est pas que pour les enfants ! Découvrez "les Ateliers Création" dédiés aux adultes.

Envie de laisser libre cours à votre créativité ?
Holika réveille l'artiste qui sommeille en vous et vous donne toute l'inspiration nécessaire grâce à une foule de conseils pratiques et d'astuces sympas. Venez partager un moment de convivialité et vivez pleinement une parenthèse de création. 

Intéressé(e) ?
Sur notre site www.holika.be vous découvrirez toutes nos formules, leur module d'inscription et notre contact.
Vous ne trouvez pas ce que vous cherchez ? Une question? Une info? N'hésitez pas à nous contacter
Au plaisir de vous accueillir et de vous faire découvrir mon univers de création,

Name: Tom Bass Sculpture Studio School
Description:
The Tom Bass Sculpture Studio School is unique. Founded by Tom Bass in 1974, it is Australia’s oldest and most respected institution dedicated to teaching sculpture in the classic atelier tradition.

Working in a large fully-equipped studio, students of all levels learn one-on-one from professional and dedicated sculptors in a friendly, creatively stimulating atmosphere.

Whether you’re sculpting in clay, stone, direct plaster, papier mache, wax or wire, you will be challenged and empowered to learn to ‘see’ and be inspired to develop your own creative expression. At TBSSS you’ll find yourself absorbed in another world apart from the everyday.

Name: Children's Art Classes of Raleigh
Description:
Our mission is to provide a comprehensive art education program that enriches lives, raises self-esteem, and improves the academic performance of our students.

Through our program, we hope children can find an art community that supports and celebrates their passion. Not only that, but we encourage each student to pursue art for life with opportunities to receive art scholarships, get their degree, and become professionals in the field.

Name: Postgraduate School of UIN Syarif Hidayatullah Jakarta
Description: Sekolah Pascasarjana UIN Syarif Hidayatullah Jakarta is a premier institution dedicated to advancing Islamic studies through rigorous academic programs, innovative research, and a commitment to societal impact. Our graduate school stands as a beacon of excellence, integrating scientific knowledge with Indonesian values to foster a holistic understanding of Islam.

Name: Creative Arts Studio
Description:
Creative Arts Studio is a collective of local artists empowering our communities through fine arts education. We seek to inspire talent for community development, as we believe in the power of art to ignite social change, growth in understanding,  and advancement in human consciousness. 

We are musicians, performers, painters, singers, actors, film makers, dancers; artists who've decided to invest ourselves and our knowledge in to the South Texas communities.

Name: Graphite Arts Center
Description:
Graphite Arts Center supports artists by providing affordable studio space, communal work areas, and public exhibition opportunities that help sustain creative careers. We currently support 11 studio artists and 18 locker artists, fostering collaboration and artistic growth through accessible workspaces.
Our open-call gallery exhibitions feature work by over 150 artists annually, offering exposure through monthly Art Walks and year-end sales events. Graphite draws more than 10,000 visitors each year through events like the Edmonds Artist Studio Tour, Jazz Walk, Wine Walk, and regular gallery hours—generating foot traffic for local businesses and contributing to the local economy. In 2024, Graphite facilitated $24,800 in art sales for both resident and guest artists.
Graphite also partners annually with Sketcher Fest, a national three-day event celebrating travel sketchbooks, serving as the event hub, taking place this year on July 19 - 20. As the first festival of its kind in North America, Sketcher Fest brings together urban sketchers, artists, vendors, and the public for workshops, exhibitions, and sketching activities in downtown Edmonds. The event combines the learning atmosphere of Urban Sketchers Symposia with the festive spirit of France’s Carnet de Voyage, celebrating art, travel, and visual storytelling.  A calendar of events online is attached as a work sample.

Name: Fundação de Arte de Ouro Preto
Description: Desde sua fundação, a FAOP tem se destacado na promoção e preservação do patrimônio cultural de Minas Gerais e do Brasil. Em 1969, incorporou a Escola de Arte Rodrigo Melo Franco de Andrade, criada pelos artistas Nello Nuno e Annamélia Lopes, ampliando sua oferta de cursos artísticos. Nesse mesmo período, o restaurador Jair Afonso Inácio estabeleceu o primeiro curso de formação de conservadores e restauradores do país, consolidando a FAOP como pioneira na área de conservação e restauração de bens culturais.

Name: Formation Martenot Arts Plastiques
Description: Vous avez une âme d'artiste ? Formez-vous et Transmettez !

Name: ARTILOFT
Description: Professional art classes for children and adults in Lausanne and Montreux, Switzerland.

Name: Cochin Cultural Centre
Description:
Cochin Cultural Centre is at the forefront of preserving and promoting Kerala’s rich cultural heritage through its traditional art forms. Our primary focus is on Kathakali, one of Kerala’s most revered dance-drama art forms, alongside other ethnic arts. We are committed to nurturing talent and appreciation through a range of activities, including expert coaching classes, immersive workshops, and captivating demonstrations.

Our state-of-the-art, air-conditioned theatres provide an ideal venue for regular performances, where audiences can experience the grandeur and intricacies of Kerala’s artistic traditions. At the Cochin Cultural Centre, we strive to bridge the gap between traditional art forms and contemporary audiences, ensuring that these cultural treasures continue to thrive and inspire.

Join us in our mission to celebrate and support the vibrant traditions of Kerala. Whether you are a performer, art enthusiast, or a cultural advocate, our centre offers a unique opportunity to engage with and contribute to the preservation and evolution of Kerala’s rich artistic legacy.

Name: New School of Music
Description: A friendly, inclusive neighborhood music school welcoming students of all ages and all levels.

Name: Музична школа та студія звукозапису Playway
Description:
У музичній школі Playway займаються діти і дорослі, новачки і досвідчені, ті, хто робить це для душі, і ті, хто мріє зробити музику своєю професією.

Ми беремо учнів віком від 5 років з будь-яким рівнем підготовки і допомагаємо їм вивчитися музиці з нуля, поліпшити існуючі навички, подолати страхи і реалізувати свої мрії.

Name: Denge the art studio
Description:
Güzel Sanatlara Hazırlanan Herkes Bu Atölyeye Kayıt Olabilir. 

Mimar Sinan Üniversitesi'nden Mezun Sanatçılardan Profesyonel Destek Almak İçin Bize Ulaşın !

Name: Raleigh Kids Art Gallery
Description: Raleigh Kids Art Gallery is a safe and accessible space for kids to explore, learn, play, and grow through art. We've made it our mission to inspire and nurture the creative spirit of young artists by providing a vibrant and inclusive space for exploration, instruction, and appreciation of art. We proudly offer children's art classes and children's art camps in Raleigh, NC where we strive to ignite imagination, cultivate artistic skills, and foster a lifelong love of the arts in children. Contact us today to learn more about our afterschool and track-out art camps in Raleigh!

Name: Duty-Free Art School
Description: Duty-Free Art School is not an art school, despite its name.

Name: 101 Art Studio
Description:
Welcome to 101 Art Studio, the place where you can learn and enjoy art! Art develops your aesthetic sense and gives you the power to heal. Established in 2018, our studio has earned a great reputation nationally for its art education. Our students of all ages have attended various art competitions and won many awards.
Our team is devoted to designing unique and effective courses for every student. We provide a variety of art activities for kids and adults who want to inspire and nurture their creativity.

Name: Jimatelier
Description:
The workshops at Jimatelier are designed to bring you closer to your creative side. While this Workshop was created to encourage beginners in their painting journey, everyone is welcome to join, no matter their experience.

Every week, strangers sit to paint together while they sip fine wine. By the end of the Workshop, they are no longer strangers. People connect after 3 hours of playing with colors, experimenting with new techniques, and creating unique beautiful paintings.

Name: Instituto de Arte-Educação
Description: O IAE - Instituto de Arte-Educação iniciou em 2014. É uma organização sem fins lucrativos que acredita e aposta na reabilitação e no desenvolvimento de crianças e jovens que vivem em situação de risco e vulnerabilidade. Tem o objetivo de difundir e discutir maneiras de pensar a arte como ferramenta principal para realização de propostas culturais, artísticas e arte-educacionais. O IAE elege e alavanca projetos sociais que respeitem particularidades culturais e socioeconômicas e busquem mudanças significativas na sociedade. Promove o acesso a uma cultura educacional mais rica e inclusiva. Oferece propostas de formação continuada em arte e cultura, apoiando o desenvolvimento profissional. Amplia a oferta de formação continuada em arte e cultura, tornando-a acessível a professores da rede pública. Desenvolve profissionais para atuarem na economia criativa. Contribui com a criação da Rede Nacional de Escolas Livres de Arte e Cultura através de conteúdos arte-educacionais e a formação de arte-educadores.

Name: De Handleiding
Description:
Welkom bij De Handleiding, jouw stappenplan naar creativiteit & verbinding.
Bij ons draait alles om doen, ontdekken en (samen) beleven. Creativiteit is voor ons een ideale ontspanning, een manier om uit je hoofd en in je handen te kruipen.

Bij De Handleiding  vind je workshops keramiek of pottery painting voor jezelf, om cadeau te doen aan iemand anders of in groep. Of je nu komt voor een moeder-dochterdate, een vrijgezellenactiviteit of een goedkope therapiesessie, bij ons vind je de perfecte plek om creatief te ontspannen of ondertussen gezellig bij te praten. 

Je vindt bij ons een sfeervolle workshop ruimte voor keramiek handopbouw én een gezellig pottery painting café in de Leopoldstraat in Mechelen.

Laat je inspireren!

Name: Anıl Ulusoy Sanat Merkezi
Description:
Hatay Dörtyol’da müzik, sanat ve teknolojiyi bir araya getiren yenilikçi bir eğitim merkezidir.
Gitar, piyano, davul, bağlama, bas gitar ve daha birçok enstrüman eğitimlerinin yanı sıra müzik prodüksiyonu ve kayıt teknolojileri alanında da dersler sunar.
Amacımız, her yaştan öğrencinin yaratıcılığını keşfetmesini sağlamak ve sanatı yaşamın bir parçası haline getirmektir.

Name: Media City Academy
Description:
South Africa’s first creative academy based inside a working production studio.

Here, learning goes beyond the classroom. MCA students train on real sets, with real professionals, inside the iconic Media City Studios — home to top TV and film productions.

Our accredited programmes, recognised by MICT SETA and SAQA, are designed to build confident, industry-ready creators through a 70% practical and 30% theory approach. Whether you’re in Grade 11, Grade 12, or looking to study part-time online, MCA connects passion with real-world experience.

Name: Simply Life Drawing
Description:
Simply Life Drawing aims to create a no pressure environment where people can come to strengthen their drawing skills, no matter their experience level.

Our classes are varied and supportive, and they are a great opportunity to meet new friendly faces.

Life drawing offers an escape from the stresses and anxieties of daily life. It’s a brief window of calm where your focus is just on the page in front of you.

Tea, cake and materials are always provided.

Please contact Katie and Bethan on 07527 636210 if you are interested in joining us. We would love to hear from you!

Name: Taste of Italy
Description: A staple of Italian cuisine, a new format with an audacious outlook on the classics known world-wide, but most importantly: available to all here in Florence.

Name: UKM Seni Rupa Desain Universitas Negeri Semarang
Description: UKM Seni Rupa Desain merupakan salah satu UKM (Unit Kegiatan Mahasiswa) di Universitas Negeri Semarang yang bergerak di bidang seni dan desain.

Name: Atelier public d'Arts plastiques - Allonnes
Description:
Ancré au cœur d’Allonnes, l’Atelier public d’Arts plastiques est un lieu dédié à la création, à la transmission et au partage artistique. Ouvert à toutes et tous, il s’inscrit dans une mission de service public : rendre les pratiques des arts plastiques accessibles, visibles et vivantes sur le territoire.

Sculpture, peinture, dessin, verre, arts numériques, photographie… autant de pratiques qui cohabitent ici et offrent de multiples portes d’entrée vers l’expression personnelle, l’imaginaire et la pensée critique. L’atelier est un espace d’expérimentation et de rencontres, où les publics, les artistes et les professionnel·les se croisent, apprennent et créent ensemble.

Soutenu par la ville d’Allonnes et animé au quotidien par une équipe engagée, le lieu participe activement au développement culturel local, à l’émancipation des citoyennes et citoyens et à la construction d’un regard ouvert sur le monde. Il défend une culture partagée, exigeante et joyeuse, attentive aux publics, aux artistes accueillis et aux personnes salariées qui le font vivre.

L’Atelier public d’Arts plastiques d’Allonnes est également un espace de diffusion et de médiation culturelle, proposant une programmation d’expositions, de rencontres et d’actions de médiation, afin de faire dialoguer les œuvres, les pratiques et les publics.

Name: Hipstitch
Description: Hipstitch provides sewing, knitting, craft, fashion design, after-school classes, and vacation camps to children and adults. We also offer a wide selection of craft, knitting, crochet, and sewing supplies and kits for purchase.

Name: Color Theory Art Studio
Description: Color Theory Art Studio is an all-in-one art studio and art education space for children, teens and adults.  We provide a variety of programs in art education that vary from finger-painting for toddlers, to advanced art and art theory classes for teenagers, to even paint nights for adults.  Color Theory Studio’s educational team is talented, knowledgeable and devoted to creating a unique and meaningful experience for our students.

Name: (Ini) Seni Geni
Description:
(Ini) Seni Geni is a two-month hybrid art mentorship program based in Indonesia, designed to help individuals explore their ideas, create meaningful works, and proudly exhibit them. We welcome participants from all backgrounds, starting from age 14, regardless of experience.

Our focus is not on teaching technical skills, but on guiding participants to develop thoughtful, personal works of art that reflect their ideas, stories, and research.

At the end of the program, participants will showcase their artwork in a professionally curated group exhibition. The experience is enriched with artist talks, art museum visits, studio tours, and a supportive creative community — a space where creativity, experimentation, and self-expression are celebrated.

Name: Noema Institute
Description: we help our artists and costumers to develope their job on worldwide audiences and improve all of us.

Name: Cairo Centre for Contemporary Jewellery- CCCJ
Description: CCCJ is a creative Jewellery Art School, whose mission is to revolutionize Egypt’s Jewellery education by developing the artistic and fabrication skills of the local minds to enable them to reach out to the community; granting them the opportunity of international exposure and placing Egypt on the international map of contemporary Jewellery.

Name: De Kleiacademie
Description: De Kleiacademie is een vaardigheidsopleiding voor het leren werken met klei. Leer alles over het vormen, draaien, bakken, ontwerpen, glazuren en produceren van enkele stuks tot hele series keramiek. Gewoon voor het plezier of met meer professionele ambities.

Name: Escuela Provincial de Artes Visuales "Gral Manuel Belgrano"
Description: Esta Escuela superior fue fundada en 1941 y se presenta como una de las instituciones más importantes de las artes visuales en la ciudad.

Name: JUZT art by JMC
Description:
JUZT art is a welcoming and inclusive creative space designed to inspire, uplift, and empower individuals through the transformative power of art. Whether you're an NDIS participant (self-managed or plan-managed) or simply someone looking to explore your creativity, we provide a supportive environment where everyone can express themselves freely.

Our Art Wellness Classes are designed to encourage mindfulness, boost confidence and promote well-being through creative expression. From adult finger painting to Pal Tiya Premium sculpting, we offer a variety of hands-on experiences that allow you to explore different artistic mediums and techniques. No matter your skill level, our expert instructors guide you every step of the way, ensuring you feel confident and inspired.

At JUZT Art, we believe that art is for everyone—there are no limits, no rules, just the freedom to create. Whether you want to relax with a painting class, sculpt something incredible, or even commission a custom art piece, we have something for you.

 What We Offer:
 Art Wellness Classes – A fun, therapeutic way to enhance well-being
 Adult Finger Painting – Unleash your inner child with this unique experience
 Pal Tiya Premium Sculpting – Learn the art of sculpting with innovative materials
 Shop for Art – Explore beautiful pieces created by talented artists
 Commission Art Pieces – Own a custom artwork designed just for you

Join us at JUZT Art and discover the joy of creativity. Whether you're looking for a new hobby, a way to de-stress, or a supportive art community, we’re here for you.

Name: AltMFA
Description: Founded in 2010, AltMFA is the peer-led alternative MFA (Master of Fine Art) by artists for artists. It is self-organised and free, and run by its members for its members. It has no fixed premises and takes place in a range of private and public venues.

Name: Bigmagal
Description: Somos una empresa global de diseño de productos de artículos domésticos. Añadiremos creatividad y belleza a los artículos cotidianos a través de un diseño original.

Name: IICA - Indian Institute of Creative Arts
Description: Have you been looking for a regular Fine Arts classes for you or your kids? Join us twice a week at our Art Center at Gaur City 2, Greater Noida West or connect us for Online Classes.

Name: The Artful Child
Description: Paint, build, dig, pour, stir, dance. Inspiring intellect through the arts for 3 to 5 year olds.

Name: Yaradıcı Mərkəz
Description:
Yaradici Center is the beating heart of Azerbaijan’s Creative Industries Ecosystem, established by the Ministry of Culture (under the strategy of social and economic development signed by the decree of the President of Azerbaijan for 2022 -2026) as part of the Yaradici Azerbaijan program.

We focus on turning innovative ideas into exceptional products, offering professional training, skills upscaling, and expert guidance on commercialization and business ownership. 

Our efforts span creative clusters like Cinema, Animation, Arts, Game Development, Music, Media, and more, empowering creators to thrive in the ever-evolving global marketplace.

Name: Orquesta Beethoven
Description: La Orquesta Beethoven se ha consolidado como referente de excelencia musical y compromiso social, cuya misión consiste divulgar la música orquestal y el derecho humano a la música.

Name: Glen Echo Pottery
Description:
Glen Echo Pottery strives to build and sustain a strong, inclusive ceramic arts community focused on both individual learning and collaborative pursuits of excellence in clay.  Anchoring our programs in strong instruction and inspiration, we strive to create opportunities for all participants to share their skills, artistry, and joy with others within and beyond the bounds of our studio.
GEP offers year-round classes for adult and teen students spanning all skill levels, master potter workshops with nationally known visiting artists, annual Popcorn Gallery exhibit of recent work by advanced students and staff, and
Pottery-making demonstrations and exhibits and sale of finished work, in our Gallery, open on weekends April to December.

Name: #apis+
Description: # APIS + is a studio and art gallery created in 2022 with the aim of disseminating contemporary arts and, at the same time, being a learning space for all those who intend to enhance their artistic creative skills. Reference point in Benevento for educational courses and multidisciplinary workshops.

Name: YVA Art Gallery
Description: Contemporary art online gallery representing young russian artists

Name: Bobbi's Pole Studio
Description:
In 2004 Bobbi and Ness opened “Sydney Pole Dancing School” (with 2 poles) in a “massage” parlor in Pitt St. Eight weeks later with over a 100 students we moved to a new studio in Castlereagh St and renamed it Bobbi’s Pole Studio (just in case we ever have another studio somewhere else, yeah right!)
In 2005 Miss Pole Dance Australia was born and Bobbi’s sister Kim opened a studio in Perth. Bobbi’s Babes started to handle all the bookings we were getting for Pole Dancers and Miss Pole Dance Australia just got bigger and bigger.
In 2010 we opened Bobbi’s Pole Studio Malaysia and Bobbi’s Pole Studio Singapore. Felix (originally a teacher from our Perth Studio) won the World Championships for the 3rd time and got all famous on our arse, dancing for Cirq de Soleil in Vegas and touring the world.
With the best teachers in the world (ok, a bit biased perhaps) and a fab reception team we teach girls of all ages, all walks of life and from all over the world!
Drop in any time to say hi and have a jelly bean!
X

Name: Taller 48
Description:
En Taller 48 creemos que crear con las manos transforma la mente.

Somos un espacio creativo en Guadalajara donde la cerámica se mezcla con la buena comida y la mejor compañía. Ofrecemos clases, cursos y experiencias personalizadas para personas, grupos y empresas que buscan conectar, relajarse y disfrutar del proceso de crear.

Cada sesión en Taller 48 es una experiencia sensorial: amasas, modelas, esmaltas y compartes — ya sea en nuestros eventos de pizza & vino, chilaquiles & mimosas, o en nuestros talleres temáticos y clases abiertas.

También trabajamos con empresas que desean ofrecer actividades de team building creativas, tanto en nuestro espacio como a domicilio.

 En Taller 48 no solo haces cerámica: creas momentos memorables.

Name: Creative Image Studio UK
Description: Creative Image Studio offers on-going weekly acrylic painting lessons aimed at anyone and everyone. No experience, creativity or drawing ability need to join and thrive in our classes. Our program has been developed to build your painting skills from the ground up.

Name: Amanita Arteterapia
Description:
A través de talleres de arte terapia y experiencias creativas itinerantes, buscamos generar espacios de encuentro, transformación y sanación, donde el arte se convierta en una herramienta de expresión, autoconocimiento y bienestar.  

Desde 2016, hemos trabajado con comunidades diversas, facilitando experiencias que van más allá de la enseñanza técnica: creamos momentos de conexión, exploración y juego que permiten a cada persona descubrir su propia voz creativa. Nos inspira la magia de la transformación a través del hacer, el compartir y el ritual, recordando que el arte es un camino hacia la empatía, la resiliencia y la autenticidad.  

 Nuestra misión: Promover espacios seguros y enriquecedores donde las personas puedan expresarse libremente, fortalecer su bienestar emocional y descubrir el poder terapéutico del arte.  
 Nuestra visión: Inspirar un mundo más consciente y conectado a través de experiencias artísticas significativas.  

#ArteTerapia #SanaciónCreativa #ArteYBienestar #Transformación #ConexiónHumana #ExpresiónArtística

Name: UAKidsToday
Description: UAKidsToday - an all-Ukrainian online gallery of children's drawings while they need to run or hide from war.

Name: PDL Projects
Description: Artistic, curatorial, research and teaching projects based in Oviedo, Asturias.

Name: Vriksham School Of Fine Arts
Description:
Welcome to our fine arts school, where we aim to help young minds discover the rich Indian cultural art forms. Our school specializes in teaching Bharatanatyam, Carnatic music, shlokas, and bhajans, which are integral components of Indian classical art.

At our fine arts school, we believe that learning these traditional art forms not only helps preserve Indian culture but also provides students with a sense of discipline, creativity, and self-expression. Our experienced teachers will work closely with students to ensure that they receive personalized attention and guidance in their artistic journey.

Join us at our fine arts school and embark on a journey to discover the beauty of Indian classical art forms.

Name: Casa Gemela
Description:
Casa Gemela es un recinto cultural y galería de arte, una casa que expresa con su arquitectura una identidad neocolonial que ha distinguido a los paisajes urbanos del barrio de Itzimná y la colonia México en Mérida, Yucatán.

Esta casa alberga exhibiciones de arte, además de conciertos y presentaciones únicas en un espacio privado y exclusivo con músicos y artistas de talla internacional.

Este emblemático proyecto, en palabras de sus fundadores, tiene como misión difundir, promover y fomentar la producción cultural y artística que contribuya al desarrollo humano integral e incluyente de toda la sociedad yucateca.

Cabe resaltar que la restauración arquitectónica fue dirigida por el maestro Luciano Cedillo y su equipo de Conservación Fractal, que con el apoyo de Mafra Desarrolladora han realizado este increíble proyecto.

Descubre Casa Gemela y vive el arte y la cultura junto a los mejores artistas y exponentes locales, nacionales e internacionales.

Name: Een Pleisterplaats Workshops Kintsugi
Description: Kintsugi-workshops, ook voor mantelzorgers en teams in de gezondheidszorg. Kintsugi is de Japanse kunst van het repareren van gebroken keramiek met goud- of zilverlak. De nadruk ligt op de schoonheid van imperfectie en vergankelijkheid, sporen van gebruik dragen bij aan de waarde van een object – net als in een mensenleven de vergankelijkheid en breekbaarheid een aanzet kunnen zijn tot heling en acceptatie. Vanuit mijn expertise in zowel kunst als zorg organiseer en begeleid ik kintsugiworkshops voor particulieren, mantelzorgers en teams in de zorg.

Description: Anderson's Martial Arts Academy is the premier training facility for self-defense in NYC and elsewhere. Name: Chroma Music Studio
Description:
ABOUT US
We offer affordable, convenient and quality music lessons at the comfort of your own home. Taught by experienced, qualified and trained music educators, our teachers design customized, engaging lessons from beginner to advanced levels for student ages 5 and up. 

OUR PHILOSOPHY
Music Education has the power to enrich lives academically, socially, and creatively. Music lessons are a way for students of all ages to tap into these three aspects in a personal and fulfilling way. 

Whether you are interested in learning piano for fun, for academic enrichment, auditioning for university/college, or becoming a professional musician, we ensure that all of our students are given a wide range of musical opportunities and knowledge. This includes learning how to independently read and interpret various styles of music, developing excellent playing techniques and strong ear-training skills, gaining performance experiences, understanding theory and recognizing its application to their music, competently sight-read music through an approach that is advantageous for everyday playing, exams and/or collaborative playing, and developing a deep understanding and appreciation for various genres of music.

At Chroma Music Studio, we believe that music education goes beyond learning a new instrument. We understand that music benefits the mind and wellbeing of our students - no matter what age, skill or level. We emphasize the connections between the skills learned in their lessons to life outside of the music room.

Our mission is to challenge students to reach their full potential and to foster a community of students who are passionate, life-long, independent music learners.

What makes us different from other music schools? 
We specialize in In-Home and Online Music Lessons to fit the lifestyle of busy students and families.

Name: INCCAS - Escola de Arte
Description:
OBJETIVOS E FINALIDADES:
A Escola de Arte tem como objetivo oferecer o ensino complementar e transformador e ajudar o aluno desenvolver satisfatoriamente as faculdades mentais: Atenção (concentração), Controle (equilíbrio), Livre Associação e Realização)

DO PONTO DE VISTA FILOSÓFICO:
A arte é o aperfeiçoamento do fazer humano. Estão na arte os mais importantes registros da cultura universal. A consciência, as habilidades motoras, a tecnologia, os avanços científicos, Justiça, Política, Religião, Filosofia, Estética e Ética, são valores que têm suas raízes firmadas na arte.
Sociedade sem arte é sociedade primitiva, viciada, submissa, sem objetivos, confusa, desorganizada, sem rumo…

DO PONTO DE VISTA PROFISSIONAL:
A Comunicação Visual cresce vertiginosamente a cada ano, num mundo onde cada parafuso, cada aparelho eletrônico, equipamento mecânico ou sinalização gráfica são concebidos a partir de um protótipo/projeto, realizado por mãos e olhos treinados de designers dos diversos segmentos das artes visuais.
A falta de conteúdo básico fundamental de artes visuais tem sido um freio para o desenvolvimento da cultura brasileira. Gerando assim um mercado carente de profissionais de Artes Visuais capazes de realizar grandes projetos.
É necessário agregar valores que estimulem a retomada do espírito investigativo, pesquisador, criador e empreendedor no aluno.

Como pretendemos fazer isso?

I – Semeando conhecimento e proporcionando condições ao aluno do desenvolvimento e aproveitamento pleno das suas faculdades mentais com o estimulo do amor ao saber;
II – Implantando o processo de ensino-aprendizagem que vê o cidadão como um todo em suas potencialidades especificas, aperfeiçoando suas ações, habilidades motoras e gestoras. Valores estes presentes nos grandes realizadores da Cultura Universal;

Veja mais em: https://escoladearte.com.br/sobre/

Name: Art For Your Heart
Description: Art for Your Heart is a creative wellness organization dedicated to helping people heal, connect, and grow through intentional artmaking. We offer therapeutic art workshops, fine art collections, and educational programs that blend creativity, emotional well-being, and mindful living. Rooted in storytelling, cultural identity, and compassion, we create spaces where children, adults, and communities can explore their inner world and embrace purposeful, authentic expression.

Name: My Crafty Panda

Providing best quality macrame fashion accessories & Boho style Macrame products, Home Decor since 2020. We are experts in making handmade stuff such as Purses, hand clutches, Earrings, Headbands & many fashion accessories.
We also have a vast collection of Bohemian style home decor stuff. We believe in delivering Quality products & have served many customers in India.

Description:
Established in 2017 with a vision to create a conducive learning environment, with an emphasis on a small teacher-student ratio to ensure personalized attention.

Our inaugural studio, nestled in the heart of Joo Chiat, quickly became an integral part of the community, amassing a dedicated local student following.

Despite the challenges posed by the pandemic, our resilience shone through. In 2023, we proudly unveiled our second studio at Sunshine Plaza, marking another milestone in our journey.

Name: Roar Modern
Description: Authentic and hip all-inclusive painting experiences where you create kitschy cat portraits in an intimate downtown locale.  Artists local to the city are your guides.  Fun, colorful, and unique...We aren't your grandma's paint and sip!  If you love cats and personalized experiences, come paint with us!

Name: Inspired Minds Art Center
Description:
Inspired Minds Art Center is a woman-owned, community-driven creative hub offering inclusive visual and performing arts experiences for all ages and abilities. Located in downtown Buda’s Historic District, we support local artists, host art and theatre classes, offer professional development through teaching opportunities, and create space for connection through gallery exhibitions, events, workshops, and private rentals.

We partner with businesses, nonprofits, schools, and community leaders to bring creativity, collaboration, and culture into everyday life—because we believe art should be accessible, meaningful, and local.

Visit us at https://inspiredminds.art

Name: The World Art Design
Description:
Explore the intersection of creativity and craftsmanship at The World Art Design. Specializing in professional art, fashion portfolio development, and advanced design skills, we offer a comprehensive curriculum for aspiring artists and designers.

Immerse yourself in Indian, modern, and contemporary art forms, mastering techniques from Madhubani to Surrealism. For fashion enthusiasts, our tailored programs prepare you for both Indian and international colleges, focusing on illustration, model design, and sustainable projects.

Advance your design skills across diverse fields like fashion, graphic, interior, and product design. Engage in hands-on projects and technical drawing to elevate your expertise.

Nurture your creativity through fine arts, storyboarding, and imaginative play. Experiment with a variety of materials, from graphite to clay, using diverse brushes and sheets to bring your ideas to life.

Join The World Art Design to unlock your artistic potential and turn your creative visions into reality.

Name: Harmony and Melody School of Music
Un Hilo a la Vez
Description:
El objetivo de Un Hilo a la Vez es crear espacios de encuentro para conectar con el presente a través del arte textil.

Un hilo a la vez nació en 2018 como una plataforma para compartir arte bordado y evolucionó desde entonces, expandiendo su oferta de productos a  servicios.
En 2023 introdujo su servicio más exitoso hasta la fecha: Bordado y Mate y Bordado y Vino. 
En 1 año 440 personas asisiteron por los encuentros para aprender a bordar y vivir la experiencia de explorar el arte con hilos.
Hoy en 2024 Un hilo a la vez cuenta con 3 servicios: un Taller Semanal de bordado, eventos de Bordado y Mate mensuales y Eventos Privados con Bordado.

Name: Aamatara Academy Pastry Arts
Description:

Located in the heart of Kathmandu, we offer a 3-month professional diploma in Pastry & Bakery, inspired by French techniques, Nepali ingredients, and global hospitality standards.

Whether you dream of working in luxury hotels, opening your own boutique bakery, or simply mastering the art of baking, Aamatara is your gateway to the international pastry world.

 What We Offer:

Name: RangMudra
Description: RangMudra is a Bengaluru-based brand specializing in eco-friendly block printing. We offer personalized, hands-on workshops, allowing participants to create custom prints on garments using traditional techniques. Focused on sustainability, we upcycle fabrics and emphasize the use of organic, natural materials. Our offerings cater to individuals, families, corporate clients, and designers, all seeking unique, artisanal creations. Join us for a creative, cultural experience that brings new life to fabrics while promoting environmentally conscious practices.

Name: La Potière
Description:
Take the time to unplug and discover the pleasure and power of pottery wheel throwing. Come, learn, and experience something really different... It takes place in our studio in Hyères (South of France). 

Nestled in an old villa in Provence, facing the beautiful island of Porquerolles, our studio offers a whole range of courses and experiences around ceramics:
- Weekly pottery classes
- Workshops  and masterclasses
- Pottery retreats (2-5 days) with accommodation on site
- Private events, team-building, bachelor parties..
- Free Access Packages

Name: Sopko Gallery
Description:
Sopko Gallery positions luxury abstract art as a strategic global investment opportunity, rooted in the bold and transformative vision of Milan Sopko. More than exhibitions, we deliver lasting cultural and financial value for discerning collectors, investors, and partners worldwide.

Global Presence & Strategic Partnerships
Founded in Slovakia, Sopko Gallery has evolved into an influential international player through key collaborations. Our network includes RD Gallery 21 Fine Art (Bratislava), luxury interior showrooms like Bedeur, Mercedes-Benz Košice, ArtRewards Oslo, and a prestigious partner gallery in Australia showcasing over 70 original Milan Sopko works. We are also established on leading platforms such as Artsy and Artmajeur. Strengthening our European presence, Sopko Gallery will feature in Slovakia’s elite Penati Golf Resort from 2025, extending our brand into one of Central Europe’s most exclusive lifestyle destinations.

Investment & Expanding Luxury Reach
Fine art consistently outperforms traditional markets, and Sopko Gallery embraces this dynamic by integrating art with investment and luxury lifestyle sectors. Our vision spans elite golf resorts, high-end fashion, hospitality, digital assets, and luxury interiors—creating exclusive touchpoints where art enhances life, prestige, and long-term value.

Join the Movement
Sopko Gallery invites investors, collectors, and visionaries to engage with a global movement that shapes the future of fine art as both a legacy and a proven investment class. Experience art that uplifts presence, drives value, and creates impactful cultural connections.

Name: Gugu Art
Description: Gugu Art, öncelikle 4-12 yaş çocukların sanat eğitimi aracılığıyla kendilerini ifade etme imkanı sunan, yaratıcılığını arttırmayı amaçlayan bir sanat okuludur. Ayrıca her yaştan sanat severi atölye ve workshoplarla buluşturma alanı ve kurumsal etkinlik hizmeti veren bir kuruluştur.

Name: Creart Studioz LLC
Description:
At Creart, we love nothing better than exploring new materials, turning recyclables into art, and making a creative mess. We offer creative art classes for kids of all ages and their families - pre-schoolers, after-school, exciting holiday programs, family popups, and awesome birthday parties!  

We bring the magic and wonder of art into kids’ lives. We want them to squeal and giggle while they paint and colour and draw. We want them to feel confident and proud and free to express themselves. But most of all, we want them to HAVE FUN!

*Voted Bothell's Best Art School*

Name: Studio Wheelhouse
Description:
So many artists we know (ourselves included) find themselves moving art projects from place to place in their homes as they toggle between living and creating. For those of us with designated home studios, art making can feel a little isolating. Some of us just need some external accountability, some want feedback.

Ours is a space meant to address both the chaos and isolation that are part of being a maker of any kind. Whether you come to connect with people in the space, or just to work, you're welcome at Wheelhouse.

Name: Spin Pottery Studio
Description:
Welcome to the vibrant new pottery studio in Toronto. At Spin Pottery Studio, we’re passionate about bringing the joy of pottery to everyone. Located in the heart of Toronto at 145 St. Luke Lane, we’ve created a welcoming, inclusive space where beginners and experienced ceramic artists alike can explore their creativity, learn new skills, and connect with a vibrant pottery community.

Whether you’re looking for a fun activity to try, a new artistic hobby, or a space to take your artistry further, Spin Pottery Studio offers pottery classes for all skill levels and a 24/7 pottery studio membership program for experienced potters. Step into a dedicated space that inspires creativity, fosters community, and supports your journey with clay. Discover the joy of learning pottery and create fun experiences with friends or enjoy a unique pottery date that sparks creativity and connection.

Name: Kutthivara Learning
Description: Art classes for children, adults and senior citizens. Online live interactive and WhatsApp classes are available. Flexible timings and step by step learning.

Name: Cool Arts Society
Description:
Cool Arts Society is a registered charity that is dedicated to providing fine art opportunities to adults with diverse abilities. Our organization is fuelled by our passionate volunteers, some of whom have been with Cool Arts for over 10 years! We are proud to be led by a small but mighty staff as well as a volunteer governance board of directors.

Cool Arts Society was founded in 2003 by Sara McDonald as a way to address the lack of accessibility for artists in the diverse ability community. Today, our artists and their work have been featured and celebrated across BC, including RCA, Kelowna Art Gallery, Kelowna Museum, and the FINA Gallery at UBC Okaganan.

Our artists have also participated in the Paralym Art World Cup, an art contest where people with disabilities from around the world come together to show their artistic talent.

Name: Chitra Varnan
Description: Chitra Varnan is a visual journey where art becomes a medium of storytelling, culture, and reflection.

Name: MAKÜ Sanat ve Tasarım Fakültesi
Description:
Sanat, tasarım, iletişim ve teknolojinin birlikteliğini ön plana koyan; kalite odaklı bir eğitimle, 21. yüzyılın farklı gereksinim ve olanaklarını, sektörel talepler doğrultusunda değerlendirebilen; akılcı, yaratıcı, estetik bakış açısı gelişmiş, sanatsal ve bilimsel yetkinliğe sahip; araştıran ve sorgulayan, ekip çalışmasına yatkın ve etkili iletişim kurabilen, global düşünüp kültürel değerlerine bağlı olan, mesleki donanımı ve alanıyla ilgili özgüveni tam bireyler yetiştirmeyi misyon edinmiştir.

Güncel teknolojiyi temel alan bölümler sayesinde sektörde rahatlıkla istihdam edilebilecek yaratıcı liderleri ve profesyonelleri yetiştiren, teorik ve pratik yönden en nitelikli olanlarını lisansüstü seviyede eğitime teşvik eden kendi insan kaynağını üretmek için yoğun bir çaba içerisinde olan bir fakülte olmak.

Fakültemiz, bu misyon ve vizyon doğrultusunda açılan Görsel İletişim Tasarımı, Çizgi Film ve Animasyon ile Dijital Oyun Tasarımı bölümleriyle küresel çapta istihdam olabilecek profesyoneller yetiştirme amacındadır.

Name: ARTÜTO
Description: ARTÜTO démocratise la pratique artistique amateur à travers des workshops assistés par IA. Nos ateliers facilitent l’engagement créatif, l’appropriation de soft skills et le bien-être des publics dans les musées, les écoles et les entreprises. Basé sur 15 ans d’expériences en didactique des arts, nous co-imaginons avec vous des ateliers d’éducation artistique et culturelle innovants. Co-fondateurs: Mathis Collins et Nathanaël Moix.

Name: Academia de Danza Condesa
Description:

Description:

Misyonumuz, öğrencilerimizin sanatsal yeteneklerini keşfetmelerine, bu yetenekleri geliştirmelerine ve sanatı hayatlarının bir parçası haline getirmelerine destek olmaktır.

Name: MyLand Culture
Description:
埋欄文化 MyLand Culture
IG @mylandculture
Email: mylandculture@gmail.com

MyLand Culture was established in Macao in 2013 with a vision focused on "people, community, creativity, and lifestyle." Our goal is to foster a platform for dialogue between contemporary art and the community through independent curation and collaboration. Through interdisciplinary and cross-regional cultural and art projects, we aspire to explore and reflect the cultural spirit of the city. As part of our continuous mission, we have launched the "MyLand Living Room" project in 2023, which envisions a public space for art.

埋欄文化 2013年於澳門成立，以「人．社區．創意．生活」為願景關鍵詞。透過自主策展及與各界合作，建立當代藝術與社群的對話平台；藉跨界及跨地區的文化及藝術計劃，發掘及反映城市文化精神。2023年發起「埋欄客廳 MyLand Living Room」藝術空間計劃，實踐公共藝術空間的想像。

Name: Yi Dance School
Description:
Yi Dance is a Royal Academy of Dance(RAD) Approved Venue(RAV), representing the highest standards of RAD ballet and Chinese dance excellence from Beijing Dance Academy(BDA). Teamed up with some of the finest dance experts and educators, Yi Dance provides international standard dance syllabi and delivers exceptional learning quality to all ages of students across Toronto.

In 2023 RAD exams, Yi Dance students achieved 38 gold and 69 silver medals, including 3 High Distinctions and 54 High Merits. In 2022 BDA Chinese dance exams, they attained impressive 86.4% distinction and 13.6% merit rates. These exceptional accomplishments established benchmarks in the field. In 2023 Canadian competitions, Yi Dance captured tens of top prizes.

Наша мета - змінювати підхід до корпоративного навчання. Наш базується на інноваціях та відкритості до нових ідей. Ми віримо, що кожна компанія заслуговує на розвиток, і ми створюємо умови для цього разом з вами.

Приєднуйтесь до нас, щоб разом знаходити нові можливості, рости та досягати великих успіхів

Name: Liceo Artistico Statale Umberto Boccioni di Milano
Description:
Il liceo artistico statale Umberto Boccioni, vanta strutture di alto livello e un corpo docenti professionale ed esperto. Garantisce una formazione completa ai suoi studenti, mettendoli in grado, un volta diplomati, di affrontare al meglio il mondo del lavoro e universitari.

Il nostro istituto “Las. Boccioni” si trova a Milano in P.le Arduino, 4. Il contesto di riferimento non è riconducibile al quartiere ma alla realtà metropolitana (comprensiva del vasto hinterland) che rappresenta il nostro bacino di utenza. Come confermano anche i sempre crescenti flussi turistici internazionali verso la nostra città, la realtà artistica e architettonica milanese deve essere intesa come irrinunciabile elemento di base per la maturazione, la crescita e il confronto delle esperienze sul campo dei nostri studenti per un consapevole approfondimento dei rapporti fra scuola e territorio. Il recente completamento delle connessioni infrastrutturali relative al centro City Life pone la nostra scuola in una posizione strategicamente centrale e rilevante nel panorama cittadino. Esperienze storiche e recenti confermano che le tratteggiate caratteristiche di iperconnessione territoriale a livello logistico, di naturale propensione del nostro Liceo a stabilire con il territorio relazioni di scambio sinergiche e la natura prevalentemente laboratoriale propria dell’indirizzo di studio, costituiscono una forte attrattiva per partner esterni a collaborare e cooperare nelle varie iniziative di ampliamento dell’offerta formativa e alternanza scuola-lavoro.

Our inclusive studio celebrates diverse art forms and crafts such as painting, drawing, mixed media, ceramics, resin, soap, candles, leather, textiles and more. Whether you’re a beginner exploring your creativity or an experienced artist seeking inspiration, The Muse ArtHouse provides a welcoming community of like-minded creators, fostering artistic growth in a supportive and collaborative environment.

We believe that creativity is a vital part of maintaining your mental and physical wellbeing. It relieves stress, fuels motivation, sparks inspiration and restores your passions and purpose. Flexing your creative muscles on a regular basis strengthens your heart and your mind. Join us in our studio for a daily dose of inspiration.

Name: SVA Academy
Description:
Company Name: SVA Academy

Industry: Education Management

Headquarters: Miami, Florida

About Us:

At SVA Academy, we are dedicated to the preservation and dissemination of the ancient Vedic arts through contemporary educational methods. Based in Miami, Florida, our institution is a unique fusion of tradition, spirituality, and cultural expression, designed to cater to a diverse and global audience.

Our Mission:

Our mission is to provide comprehensive and accessible learning experiences in the five ancient Vedic arts: visual, performing, literary, ceremonial, and culinary. We aim to inspire and educate students of all ages and backgrounds, instilling in them a deep appreciation and understanding of these timeless cultural practices.

What We Offer:

Online Courses: Leveraging modern technology, we offer a range of online courses that allow students worldwide to delve into the rich tapestry of Vedic arts at their own pace.
Expert Instructors: Our faculty comprises seasoned practitioners and scholars in Vedic arts, ensuring authentic and insightful learning experiences.
Interactive Learning: We emphasize a hands-on approach, encouraging practical application and creative expression in all our courses.
Community Engagement: Beyond online classes, we host workshops, seminars, and events that foster a vibrant community of learners and enthusiasts.
Our Vision:

SVA Academy envisions a world where Vedic arts are not just historical concepts but living, breathing elements of everyday life. We strive to be at the forefront of cultural education, bridging the gap between ancient wisdom and modern living, and nurturing a community that values both heritage and innovation.

Connect with Us:

Join us on our journey to explore and celebrate the richness of Vedic arts. Whether you are a curious beginner, a practicing artist, or a cultural enthusiast, SVA Academy welcomes you to be a part of our ever-growing family.

Name: Festival Geek
Description:
O Festival Geek é o maior evento geek gratuito do país!!

Idealizado em 2017 pela Secretaria de Cultura de Santos, com o secretário Rafael Leal à frente da pasta, o Festival Geek cresceu exponencialmente, e se consolidou como um evento gratuito que incentiva a arte, e em especial a disseminação da cultura geek para todos! 

Com programação que abrange o universo cosplay, games, literatura, quadrinhos, TV e música, o evento é para voltado para toda a família, com atrações para todas as idades.

Sempre realizado no Centro Histórico de Santos, o Festival Geek ocorre anualmente no mês de novembro. Já recebeu nomes como Carlos Villagrán (Kiko, do Chaves), Maurício de Sousa, Pato Fu, Fresno, Edgar Vivar (Sr. Barriga, do Chaves), Paul Zaloom (O Mundo de Beakman), entre outros. Name: Celestial Dream Studios
Description:
Celestial Dream Studios (CDS) is a boutique creative studio that offers artful experiences designed to nourish the soul. Based in Uppsala, we specialize in running hands-on workshops, seasonal events, and creative courses that help people slow down, reconnect with themselves, and rediscover the joy of making.

Our offerings range from mindful painting and upcycled crafting to beginner-friendly sewing and pattern-making classes. Every experience is thoughtfully designed to feel intimate, personal, and rooted in values of authenticity, creative expression, and community.

We work with individuals, schools, and small teams to design cozy, meaningful events—whether it’s a private celebration or a creativity-infused after-work session. CDS is also a growing space for families, teens, and mothers seeking screen-free, imagination-fueled alternatives to everyday routines.

At the heart of our work is a belief: that creativity isn’t a luxury—it’s a lifeline.

Name: Whitten & Proctor Fine Art Conservation
Description:
Whitten & Proctor Fine Art Conservation is a Houston-based practice founded by Jill Whitten and Robert Proctor, distinguished painting conservators with decades of combined experience dedicated to the preservation and restoration of fine art. Both are graduates of the esteemed art conservation program at Buffalo State College and have built careers marked by collaborations with prestigious institutions, including the Art Institute of Chicago, the J. Paul Getty Museum, the National Gallery of Art, and the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston.

Jill Whitten, in private practice since 1999, is recognized for her expertise in 20th-century paintings and her developmental work on retouching materials, sharing her knowledge through lectures and workshops in the U.S. and Europe. Robert Proctor, serving clients since 1994, is a specialist in the intricate reweaving of tears and has lectured internationally on varnishes. Their collective experience includes teaching at Buffalo State College and joint projects, such as their work on the Frederic Remington Collection at the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston.

Whitten & Proctor offers a comprehensive suite of services for individuals, institutions, museums, libraries, and corporations. These include meticulous treatment for the restoration and preservation of paintings, in-depth technical analysis, thorough collection surveys, and expert consultation on storage, exhibition, and disaster remediation. They also provide examination services for loans or purchases and continue to contribute to the field through lectures and teaching. Their practice combines deep art historical knowledge with advanced scientific methodology to ensure the highest standard of care for every piece they undertake.

Name: Sofia Art Academy of Miami
Description:
We teach art classes in Miami to kids and adults, using all the knowledge and experience from traditional, classical art schools of Europe, where we've been trained and educated. If you're serious about learning how to draw and paint it is essential to find the art school where academically-trained masters are teaching rules-based art programs! Also known as realistic or academic style art program is the foundation of fine arts education for creative people, especially for gifted children who love to draw and paint, and dream to become a studio artist, a cartoonist, a game or fashion designer, or an architect. 

We're also specializing in preparing children and teenagers for auditions, as well as helping to prepare art portfolios for submissions to magnet schools and art/design colleges.

For adults, we'll be happy to create a customized program, based on your individual goals, or you can follow our main program.

We teach semi-private classes (no groups), therefore schedule and tuition options are individually-based and have to be discussed in person during appointment. Feel free to contact us and we'll be happy to assist you!

Name: Beauville Arts
Description:
Beauville Arts is a performing arts organisation based in Lot-et-Garonne in the south west of France. We are a limited French company (SARL) and an official Sejour de Vacances regulated by the French government.  The Directors Jonathan Mallalieu and Claire Mallalieu set the company up in 2002.

We specialise in running performing arts / musical theatre holiday camps for young people. Our courses are taught in English and help develop English language skills as well as nurturing performing arts talent. We bring together young people and performing arts professionals to stage inspiring, high-quality shows and concerts. We help develop the talent and skills of our students in music, theatre and dance, which in turn boosts their confidence and helps them create lifelong friendships and memories. Our expertise, international ethos and friendly, encouraging atmosphere have led to us working with over 3000 young people, staging over a hundred shows and concerts in locations in France, UK and even in China.

We are specialists at working with schools and offer a range of bespoke music, drama and dance courses, both residential and non-residential.  Tailor-made corporate courses can also be organised either on or off-site.   Team-building activities range from Drama Games to Rock Concerts and everything in between.

Beauville Arts offers a range of other bespoke services, including:

* Hire of a digital recording studio
* Arrangements and music production
* Composition and production of music for TV
* Weekly music tuition
* Music performance and appreciation courses
* Inset training for music teachers

We are friendly, professional and flexible, so please contact us to discuss how we can meet your requirements. 

Courses run for young people by Beauville Arts are declared ‘Séjours de Vacances’ and fall under the remit of the ‘Direction Departementale de la Cohesion Social et de la Protection des Populations’ (DDCSPP – formerly Jeunesse et Sports).

Name: Sahanas
Description: Sahanas - Art as a lifestyle. At present times where the pressure on students, parents and the working class are similar when it comes to academics, work and personal life, the importance of mental health and avenues to divert oneself with good extra curricular skill is at its peak. At Sahanas, we aim to remove the competitive nature of learning art as a skill to excel at and convert it into a form of life for those who seek to learn it. We do this by Customizing the way each student learns and having platforms and avenues that encourage our students to pursue art in a more meaningful & relaxing way.

Name: Ceramic League Of Miami
Description:
The Ceramic League of Miami (CLM) is a nonprofit ceramic arts education organization dedicated to promoting education and appreciation of the ceramic arts and fostering the artist that exists in everyone. We offer wheel, hand building, mosaic, and raku classes, and visiting artist workshops to our members and to the general public.

CLM is a member run organization. Our members volunteer their time with the administrative operations of the organization, maintaining CLM’s fully equipped facility, and representing CLM in the community to bring the fun of clay to schools, scout troops, senior centers, special needs organizations and community events.

CLM members enjoy the use of our fully equipped facility with electric, gas, soda, and raku kilns, as well as pottery wheels, a slab roller, pugmill, studio spaces, and more. CLM is a welcoming community of ceramic artists who share their work and passion for clay.

Name: Solid Rock Music Institute
Description:
Solid Rock Music Institute is one of Dubai’s leading destinations for music and dance education, offering a creative space where passion meets performance. Our experienced instructors specialize in Guitar, Piano, Drums, Violin, Flute, and Vocal training, helping students build a strong foundation in both theory and performance. In addition to music lessons, we offer energetic dance classes in popular styles such as Hip Hop, Bollywood, Jazz, Contemporary, and Salsa, encouraging self-expression through rhythm and movement.

At Solid Rock, we believe in nurturing creativity through an inspiring and supportive environment. Every class is designed to help students develop confidence, stage presence, and artistic growth while enjoying the learning process.

Whether you dream of becoming a performer, wish to explore a new hobby, or want your child to discover the joy of music and dance, Solid Rock Music Institute is the perfect place to start your journey.

Name: Ox-Bow School of Art & Artists' Residency
Description: OX-BOW SCHOOL OF ART & ARTISTS’ RESIDENCY was established in 1910 and continues its mission of connecting artists to a network of creative resources, people, and ideas; an energizing natural environment; and a rich artistic history and vital future. Ox-Bow’s egalitarian and intimate environment encourages all artists, regardless of experience, to find, amplify, rediscover, and share their impulse to create. Faculty, Visiting Artists, Residents, staff, and students live together in a temporary intentional community on our campus in Saugatuck, Michigan, where they share meals, social time, and the exchange of ideas. We actively encourage our participants to engage across differences in age, regional location, race, and gender identity, learning what it means to be a community by participating in one.

Name: Shunya Pottery Studio
Description:
Shunya Pottery Studio is an learning space in the heart of Delhi where you can come and connect with your own-self while working with clay. 

Working with clay is perhaps the most centring activity out there. It promotes mindfulness and relaxation and prepares you to take on the world

Why Pottery?? 

 Stress Reduction: The tactile nature of working with clay has been proven to reduce stress and anxiety. It's a mindful practice that encourages employees to slow down, breathe, and find peace in the present moment.

 Boosted Morale: Accomplishing something beautiful with their own hands can do wonders for an employee's self-esteem and overall morale. It's a tangible reminder that they can overcome challenges and create something amazing.

 Enhanced Creativity: The process of shaping and molding clay can stimulate creative thinking. Your team will return to work with fresh perspectives and innovative ideas.

At SHUNYA POTTERY STUDIOS, we're passionate about promoting well-being, creativity, and teamwork. Our studio is equipped with state-of-the-art pottery tools and led by experienced instructors who are dedicated to creating a nurturing and inspiring environment.

We believe that pottery isn't just about making beautiful objects; it's about making beautiful connections, both within yourself and with your colleagues. We invite you to explore the therapeutic, meditative, and team-building benefits of pottery at our studio.

Name: FABRIKA Arts
Description:
FABRIKA is a boutique performing arts school in Dubai, designed for aspiring talents who want to shine on stage and beyond. We offer world-class training in Vocals, Commercial Dance, Acting, and Visual Arts, guided by a team of passionate professionals and industry experts.

Our mission is simple yet powerful: to unlock creativity, nurture individuality, and transform raw talent into stage-ready artistry. Whether you are a teenager discovering your voice or an adult chasing your artistic dreams, FABRIKA provides the tools, community, and inspiration to help you grow.

 What makes us unique:
	•	A glamorous, luxury-theatrical brand identity that celebrates artistry and confidence.
	•	A curated curriculum blending technique, creativity, and performance.
	•	Intimate class sizes for personalized attention.
	•	Exclusive “All Stars” program, preparing students for concerts, shows, and recordings.
	•	A vibrant community that connects people through art.

At FABRIKA, we believe that life is a stage — and every performer deserves their spotlight.

Name: River Gallery School of Art
Description:
For more than 45 years, River Gallery School has been offering workshops, classes and experiences for everyone who wants to make art and explore their creativity. We have programs for all ages, including weekly classes and 1-2 day workshops. Our teaching artists work in a variety of visual media, including all types of painting, drawing, printmaking and encaustics.

We believe that everyone can benefit from creative expression, and we are committed to fostering an inclusive art making community, with a variety of experiences designed for equity, access and inclusion. Our programs are offered in our studios, online and in regional offsite venues, with classes and workshops offered days and evenings, weekdays and weekends.

Our Vision

River Gallery School of Art envisions a world where creativity and its expression are important parts of one’s life, and where societies value the arts and the diversity of cultures and experiences they represent.

Our Mission

River Gallery School’s mission is to foster an inclusive art making community where people are able to realize their creative capabilities and express themselves fully.

Our mission? To provide students of all ages with the skills they need to enjoy music and dance for a lifetime. 

We believe that regardless of a student's age or experience, they each have the innate ability to develop their skill to a high level, given the proper training.

Most importantly, we believe that the best results are often accomplished while having fun and that some of the most important lessons learned while in dance classes or music lessons have nothing to do with dance or music.

Name: AtelierPaulista
Description:
No ano de 1980 a artista Branca de Oliveira, visando obter autonomia para expandir e compartilhar seu conhecimento e estudos no campo das poéticas visuais que envolvem a produção e multiplicação de imagens, cria o Atelier Paulista. Na cidade de São Paulo, aparelhou com equipamentos e materiais de gravura um pequeno espaço instalado no bairro de Pinheiros. Com experiência já consolidada no âmbito do ensino desta mesma matéria, em 1982 associa-se a também, artista Maria Luisa Beer e lá produzem, juntas, a exposição Due Braziliane a Venezia, realizada na Galeria Segno Grafico – da veneziana Scuola Internazionale di Grafica, em novembro de 1983.

Após receberem um telefonema do amigo León Ferrari, em 1984, informando sobre a vacância de um espaçoso estúdio a seu lado, se mudam. No novo local puderam ampliar e atualizar suas instalações. Assim, o Atelier Paulista sedimentou-se como um centro independente de estudos e produções em arte, fomentando projetos em gravura, desenho, pintura e multimeios. A partir desse momento, passou a sediar, paralelamente às suas pesquisas poéticas, atividades que visavam à reflexão sobre as metodologias e procedimentos específicos empreendidos nas etapas de concepção e realização de projetos artísticos. Neste sentido, vem procurando, desde então, desenvolver recursos de metalinguagem e sistematização adequados às formas de apresentação e documentação da pesquisa em arte.

Seguindo com os mesmos propósitos, o Atelier Paulista promove ações multi e interdisciplinares na esfera expandida da arte que envolvem: pesquisa teórica, investigações técno-poéticas, residências artísticas, oficinas, cursos de curta e longa duração, palestras e encontros entre expoentes de expressivos setores da cultura, além de exposições experimentais de múltiplas naturezas – visual, audiovisual, performática, musical, literária, filosófica etc.

Name: Arasbaran Cultural Center | فرهنگسرای هنر (ارسباران)
Description:
فرهنگسرای هنر یا فرهنگسرای ارسباران یکی از فرهنگسراهای فعال در شهر تهران است.

این فرهنگسرا در آبان ۱۳۷۴ توسط شهرداری تهران تأسیس شد. هفت کانون هنری تجسمی، صنایع دستی، موسیقی، نمایش، معماری، فیلم و عکس در کنار واحدهای آموزشی، روابط عمومی، مذهبی و ورزش فعالیت میکنند.

یکی از مهمترین بخشهای فرهنگسرا، کتابخانه با مساحت ۳۰۰ متر مربع است که دارای دو سالن مجزا برای قرائت خانمها و آقایان است. کتابخانه فرهنگسرای هنر دارای ۱۲۳۰۰ جلد کتاب فارسی و ۷۲۹ نسخه کتاب انگلیسی است و روزانه ۲۱ روزنامه در آن موجود است و ۱۰ مجله فارسی و یک مجله ژاپنی بهطور ماهانه در اختیار مراجعهکنندگان قرار میگیرد.

از دیگر بخشهای فرهنگسرا، سالن نمایش با ظرفیت ۳۰۱ صندلی در طبقه پایین و ۲۹ صندلی جهت میهمانان است. نگارخانه هنر نیز در بازارچه پنجشنبه و جمعه خود، صنایع دستی مختلف عرضه میکند. نگارخانه عکس فرهنگسرا با برپایی نمایشگاههای مختلف در این مرکز فعال است.

فرهنگسرای هنر با برپایی کلاسهای آموزشی هنرهای سنتی ایران رشتههای نگارگری، طراحی قالی، تذهیب، خوشنویسی ،(در سطوح مختلف) نقاشی قهوهخانهای و رشتههای قصهنویسی، ویراستاری، طراحی و نقاشی و همچنین در حوزه ملی، فرامنطقهای، منطقهای، محلهای،از طریق کانونهای نمایش، موسیقی، ادبی همراه با واحدهای روابط عمومی، آموزشی، امور اجتماعی مشارکت دارد.

این فرهنگسرا در بزرگراه رسالت، نزدیکی پل سیدخندان، خیابان ارسباران واقع شدهاست.

Además de esto, organizamos diversos eventos para promover el arte y la cultura a nivel público, con el objetivo de despertar el interés de la sociedad por estas manifestaciones.
Nuestra misión es fomentar el amor por el arte y la cultura en la sociedad buscando que esta herramienta los acompañe toda su vida.
