Name: Libby Leshgold Gallery
Description:
The Libby Leshgold Gallery is a public art gallery dedicated to the presentation of contemporary art. Located within Emily Carr University of Art + Design on Great Northern Way, the Gallery serves a broad and varied community that includes the students, faculty and staff of the University, the arts community, the public of Greater Vancouver, and visitors from around the world.

The mandate of the Libby Leshgold Gallery reflects its relation to the Emily Carr University of Art + Design. The gallery’s primary objective is the presentation of exhibitions and public programmes that effectively communicate the role of the gallery and University as an active site for the exhibition, discussion, teaching and production of art and design. The gallery carries out a programme of regional, national and international exhibitions that reflect the range of disciplines taught at the University. Emphasis is on contemporary thematic group shows that contain an educational and/or critical component and solo exhibitions that offer in-depth analysis of an artist’s production. Our projects involve the public, University and artistic community in a dialogue about the development of critical practice in art and design.

Previously the Charles H. Scott Gallery, named for the first principal of the Vancouver School of Art (now the Emily Carr University of Art + Design), we became the Libby Leshgold Gallery in the Fall of 2017 with our move to the Great Northern Way Campus. The Gallery was opened in 1980 when the University relocated to its previous location on Granville Island.

Since its inception, the Libby Leshgold Gallery has operated as a public gallery with professional museum standards. It has made a significant contribution to the presentation and analysis of contemporary art in Canada. As well, throughout its history the Gallery has functioned as a teaching gallery where students can learn professional curatorial and exhibition practices.

Name: The Northern Pottery
Description:
Welcome to The Northern Pottery – Where Creativity and Community Flourish!

Located in the heart of Hornsby, The Northern Pottery is a vibrant studio and gallery space dedicated to the art of ceramics and the joy of community connection. We believe in the transformative power of creativity, and our mission is to inspire artistic growth, build practical skills, through a shared passion for pottery.

Our studio offers a diverse range of pottery classes and workshops for all skill levels – from beginner handbuilding and wheel-throwing to surface treatments and advanced glaze chemistry. We provide a welcoming and supportive environment where participants can develop technical expertise, experiment with their creativity, and enjoy the meditative process of working with clay.

Beyond the studio, The Northern Pottery features a gallery showcasing stunning ceramic art by talented local artists. It’s a space where the community can celebrate art, purchase one-of-a-kind pieces, and gain inspiration.

We also hold open days, taster workshops, and special events, making it easy for anyone to try their hand at pottery or deepen their knowledge of specific techniques. Whether you're looking to pick up a new hobby, refine your skills, or connect with like-minded creatives, our offerings cater to a wide range of interests.

At The Northern Pottery, we’re not just about making pottery; we’re about making connections. Our studio is a hub where art and community come together, creating an inclusive space for collaboration, inspiration, and growth.

Join us to shape clay, spark your creativity, and become part of a thriving artistic community.

Visit us at www.thenorthernpottery.com.au to learn more about our classes, events, and gallery.

Name: L'Atelier Ballet Eirl
Description:
Somos unas academia especializada en la formación temprana del ballet y de disciplinas afines para niños y jóvenes.

Misión:
Ofrecer una educación de excelencia en el arte del Ballet Clásico. Desarrollando habilidades y talentos por medio de la diversión en los movimientos acorde a la edad del estudiante; y a la vez, fomentando el respeto por el arte, el compañerismo y la creatividad.

Name: Art Village Gallery & Studio
Description: Art Village is an independent art gallery and studio, as well as an academy for all ages. Founded in 2014, our aim is to inspire both children and adults to love art and do art in an environment comprised of professional art, where students are able to learn from professional artists. We hope that by bringing art and teaching together, our students will be able to grow into young budding artists themselves, as we cultivate the creativity and techniques of each and every individual to their fullest potential.

Name: Mystic Palette Studio
Description: Mystic Palette is your local art studio, designed to inspire creativity and relaxation for everyone, whether you’re an experienced artist or a complete beginner. Our inviting space is perfect for exploring your artistic side, offering a variety of workshops and private events such as parties and corporate team-building sessions, suitable for all ages and skill levels. Our studio follows a BYO policy, so you can bring along your favorite snacks and non-alcoholic beverages to enjoy. During the workshop, you’ll even have time to nibble and sip while your masterpiece dries! Each session lasts two hours, set in a relaxed atmosphere with light music. Our expert instructor will guide you step-by-step to create a beautiful painting on canvas.

Name: Arhi Drama School
Description: Arhi Drama School was founded in 1993 by Nellie Karra.

Name: Ekko Performing Arts Society
Description:
At Ekko Performing Arts Society, we believe in the power of music and the performing arts to transform lives. Formerly known as Ekko Mindful Music Studio, our journey has evolved into a non-profit organization dedicated to fostering creativity, inclusivity, and community engagement through performing arts.

Rooted in the heart of Downtown Dartmouth, we provide a space where artists, students, and community members can explore their artistic potential while supporting mental wellness and personal growth.

Ekko began as a small, passionate music studio focused on mindful music education in 2021. As we grew, we recognized a larger need for accessible performing arts programs in our community—programs that not only teach artistic skills but also create meaningful connections and positive social impact.

This realization inspired our transition into a non-profit organization on April 1, 2025. With this shift, Ekko Performing Arts Society now serves a broader community, offering more inclusive and accessible programs for all ages and backgrounds.

Mission: To cultivate a vibrant, inclusive, and mindful performing arts community that fosters creativity, collaboration, and personal well-being.

Vision: A world where performing arts are a tool for empowerment, connection, and healing—accessible to everyone, regardless of background or ability.

Accessibility is Key: Our work is guided by the belief that art is for everyone, and that creative expression can be a catalyst for social change.

Name: Ohana Danças
Description:
Ohana em havaiano significa Família, e é assim que nos consideramos. Muito mais que uma escola de dança, uma comunidade artística.
Sempre buscando a união entre corpo e mente, unindo a dança ao conhecimento da cultura, religião e costumes. Em nossas aulas incluímos trajes típicos, instrumentos musicais, culinária, dentre outros elementos históricos e culturais de cada região. 
Temos aulas em grupo e particulares; presenciais e on-line;
Participamos de shows, eventos culturais, esportivos, empresariais e sociais.
Ampla experiência com as danças havaiana, tahitiana, indiana, ventre, flamenco e cigana.

Name: Faire & Co Pty ltd
Description:
Faire & Co was born in 2016, when our founder Fay Valli, needed a place to sell tee's she was screen printing to raise money for Children's Leukaemia Research after a friend's son was diagnosed at the age of 3 years old.

The studio came to be because the tee's were flying out the door and we needed somewhere for people to try them on and store them.  Fay filled the store with other small business products, as well as the tee's and with a toddler and young baby at home, Fay had to entertain both babes whilst at the studio and that's how our Pee Wee sessions started.  As more people witnessed Fay crafting with her own kids in the studio, they asked to join the sessions and from there it just grew!

The process became the focus, because so many people where telling Fay they weren't good at art, or "couldn't draw a straight line" and it made Fay sad that these people were missing out because a lack of confidence, self belief and intimidation from the art world.

Cut to today, where the studio focuses more on classes and less on retail, focusing on the process of creating rather than the end result.  Our team is growing constantly, finding like minded, fun creatives who know that just the act of creating can have a huge impact on people.

Name: Paperartist Academy
Description: Grafikdesign, Art and Photography Courses

Name: Turkish Quandale Dingle's School for the Psychologically Tortured
Kypseli Print Studio
Description:
Kypseli Print Studio is an artist-run screen printing studio in Athens founded in 2019 by Eleanor Lines. Initially established as a personal studio for the production of her work, it has since evolved into a space for hosting workshops and artists in residence, alongside her own practice.

The studio acts as a creative hub both locally and internationally, fostering friendships and connections through the workshops and residency programme. The workshops attract people from the local area while the residency brings together artists from the international print community who engage in creative dialogue and collaborate with one another.  The vibrant backdrop of the city and the country beyond serves as a rich springboard for creative inspiration.

Name: Institute of Liberal Arts
Description: We build the Future

Name: Artist Block Creations LLC
Description: Artist Block Creations hosts art making events and parties. Our projects are a perfect combination of challenging and accessible making sure all our participants are set up to succeed. All of our projects allow participants to make something unique and truly express themselves. Join us for a new take on paint and sip parties.

Name: International Young Artists and Designers
Description:
International Young Artists and Designers (IYAD) is a global community of art enthusiasts, dedicated to fostering creativity and passion in all forms of artistic expression. As a newly founded organization, we provide a space for young artists and designers to collaborate, share ideas, and celebrate the power of the arts. Whether through visual arts, design, or any creative medium, IYAD is committed to nurturing talent and building a thriving community of like-minded creators. 


Instagram: Iyadc_ommunity 
E-mail: iyadcommunity@gmail.com

Name: Studio de Danças Marcia Pee
Description: Fundada em 1985, o Studio de Danças Márcia Pee tem seu propósito dirigido para o desenvolvimento das técnicas universais da dança, e do bem estar de seus alunos.Milhares de alunos já passaram pela escola e assim tivemos a oportunidade de ensinar e aprender, buscando tocar cada coração que por aqui passa. Hoje temos orgulho de dizer que formamos bailarinos para o Mundo. Nosso quadro de professores é composto por profissionais qualificados, especializados e atuantes nas modalidades que ensinam, garantindo didática e metodologias sempre atuais, refletindo em aulas gostosas e coerentes com o cenário atual da dança.

Name: ODA
Description:
MILANO BASED FINE ART STUDIO 

Oda è uno spazio creativo ma è anche un nuovo modo di vivere l’arte. Aperto a tutti, adulti e bambini, professionisti e appassionati, è il punto di riferimento per chiunque voglia imparare, rilassarsi e divertirsi. 

Specializzato in corsi, workshop ed eventi che uniscono l’arte, il benessere e la convivialità. La scelta di concentrarsi sulla ceramica come forma di espressione artistica deriva dal fatto che – a differenza di altre forme di arte – la ceramica permette di creare oggetti di uso quotidiano.

Name: Georgia Junior Classical League
Description: We offer beginner-friendly, in-person courses that take place on a weekly basis over the course of a month. Experienced instructors teach students the basics of art, ranging from using simple shapes to sketching an outline and mastering shading techniques. Our theme focuses on "Around the World" as we will explore a different continent in each class and provide informative lessons surrounding the chosen topic. Fifty percent of our total profit is donated towards charity.

Name: Egley Train Boise Jiu Jitsu - HQ
Description:
Whether you’re a novice or you’re bringing your belt with you, Egley Train Boise is here to help you succeed. We offer adult and kids Jiu Jitsu (BJJ) curriculums and classes in Boise, Idaho for beginner through advanced students. We will provide you with hands-on coaching, inspirational mentors, and the earnest accountability you need to achieve amazing growth every step of the way. Located in Southwest Boise, we have an infectious passion for Brazilian Jiu Jitsu and will train you to become an expert at one of the world’s fastest-growing sports.

Egley Train Boise is about you. It’s about accomplishing your goals and providing you with an incredibly supportive community where you can pursue fitness, self-defense, and dream big. We offer a world-class professional Jiu Jitsu program with a variety of classes and class times. Our gi and no-gi classes are fun, challenging, and rewarding. From traditional fundamental grappling to intermediate and advanced jiu jitsu, we are your home for authentic fighting arts. At Egley Train Boise we’re TEAM PEOPLE. From 4 to over 70, men and women, BJJ truly is for everyone. We understand the toxic gym tribalism that plagues other martial arts gyms. Our team stands behind the quality of our training and instruction, and we encourage all of our members to train as often and with whomever they so choose. We pride ourselves on the diversity of our members. Begin your journey today.

Name: Dzimbanhete Arts & Culture Interactions
Description:
Preserving Heritage, Empowering Creativity, Shaping the Future

Dzimbanhete is an arts and culture resource center located 25km outside Harare, Zimbabwe, offering a peaceful environment that fosters creativity and heritage preservation. Since its inception in 2008, Dzimbanhete has been dedicated to empowering artists, preserving Zimbabwe’s cultural heritage, and providing spaces for cultural exchange and artistic development.

Our Services and Products:
Creative Skills Training: We offer workshops that equip individuals with both traditional and contemporary creative skills, helping artists grow.
Cultural Residency Programs: Artists from around the world are invited to immerse themselves in the local culture and focus on their craft in a supportive setting.
Cultural Exchanges and Consultancies: We facilitate cultural exchanges and provide expert consultancy to artists and institutions looking to enhance their cultural initiatives.
Artist Showcasing and Workshops: Dzimbanhete provides spaces for artists to showcase their work, participate in workshops, and collaborate on projects.
Film Locations and Theater Workshops: Dzimbanhete offers scenic locations for filmmakers and hosts theater workshops that engage the community.
Architectural Innovation:
All Afrika Village: A cultural park that celebrates Africa’s diverse architectural styles, providing a space for artistic displays, cultural interactions, and heritage preservation.
Dzimbanhete Creative Village: A sustainable space that blends indigenous design with modern architecture, offering a collaborative environment for artists.
Digital Transformation:
Our All Africa Virtual Village brings African culture and heritage into the digital realm, offering global access through XR technology, enabling users to explore Africa’s diverse traditions and art from anywhere in the world.

At Dzimbanhete, we continue to empower artists, preserve culture, and inspire creativity for a brighter future.

Name: The Civic & Cultural Arts Center of Pineville
Description: The Civic & Cultural Arts Center of Pineville is a 501(C)(3) not-for-profit volunteer based, civic organization offering a place where artist of every discipline have an opportunity to network and enhance their gifts.  The CCAC is a gathering place for emerging and established artists of all ages to present, create and collaborate in giving life to their art, with a goal of embracing and promoting the artistic, creative and entrepreneurial possibilities available in our community.  Come and Explore Your Potential! - CLOSED

Name: MICE
Description:
A MICE nasceu da convicção de que a cultura visual, as narrativas e as marcas são forças vivas que moldam o mundo. Provocamos diálogos, conectamos ideias e transformamos estéticas em movimentos que inspiram e remodelam realidades.



Nossa Missão:



Traduzir o espírito do presente em narrativas e visuais que ressoem com autenticidade. Atuamos como um espaço onde o pensamento crítico, a arte e o design convergem para criar marcas que fazem sentido – porque acreditamos que o futuro está nas histórias que contamos hoje

Name: Boston Sanat Atölyesi
Description:
Boston Sanat Atölyesi, hayatın karmaşasından kaçarak sanata sığınmak isteyen herkese kapılarını açıyor.

Atölyesi olmayan sanatçılar, öğrencileri ile buluşmak isteyen freelancer öğretmenler; haftada birkaç saat, birkaç gün veya kafasına esen her anda kaçarak kendini renklere ve çamura bırakanlar… gelin tanışalım!

Name: Children's Art Classes - Goodyear
Description: Empowering the next generation through art education. At Children's Art Classes, we combine creativity with learning to help children build confidence, critical thinking, and a lifelong love for the arts. Our programs go beyond painting—they inspire imagination, problem-solving, and self-expression in a fun, supportive environment

Name: Acenturi
Description:
Join a curated community of painters, writers, and musicians for a week or more of immersive creative practice in a private villa near Florence. This isn’t a vacation. It’s a turning point.

Work with expert educators and skilled peers in writing, music and painting, all while exploring your purpose and the meaning of creativity.

Name: KWASSIE Art Studio
Description:
KWASSIE Studio presents art workshops for individuals, groups and businesses that focus on the element of play and self-exploration, and learning fine arts techniques. You will learn watercolour and acrylic painting, collage, drawing and mixed media in a relaxed and cozy atmosphere. 

KWASSIE Art Studio offers tailored workshops for your business, bringing employees together in a painting workshop just for your team, that will be equally fun, challenging and engaging you all!

Name: Kids Art Circle
Description: Art classes for children at Te Manawa - Auckland Council every Saturday.

Name: Simek art
Description:
I draw and paint people's image or ideas in a creative way.
We have different sizes, depending on an individuals choice and preference.

Name: Loop Music Academy
Description:
The Loop Music Academy officially launched in 2024, as an alternative to frustrating guitar/bass lesson options. LMA uses it’s song-first approach to bring beginners faster results. 

LMA’s origins unofficially date back to 2017, when founder, Eric Loop, began teaching local guitar lessons in and around Dallas, TX. Over the years, he’s taught all ages and many levels of guitarists/bass guitarists, helping players develop their passion for music and their instrument. With constant iteration, Eric has refined his song-first approach and seen first-hand what it takes for students to succeed at the instrument.

Learn guitar/bass in-person or online with LMA, and elevate your instrument journey.

Name: Ponto de Cultura Kombinação
Description:
O Ponto de Cultura Kombinação é uma organização sociocultural sem fins lucrativos que atua na formação artística, inclusão social e fortalecimento comunitário através da arte e da educação.

Com sede em Canela (RS), promovemos oficinas gratuitas para crianças, adolescentes e jovens em situação de vulnerabilidade, abrangendo linguagens como circo, música, teatro, dança, literatura, artes visuais e educação ambiental. Também realizamos espetáculos, intervenções em espaços públicos, conteúdos digitais e projetos de impacto social em parceria com escolas, governos e outras organizações.

Fazemos parte da Rede RS de Pontos de Cultura e da Comissão Nacional, articulando práticas culturais colaborativas, cidadania e pertencimento em diversos territórios.
 Transformamos realidades com criatividade, afeto e propósito.

Name: T.A. es Todo Arte
Description: Estudio localizado en Oviedo, Asturias, que conserva y restaura obras de arte, crea dibujos y pinturas, e investiga técnicas y materiales aplicados con estos fines.

Name: Fleur Escola de Artes
Location: São João da Boa Vista, SP

Name: Lambes Brasil
Description:
A Lambes Brasil é um instituto criado em 2016 pelo artista e comunicador Alberto Pereira (RJ), composto pelos também artistas Bruna Alcantara (PR), Milla Serejo (RN) e Tacio Russo (PE), com o intuito de fomentar, promover e valorizar o lambe-lambe no contexto das artes visuais e cultura social brasileiras.

Através de parcerias e iniciativas independentes busca fortalecer o cenário aos artistas e produtores, gerando reconhecimento da técnica e prática artística perante o público, órgãos governamentais, empresas, instituições culturais, demais artistas e linguagens artísticas.

Name: Art Magic Creative Studio
Description: Art Magic Studio: Your Creative Oasis in Oceanside, CA. Explore modern art experiences, team-building workshops, and private events that ignite creativity and imagination. Join us for unique projects like ocean-inspired art, geode coasters, and fluid art. Let's make art magic together!

Description:
Encore Performers is a Dance Studio located in Chantilly, Virginia.
For the last 29 years, we've offered classes for Ages 3-18 in a variety of styles including Jazz, Tap, Ballet, Pointe, Hip Hop, Contemporary, Ballroom, Theatre & More! 
JOIN OUR ENCORE FAMILY TODAY! www.encoreperformers.com/join

Name: Art Club Cajicá
Description: Somos una empresa de  Gestión Cultural que presta servicios de asesoría, consultoría y desarrollo de proyectos artísticos y culturales a través de procesos de  formación  artistica,  comercialización, venta y suministro de todo tipo de bienes y  servicios  culturales y realización de  eventos  artísticos, culturales, formativos, sociales, entre otros.

Name: BULBO A.C.
Description: BULBO Asociación Mexicana de la Imagen, es una organización sin fines de lucro que nace en julio de 2022 en la Ciudad de México, dedicada al estudio, investigación, divulgación, creación y desarrollo de proyectos multidisciplinarios en torno a la imagen. Basados en el encuentro reflexivo de problemáticas sociales, artísticas y culturales contemporáneas, fomentamos el desarrollo de proyectos fotográficos, editoriales, audiovisuales, escritos, performáticos, ilustrativos y experimentales, así como sus canales de divulgación y espacios expositivos. Somos una red que colabora con artistas, colectivos, comunidades, ONG’s, universidades, e instituciones gubernamentales para fomentar espacios de estudio, encuentro y diálogo que beneficien al tejido social a través del arte y la cultura.

Name: Ed Elliott Sculpture
Description: Sculpture Artist Making Bespoke One Off Art Pieces and Limited Edition Cast Work for Public & Private Collections and For Sale Worldwide. Wooden Original Sculptures, Bronze Sculptures & Mixed Media. Small Scale and Large Scale Artwork for Interior & Exterior Spaces. Often Design Commissioned Work for a Specific Place.

Name: IronNotes
Description:
New needs in a rapidly changing society, also challenges old craft trades, such as blacksmithing, to reflect, adapt and re-invent their roles in society. At the Borders of Iron (IronNotes) project aims to strengthen the cultural heritage of blacksmithing; as a skill-demanding craft, it is one of those rare professions and traditions about to disappear without further action.

With a strong background in metalworks and blacksmithing this network brings together artists,
creators, designers, producers and educators from five different countries with different kinds of events to broaden the view of the use of metal in the society today. The consortium seeks to find ways to strengthen the awareness of blacksmithing tradition, its possibilities to enhance regionality and co-operation between countries.

*Project info*
Funding: Creative Europe Culture
Project period: 1.1.2025 – 31.7.2027

Project co-funded by the European Union under the Creative Europe programme. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or Creative Europe. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

Name: THE CREATIVE ZEST ART SCHOOL
Description:
Creative zest - an Art school, working since 2014. It is owned by Gurpreet Kaur Tak. We train students in the field of art and craft by enhancing not only their skills in drawing and painting, but also developing a zeal of creative thinking in them. This lets our students stand out of the ordinary. We offer our students a number of lessons, including the traditional art of India- Mithila painting,  Mandala,  warli Art, Kalamkari and a lot more. We are not just limited to paintings and drawings, the creative zest also teaches lifetime skills like Tie and dye, Block printing, stencil, stitching,  Embroidery,  glass painting,  etc..

Name: Bunchof Doodelim - שעת שקט, רוגע וכיף
Description:
אז... מה זה בעצם שרבוט? במילים פשוטות, זה לקחת את הקו שלנו לטיול על הדף בלי יעד מוגדר מראש ולראות לאן הוא לקוח אותנו ומה יוצא לנו בסוף, בלי שיפוט ובלי ביקורת. פשוט נהנים. 

כשעושים את השרבוט ביחד, מחכה לנו מסגרת כיפית ותומכת שתעניק לכם חוויה מעצימה, תכניס אתכם לקהילה יוצרת ופשוט תביא המון הנאה ורוגע. בסוף התהליך? תהיו מצוידים בארגז כלים קסום שיהפוך כל רגע מלחיץ או משעמם לזמן של כיף טהור ויצירתיות בלתי נגמרת!

תחילת פעילות - לקראת ספטמבר 2025...

Name: Alma Estudos Visuais
Description: Escola voltada à educação plástica, atuando no desenvolvimento do pensamento visual e relacionando à prática independente de seu meio.
Location: São Caetano do Sul, São Paulo

Name: Aquino Studio
Description: The founder, illustrator and art educator Bibi Aquino, graduated in Visual Arts from FPA, has more than 14 years of experience in art and education, and has worked as an illustrator for publishing companies for the past 7 years. All this experience resulted in Aquino Studio, a place to gather everything you love: art, friends, good conversation and a coffee.

Name: Music Masters Vancouver
Description: MusicMasters offers to children from 5 to 17 of age, unique private music courses by Postgraduate Teachers in English combined with foreign languages education (French & Italian) and prepares them for entry exams for the Various Music Conservatoires (Piano, violin, flute).Powered by Dardant.

Name: Instituto Se Toque
Description:
Bem-vindos ao Instituto Se Toque, uma organização sociocultural dedicada à experimentação e pesquisa em arte, gênero e sexualidade. Fundado pelas artistas Catarina Maruaia e Lina Mintz em 2014, o Instituto se destaca por oferecer oficinas, vivências e projetos artísticos e culturais voltados para mulheres, corpos dissidentes e jovens. 

O objetivo é abrir espaços de diálogo e reflexão sobre temas essenciais e muitas vezes considerados tabus na sociedada através da promoção do encontro entre arte, saúde e a prevenção de violências.

Venha para essa jornada de transformação social através da arte e do diálogo!

Name: Maakaap
Description:
Maakaap is een atelier en werkplaats voor iedereen die wil leren tekenen, schilderen, drukken of ontwerpen.

Je hebt geen ervaring nodig. Je hoeft niet te kunnen tekenen of creatief te zijn. Dat gaan we je leren!⠀
We gaan oefenen met kijken, kleur, contrast, composities en nog veel meer.⠀⠀
Daag jezelf uit om lekker analoog een workshop te volgen.
Maak het mee met MAAKAAP. We zien je graag in ons atelier.

Bert de Groot
Margot Westermann

Name: Scrap U & Artistry Too
Description: Welcome to Scrap U & Artistry Too, a full service art studio and the best destination spot for you to explore your creativity.  We provide art classes, workshops and camps to all ages from toddlers through adulthood.

Name: Roös Atelier
Description: A space to collaborate, explore and practice biophilic art, architecture and wellbeing.

Name: Sasha Fabris Studios
Description:
Sasha Fabris’s working studio and workshop facility. She offers in-house developed and written courses pitched at various skills levels from foundation phase to master classes. She runs exclusive skills development, residency courses with dormitory accommodation for groups up to 8x participants at a time. 
She runs projects with various European entities throughout the year.

Name: Instituto Cultural para Educação Nacional de Arte - INCENA
Description: Incena is a higher education company based out of AV. COLARES MOREIRA 18 QD 49, São Luís, Maranhão, Brazil.

Name: Atolya
Description: Atolya Art Studio offers traditional art workshops perfect for team building and events. Our creative classes inspire participants to explore their artistic talents while supporting women artisans. Join us to create, learn, and inspire in a welcoming environment.

Name: Vida Feita à Mão - Escola de Cerâmica
Description:
Nosso propósito é proporcionar o bem estar individual, acolhimento empático e o empoderamento criativo para a produção de cerâmica artesanal através do ensino técnico de excelência.

Fundada em 2018 pela designer e ceramista Cynthia Sarmento, a escola de cerâmica Vida Feita à Mão está localizada no bairro Mercês, em Curitiba/PR. Pelos nossos cursos e aulas, já passaram mais de 3 mil alunos presencialmente e 15 mil alunos online.

No YouTube, temos o maior canal com conteúdo em português sobre cerâmica artesanal, com mais de 40 mil inscritos. No Instagram já são mais de 50 mil seguidores.

Name: FEELartistic Studio
Description: Provides team building art activities to businesses. Team building activities at work is a great way to reduce employee stress, increase productivity and promote creativity in your business. Our painting, pottery and ceramic activities are not only fun, it also helps communication, collaboration, and idea generation. Spending two or three hours in art activity is a great way to work on your business, brainstorm ideas and renew office morale!

Name: Escuela Nacional de Bellas Artes
Description: La Escuela Nacional de Bellas Artes, es una institución educativa pública de formación artístico-plástica del nivel medio, única en su género y su grado académico. Depende de la Secretaría de Educación a través de la Dirección Departamental de Francisco Morazán y la dirección Distrital No. 9.

Name: Royal Ulster Academy
Description:
The Royal Ulster Academy of Arts (RUA) stands as Northern Ireland’s preeminent body for the promotion and celebration of visual arts. Founded in 1879 as the Belfast Ramblers’ Sketching Club, it evolved over decades into a prestigious institution.  Today, the RUA continues to champion artistic excellence, fostering a vibrant community of artists and engaging the public with the transformative power of art.

Our mission is to advance the appreciation and practice of the visual arts across all mediums—painting, sculpture, printmaking, photography, and more. Each year, we host the RUA Annual Exhibition, one of the region’s most significant open-submission art events, showcasing the work of both established academicians and emerging talents. This exhibition, a cornerstone of Northern Ireland’s cultural calendar, reflects the diversity and creativity of our artistic community while offering a platform for dialogue and discovery.

The Academy comprises a distinguished membership of elected artists, each recognized for their outstanding contributions to the field. Our academicians represent the pinnacle of artistic achievement, while our associate members and invited artists bring fresh perspectives and innovation. Together, they shape a dynamic network dedicated to mentoring the next generation and preserving the legacy of artistic tradition.

Beyond exhibitions, the RUA is committed to education and outreach, delivering workshops, talks, and collaborative projects that inspire creativity and connect art with everyday life. We invite collectors, enthusiasts, and professionals to join us in celebrating the richness of Ulster’s artistic heritage and its bold future. Follow us to explore our events, discover exceptional talent, and become part of a legacy that has thrived for over 140 years.

Name: Maureen Gaffney Wolfson Art Gallery
Description:
Maureen's artistic and talented life spans 60 years. Her high hopes and enthusiastic ambition for life has yielded a woman who is a visual artist, philanthropist, memoirist, singer, former actress & model and now a proud gallery owner. Her paintings are inspiring and executed in her unique emotive style. Her appeal is evident from numerous domestic and international exhibitions and collectors. Maureen's worldly insights from her travels with her husband are imbued in her paintings. Keen to share these experiences with their home community of California, this gallery expresses their civic efforts to foster the arts and ta provide more accessibility to her works. Irish American Artist Maureen Gaffney-Wolfson has been entertaining audiences in a variety of mediums for over 60 years. She has transformed her career from being a model, actress, singer, and dancer to a world renowned painter. Maureen has spent years traveling the world and bringing her experiences back to the United States where she celebrates them in her work. Her success has been based not only on her talent, but on the hearts that her paintings touch.
It was after dropping out of school at an early age that Maureen began to cultivate her creative side. Living on both the east and west coasts, Maureen pulled from her experiences and immersed her talents with the emotional ride that life offered. After landing a reoccurring role on the Red Skelton Show, modeling for world famous Andre De Dienas, and traveling the United States as a “Harlow Girl”, Maureen enrolled in the Art Students League under Thomas Fogerty and David Laffell. Recognized as Woman Artist of the Year in 1983 by the International Beaux Arts Inc., Maureen’s painting career immediately took off and she has never looked back. In 1987, Maureen married her husband, Stephen, who has been an inspiration and support system for her career. They currently reside in California where Maureen has been working on her next collection and her memoir.

Name: L'Atelier Indigo

Que de bons moments artistiques, d’échanges et d’interactivité entre les élèves enfants, adolescents et adultes.

C’est un véritable éveil au dessin et à la peinture qui leur est proposé à travers l’approche de nombreuses techniques de dessin : gouache, acrylique, pastels, fusains, crayons, crayons de couleur, mines de plomb, sanguine, encre de chine, pigments de terre… (peinture à l’huile, sur demande).

A travers un cadre d’enseignement basé sur la liberté de créer, sur l’écoute, sur l’observation de l’enfant et où ses qualités seront mises en avant, nous aborderons l’Art au regard de petits groupes de 6 – 7 – 8 ans, 9 – 10 – 11 ans, 12 – 13 – 14 ans, 15 – 16 – 17 ans et adultes selon la demande.

A chaque cours, Sandra est à l’écoute des élèves, de leurs envies, c’est un vrai suivi personnel pour chaque élève. Une relation de grande confiance s’installe au fil des créations de chacun.

Description:
Bienvenido a Moroccan Care, tu destino para el cuidado personal y la belleza inspirada en los secretos de Marruecos. Nos enorgullece ofrecer una amplia gama de productos de cosmética que capturan los beneficios naturales de los ingredientes tradicionales marroquíes, para ayudarte a lucir y sentirte lo mejor posible.

En Moroccan Care, creemos en la belleza auténtica y el poder de la naturaleza. Nuestra colección está cuidadosamente seleccionada y formulada para brindarte productos de alta calidad, ricos en ingredientes naturales como el aceite de argán, la rosa de Marruecos, el ghassoul y otros tesoros de la naturaleza marroquí. Estos ingredientes han sido utilizados durante siglos en la tradición marroquí de cuidado personal, conocida por sus propiedades hidratantes, nutritivas y rejuvenecedoras.

Nos apasiona ofrecer una experiencia de compra excepcional a nuestros clientes. Nuestro equipo de expertos en belleza está aquí para brindarte asesoramiento personalizado y recomendaciones basadas en tus necesidades individuales. Valoramos tu satisfacción y nos esforzamos por superar tus expectativas en cada interacción.

Síguenos en LinkedIn para mantenerte actualizado sobre nuestras últimas novedades, descubrir consejos de belleza inspirados en Marruecos y conocer más sobre nuestra cultura y filosofía de cuidado personal. Compartiremos información relevante sobre tendencias de belleza, técnicas de cuidado de la piel y bienestar general.

Únete a nuestra comunidad y descubre cómo puedes realzar tu belleza de manera auténtica y natural con Moroccan Care."

Name: Artelier art&cafe
Description:

U nás sú vítaní amatéri rovnako ako aj profesionáli. Stačí si jednoducho prenajať svoje miesto v našom umeleckom ateliéri a tvoriť. Taktiež si môžeš vybrať z našej ponuky kurzov a workshopov a naučiť sa rôzne výtvarné techniky pod vedením skúsených lektorov.

Srdcom Artelieru je bar s kaviarňou, kde Vám vždy radi pripravíme výberovú kávu a hlad vám pomôžeme zahnať zdravými dobrotami. V ponuke máme aj kvalitné vína, prosecco, pivko z remeselných pivovarov a mnoho iných nápojov na potešenie tela i ducha. 

V teplých mesiacoch sa Artelier pravidelne rozšíri o nádhernú terasu v našom vnútrobloku. V oáze pokoja budete môcť maľovať pod holým nebom, viesť dlhé rozhovory s priateľmi, alebo len tak zavrieť oči a dlhými dúškami si vychutnávať výbornú kávu.

V našej ponuke nájdete nielen možnosť príjemného posedenia, zdravých snackov či skvelých drinkov, ale aj teambuilding či oslavu so zážitkom!

Vyskúšajte si v rámci teambuildingu zážitkový kurz maľovania s lektorom.

Že neviete maľovať a naposledy ste štetec držali v ruke na základnej škole? To vôbec nevadí! Naši lektori sa postarajú o to, aby bol váš výsledok čo najlepší.

Obraz si však namaľujete sami, my vám len ukážeme ako na to. Máme pre vás pripravené množstvo techník.

S nami to zvládne každý!

Description:

Ruby’s offers a place for creativity and community, serving a range of studio users from preschoolers whose work is fired for free as part of our Community Outreach program, to adults taking a clay class for the first time, and to those that are hobby and professional artists.  
Ruby’s Clay Studio & Gallery keeps studio costs low by enlisting hundreds of hours of volunteer service and through careful financial planning.  Artists working in clay are often dependent on sharing space and necessary equipment.  Please consider helping us in continuing to keep Ruby’s Clay Studio & Gallery an arts center whose objectives are to promote community appreciation of the ceramic arts and to encourage self-expression and technical and artistic development through exhibitions, classes and the resources provided by a shared learning facility for many years to come.

Name: Cine Natureza
Description:
O Cine Natureza é um projeto de cinema itinerante que promove exibições audiovisuais em diferentes territórios, integrando cultura, educação ambiental e democratização do acesso ao cinema. Com uma estrutura inovadora de infláveis, garantimos a realização das sessões em espaços abertos, bairros periféricos e comunidades tradicionais, criando novas possibilidades de encontro e reflexão sobre a relação entre o ser humano e a natureza.
Nosso compromisso vai além da exibição de filmes. Trabalhamos com um modelo lixo zero, minimizando resíduos e investindo em materiais duráveis e reutilizáveis. Toda a comunicação impressa do projeto é pensada para ser integrada ao longo dos anos, reduzindo o impacto ambiental e alinhando-se aos valores da Rede Formação. A partir de 2025, nosso site contará com um Laboratório de Educomunicação, ampliando a difusão de conteúdos sobre cinema e meio ambiente.
As curadorias dos filmes são cuidadosamente selecionadas para dialogar com os territórios em que são exibidos. Realizamos sessões em comunidades como museus, teatros, centros culturais, pontos de cultura, sempre buscando compreender as características de cada público para aprimorar nossas estratégias de engajamento. 
O Cine Natureza é apenas o começo de uma jornada para fortalecer o cinema independente, a educação ambiental e a valorização das comunidades locais. Seguimos investindo em infraestrutura e formação, ampliando as possibilidades do audiovisual como ferramenta de transformação social. 

#CineNatureza #CinemaItinerante #Sustentabilidade #CulturaAcessível #Educomunicação

Name: DanceArtChicago
Description:
DanceArt was established in September 2000 by Maria S. Gebhard, a seasoned non-profit executive with hands-on experience in the fine arts, arts education, and community development. Leveraging her accomplished and decorated tenure, she founded, developed, and operates the organization which began with a vision – ensuring that all students could experience the world of dance, its history, discipline, craft, performance, and appreciation.

The faculty consists of gifted performing artists who are sensitive to the needs of children and who approach each lesson with genuine love and dedication to the craft. DanceArt began as a studio, but transformed into a professional performing arts center, and ultimately, into a performance art company catering to at-risk youth through outreach and professional education components in nearly 20 Chicago neighborhoods. It acts as a multidisciplinary platform for artistic education, committed to supporting artists and building new audiences for the arts and future appreciation. The faculty teaches multiple weekly sessions in up to 60 locations through an innovative and discreetly integrated customized arts programming schedule. The target age group is students aged pre-K through high school (with a curriculum integrated to the 4th – 8th grade level), who have an opportunity to deepen their love of the arts.

The DanceArt mission brings benefits to its participants while also building critical social skills and mutual respect through the disciplined protocol of dance – and through a deeper cognizance of mind and body health which builds self-esteem. DanceArt instills these core values and sets students up for success. Its vowed secondary mission is to promote professional artists by giving them high-paying and highly responsible teaching opportunities. Only the most gifted artists are chosen through a thorough vetting process to ensure they can provide substantive chance consistent with the DanceArt mission.

Name: Martin Music Academy
Description:
I teach Guitar, Bass and Ukulele out of Santa Maria CA, and online. I founded Martin Music Academy in 2022 with the goal of providing personalized guitar instruction for all ages and all musical styles. I serve students with experience levels from absolute beginner to intermediate. My approach is based on the belief that everyone can learn to play guitar, regardless of age or ability.

I offer one-on-one instruction in my studio located in Santa Maria California. I am passionate about teaching my craft. Whether you're looking to improve your skills or just starting out, I'll help you reach your musical goals. Contact me today to schedule a trial lesson. 

My students range in age from seven to seventy. I can help the absolute beginner take their first steps in learning to play, beginning with learning how to tune the instrument. I can also help the intermediate player break through their plateau and learn to play up the neck and take that guitar solo.

I understand that being a good teacher means being flexible rather than following a rigid curriculum. I know that one size doesn’t fit all. Students have different learning styles and I believe it is important for me as a teacher to adapt to the learning style of my students.

Playing music has been an important hobby for me since  I first picked up bass guitar as a teen. I was a teacher in my previous career and recently I have pivoted to teaching music. I've always loved teaching. With music, I love figuring out how to tailor lessons to the individual student. 

Playing music is a skill you can learn and continue to develop and enjoy through life. Most players find their progress is uneven and plateaus can be hard to work through. I can help you travel the most direct path to meet your musical goals and have fun along the way. It's not too early or too late for you to begin. Enjoy the journey!

Name: Maison Régionale des Arts de la Table
Description:
L’ancien hospice d’Arnay-le-Duc, appelé « Domus Dei Arneti » est signalé dès le XIIIe siècle. Un arrêt de la cour du parlement, daté du 15 juin 1599, constate l’existence de cet établissement hospitalier alors implanté en bordure de l’Arroux à droite en aval du pont Saint-Jacques qui enjambe cette rivière. Cet hôpital comportait huit lits destinés aux pauvres et était desservi primitivement par deux femmes laïques puis par trois sœurs religieuses des hospices de Beaune.
A 100 mètres de son emplacement primitif, sur l’autre rive de l’Arroux, on édifia de 1693 à 1695 le bâtiment actuel de l’hôpital Saint-Pierre, d’après les plans et sous la direction de Claude et François Boituzet, architectes à Autun. La première pierre en fut posée par Emiland Bonnard, secrétaire du roi et maire d’Arnay en 1681. 
Douze lits de malades y furent installés et confiés aux soins de quatre religieuses de l’ordre de Sainte Marthe de Beaune. Pendant trois siècles, les religieuses assurèrent le fonctionnement de cet établissement. La rotonde de la chapelle fut ajoutée en 1873. Dans le chœur sont inhumés les aumôniers de l’hôpital et dans la chapelle, les supérieurs. En 1977, les derniers malades sont transférés dans le nouvel hôpital d’Arnay-le-Duc, d’où l’idée de créer la Maison Régionale des Arts de la Table dans les anciens hospices. Le portail d’entrée, les grilles intérieures, les façades et toitures du pavillon des gardiens, du bâtiment de l’hospice et du pigeonnier furent classés en 1981.
Réalisation unique en France, premier musée consacré totalement à notre alimentation et aux arts de la table, la Maison Régionale des Arts de la table une découverte ou une redécouverte de cet art de la table que la précipitation permanente ne nous permet pas d’apprécier comme il conviendrait. Depuis 1981, chaque année, la MRAT ouvre ses portes pour une exposition de 7 mois autour des éléments essentiels de l’art de vivre : l’alimentation, la gastronomie, la gourmandise et les arts de la table…

Name: Clay & Kiln Collective
Description:
Clay & Kiln Collective is a ceramics studio and creative hub dedicated to fostering community, connection, and artistic expression. Located in the heart of Salem, OR our studio provides access to professional-grade pottery wheels, kilns, handbuilding stations, and even cutting-edge equipment like a 3D clay printer. Really anything a potter could need! 
We aim to support artists, hobbyists, and beginners alike by offering a collaborative and inspiring environment to explore the art of ceramics.

At Clay & Kiln, we believe in the transformative power of creativity. Our space is designed to be accessible and inclusive, welcoming everyone from seasoned ceramicists to those discovering the joy of working with clay for the first time. Beyond being a workspace, we’re a place where people can connect, learn, and grow. Members can enjoy flexible access to state-of-the-art equipment, and we offer workshops, classes, and special events to engage the broader community.

Rooted in the timeless traditions of shaping earth into form, Clay & Kiln also embraces modern innovation, making it a unique space where history and technology meet. Our mission is to empower individuals to create freely while forming lasting connections with others who share their passion for art.

Whether you’re an artist seeking a collaborative space, a beginner eager to learn, or someone looking for a creative outlet, Clay & Kiln Collective is a welcoming space where ideas and clay take shape. Join us in building a community where creativity knows no bounds.

Name: Werkschule Oldenburg - Werkstatt für Kunst und Kulturarbeit e.V.
Description:
Die Werkschule Oldenburg ist eine renommierte Bildungseinrichtung und ein lebendiges Zentrum für Kunst und Kulturarbeit. Als Veranstalter der Internationalen Keramiktage Oldenburg, einem der größten und bekanntesten Keramikmärkten Deutschlands, zieht die Werkschule jährlich über 60.000 Besucher:innen an und präsentiert rund 100 internationale Ausstellende.

Darüber hinaus bieten wir das ganze Jahr über ein breit gefächertes Kursprogramm in den Bereichen Keramik, Bildhauerei und Malerei an, ergänzt durch wechselnde Ausstellungen in unserer eigenen Galerie, dem Kunstforum und spannende Projekte. Unser Engagement für die Förderung der Keramikkunst wurde 2016 mit der Aufnahme in die Internationale Academy of Ceramics (IAC) gewürdigt.

Wir stehen für individuelle Förderung, gemeinsames kreatives Arbeiten und hohe Vermittlungsstandards. Entdecken Sie die Vielfalt der Kunst und werden Sie Teil unserer inspirierenden Gemeinschaft!

Name: Yuri Leonov
Description:
Born in St Petersburg, Russia in 1987 I pursued art from a young age, taking classes to build a foundation based on primarily classical knowledge. I have enjoyed the contrast of living in one of the major cultural centers of Europe, home to world heritage sites, immense museums, and expansive architecture, with a rural setting of a rustic, quaint country house during the summer. In adolescence I moved to New York City, the capital of modern art, inspiring me to expand my creative horizons. I attended LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts, subsequently receiving my Bachelor of Fine Arts degree in Illustration from the School of Visual Arts in 2011. Since graduating, I have been living in Brooklyn, New York where I was cultivating, and teaching a life model drawing class, along with other courses, in collaboration with BK Society of Draftsman. Most recently was employed as a mural painter by Seen Outdoor Media, previously worked in that position for Overall Murals, and Evergreene Architectural Arts. I Assisted an Interior decorator at Kay Cha Studio, was an art handler at Marlborough Gallery, Derek Eller Gallery and others, served as a studio assistant for a fine artist Sean Mellyn, and a Gallery assistant for Dacia Gallery and others. Currently residing in Saratoga Springs, Upstate New York. 
 My work encompasses small and large scale drawings and paintings, individual, but more commonly in series, connected not only aesthetically but through technical execution, dictated by the concept of each project. Tapping within the subconscious allows me to concentrate on the ever persisting yet unresolved, permanent, timeless issues, attempting to avoid cliches and trends of the new as well as the repetition and redundancies of the old. My artwork is oftentimes conceived in series to generate an immersive effect, and emulate an authentic experience through prolonged engagement with the shape shifting, evolving world I construct. The worldbuilding involves i

Name: Académie d'Art Vocal Pontivy
Description:
L'Académie d'Art Vocal, association culturelle pontivyenne, s'est donné pour mission de faire vivre les arts de la voix en Bretagne, à travers une saison de stages variés. Elle souhaite répondre ainsi, dans notre région, à des besoins qui, ailleurs en France, sont nourris par des structures telles que la Cité de la Voix à Vénélay ou le Cepravoix en région Centre.
C'est à cette fin que l'Académie d'Art Vocal propose d'accueillir des chanteurs amateurs, amateurs éclairés et professionnels, des professeurs de chant ainsi que des chefs de chœur ou d'ensemble vocal et des chœurs, au horizons et bagages multiples, dans des stages conçus pour eux et encadrés par des intervenants spécialisés d'exception.
L'Académie d'Art Vocal a comme projet la réhabilitation de l'Eden Palace à Pontivy pour créer un lieu pour les artistes comme pour le public, tout en gardant l'esprit de ce bâtiment mythique, l'ancien cinéma de Pontivy de 1950 à 1990.

Con oltre 1.500 studenti e studentesse provenienti da ogni parte del mondo, la scuola si distingue come punto di riferimento nella formazione professionale e amatoriale di mosaicisti, artisti ed esperti di arte musiva.

Oltre ai corsi brevi, intensivi, avanzati e professionali, la scuola ha ampliato la sua offerta con la produzione di kit mosaico fai da te, strumenti per l’apprendimento del mosaico e una vasta gamma di risorse didattiche, tra cui video tutorial online e manuali multilingue.

Name: Instituto Trovadores Urbanos
Description:
INSTITUTO TROVADORES URBANOS
ESPALHANDO AFETO PELA CIDADE DE SÃO PAULO

Desde 2002, o Instituto Trovadores Urbanos tem como missão espalhar afeto por São Paulo. Unindo arte, cultura, música e gentileza, suas ações alcançam comunidades carentes, crianças, mulheres e idosos, promovendo alegria, consolo e presença através da música e de projetos sociais.

A trajetória começou com serenatas em hospitais como A.C. Camargo, GRAACC, Hospital das Clínicas e outros, levando conforto a pacientes e profissionais da saúde. Em seguida, vieram projetos como Serenata na Sopa (2004), com moradores em situação de rua, e Seresta de Sexta (2010), que acontece até hoje na Casa dos Trovadores, em Perdizes, com entrada gratuita.

Em 2012, nasceu a Escola de Trovadores, que oferece aulas de canto coral, musicalização e teatro para crianças da periferia. Dela surgiu o grupo Trovadores Mirins, que já gravou CDs e realizou diversas apresentações públicas.

Outras iniciativas marcantes do Instituto incluem:

Oficinas Afetivas (bonecas, instrumentos recicláveis, voz)

Roda de Mulheres, em parceria com SASFs, promovendo escuta e acolhimento

Tricoteiras da Cidade, com mantas para idosos

Música e Meditação no Escuro, em parceria com nomes como Monja Coen

Atividades culturais na Casa dos Trovadores, como saraus, exposições e encontros musicais

O Instituto também leva grupos das periferias a teatros, praças e centros culturais. Espetáculos como Cirque du Soleil, Rita Lee – O Musical e concertos na Sala São Paulo e Theatro Municipal passaram a fazer parte do repertório cultural de quem nunca antes havia estado em um palco.

Em 2024, os Trovadores realizaram uma turnê por nove cidades do interior paulista, resgatando memórias musicais e promovendo serenatas nas praças.

Tudo isso com um propósito claro: usar a arte como ferramenta de transformação social. O Instituto Trovadores Urbanos é, antes de tudo, um projeto de amor à cidade e às pessoas.

Afeto é o que nos move.

Name: Sky Arts Produções Culturais
Description:
Desde 2005, a arte da dança já se fazia presente em Curitiba com a Sky Dance Cia de Dança, que lançaria as sementes do que viria a ser a Sky Arts – Produções Culturais. Fundada oficialmente em 2008, a Sky Arts tornou-se uma das principais referências da cena artística curitibana, expandindo seu repertório para além da dança e abraçando diversas linguagens da produção cultural. Sob a direção de Caio Fábio, coreógrafo e diretor artístico, a produtora tem como missão transformar realidades por meio da arte, levando ao público obras que emocionam, educam e inspiram.

Ao longo dos anos, a Sky Arts produziu mais de 20 espetáculos teatrais e 8 espetáculos de dança, com destaque para Reticências, obra original de 2020 que retorna aos palcos em nova versão, com elenco renovado da Sky Dance. Atualmente, circulamos com Uma Jornada no Sertão, que leva o público a uma viagem poética pelo Nordeste brasileiro, e desenvolvemos três novas montagens: No Céu de Tango, inspirado na paixão do tango argentino; Newton e as Tintas Mágicas, uma aventura lúdica e educativa; e Picamalácia, que explora a riqueza da língua portuguesa em uma experiência interativa.

Mais do que criar espetáculos, a Sky Arts constrói pontes culturais, conectando públicos a experiências transformadoras. Com uma equipe de mais de 45 artistas e técnicos, seguimos ultrapassando os limites da criatividade, sempre comprometidos com a excelência técnica e estética.

Neste constante desafio de inovação, a Sky Arts consolida-se como uma força pioneira no Paraná e no Brasil. Para nós, arte é mais que expressão: é ferramenta de transformação. Convidamos todos a fazer parte dessa jornada de descoberta, emoção e celebração.

Name: Experiência PADMA
Description:
A Experiência PADMA é uma proposta sensível de aprendizado pela arte. Um convite para desacelerar, observar e escutar — a partir de um encontro direto e subjetivo com obras visuais.

Diferente das abordagens tradicionais, PADMA rompe com a lógica interpretativa imposta e propõe uma vivência intuitiva, acessível e profundamente humana. Por meio de uma metodologia guiada e flexível, os participantes desenvolvem escuta ativa, pensamento crítico e imaginação criativa, fortalecendo seu senso de julgamento estético e pessoal.

Mais do que interpretar, a proposta convida o público a se relacionar com a arte como um ponto de partida — para perceber, imaginar e atribuir sentido a partir de suas próprias referências e histórias. Ao reconhecer a legitimidade do olhar individual, PADMA empodera o participante a transitar com liberdade pelo universo artístico, sem depender de mediações externas.

A experiência contribui para ampliar o acesso cultural e naturalizar a presença da arte no cotidiano, desfazendo barreiras simbólicas que mantêm o campo artístico distante ou inacessível.

PADMA já foi realizada em museus, galerias, espaços culturais e ambientes corporativos, fortalecendo o vínculo entre arte, subjetividade e vida.

Name: Art Class with Savi
Description:
Artists Welcome!  | Bringing the World of Art to You via Zoom 

Hello, I'm Savi, and I'm passionate about the world of art!  As an artist and painter with a lifelong dedication to the craft, I've explored the nuances of color, the beauty of shapes, and the magic of drawing and painting since I was a child. 

With a background in art history and urban design, I've had the privilege of delving deep into the artistic world, collaborating with fellow artists and painters, and studying the evolution of art through the ages. Now, I'm thrilled to share my knowledge and expertise with you through my interactive art classes, conducted conveniently over Zoom. 

Whether you're a budding young artist or an adult seeking a creative outlet, my classes cater to all ages and skill levels. Together, we'll embark on a journey of artistic exploration, where you'll learn the foundations of color theory, the secrets of shape manipulation, and the joys of drawing and painting. 

Join me on this creative adventure, where we'll unleash your inner artist and discover the boundless possibilities of self-expression. 

Reach out to me for more details on class schedules and how to join! 

#ArtClasses #ZoomArtClasses #Artist #Painter #ColorTheory #Drawing #Painting #ArtEducation #Creativity #UnlockYourPotential #creativity #creative #creators #create

Name: AshishPatelAtelier
Description:
THE ONLINE ATELIER EXPERIENCE
-A talent development programme for artists of all levels, from beginner to advanced.
-We simplify the creative process by breaking it down into small, manageable moving parts such as value, edge, colour theory, tone, and so on.
-Our emphasis is on technical proficiency, which is the cornerstone of any correctly crafted art. Every detail is considered, from excellent brush technique to generating realistic artwork.
-Building a compelling structure takes time, thought, patience, and, most importantly, repetition. Each new technique can be mastered before going on to the next.
-We enjoy providing constructive feedback to our students, and we will always point out what you did well as well as what you should improve.
Our lecturers are internationally known professional artists who put what they teach into practice.
-Over the course of a decade, this programme aims to create hundreds of success stories by assisting students in obtaining commission employment and career opportunities.

Name: Vyzantino Odeio
Description:
The Byzantine Conservatory was founded in 1992, by Ms. Nikolopoulou - Zombola Charalambia.

Throughout its more than 25 years of operation, it continues to offer a high level of musical studies in a wide range of instruments, which extends from classical music to traditional - Greek folk music, jazz and rock.

Our philosophy is not limited to the provision of musical instrument learning services, but extends to the transmission of music education to our students, with responsibility, professionalism and consistency.

We offer programs tailored to the requirements of the student and in particular:
- preparation programs for admission to music schools or universities,
- programs for obtaining degrees / diplomas recognized by the Greek state,
music-motor education programs, as well as
- free departments of modern musical instruments based on recognized programs of foreign universities.

Our conservatory is taught by trained and experienced graduate teachers, who have studied in Greece and abroad and have at least ten years of teaching experience, and some of them have won significant distinctions and awards in their field of specialization.

Working both as professionals and as a family, we take care of each and every one of our students.

We will be very happy to meet you up close, in order to discuss the curriculum that interests you.

Name: Atelier Mari Barraco
Description:
Creado y dirigido por Mari Barraco el Atelier nace en 2017 como una Escuela de Arte Integral multidisciplinaria donde se desarrollan actividades de creación, formación, difusión e intercambio del arte en general.
Diseñamos experiencias con el fin de democratizar y expandir el arte.

El programa de formación ofrece cursos multidisciplinarios como dibujo, pintura, cerámica, escultura y arte digital que se complementan con Workshops y cursos intensivos.

Creamos un método educativo, basado en la motivación continua, el aprendizaje gradual y personalizado, innovando en ejercicios de gran impacto, que puedan fomentar la rápida asimilación de las herramientas necesarias llevando el arte a que lo disfrutemos todos.

Ofrecemos proyectos artísticos corporativos y educativos diseñados para transformar el entorno laboral y fortalecer la cohesión del equipo. Nuestros talleres artísticos personalizados no solo fomentan la creatividad y el pensamiento innovador entre empleados, sino que también proporcionan un espacio para el bienestar psicológico y emocional, reduciendo el estrés y aumentando la productividad. 

Además, nuestros exclusivos regalos empresariales, creados por artistas locales, son una manera única y memorable de agradecer clientes y socios. Al integrar arte y negocio, ayudamos a las empresas a destacarse y a crear un impacto positivo duradero.

Name: Lakhya Institute of Arts
Description:
The Lakhya Institute of Arts, founded by Dr. Sunil Jaiswal, is an art studio and educational space located in Palam Vyapar Kendra, Delhi. Dr. Jaiswal is an accomplished Indian artist known for his vibrant acrylic paintings that often explore spiritual and mythological themes. His works include expressive depictions of deities such as Krishna, Matsya, and Buddha, blending traditional Indian iconography with contemporary expressionist styles.
Through the Lakhya Institute of Arts, I have mentored over 500 students, helping them nurture their artistic skills and discover their unique voices. I have also launched a coffee table book under my full name, Sunil Kumar Jaiswal, showcasing a collection of my works. In addition to selling original paintings, I also take on commissioned art projects, creating personalized pieces that reflect the client's vision while staying true to my artistic essence.

Name: Robert O'Neal Multicultural Arts Center (ROMAC)
Description:
Robert O’Neal Multicultural Arts Center (ROMAC) is a dynamic, mission‑driven nonprofit established in 2019 in Cincinnati to celebrate, advance, and preserve African and African American arts, history, and culture through education and community engagement. Located in the West End, ROMAC aspires to become a premier arts institution—offering a collaborative makerspace, coworking opportunities, cultural event programming, galleries highlighting artists of color, and educational and nightlife programming that revitalizes its historic neighborhood and serves creatives region‑wide.

At the heart of ROMAC’s programming is the ARTprenuer Apprenticeship & Entrepreneurship Program, a transformative year‑long initiative fostering economic mobility among young creatives aged 13–21. Participants—compensated for their efforts—gain hands‑on experience in art creation, sales, marketing, social media, budgeting, financial literacy, and business practices, supported by mentorship, workshops, and pathways to higher education. Balanced recruitment ensures diverse representation from Cincinnati’s West End and neighboring communities, advancing equity in access to resources and opportunity.

Together, ROMAC and programs like ARTprenuer are cultivating the next generation of artists‑entrepreneurs—nurturing creativity, building business acumen, and fueling inclusive cultural and economic renewal in Cincinnati.

Name: Artreach Collective
Description:
At ArtReach Collective, we believe in the transformative power of creativity. We provide a safe, inclusive, and nurturing space where individuals—children, teens, and adults—can explore their emotions, build resilience, and heal through expressive arts and art therapy.

Our services are grounded in evidence-based therapeutic practices and creative exploration, helping individuals overcome anxiety, trauma, stress, and perfectionism. Whether through one-on-one sessions, group workshops, or community outreach programs, our goal is to make healing accessible through the arts.

We support emotional regulation, self-expression, mindfulness, and personal growth—one brushstroke at a time.

Name: The Vine Works
Description:
The Vine Works is a creative arts initiative dedicated to walking alongside individuals and communities facing life’s challenges. Through painting, storytelling, and hands-on creative practices, we create safe spaces that foster encouragement, healing, and joy.

Rooted in the belief that art has the power to restore and connect, The Vine Works partners with diverse groups, from children and families to those navigating illness, caregiving, or personal struggles, to nurture creativity as a source of strength, resilience, and hope.

Our mission is simple: to use the language of art to bring light, dignity, and companionship into every life we encounter.

Explore. Create. Evolve. — Art Education for All Ages & Levels

At our Art Education Institute, we believe that creativity is a skill anyone can learn, nurture, and master. Whether you are a beginner discovering your passion or an experienced artist looking to expand your skills, we provide a vibrant learning environment for all.

We offer comprehensive art classes both online and offline, making quality art education accessible from anywhere. Our curriculum covers a wide range of artistic disciplines, including:

 Painting in Various Mediums – Acrylic, Watercolor, Oil, Mixed Media
 Ceramic & Pottery Work – Hand-building, Wheel Work, Glazing Techniques
 Murals & Art Installations – Conceptual Design, Large-scale Execution
 Sketching & Drawing – Fundamentals, Portraits, Still Life, Nature Studies

Led by Professional Artists and Educators, our classes combine technical instruction, hands-on practice, and individual mentoring. 
Whether you're a hobbyist, student, or aspiring professional, we tailor our programs to suit different goals and skill levels.

We also offer short-term workshops and customised learning paths for schools, corporates, and art enthusiasts.

Join our growing community of learners and creators, online or at our vibrant studio space and experience the joy of art in its many forms.

 Flexible Schedules | Expert Faculty | Creative Community

Name: Deriva Escuela
Description:
DERIVA es una escuela para la formación en artes visuales que aúna fotografía, cine y literatura.

DERIVA pretende fomentar el estudio y aprendizaje de la imagen como un modo de expresión que permita conocer, descubrir, cuestionar y contar el mundo.

DERIVA es un espacio de reunión, discusión, reflexión y creación de historias en el que a través de la imagen se ordenan una serie de factores y experiencias que señalan el inicio o el deseo de conocer y contar. La enseñanza en DERIVA gira entorno a diferentes formatos que pretenden acercarse al mundo de las artes visuales independientemente de sus aplicaciones profesionales. Somos una escuela que apuesta por una enseñanza interdisciplinar, en la que el aprendizaje se nutra de todo cuanto rodea a la imagen y a la práctica de la misma.

Name: ARAM Method
Description:
The ARAM Method is a transdisciplinary path that integrates ancient wisdom, strategic thinking, and transformative practices for the development of individuals, organizations, and communities.

Rooted in the traditions of Shaolin Kung Fu, Tai Chi Chuan, Taoist and Hermetic philosophy, Christian mysticism, Kabbalah, Jungian psychology, and contemporary science, the ARAM Method bridges East and West, past and future, spirit and strategy.

More than a practice, it is a living system that combines:

Physical training (Kung Fu, Tai Chi, Sanda, Submission) to strengthen the body and discipline the will.

Philosophical and spiritual study (Tao, Kabbalah, Hermeticism, Jung, Wilber, mysticism) to expand consciousness.

Ritualistic and symbolic practices (music, meditation, sacred symbols, and ceremonies) to connect with ancestral wisdom.

Strategic and systemic thinking (Sun Tzu, Musashi, Maquiavel, chess, Go, poker) to prepare leaders and communities for real-world challenges.

The ARAM Method is designed for those who seek not only personal growth, but also collective transformation, aligning body, mind, and spirit with strategic clarity and cultural renewal.

It is currently being developed and shared through:

Mentorships and Consultations (individual and collective)

Trainings and Workshops (physical, philosophical, and spiritual)

Transpersonal Therapeutic Sessions (with and without sacred medicines)

Cultural and Educational Projects connecting Brazil, Europe, and beyond

At its core, the ARAM Method is a bridge between worlds — a way of weaving wisdom, strength, and vision into a new cultural horizon.

Name: Negaran Contemporary Art Gallery
Description:
نگارخانه سراوان (نگارخانه هنرهای معاصر نگاران)، پروژه ای شهروندی است که در سال ۱۳۹۸ با پیگیری و مدیریت برخی از هنرمندان شهر، فعالیت خود را آغاز و هم اکنون شهروندان زیادی در این پروژه مشارکت دارند.

نگارخانه سراوان، هزینه دوره های آموزشی اساتید را با دریافت شهریه از هنرجویان پرداخت می کند، ده درصد از مبلغ شهریه برای هزینه های نگارخانه کسر می شود و الباقی به حساب اساتید مربوطه واریز می گردد. فعلا هیچ گونه حمایت مالی دیگری وجود ندارد. لیست هزینه های نگارخانه و درآمدهای اساتید، در پایان هر فصل در وب سایت نگارخانه منتشر می شوند.

مسئول نگارخانه توسط اعضاء انتخاب تا برای دوره های آموزشی، نمایشگاه ها و پروژه های پیشنهادی و حل تعارض ها، برنامه ریزی و هماهنگی های لازم را انجام دهد. همچنین در امور مربوط به نگارخانه به نمایندگی از اعضاء در جلسات و مواردی از این دست شرکت و در جهت بهبود کیفیت فضا و محتوای نگارخانه تلاش کند.


۱- بهروز بردبار ( از سال ۹۸ تا آبان ماه سال ۱۴۰۰ )
۲- عارف خدابنده ( از آبان ماه سال ۱۴۰۰ تا الان )

اهداف :
ایجاد فضایی نمایشگاهی برای معرفی هنرمندان سطح شهرستان، رشد و ارائه آثار آنها.
برگزاری کلاس های آموزشی رشته های هنری با هدف:
– غنی کردن اوقات فراغت شهروندان و پرورش خلاقیت.
– درآمدزایی برای اساتید هنری.
تولید محتوا : مستند، فیلم کوتاه، مجموعه عکس، مجموعه آموزشی، کتاب و . . . .
برگزاری نشست های هفتگی با هدف ارتقاع سطح آگاهی جامعه.
اجرای پروژه های آموزشی و شهروندی.

Name: Madonna- BU Art Society

Madonna – BU Art Society (BUAS) is the official art and visual culture society of the University of Barishal, Bangladesh. Founded and led by students, BUAS serves as a dynamic platform to nurture creativity, promote cultural dialogue, and celebrate the transformative power of art in society.

We organize exhibitions, cultural events, workshops, live art performances, and collaborative events that bring together emerging artists from diverse disciplines. Our initiatives spotlight traditional Bangladeshi artistry as well as contemporary expressions, with past projects paying tribute to legendary figures like S.M. Sultan.

At BUAS, we believe art is not only a form of expression but also a medium for social commentary, community engagement, and academic enrichment. Our members are encouraged to explore bold ideas, challenge boundaries, and contribute meaningfully to the cultural landscape of our campus and beyond.

Name: Ars Libri - cultura e acessibilidade
Description: A arte e a cultura são expressões que vem da alma de cada ser humano e nos ajudam a contar histórias e entender o passado, o presente e o futuro, aprendendo sobre como o ser humano se comporta com o passar do tempo. Se boa parte da população puder ter acesso a arte, a cultura e a educação, seremos capazes de entender a história que nos trouxe até aqui, e minimizar fenômenos sociais que só prejudicam a existência da própria sociedade. Com educação e tecnologia, o Ars Libri visa poder mudar cada vez mais a realidade de desinformação e desvalorização da arte e da cultura, mudando primeiro o pensamento de cada um de nós.

Ensinamos Kung Fu (功夫 Gōngfū), Tai Chi Chuan (Tàijíquán 太极拳), Chi Kung (气功 Qìgōng) e Mandarim (中文 Zhōngwén)em suas formas mais autênticas — com respeito às raízes e com didática moderna.

Acreditamos que cultura é ponte, não fronteira. Por isso, oferecemos cursos de Mandarim, Kung Fu, Tai Chi Chuan e Qi Gong com opção EAD.

Na Shaoyao, tradição e atualidade se encontram para formar pessoas mais conscientes, saudáveis e conectadas com o mundo.

Name: Den Ukrainske Kunstforening
Description:
NO:
Den Ukrainske Kunstforening

Foreningens formål er å samle og synliggjøre ukrainske kunstnere i Norge, fremme deres kunstneriske virksomhet og bidra til økt offentlig engasjement i kunst og kultur. Foreningen arbeider aktivt for å skaffe visningsarenaer, styrke nettverk og legge til rette for kreativ utvikling og kulturell utveksling. I tillegg arrangerer foreningen kunstaktiviteter og prosjekter for mennesker i alle aldre, med mål om å gjøre kunst tilgjengelig og inkluderende for hele samfunnet.

Foreningen sprer kunnskap om maleri, fotografi, design, redesign og gjenbruk av tekstil, tre, glass og andre materialer. Dette oppnår vi gjennom kurs og aktiviteter for barn, unge og voksne – blant annet innen treskjæring, glassgravering, akvarellmaling og tekstilkunst med fokus på gjenbruk. Vi forener og inspirerer mennesker gjennom kultur, samt kreativ og teknisk utvikling.
____
ENG:
The Ukrainian Art Association

The purpose of the association is to unite and promote Ukrainian artists in Norway, support their artistic work, and contribute to increased public engagement in art and culture. The association actively works to provide exhibition venues, strengthen networks, and facilitate creative development and cultural exchange. In addition, the association organizes art activities and projects for people of all ages, with the goal of making art accessible and inclusive for the entire community.

The association spreads knowledge about painting, photography, design, upcycling, and the reuse of textiles, wood, glass, and other materials. We achieve this through courses and activities for children, youth, and adults – including wood carving, glass engraving, watercolor painting, and textile art with a focus on reuse. We connect and inspire people through culture, as well as creative and technical development.

Description:
A Gdance Entretenimento é uma referência no setor de bem-estar e serviços Wellness, atuando há mais de 16 anos no desenvolvimento de soluções que integram saúde, lazer e capacitação profissional.

Nascida na Bahia e com atuação expandida para o cenário nacional e internacional (EUA/Canadá), a empresa opera através de quatro pilares de negócio estratégicos:

Licenciamento B2B: Implementação de metodologia própria em academias e centros de treinamento, oferecendo retenção de alunos e diferenciação de mercado para parceiros corporativos.

EdTech e Capacitação: Através do Portal Instrutor Gdance, atuamos na formação continuada de profissionais. Já capacitamos e inserimos no mercado de trabalho mais de 300 instrutores, utilizando plataformas digitais para ensino à distância e atualização de coreografias.

Gestão de Eventos: Produção de experiências de entretenimento de grande porte para setores corporativos, educacionais e privados.

Varejo e Merchandising: Gestão de marca própria com linha de produtos oficiais, totalizando mais de 5.000 unidades comercializadas com logística integrada.

A Gdance combina a energia da cultura brasileira com uma gestão orientada a dados, processos escaláveis e foco total na qualidade de entrega para o cliente final e parceiros de negócios.
