AMOK - Akademiet for Moderne Dans og Klassisk Ballet | DANSE GRUNDUDDANNELSE
Description:
DANSE GRUNDUDDANNELSE (DGU) is a specially-certified high school offering for talented and ambitions young adults from Denmark who are aiming for a professional career in dance. 

With a 4year education, students can earn an STX, HF, or HHX diploma, equivalent to the highest-ranking high schools in the country, while also receiving elite dance training certified by the Ministry of Education and recognized by the Ministry of Culture.

Our partner Institutions such as Odense Katedralskole and HF & VUC FYN oversees the theoretical subjects and The Royal Danish Theatres Ballet School, Odense oversees the artistic dance education. 

We collaborate with companies, choreographers and educational institutions on teaching, workshops, lectures, meetings with the professional scenic working life, external censors, attendance at trials and internships. All to develop the students and create relationships between them and the dance industry.

DGU seeks and strives for cultural diversity and has learned that this leads to greater creativity and innovation as well as respect for and trust in each other. Here we seek to create an education with a balance between developing the dancer, the academic and the human being in the individual, who will be able to enrich and touch the surrounding society. An education that is characterized by joy, passion and desire. We focus on 'the whole person' with a strong technical and artistic expression – an innovative dancer.

We are happy to give the students a chance for a national and international career and to, together with the city of Odense, be pioneers in dance and education.

Name: Atelier Ainoa
Description:
A new ceramics studio is opening in October 2022 in Zaandam, the Netherlands. After several months of renovation an old Huyndai showroom in Penningweg 91 has turned into a spacious, lightful art factory that accommodates a ceramic art and sculpting studio Atelier Ainoa, and screenprinting masters of Krijger Vormgave.

Atelier Ainoa is specialised in guiding students to find their creativity and unique ways to express themselves. Learn the basic clay hand building techniques while working on your own ceramics project under the guidance of an experienced teacher.

Small group size 4-8 persons, prices include materials, tools and firing service. Ask also about private workshops.

While the clay transforms into a ceramic art piece in the process of sculpting, drying, firing and glazing, the creator also goes through a change in her own mindset. The versatility of clay invites you to search your own path while respecting the surprises on a way – sometimes delightful ones, sometimes incidents you need to adapt to.

Clay Sundays are meant for testers who want to get a feeling of working with clay. Hand-building I and II both consist of 6 x 3 h lessons, where you will learn pinching, coil building and slab building techniques as well as the basic ceramics process from sculpting to glazing your work. All courses suit both beginners and more advanced students.

The teacher is Sanna Pöyhönen who first put her hands in clay as a teenager and after 30 years is still in love with the ceramics as an art medium.

Name: Art Mira Studio

Art Mira is much more than just a showcase for art. It's a community where everyone can access artistic expression, fostering a love for art and nurturing creative growth. Whether you're a collector seeking unique pieces, a beginner exploring your artistic side, or an organization seeking imaginative team-building experiences, Art Mira welcomes you with open arms.
 
Art Mira Studio Mission: Empowering Creativity and Supporting Artists.
To provide students with the tools, resources, and opportunities to grow their creative talents and to support artists in their professional development.
 
Vision: To cultivate a world where creativity thrives and artists are valued members of society.

Goals:
Expand access to arts education: Provide high-quality arts education programs to students of all ages and backgrounds.
Develop creative skills: Offer a variety of workshops, classes, and programs to help students develop their creative skills in different mediums.
Foster a creative community: Connect artists with each other and with the broader community through events, exhibitions, and partnerships.
 
Values:
Creativity: We believe that creativity is essential for individual growth, self-expression, and problem-solving.
Inclusivity: We believe that creativity is for everyone, regardless of age, background, or experience.
Innovation: We believe in fostering a culture of experimentation and exploration.
Collaboration: We believe that creativity is best nurtured in a supportive and collaborative environment.
Sustainability: We believe in supporting artists and fostering a thriving creative community.
Art Mira Studio was founded by professional Contemporary Fine Artist Mira Mitrova. Mira is a talented and passionate artist with a unique style. She has exhibited her work in galleries and museums around the world.
 
If you are looking for a place to learn about art or to create your own artwork, Art Mira Studio is a great option! They offer a warm and welcoming

Name: Samford Potters Collective
Description:
Discover the Joy of Pottery at Samford Potters Collective

Welcome to Samford Potters Collective, a vibrant and welcoming pottery studio in Samford, designed to inspire creativity, mindfulness, and connection. Nestled on 5 serene acres, our custom-built studio offers a supportive space for beginners and experienced potters alike to explore the art of wheel throwing, hand-building, and glazing.

We host pottery classes, corporate team-building events, and mindful clay workshops, creating opportunities for relaxation, creativity, and personal growth. Pottery has been proven to support mental well-being, aiding in stress relief, mindfulness, and even dementia therapy—and we’re passionate about sharing these benefits with our community.

Whether you're looking to unwind, learn a new skill, or connect with like-minded creatives, our expert-led workshops and welcoming environment make every visit inspiring.

Name: Escola Quillindo

Nossas aulas e oficinas, ministradas pela experiente Zila Siquet, são um convite para explorar a voz como instrumento de expressão pessoal e terapia natural. Através de métodos acolhedores e estimulantes, ajudamos você a descobrir seu potencial musical enquanto constrói relações significativas em nossa comunidade.

Os produtos artesanais em quilling e adinkra que criamos carregam essa mesma essência: cada peça é um símbolo da energia positiva e da criatividade que cultivamos em nosso espaço. E nos saraus e eventos culturais, essa magia se completa, quando vozes e histórias se encontram em experiências coletivas inesquecíveis.

Our "CREATE" mission:

C– CONNECT: Create community connections through art in schools, business-to-business relationships and face-to-face interaction

R– RELATE: Experience creating in relation to the world around you

E– EXPRESS: Develop your creative voice through creativity and self expression

A– ACADEMIC: Learn art and design concepts and techniques through curriculum based programs and projects

T– THERAPY: Create focus, problem solving, mindfulness and achieve self confidence through art expression

E– EXPLORE: Discover the creative spirit through unique materials, mixed media combinations, curiosity and exploration

With digital media being so pervasive in our kids lives, it is more important than ever to get them to put down the phones and video games and engage with each other in a positive and creative environment.

Name: Parque Cultural Caminhos dos Tambores
Description:
Parque Cultural Caminhos dos Tambores – Onde arte e natureza se encontram.

Fundado em 2020 por Joel Caminho em Ponte Preta-RS, somos um espaço que une arte, cultura e sustentabilidade. Nosso anfiteatro natural, sala de imersão artística com tambores, agrofloresta e fábrica de tambores promovem festivais, oficinas de música, dança e artes visuais, além de experiências gastronômicas com ingredientes da nossa horta orgânica.

Comprometidos com a arte sintrópica, harmonizamos o ser humano e o meio ambiente, integrando a Associação Pés na Terra, Mãos do Mundo. Geramos impacto social através da economia solidária, turismo cultural e agroecologia. Aberto de sexta a domingo, com refeições orgânicas e camping.

Visite-nos e conecte-se com a cultura e a natureza!  Av. Brasil, 1060, Centro, Ponte Preta-RS |  +55 (54) 99159-6030 |  Instagram: @caminhosdostambores. #ArteSintrópica #Cultura #Sustentabilidade

Description: Art therapy liaison combines therapeutic practice with artistic expression and education. Additionally, training programs are provided to educate professionals in the methods and principles of art therapy. Name: कला BAZAAR
Description:
Kala Bazaar is an art and painting service provider based in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Our services include a wide range of products and services that cater to the needs of individuals, businesses, and organizations alike. We have a team of highly skilled and experienced artists who specialize in various types of paintings, murals, sculptures, graffiti art, street paintings, and graphic designing.
We take pride in being one of the leading providers of wall painting projects in Bhopal and across india. Our team has worked on several corporate, residential, and commercial painting projects, delivering high-quality results to our clients. We offer 3D paintings, canvas paintings, wall paintings, sketches, portraits, wall artists, digital illustrations, set designs, murals, and sculptures, among others. Our expertise also extends to wedding shoots, video editing, photography, and videography, making us a one-stop-shop for all your creative needs.
One of our specialties is creative interior wall hand painting designs that add character and style to any space. Our team creates beautiful fractal displays that fade into beautiful arts, adding a touch of elegance and sophistication to your walls. Our designs are perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, specific areas, galleries, porches, and even kids' rooms. We work closely with our clients to understand their requirements and offer personalized solutions that suit their preferences and budget.
In addition to our personalized range of services, we also offer business solutions that cater to the needs of commercial and corporate clients. Our team works closely with businesses and organizations to create unique and eye-catching designs that reflect their brand identity and values. We have worked with several renowned brands and companies, delivering outstanding results that have helped them stand out in their respective industries.
In conclusion, Kala Bazaar is a one-stop-shop for all your creative needs in Bhopal.

Description:
Dunlevy Family Band Studios (formerly "Language of the Soul" Academy of Music) was Wyoming's largest and longest running dedicated Music Lesson and Entertainment Studio.  We took our first student in January of 2008, opened our first store front as "Language of the Soul" in May of 2010 and officially closed our doors as DFB Studios in December of 2022.

We taught Private and Group Guitar, Bass Guitar, Ukulele Piano, Vocal, Drums, Banjo, Mandolin, Songwriting, Career Coaching, Band Coaching and Music Production.

Name: Escola Baila Brasil
Description: At Baila Brasil, we believe that dance goes far beyond technique. It is a language that awakens consciousness, strengthens the body, heals emotions and brings people closer to themselves — and to God. Our difference lies in combining technical excellence, body awareness and human development in one place. Headquartered in Curitiba and with a structure designed to accommodate students of all levels and ages, we offer ballroom dancing classes (with a special focus on tango), weight loss programs with dance and projects aimed at seniors, couples and teacher training. All with a personalized approach and our own methodology that respects the time and body of each student. Here, dance is treated as a tool for physical, emotional and spiritual transformation. Our programs do not seek to simply teach steps — we seek to awaken purpose, increase self-esteem, generate comprehensive health and restore the lightness of life through movement. Our CEO and founder, Fabrício Alves, has been working with ballroom dancing for over 20 years. He has a degree in Physical Education (ULBRA), a postgraduate degree in Dance (UFRGS) and has several qualifications in high-impact training, hypnotherapy and digital marketing. He comes from a circus family and carries in his DNA a passion for art, education and the mission of transforming lives. Baila Brasil is more than a dance school. It is a space for healing, connection and growth. It is where you dance with your body… and with your soul.

Name: ABUKO POTTERY CENTER
Description: The Abuko Pottery Center is a community-based initiative in Banjul, Gambia, Africa, where skilled ceramics artists teach and train people in the village to use clay. The center operates without access to electricity, and all pots are thrown on a kick wheel, often with teams of people taking turns. Despite the lack of a kiln or modern materials, the artists at the Abuko Pottery Center create beautiful and unique pieces of pottery using their ingenuity and traditional methods. The center provides a wonderful place for the community to learn and create, and people are happy to have access to such amazing instructors.

Name: How to Draw Faces With JR
Description: JR is a seasoned visual artist and the author behind a series of popular drawing ebooks on Amazon Kindle, aimed at helping beginners and experienced artists alike master the art of drawing. With a passion for teaching accessible techniques, JR breaks down complex drawing concepts into easy-to-follow steps that empower readers to bring their creative visions to life. As the creator of Learning How To Draw, JR provides valuable resources for aspiring artists looking to hone their skills. Visit JR’s website, seethinkdraw.org, to explore tips, tutorials, and updates on the latest drawing guides.

Name: TÓRCULOS RIBES, S.L.
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar, cumpliendo grandes sueños  Nacimos en 1972 y seguimos en el mercado, fabricando lo que mejor sabemos hacer: tórculos calcográficos.

Nuestros tórculos están construidos de forma artesanal, nos sentimos muy orgullosos de poder decir que son un referente en el mundo del grabado y de garantizar su durabilidad, nuestros primeros tórculos siguen al pie del cañón después de más de 45 años de servicio.

Todas nuestras prensas son auténticas joyas de artesanía, donde el artista encontrará en ellas una herramienta para potenciar sus obras de arte. 

Que sentido tendría elaborar con tanto cariño y detenimiento una obra si al estamparla no se reflejara esa esencia de tu trabajo? 

Nuestros tórculos son parte esencial del proceso de grabado, son el colofón final a esa espera maravillosa después de horas y horas de trabajo.

Desde aquí queremos dar las gracias a cada uno de nuestros clientes, por aquel momento que confiaron en nosotros y continuar confiando después de tantos años.

Quizás en este momento estés pensando en la adquisición de un tórculo, en la inversión que supone ese paso en tu trabajo, no dudes en contactarnos.

Email : belen@torculosribes.es 
Móvil : +34 628 842 281

Name: LaRuedaTaller
Description:
Laboratorio Creativo - Espacio de libre pensamiento.
Diseño/amos talleres, eventos y actividades en torno al quehacer cerámico y artístico en general. 
Mi formación y experiencia en diversas áreas de las artes tales como la alfarería, diseño, museología y audiovisual me ha brindado una amplia gama de escenarios de trabajo donde pongo en juego permanentemente el pensamiento y lógicas de trabajo creativos. 
Potenciando las posibilidades e intereses de cada persona o sector interesados en la exploración artística, generamos espacios de investigación y coprocesos creativos desde la teoría, la experiencia y los aportes de cada parte. 
El dispositivo taller es la propuesta más utilizada para las dinámicas en nuestro espacio o donde las quieran llevar, LaRueda, gira!

Name: Cornerstone Music Studios
Description:
At Cornerstone Music Studios, we believe that every person is born a musician, and our mission is to nurture that potential in a welcoming and inspiring environment. Located in Laramie, WY, we offer high-quality private and group lessons for musicians of all ages and skill levels.

Our experienced instructors currently specialize in violin, viola, and piano, with plans to expand our offerings by welcoming additional teachers in other instruments. Whether you're a beginner looking to explore music for the first time or an advanced musician refining your technique, our personalized approach ensures that each student receives the guidance and support they need to thrive.

Join our community of passionate musicians and discover the joy of making music! If you're a dedicated music educator interested in joining our team, we'd love to connect.

 Based in Laramie, WY
 Private & Group Lessons | All Ages & Levels
 Contact us to learn more!

Name: RSM Gallery
Description:
RSM Art Gallery is a vibrant collective of 3 passionate artists dedicated to bringing their unique vision to the world through art.  Together, they form a dynamic team committed to creating a colorful and inspiring world through their artistic endeavors. The gallery's name, RSM, is an acronym derived from the first letters of the founders' names:
Reham Kamal
Shaymaa Mohamed
Marwa Adel.
* Our Mission *
At RSM Art Gallery, our mission is to infuse the world with color and creativity. We believe that art has the power to transcend boundaries, inspire change, and connect people from all walks of life. Through our collective work, we aim to deliver a message of hope, beauty, and unity.


* Why RSM Art Gallery? *
- Unique Artistic Perspectives: Each artist brings their own unique perspective and style, resulting in a diverse and captivating collection of artworks.
- Collaborative Spirit: Our collaboration allows us to explore new artistic horizons and create works that reflect our shared vision.
- Community Engagement: We are committed to fostering a vibrant art

Name: Cécirka
Description:
Cecirka : Entreprise d'Illustration et d'Aquarelle

Mission : Cecirka se consacre à la création et à la promotion d'illustrations et d'œuvres d'art en aquarelle, tout en offrant des produits de papeterie uniques et des ateliers créatifs pour les débutants.

Produits et Services
Papeterie : Une collection unique comprenant des carnets, cartes de vœux, affiches et blocs-notes, ornés d'illustrations et d'aquarelles originales.

Aquarelles Originales : Vente d'œuvres d'art en aquarelle, disponibles pour les amateurs et les collectionneurs.

Commandes Personnalisées : Création de faire-part, logos et autres projets de design sur mesure.

Ateliers d'Aquarelle pour Débutants : Cours pour apprendre les techniques de base et développer ses compétences artistiques.


Boutique en Ligne : Vente d'œuvres originales, produits de papeterie et commandes personnalisées

Whether you’re looking to master vibrant dance forms like Bollywood, Hip Hop, Kathak, Semi-Classical, or Latin styles, AAS Studio is the perfect place to nurture your artistic passions.

Beyond regular classes, AAS Studio organizes unique workshops in festive arts, baking, hairstyling, and social dance events, offering something exciting for everyone. Art Temple
Description:
Art Temple is a creative studio and gallery founded and run by contemporary painter Olga Hilgers, also known as @art.priestess on Instagram. Based in Berlin, Olga brings a transcultural perspective to her practice and curatorial vision.

Located in Berlin, Art Temple is more than just a studio or exhibition venue. It’s a sacred space for creative exploration. The mission of Art Temple is to inspire both artists and audiences to engage deeply with contemporary art, pushing the boundaries of traditional formats and exhibition practices. Through immersive experiences and a strong sense of community, Art Temple invites people to rediscover the transformative power of art in all its forms.

Name: Studio Caruso Detroit
Description: I am a Detroit based artist and Art Consultant.  My work spans many mediums but my primary focus has been abstract encaustic and oil painting as well as mixed medium sculpture. I have 20 years of teaching experience working with artists from Pre-K to senior citizens. I currently share my love of art while teaching secondary students, college students, senior adults and adults with disabilities and other challenges. I believe that all forms of art are a response to our existence and are best expressed through exploration, play and curiosity. As a Whole Life Healing Coach, I use art as a means to help others to explore, express and expand. To learn more about coaching options offered visit SatoriShift.

Name: Collective 65
Description: Collective 65 is Toronto’s premier photography artist incubator for Spanish-speaking seniors—welcoming, community-rooted, and serious about craft. The program pairs accessible, Spanish-language instruction with professional mentorship, critique, and production support, guiding participants from fundamentals to fully curated exhibitions. Its incubator model—learn, make, refine, showcase—builds portfolios and public voice, while honoring elders’ stories and cultural context. Through consistent showcases and partnerships across the city, Collective 65 has earned a reputation for culturally responsive, high-standards arts education. The result is authority with heart: artists who are seen, heard, and confidently shaping Toronto’s visual culture.

Name: Sound Before Sight Studios
Description: We believe that music is best learned the way we learn language as a child—by listening, allowing our brains to connect the dots, and developing skills through repetition and interaction. We believe fulfillment in music-making is best found in 1) Understanding what we are hearing and 2) Being able to reproduce that sound. Our primary goal is to teach students to “hear” the melody, harmony, structure, and feel of music in such a way as to be able to reproduce, arrange, and build on what they hear. We do this through innovative curriculum, excellence in instruction, and opportunities to jam, record, and produce music in collaboration with others.

Description: Fretboard Foundation is the fastest way to learn the most fulfilling kinds of guitar playing: improvisation, soloing, jamming with others, chord melody, and playing by ear. It provides self-paced online courses, live workshops, private lessons, books, and videos.

3D printing pen is the latest trend in creating amazing projects and bringing ideas into real structure. While regular 3D printers require advanced knowledge of computer-aided design, 3D printing pens allow anyone to be creative.

Description: La Asociación Cultural Yen San Cei (fundada por Jaime Sánchez Molina) nace para democratizar el aprendizaje del cómic y la ilustración. Ofrecemos cursos accesibles, feedback profesional y un espacio para la comunidad artística que busca convertir la pasión en oficio.

Name: Serey Art & Science
Description:
En la Academia Serey Art & Science, transformamos la pasión artística en carreras exitosas y sostenibles. Inspirados por la innovación y el espíritu del Renacimiento del siglo XXI, nuestro programa Innovarte fusiona habilidades artísticas con estrategias de marketing digital y desarrollo de marca personal.

 Enfoque Innovador:

Arte como Inversión: Enseñamos a convertir la creatividad en una inversión valiosa y enseñamos a nuestros estudiantes a ver sus obras como un patrimonio que están construyendo.

Crecimiento de Marca Personal: Potenciamos la marca personal de cada artista, ampliando su impacto y red profesional.

Habilidades en Marketing Digital: Desarrollamos habilidades específicas para artistas en marketing online y creación de contenido viral.

 Programas:

Anti-cursos de Dibujo de Retrato y Anatomía Artística: Nos hemos enfocado en la creación de Programas centrados en el estudiante, entregando una aplicación práctica y seguimiento personalizado, algo distinto a los cursos que actualmente existe en línea.

Comunidad Estratégica: Espacio colaborativo para conectar, compartir y crecer juntos, enfocados en convertir la pasión artística en una fuente de ingresos.

Estrategias de Marketing Personalizadas para artistas: Enfoque dual con contenido listo para usar y guías para la creación de contenido único.

 Impacto y Alcance:
Formamos artistas técnicamente competentes y líderes en su campo, capaces de comunicar su arte de manera efectiva y establecerse como referentes.

 Excelencia en la Enseñanza:
Comprometidos con la excelencia, aseguramos que nuestros estudiantes adquieran habilidades técnicas y las herramientas necesarias para transformar su pasión en una profesión próspera y reconocida.

Trabajamos por resultados y nuestra misión es que ya no existan personas que digan que del arte no se puede vivir.

Name: Renuka Anand Art Academy
Description: Discover the world of creativity at Renuka Anand Art Academy, your premier online fine arts destination. Our courses cater to all skill levels, offering a comprehensive learning experience from the comfort of your own space. Our experienced instructors are dedicated to guiding you on your artistic journey, exploring various mediums and styles. Unlock your potential, hone your skills, and find joy in creating masterpieces with us. Whether a hobbyist or aspiring professional, let Renuka Anand Art Academy inspire and support your artistic endeavors

Name: Young Artists' Club 青少年画家俱乐部
Description:
Young Artists' Club was founded on 16 August 1986 by Mr Yap Tay Soon. It started as a community art class with a small group of students when Mr Yap saw the need for a framework to sustain and spark interest in art among youths. 30 years later, the members have grown from a humble group of 16 to thousands.

"We are going to paint our dreams, and beautify the nation" 

Our passion and dedication towards our craft are what keeps us going. The members of the Young Artists' Club believe in not just honing their individual skills, but in giving back to the community. Many have continued to pursue their passion in related fields of Architecture, Design, and Art Education, inspiring the next generation.

Name: Japan Cupcake Academy 日本カップケーキ協会
Description:
After graduating from university in New York, I moved to Greenwich Village and stumbled across Magnolia Bakery. It was so cute that I just had to be a part of it.

Soon after I started working there I was making cakes for celebrities such as Tom Cruise, Meryl Streep and Ethan Hawke to name but a few. I was also lucky enough to make the cupcakes that were used in a scene of "Sex And The City", in which Sarah Jessica Parker bit into a cupcake in front of the bakery. This helped to kickstart the cupcake craze that swept through the world... 

After a while I wanted to do something bigger - I moved back to Japan where I grew up. While I was there I established the Japan Cupcake Academy in Tokyo to teach Japanese people how to make real New York cupcakes.

Follow us to stay updated on our student achievements, upcoming performances, and our journey in fostering a vibrant community of art and culture.

Name: Hedgeapple Arts
Description:
At Hedgeapple Arts, we believe in the power of creativity to build community, shape culture, and inspire lifelong learning. Founded by artist and educator Katie Bretzlaff, our studio is a welcoming space where artists of all levels can explore, develop new skills, and reconnect with their creative selves. Through hands-on classes, workshops, and community events, we foster artistic expression as a means of self-discovery, mindfulness, and well-being.

Whether you’re a beginner looking to try something new or an experienced artist seeking inspiration, Hedgeapple Arts offers a space to create, connect, and cultivate both art and inner balance. Located in Kankakee, we are dedicated to expanding arts opportunities and supporting holistic wellness through creativity.

Join us in making art, making connections, and making an impact - one creative experience at a time.

Name: Putnam Music Center
Description:
Educating. Guiding. Inspiring.

Putnam Music Center is an ideal Music School for students to build a solid foundation while having fun with music education. No matter which instrument or program you pick, you’re guaranteed a quality experience from our passionate instructors. Our experienced staff and professional music teachers, will guide you on your artistic journey. Putnam Music Center offers both private and group lessons to all instruments.   Whether you are purchasing an instrument, in need of sheet music or accessories, instrument rentals and repairs, we have you covered.  We also are pleased to introduce our new Art Program featuring classes from Fine Arts Studio.  Whether you’re enrolled or thinking of starting a new musical chapter in your life please feel free to browse our store and ask any questions you would like. Professional service, wonderful customer care, and staff that are always eager to help, no matter what your musical need is!

Name: Pinot's Palette Stamford
Description:
For more than 10 years, Pinot's Palette has been a fixture in Stamford's vibrant Harbor Point Community. Our mission is to bring art to Fairfield County in a lively and fun atmosphere. Come to our studio on your own or with friends/colleagues to create your own masterpiece, regardless of prior art experience. Enjoy craft beer, wine and specialty mocktails or cocktails at our full bar. We also offer in-studio, mobile, and virtual private events.

The Stamford studio is a woman-owned, locally operated small business. Our executive team leverages extensive corporate experience to help businesses create unique, high-impact team building events anywhere in the Tristate region.

Many of our artists have been trained at some of the best art schools in the country - all of them know how to have a good time! They guide each guest through the creation of a one-of-a-kind work of art, even if they have never held a paint brush! 

Come see what we're all about!

The FCCA offers a Diploma in six disciplines: Cinematography, Directing, Editing, Producing, Photography and Animation. Graduates finish with a Certificate of Completion. * Over the course of six months, Fellows team with classmates to write, produce, design, direct, shoot and edit 1 to 5 films.

It's a method of drawing structured patterns that not only produces stunning artwork but also promotes relaxation and focus. Whether you're a seasoned Zentangle enthusiast or a curious beginner, Tangled Trails is a place to grow and learn. Name: Mount Studio
Description:
Mount Studio is an artist-led space in Colombo, Sri Lanka, dedicated to fostering creativity, experimentation, and dialogue across photography, visual arts, and archive practices. Founded by multidisciplinary artist Lojithan Ram, the studio serves as both a workspace and a hub for collaboration, supporting emerging and established artists in their creative journeys.

Alongside exhibitions, workshops, and community projects, Mount Studio runs Sri Lanka’s only analogue film developing darkroom – offering black & white and color film developing, high-resolution scanning, and vintage printmaking workshops.

We believe in cultivating a culture of artistic exchange while bridging contemporary practice with traditional techniques. From archiving projects to experimental image-making, Mount Studio nurtures innovation, dialogue, and critical engagement in the arts.

Name: Međunarodno takmičenje solo pevača "Lazar Jovanović"
Description: The international competition of solo singers "Lazar Jovanović" is an important musical and educational manifestation and one of the most important opera competitions in this part of Europe! The competition is intended for young artists ready to start their professional career and to measure their knowledge, artistic qualities and show their talent in front of an authoritative international jury. It was founded in 2003 in honor of the famous Yugoslav tenor Lazar Jovanović and until 2015 was held as part of the activities of the "Stanković" Music School. Then, due to the extraordinary increase in importance and significance, the competition had to look for a new host, so since 2016 it has been held under the auspices of the Cultural Element, which introduces a number of organizational and artistic novelties and moves the competition from the halls of music schools to its current home. Endowment of Ilija M. Kolarc. Every year, the competition welcomes over a hundred participants from over ten countries. Until now, some of the biggest names of the domestic and international music scene and pedagogy have appeared in the jury of the competition, and the winners of the competition have confirmed themselves as excellent musicians over the past years, conquering the world's concert podiums and opera stages.

Name: Nilay Bale Okulu
Description:
1998 yılında, Bakırköy ilçesinde eğitime başlamış olan kurumumuz; o günden bugüne samimi ve amatör ruhunu kaybetmeden, aynı zamanda sanatsal ve akademik açıdan gelişerek eğitim anlayışını oluşturmuştur.
     
Konservatuar bale bölümü mezunu, pedagojik formasyonu olan, çocuklara sevgi ve anlayışla yaklaşan deneyimli öğretmenlerimizle akademik eğitim sürecinin yanı sıra, sanat bilinci olan, müziksel ve ritmik duyumu gelişmiş çağdaş bireyler yetiştirmeyi hedeflemekteyiz.
       
Eğitimimiz, 3,5 yaş grubu çocuklarımız için baleye hazırlık olan yuva sınıfı ile başlamaktadır. 7 yaş ve üzeri için ise akademik süreç başlamış olup, her eğitim yılı sonunda sınıf geçme sınavı uygulanmakta, geçmişte bale eğitimi almış öğrenciler de seviye tespit sınavıyla ara sınıflara yerleştirilmektedirler. Eğitim süresi sonunda başarılı öğrencilere Milli Eğitim Bakanlığı’ndan tasdikli diploma verilmektedir. Diploma almaya hak kazanmış öğrenciler, okullarda ”Usta Öğretici“ olarak bale eğitmenliği yapabilmektedir. Ayrıca mezunlarımızın bazıları ise tanınmış dans topluluklarında halen eğitmen ve dansçı olarak profesyonel çalışmalarını devam ettirmektedir. 
Nilay Bale Kursu, Sofya Ulusal Müzik Akademisi Bale Sanatları Bölümü'nün iş birliğiyle; uluslararası kabul gören profesyonel bale sistemi “Vaganova Metodu” ile bale eğitimi de vermektedir.
Kurumumuzun vizyonu; birey toplum ilişkisi içinde, sanatla iç içe bir nesil oluşturmak ve bununla beraber akademik süreci de gerçekleştirmektir.

Name: Art Histories, its Mysteries and Other Victories
Description: Art Histories, its Mysteries and Other Victories is a digital anthology that unearths overlooked historical facts, forgotten narratives and the enduring mysteries of lost or hidden artworks alongside the triumphant stories of marginalised artists, those Othered by the historical canon, who have defied subjugation, gender dichotomies and rigid social boundaries to claim recognition as artists in their own right. At its core, AHiMaOV challenges the Western-centric and exclusionary lens of art history, revealing what the canon has tried to erase and what it would prefer you never knew.

Name: Carimic Ceramics
Description:
Próximamente, un espacio donde la cerámica se convierte en mucho más que arte: una experiencia para desconectar del ruido cotidiano y reconectar contigo mismo.

En Carimic Ceramics, el barro es el punto de partida para un viaje terapéutico y creativo. Aquí, cada pieza no solo cuenta una historia, sino que también es el resultado de un proceso de exploración personal y tranquilidad mental.

Este proyecto nace de la convicción de que la creatividad puede ser un refugio. A través de talleres y experiencias en torno a la cerámica, mi objetivo es ofrecer un espacio seguro y acogedor donde puedas expresarte, relajarte y encontrar un equilibrio entre cuerpo, mente y espíritu.

Si buscas una manera diferente de cuidar de ti, de explorar tu lado creativo y de conectar con el momento presente, te invito a ser parte de esta aventura.

Sigue este espacio para descubrir más sobre el lanzamiento y lo que Carimic Ceramics puede aportar a tu bienestar!

Master your skills | Polish your portfolio | Become industry-ready | Meet your mentors | Stay relevant | Start any time – From zero to hero 

Fiecare persoană are un talent unic care merită descoperit, cultivat și pus în valoare. Vrem să facem arta accesibilă prin cursuri și workshopuri creative, dedicate atât pasionaților de artă, cât și începătorilor.

 Ce ne face diferiți?
*O echipă talentată de artiști și mentori dedicați, cu o vastă experiență în domeniul artelor plastice.
* Metode moderne de predare, îmbinate cu tehnici tradiționale, pentru o experiență de învățare completă.
* Programe personalizate care ajută cursanții să-și descopere stilul unic și să-și dezvolte creativitatea.

 Ce oferim?

* Cursuri de artă: modelaj, desen, pictură și multe altele.
* Workshopuri pentru companii: activități de team-building care stimulează creativitatea și dezvoltarea personală.
* Mentorat personalizat: feedback direct și ghidare pas cu pas din partea echipei noastre.

 De ce să alegi Cubul?
Cubul nu este doar o academie de artă, ci o comunitate de oameni pasionați, care cred că arta poate schimba vieți. Fie că visezi să devii artist, vrei să descoperi o nouă pasiune sau cauți o experiență creativă pentru echipa ta, te așteptăm cu brațele deschise!

Name: Abyssinia Fine Arts & Vocational Training Center
Description:
Abyssinia Fine Arts & Vocational Training Center is a creative school in Addis Ababa that provides professional training in the arts, music, dance, and performance. We are dedicated to helping people explore their creativity, build confidence, and develop their own artistic voice in a supportive and open environment.

Our programs cover a wide range of disciplines. In the visual arts, we teach painting, drawing, sculpture, and epoxy techniques. In music, students learn guitar, keyboard, and Ethiopian traditional instruments such as the kirar and mesenqo. We also offer training in traditional and modern dance, modeling, vocal performance, theater, and acting for film.

We believe that every person has creativity within them, and our role is to help bring it out. Our teaching combines practical skills with personal exploration, giving students the tools to express themselves while staying connected to Ethiopia’s rich cultural traditions. At the same time, we encourage innovation and new ways of thinking, creating a space where tradition and modern creativity work together.

Through classes, workshops, and community showcases, Abyssinia Fine Arts gives students the opportunity to learn, grow, and share their talents. Our vision is to be a leading center for creative education in Ethiopia and to inspire a new generation of artists who are confident, authentic, and free to express themselves.

But we're more than just a tutoring company; we're a vibrant community of over 1000 music enthusiasts who come together to share our love for music through events, workshops, and performances. Our commitment to fostering a supportive and inclusive environment sets us apart, ensuring that every member of our community feels empowered to explore their musical talents.

Name: VPS Kalari
Description:
VPS Kalari, located in Ponnani, Kerala, has been a distinguished institution for mastering Kalaripayattu, an ancient Indian martial art. Led by a 4th-generation Gurukkal, our institution is renowned for its exceptional attributes and commitment to both Kalaripayattu and its practitioners.
Over 25 years, VPS Kalari has gained national and international recognition by participating in prestigious events like the National Games, Commonwealth Games, G20, and Khelo India, establishing itself as a pioneer in the field.
Beyond traditional practices, we integrate Kalari treatments, focusing on both the art and healing intricacies. We foster an environment of wisdom-sharing, allowing students to delve deeper into this ancient art form.
VPS Kalari has revolutionized the presentation of Kalaripayattu theatrically, setting URF Asian and World Records with groundbreaking productions like "Moksha." Our holistic approach aims to preserve the rich heritage of Kalari and empower individuals to embrace a transformative journey towards holistic well-being.

Shyju Gurukkal - A Profile
Shyju Gurukkal, a 4th-generation Kalaripayattu practitioner, brings lifelong dedication to this traditional martial art. With international recognition for his exceptional teaching abilities and significant contributions to the art form, he introduced the innovative concept of theatrically presenting Kalaripayattu, captivating audiences worldwide.

Legacy and Contribution
With expertise in Kalaripayattu and Ayurveda Marma Kalari Chikitsa, Shyju Gurukkal has excelled in various international events, earning recognition as a global ambassador for Kalaripayattu. His passion enriches not only his life but also imparts invaluable knowledge among students worldwide, preserving the legacy of this extraordinary tradition.

Description:
My name is Rose Gallo, and I am the owner and creator of Art Designs by Rose. I hold a teaching certificate in Visual Arts and have dedicated many years to creating original artwork through drawing, watercolor, and acrylic painting.

My collection includes a wide range of subjects, including animals, portraits, homes, still life, landscapes, abstract compositions, and mixed media pieces. Various sizes of prints are available to suit different spaces and preferences. Seasonal and Christmas-themed artwork is also available.

Beyond painting, I also enjoy hand-knitting and crafting. My handmade items include whimsical creations such as bunnies and baby chicks, as well as unique wall art décor designed especially for children’s rooms or play areas.

Art Designs by Rose also features a collection of hand-painted and decorated shells, adding a coastal or natural touch to any home décor. I particularly enjoy drawing and painting dogs and cats. Commissions are welcome! I take great pride in creating personalized artwork that reflects each client’s vision.

I offer acrylic art classes, designed to inspire creativity and enhance your artistic skills. In addition, I also host specialized workshops in:
Pizza Making
Bread Making
Homemade Pasta from Scratch
Authentic Tomato Sauce Preparation

Each class is crafted to provide hands-on experience and practical knowledge in a fun, engaging environment.

You're invited to explore my shop, Crafted Canadian, where you'll find my latest art and design pieces: https://craftedcanadian.ca/store/art-designs-by-rose.

Connect with me on social media for updates, behind-the-scenes content, and more:

Thank you for your support!

Name: Sup'Lyrique
Description: Cette association à but non lucratif a pour objet la création et le développement d’une école de musique, spécialisée dans l’art lyrique, autour de l’opéra, et plus généralement de l’art du chant, incluant la danse, offrant des cours et des activités culturelles. L’école supérieure va également proposer des cours a de jeunes chanteurs visant un parcours professionnalisant. L'association projette également de développer des cours de soutien scolaire s’appuyant sur des pédagogies d’apprentissage de la musique. Dans le cadre de l’école, l’association proposera des événements culturels et artistiques, avec le soutien de la Ville de Saint-Ambroix et de la Communauté de Communes Cèze Cévennes, ainsi qu’avec le soutien financier de l'État, de la région, du département, et de mécénat. L’association souhaite ainsi dynamiser l'activité musicale dans cette région éloignée des métropoles artistiques établies et reconnues des régions Occitanie et Provence. La philosophie de l’école est de promouvoir la voix et la musique acoustique, sans amplification, pour offrir au spectateur une relation brute au son pur et à l'émotion qu'il porte.

Name: The Music Studio of Virginia Beach
Description:
Let The Music Studio in Virginia Beach show you the secret to making amazing progress, sticking with it, and becoming great at playing piano! Our renowned program is tailored to deliver exceptional music education, whether you're just starting out or an experienced musician aiming to enhance your abilities.

Located in the heart of Virginia Beach near the Hilltop area, our music school offers extended lessons that place a strong emphasis on sight-reading. This approach allows students of all proficiency levels to make rapid progress and establish a solid foundation in music education. We have devised a unique formula for student success by reimagining the traditional 30-minute private lesson structure, addressing its limitations, and implementing a redesigned curriculum.

Our primary focus is on cultivating fundamental skills, including sight-reading, performance techniques, and mastering the basics. We believe that playing music at home should be an enjoyable experience, never a tedious chore. Our students thrive as they swiftly advance through their lesson books, often progressing at twice the rate of those in traditional private instruction. This remarkable progress is made possible through our innovative format, as well as the expert guidance and unwavering support provided by our experienced teachers.

When you're ready to elevate your musical skills to new heights, entrust your journey to our program for student success. Discover firsthand the difference our top-notch music lessons in Virginia Beach can make in your musical growth and development.

The platform provides tools and resources tailored to enhance artistic expression and professional growth, ensuring a nurturing and innovative environment for all.

Description: L'escola d'Art de Manresa és un centre públic de titularitat municipal, amb més de 120 anys d'història i tradició a la ciutat, que ofereix ensenyaments reglats d'Il·lustració, Disseny Gràfic i Serigrafia. També ofereix un ampli ventall de taller monogràfics oberts a tothom.

Name: Mov Arte
Description:
Sobre
Somos uma plataforma de diversidade, arte e cultura que serve para artistas de diversas áreas se conectarem, se encontrarem, se ajudarem, promoverem e venderem a sua arte. Além disso, aqui será possível gravar e publicar conteúdos relacionados a essa área, como dicas para outros artistas, apoio de profissionais e uma parte onde você pode compartilhar suas experiências, certificados e trabalhos que podem ajudar de alguma forma numa futura contratação. 


Movarte: onde a arte ganha vida

Name: Wyoming Fine Arts Center
Description: As a Cincinnati nonprofit supported by ArtsWave, we seek to educate, create experiences, and nurture appreciation in music, art, and dance across all ages, races, abilities and backgrounds.

Name: GRANARY ART CENTER
Description:
GRANARY ART CENTER is an art courses for all ages and workshop tutor who bases in Greenlake City, Tangerang and has  branch in Jakarta. We teaching traditional art (drawing/oil pastel/painting), digital art (ibis paint/procreate/photoshop), and craft (relief painting, sclupture figure,etc).  We can help you to build great portofolio for techical drawing (architecture/ design interior). 
We often held art exhibition for our students and collaborate event  with local artist.

Name: FACE School Foundation
Description: The guiding mission at the Face School Foundation is to support, maintain, and enrich the FACE School Fine Arts program, and a wide range of activities aimed at improving the quality of life of the students.

Name: Westminster Arts Academy
Description: Westminster Arts Academy is a leading fine arts learning center located in Orange County, California. As the original and flagship location of the Learn The Arts! brand, the Academy offers professional coaching in music, dance, and visual art in a welcoming and supportive environment. The organization’s mission is to make arts education accessible to everyone by creating a fun, non-intimidating learning experience. Through innovative coaching methods and the use of modern technology, students of all ages are encouraged to grow both artistically and personally while developing a lifelong love for learning and the journey itself.

Name: Open Art Academy
Description:
В Академії проводяться онлайн курси, марафони, челенжі, майстер класи з малювання, живопису, народного декоративного мистецтва, ліпки для дітей та дорослих. З будь-якої точки світу, в комфортному для вас місці, в затишній обстановці, наповненою творчою та доброзичливою атмосферою, під керівництвом досвідчених художників-викладачів, народних майстрів ви доторкнетеся до світу образотворчого мистецтва та зможете розкрити свій творчий потенціал.

Яскраві фарби, пензлі та полотно допоможуть Вам відволіктися від проблем і турбот, вдихнуть у вас нову енергію і зроблять ваше життя яскравим і цікавим.

Наші спеціалізовані курси малювання та ліпки для дорослих та дітей будуть корисні не тільки тим, у кого вже є досвід самостійної творчості, а й тим, хто хоче почати своє навчання з самих основ. Є курси для підвищення кваліфікації професійних художників. Програма навчання включає в себе всі послідовні етапи мистецької освіти і заснована на індивідуальному підході до кожного учня.

Name: Samaak Institute (for Inclusion & Applied Literature)
Description:
**We are here to Create in more Accessible Ways**
Welcome to Samaak Institution, a leading center for Persian Language and Literature with a focus on practical application. Co-founded and directed by renowned scholars, Samaak combines academic excellence with real-world relevance.

What We Do:

1. Educational and Promotional Activities: We provide educational programs and activities that highlight the importance of Persian Language and Literature, showing how they can be part of daily life.

2. Interdisciplinary Research: We conduct research that combines literature with other fields to address social issues. This includes looking at how Persian literature influences social media and the film industry.

3. Psychological Empowerment Through Literature: We use literature to support psychological growth and help individuals, especially children and young adults, including those with special needs, develop important skills.

4. Literary Training for Communication Skills: Our programs also focus on improving communication and thinking skills through literature, using stories and poems to foster effective communication.

5. Our Unique Approach (Combining Accessibility with Cultural/Literary Work): With expert leadership, Samaak explores new ways to apply literature in practical contexts. We promote a systematic approach to literature, encouraging diverse interpretations and helping people connect deeply with literary works. Our goal is to enrich both personal and professional lives through meaningful engagement with texts.

Name: SARAH GILES COLLECTION CARE
Description:
Sarah Giles Collection Care works with art, antiques and objects of all types, offering a personal and trusted approach to advise on issues such as preventive conservation, conservation and restoration.

Working with a large network of industry specialists who consistently adhere to conservation best practice, we ensure that each job is approached with sensitivity and work is completed to the highest of standards, within an agreed timescale and at a competitive price.

Sarah Giles Collection Care was founded following a 23-year career at London-based art restoration service Plowden & Smith, where Sarah worked with specialist conservators and restorers, gaining an extensive general knowledge of collection care.

Today we work with clients around the globe to help preserve collections for the long term, thus protecting their value and safeguarding pieces for future generations.

Sarah has a Joint Honours Degree in Art History & English and a Post-Graduate Qualification in Fine Art Valuation. Sarah is on the Committee for FAIR – The Fine Art Insurance Reception.

Name: Tinto de Verano
Description:
Tinto de Veranos es una Casa Cultural ubicada en Medellín, en el barrio Laureles.

Apoyamos artistas y marcas locales (y nacionales), con el único fin de darle valor a nuestro arte y nuestra cultura. 

En tu nueva casa encuentra cursos, charlas, música en vivo, teatro, eventos, galería, tienda, librería, café local y gastro-bar para pasar el rato. 

Tenemos dos ambientes para disfrutar solo o en compañía.

Name: NBP Nuestra Belleza Peruana
Description:
Certamen "Nuestra Belleza Peruana"

Tenemos como finalidad que nuestras candidatas sean formadas de manera profesional con maestros nacionales e internacionales para que puedan concursar con un buen desempeño.

Agencia de Modelos NBP

Dedicada a la selección, preparación y representación de modelos publicitarios (Femeninos y Masculinos) trabajando para las mejores agencias y empresas como modelos o anfitrionas.

Escuela de Modelos NBP

Somos un grupo humano con muchas ganas de trabajar en pro de las reinas peruanas; estamos conformados por
ex reinas, reinas de belleza, profesores con muchos años de experiencia en el rubro de la enseñanza.

Nuestro principal objetivo es formar candidatas y mujeres de éxito e inspiración de muchas niñas y jovencitas que admirarán su trabajo. Tenemos por misión preparar mujeres de éxito que sepan llevar su belleza de la mano con humildad y arduo trabajo en los diferentes campos de sus vidas.

Name: Souha's Gallery
Description:
At 𝗦𝗼𝘂𝗵𝗮’𝘀 𝗚𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗿𝘆, we believe that art is more than just a visual experience—it’s an 𝗲𝗺𝗼𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗮 𝗺𝗲𝗺𝗼𝗿𝘆, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗮 𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆

Founded by 𝗦𝗼𝘂𝗵𝗮, 𝗮 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝘁 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝟮,𝟬𝟬𝟬 𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱, the gallery specializes in graphite and charcoal portraits, turning imagination into masterpieces. Starting in 𝗔𝗹𝗴𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗮 and now based in 𝗧𝘂𝗿𝗸𝗲𝘆, Souha’s Gallery has reached collectors and art lovers across 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲, 𝗗𝘂𝗯𝗮𝗶, 𝗣𝗼𝗿𝘁𝘂𝗴𝗮𝗹, 𝗖𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗮, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗯𝗲𝘆𝗼𝗻𝗱.

 𝗖𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺 𝗣𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗶𝘁𝘀 & 𝗔𝗿𝘁 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀
 𝗙𝗶𝗻𝗲 𝗔𝗿𝘁 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗖𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘀 & 𝗕𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗲𝘀
 𝗖𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗚𝗹𝗼𝗯𝗮𝗹 𝗕𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱𝘀 & 𝗜𝗻𝗳𝗹𝘂𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲𝗿𝘀

With partnerships including 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗖𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗮 and exclusive collaborations with 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗕𝗲𝗮𝘂𝘁𝘆 𝗦𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀 (𝟮𝟵𝗠+ 𝗳𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿𝘀), Souha’s Gallery continues to bridge art with personal expression.

 𝗟𝗼𝗼𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗮 𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗽𝗶𝗲𝗰𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗮𝗿𝘁? 𝗟𝗲𝘁’𝘀 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝘀𝗼𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘂𝗻𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝘁𝗼𝗴𝗲𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿!

 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗰𝘁 𝘂𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 & 𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀.

Name: Preston Harmony School of Music
Description: Preston Harmony School of Music is the continuation of the award winning Gray School of Music. We have been teaching North Dallas area music students for 27 years at the Preston and Forest location. We offer lessons in piano, violin, viola, ukulele, guitar, and voice. Lessons are all taught in noise reduced studios by experienced teachers who have advanced music degrees. Come have fun learning the art of music with us.

Name: Ecole de  Musique de Gif
Description: Cette association a pour but de développer l’activité musicale et le théâtre ainsi que, selon opportunités, tous les arts associés, dans la commune de Gif sur Yvette et dans toute commune avoisinante désirant participer

Name: Home & Heart: Academy & Studio
Description: Since 2010 through group classes, private coaching and guided conversations, Home & Heart has been inspiring homemakers in Lifestyle and Interior Designs - creating a life of beauty, balance, serenity and celebration.

Name: Horizon Music Studio
Description: Developing musical excellence with joy- individual music lesson and group classes in San Gabriel, CA

Name: Metronoom
Description:
Bij Metronoom leer je muziek door gewoon lekker muziek te spelen! Ervaren of niet, groot of klein: wij halen de muziek uit elk van onze leerlingen. 

Metronoom wil het initiatief nemen om in brugge een degelijk muziekopleidingscentrum uit te bouwen met een fris aanbod muzieklessen drum, bas, gitaar, zang, piano, percussie, dj en muzieksoftware met een sterk accent op de hedendaagse muziekcultuur.

Name: Sangskolen i Oslo
Description:
Sangskolen i Oslo ble opprettet sommeren 2022, og består av sangpedagogene Lisbeth-Anita Grimsø Olsen og Johanne Johnsen. Vi har lang erfaring som profesjonelle sangere og sangpedagoger, og tilbyr undervisning i de fleste sjangere. Skolen består av sangere i alle aldre med ulik erfaring og ambisjoner, fra hobbysangere til profesjonelle artister. 

I Sangskolen i Oslo har vi fokus på sceneopptreden og formidling, og elevene vil få erfaring i dette gjennom skolens egne huskonserter. Vi tilbyr i tillegg undervisning i låtskriving, gehør og teori, og holder ulike seminarer og workshops gjennom året. Vi tilbyr også seminarer, workshops, kurs og hjelp til konsert- og auditionforberedelser på forespørsel. 

Vi holder til på Øvingshotellet på Schous Plass, sentralt i Oslo. Vi har gode fasiliteter med lydanlegg, mikrofon og piano tilgjengelig.

Ta gjerne kontakt med oss dersom du lurer på noe!

Name: Churchill College Drawing Society (CCDSOC)
Description: The society supplies a selection of drawing materials and music for attendees to enjoy during an hour of life drawing. During each session, a life model will hold a variety of poses for different periods of time (ranging from 2-minute warm-ups to longer, 15-minute poses).

Name: OOVOOKOO
Description: We've renovated a building in downtown Johannesburg into a thriving hub for creatives - more coming soon!

Name: Mumbai Painting Studios
Description:
Mumbai Painting Studios by Shivangi Patel is an art company that conducts art, painting and craft workshops across Mumbai at different venues and cafes. We conduct corporate painting parties, birthday parties, bachelorate parties, baby showers, etc. We provide paint parties for corporations as an ideal engagement solution for Employee engagement, Team Building, Sales meets, Conferences, Off sites & Cultural / Festive occasions. Our paint parties not only help break the monotony of the corporate routine but relaxes the mind and catalyzes expression and communication amongst peers. We believe art has no boundaries and can be pursued by anyone at any stage of life. With COVID hitting us in 2019, we have been teaching and conducting workshops online too and have taught students worldwide. Mumbai Painting Studios is created by the intention to foster creativity, cheerfulness and positivity through art in everyday settings.

About the Founder – Shivangi Patel
Shivangi has started her art journey since she was 5 yrs old. Due to her interest and passion in art she started attending art competitions and won over 250+ awards for various international, national, state level painting competitions. The most prestigious among them was receiving an award at the hands of our former honourable President, Dr.A.P.J Abdul Kalam for an international competition and also a national awards at the hands of Actor Jeetendra Kapoor. She is a self-taught artist who has learnt and evolved over time.In the year 2018, she founded Mumbai Painting Studios which conducts art and Painting workshops across different locations in Mumbai. We teach 50+ art forms ranging from acrylic painting, oil painting, knife Painting, pencil sketching, alcohol inks, resin art and many more. We, in a short span of time have conducted workshops for corporates like Tatacliq, Wework, Twitter to name a few. MPS conducts online art workshops too.

Name: Paula Rodrigues Studio de Dança
Description:
Uma atmosfera de encantamento e magia é sentida quando você entra no Paula Rodrigues Studio de Dança. 
O Studio foi projetado com altíssimo padrão de qualidade em infraestrutura, uma excelente área de convívio e design que preza pelo bem estar e conforto. São alguns diferenciais para que seu momento com a gente seja incrível!

Name: Saraswathy Kala Kendra
Description:
Founded in 1971 by Sri. T. Narayanamurthy and Smt. Meera Narayan in Perambur, Chennai, India, Saraswathy Kala Kendra (SKK) has been a cornerstone of artistic excellence. Our journey began with just three students embracing Bharathanatyam and Carnatic Music, but it has since evolved into a revered institution.

Today, Smt. Meera Narayan’s daughters, Smt. Kiran Mayee and Smt. Yagna Prabha, carry forward the tradition as they embrace the mantle of teaching at our institution. Our journey is characterized by a deep dedication to upholding the pure essence of art, embracing its inherent authenticity and artistic integrity. At SKK, we nurture Bharathanatyam and other traditional performing arts with a holistic approach, shaping well-rounded individuals.

Name: The Academy PTY
Description:
Bienvenidos a The Academy PTY. Somos un estudio de educación alternativa con más de 12 años de experiencia. Destacamos por nuestra creatividad, confianza y enfoque en resultados. A través del poder del conocimiento, buscamos generar cambios impactantes en el entorno. Ofrecemos proyectos personalizados y orientados a un entorno moderno y tecnológico, rompiendo con los esquemas ya obsoletos de educación. Trabajamos con clientes de todas las edades y nos dedicamos a guiarlos hacia el éxito.
Visita nuestro sitio web para obtener más información y vivir esta experiencia juntos.

Name: Over the Moon Art Studios
Description:
Over the Moon Art Studios is a multidisciplinary art space located in Asbury Park, New Jersey. It offers classes, workshops, events, and studio access for artists of all ages and experience levels. The studio provides a welcoming, hands-on environment where people can learn new skills, experiment with different materials, and engage with a creative community.

Founded by artist and educator Meagan Greenberg, Over the Moon began as a way to make art more accessible and approachable outside of traditional settings. Karen Propp, a former art dealer and advertising executive, joined as partner to help expand the studio's programming and operations.

The studio offers group classes in drawing, painting, collage, printmaking, and mixed media, along with open studio sessions, after-school programs, and private events. Resident artists and members have access to shared and private studio space, and the studio frequently collaborates with local schools and community partners to provide arts education and outreach.

Over the Moon is also home to exhibitions, artist talks, and community gatherings, creating opportunities for connection and creative exchange. With an emphasis on process, play, and inclusion, the studio aims to support both emerging and established artists, as well as those simply curious to try something new.

Name: Sintonia Escola de Música
That’s Sew Creative!
Description: We teach beginner to advanced sewing classes to youth ages 8+. We work with organizations like schools, libraries, and community centers around the DFW as well as individuals and groups. Our classes are public or private! Book a private lesson or a private sewing party for any special occasion. We provide all machines and materials needed! No sewing experience needed to take and beginner class!

Name: Criança Ativa
Description:
Atuamos em escolas levando a arte e a cultura para crianças e suas famílias.
Vem ser Ativa!

Name: VivaArte School
Description: Escola online de artes tradicionais e digitais.

Name: Music Hub Academy
Description:
Music hub is an exciting music school where anyone can develop their musical skills and passions. We offer group and individual classes in voice and major musical instruments for all age groups (kids, teens and adults). Our curriculum has been designed and is based on the knowledge and our experience from Berklee College of Music (Boston, USA).

From April 2020 Music Hub became an Official Examination Partner for ABRSM (The Associated Board of the Royal Schools of Music). You can now take your weekly lessons which will lead to the ABRSM graded examinations.

We have chosen two tranquil areas of Warsaw to be our artistic centres for the classes and workshops. Visit us at Powiśle!

Name: Horang-I Kwan
Description: Instituto de Hapkido presidido pelo Grão-Mestre Gustavo Agostini.

Name: FitART NL
Description: Kunst & Cultuur projecten en programma's voor 55+ in de regio Oost Nederland. Want ... samen kunst maken geeft plezier, houdt je brein lenig, verbreedt je horizon, brengt nieuwe ontmoetingen en geeft zin in én aan je dag.

Name: PMA MUSIC ACADEMY
Description:
PMA è un’associazione che ha l’obiettivo di dare impulso alla cultura e alla creatività attraverso la musica, il canto e tutte le arti inerenti ad esse. 



La struttura vede i suoi natali grazie al Maestro Jose Mascolo, pianista, compositore, arrangiatore e direttore d’orchestra, che aveva fondato nel 1978 il Centro Teatro Attivo, poi l’Accademia di Musica Moderna da cui è nata la scuola di canto Parole & Musica. 

L'associazione infatti oltre ad essere accademia diventera' anche studio di registrazione e luogo di aggregazione artistica.

Name: Dry Canyon Community Art Center
Description: Dry Canyon Community Art Center, founded by Dry Canyon Arts Association, opens in December 2025 and provides gallery space for local artists to display and sell their work. Our mission includes providing art education to all ages, especially kids and underserved groups in Central Oregon.

Name: Kidz Kraftz!
Description:
Fashion Design ~ Sewing ~ Jewelry-Making Lessons for Children and Adults.

Our unique sewing and fashion design program encourages positive development and provides cognitive stimulation. Children who participate in our sewing classes, not only learn fun and practical sewing skills, but also improve their reading comprehension, math and analytical skills.

Name: Swedish Weaving LLC
Description: We are bringing the art of weaving to Utah County. We teach on imported Swedish looms with Swedish techniques.

Name: HARP International
Description:
H.A.R.P es una institución artistica la cual ofrece programas y cursos ONLINE, con el objetivo de fomentar y promocionar el arte en varias de sus expresiones a nivel internacional.

En nuestra institución contamos con recursos pedagógicos calificados para una formación y trayectoria artística de calidad.

De la mano de artistas con alto prestigio y nivel técnico, así como también experimentados profesores en distintos sectores, generos y areas tanto de la música como de la danza.

Name: Solomon David Music & Arts Studio
Description: Professional Music Lessons and Music Instruments

Name: Instituto Social de Ensino Arte da Vida
Description: Projeto social para ensinar artes marciais, à comunidade, levando os valores cristãos aos integrantes.

Name: La Creativa, casa de arte
Description:
La Creativa pretende ser un lugar de encuentro, como bien dice su nombre, un espacio para crear, compartir, trabajar e ilusionarse. Este espacio nace para generar un lugar donde experimentar con las artes plásticas y visuales, la artesanía y la música y establecer relaciones con las demás artes, desde un lugar descentralizado y rural.

También pretende ser un espacio para impulsar la educación artística y cultural y ser, quizá, el punto de partida para futuros artistas. 

Una de las prioridades de La Creativa es el fomento de la educación en arte y cultura con la ayuda de profesionales que transmitan esa pasión. Ofrecerá, pues, un marco para la enseñanza de diferentes destrezas en los aspectos creativos ya sea para disfrute personal o enfocado a cuestiones profesionales. 

Nuestra comunidad, la castellano-manchega, es la gran olvidada, junto con otras, dentro del territorio español. Albacete está muy necesitada de espacios creativos y culturales donde poder potenciar tanto el trabajo de los profesionales de la gestión cultural, como de los diferentes profesionales dedicados a las artes en general. También pretende dar visibilidad tanto a artistas emergentes como otros consolidados de la provincia de Albacete y por extensión de Castilla-La Mancha.

La Creativa se encuentra en una zona rural, descentralizada, pero con la intención de que siga generando un diálogo artístico con la capital, Albacete y con las demás capitales de la comunidad castellano-manchega. También pretende estrechar lazos con el resto del territorio español, así como con espacios artísticos y culturales internacionales.

Name: Mariano Rodríguez Art Foundation
Description:
Foundation dedicated to Mariano Rodríguez.
He was one of the most important painters of the second generation of the Cuban historical avant-garde. He tackled other genres such as painting, drawing, book illustration, ceramics, and stage and costume design for ballet.

Name: Wolu Art
Description:
Fine art courses - drawing, painting, pastels... for adults and teenagers. 
• All levels are accepted from beginner to advanced
• Group of 8 to 12 persons
• Enrolment possible at any time of the year
• Relaxed athmosphere to learn and have fun
• Other activities are organized: exhibition, visits.

Name: Aliki's Art House
Description: Art for all, and All for Art! We believe everyone can learn to be creative. Learn to draw, paint and sculpt from professional artists in an inclusive and friendly environment! Aliki's Art House offers fine art classes for the young, and the young at heart. Our classes are educational and fun.We teach practical skills that will encourage our students to use art to enrich their lives. Our objective is to create opportunities for everyone to discover, experience and develop new skills, and gain greater self-confidence in their abilities along the way. You'll be amazed what happens when you relax and allow yourself to be creative. We are currently offering summer camps and classes for children, teens and adults.

Name: Livermore Fine Arts Studio
Description: The fine arts are more than skills or techniques, rather they’re a language of expression. They give shape to creativity, confidence, and imagination. To us, the fine arts mean giving people of all ages the chance to discover their voice, to create with purpose, and to share there gifts. They are the bridge between practice and passion, discipline and joy, the individual and the community. At Livermore Fine Arts Studio, the fine arts are not just something we teach but they are how we help people grow, connect, and be seen.

Name: StART Art Classes
Description:
START! Oxford Art Classes for Beginners & Improvers but, most of all, for people who want to enjoy art. Learn drawing & painting from a Professional Artist through engaging presentations, amazing demonstrations and inspiring art projects.
Providing art education for adults and children.

Name: Dún Laoghaire Institute of Visual Arts
Description:
DIVA is a newly renovated art centre, featuring teaching rooms, artist studios, exhibition spaces, and rooms for hire located right in the heart of Dun Laoghaire at 24 Mellifont Avenue.

DIVA offers exciting creative activities and classes all year round.

Name: Seasons Art Class Auckland (West & Central)
Description:
Seasons Art Class offers engaging, step-by-step art courses designed to inspire creativity, nurture artistic confidence, and foster a vibrant community of art enthusiasts. Our classes are thoughtfully structured to cater to absolute beginners and those looking to enhance their existing skills, providing an enriching and enjoyable experience for all skill levels.

We specialize in a wide range of artistic techniques, including drawing, oil pastels, acrylic, watercolor, and mixed media, guided by experienced instructors dedicated to unlocking each student's creative potential. With carefully curated course materials, interactive sessions, and personalized feedback, we aim to make the journey of learning art accessible, rewarding, and fun.

Join us to explore your creativity, unwind in a supportive and social environment, and discover the joy of making art together. Connect with us to learn more about upcoming courses, workshops, and community events.

Name: ArtZ Club
Description:
Artz Club is a vibrant haven of creativity and inspiration, offering a unique artistic experience for anyone with a passion for art and self-expression. From colorful paintings to intricate crafts, every creation is a joyful journey into the world of art.

We welcome art enthusiasts, curious beginners, and seasoned crafters alike to explore a variety of activities designed to spark imagination and unleash creativity. In a relaxed and engaging atmosphere, Artz Club brings art into everyday life through interactive and fun-filled workshops that empower participants to discover their limitless potential for self-expression.

Whether you're adding a splash of color to your day or sharing the joy of art with friends, Artz Club promises an experience filled with delight and inspiration. It's not just a space to create—it's a community that celebrates creativity, laughter, and connection.

 Artz Club—Brightening every day with the magic of art!

Name: UnicDIY
Description:
UnicDIY is a creative studio offering hands-on arts and crafts experiences for all ages. We provide a wide range of workshops, including silver ring making, sewing, crochet, and many more, with all materials and tools included. 

Our services also extend to private parties, corporate events, and offsite workshops. 

In addition to in-studio activities, we offer online sales of DIY craft kits and materials, allowing customers to enjoy creativity anytime, anywhere. You can also purchase our beautiful and unique finished art work online.

Visit us at www.unicdiy.com.au

Name: TATO Gallery
Description:
TATO Gallery is characterized by its commitment to including artists within the art system. Its dynamics encompass the commercialization of artworks as well as programs dedicated to artists. The gallery maintains a constant reflection on contemporaneity, and its work consistently expresses challenging questions about life and the images that surround us—a reflection of its team of seven represented artists.

With a focus on training, TATO develops programs such as Casa TATO, Artist Clinic, 6x6, among others, aimed at fostering professional development and building networks among artists engaged in the art system. The gallery also offers personalized consulting for artists, collectors, and gallerists.

TATO Gallery has established itself thanks to its strong affinity with current issues in contemporary art, particularly in its most experimental, free, and perceptive dimensions.

Based in Brooklyn and The Catskills, The Painting School offers classes, workshops, corporate training, events and membership opportunities.

We offer a wide range of arts and crafts workshops to ignite your inner DIY diva. From ring making to candle making, embroidery to stained glass, we have something for everyone.
 
We also offer kids camps that are sure to keep your little ones entertained and inspired. Our Mini Mooi Maker After-school Club is the perfect place for your kiddos to unwind and unleash their creativity after a long day of learning.
 
At Studio Mooi, we pride ourselves on our hand-made, curated items that are sure to make your heart sing. From artisanal soaps to one-of-a-kind jewelry, we've got you covered.

Name: Artlis Studios
Description:
Artlis Studios is an art school based at 5/2 Hawker St, Currumbin Waters offering kids and adult art classes, art therapy, pottery classes, sewing classes, birthday parties, homeschool sessions and art supplies. 

At Artlis Studios our teachers believe that having a healthy creative outlet can help with confidence, resilience and self awareness which in turn leads to safe decision making and increased motivation and strength for achieving goals.  We make it our mission to help your mini-artist find their creative confidence.

Name: SW Art Studio
Description: SW Art Studio, located in Fremont and Belmont, specializes in offering high-quality art skill courses tailored for young artists aged 4 to 14. We specialize in customized art classes that enable students to explore and learn through all different art mediums. We tailor the most appropriate teaching plans to each child's age, skill level, and interests, providing professional, personalized instruction.

Name: Art Til Infinity
Description:
At Art Till Infinity we initiate artistic workshops and conduct group /one on one art related activities, which helps in improving socio education relationships, promote joy , harmony , self-expression and find more clarity and meaning to life. 

We also aim at utilizing ones free time with leisure activities and discovering new potential with in  individuals of all ages.

Name: Wild Clay
Description: Wild Clay was dreamt up by founders Joshua & Lauren Freeman as a way to bring his passion for ceramics to a broader audience and provide a space that is shared and loved by the community, including serving the homeschool families who need enrichment classes. Joshua brings 20 years of clay enthusiasm and 15 years of award-winning instruction to the city of Claremont and surrounding areas to inspire new artists and support those seasoned ones as well.

Name: Aziza Art Gallary
Description: Aziza Gallery offers one-of-a-kind, luxurious art and paintings designed to be timeless investments. Our exclusive collection is crafted by renowned artists, making each piece a unique masterpiece. We specialize in high-end artwork for discerning collectors, providing fine art that adds value to your space and legacy. Elevate your collection with Aziza Gallery—where art meets exclusivity.

Name: Εν Τεχνών Μαθήματα Ζωγραφικής
Description:
Από το 2004 το Εργαστήρι «Εν Τεχνών», στοχεύει να εκπαιδεύσει τον σπουδαστή να προετοιμαστεί σε γενικές γνώσεις που αφορούν στις διάφορες τεχνικές της Ζωγραφικής.

Σκοπός του Εργαστηρίου είναι να βοηθήσει τους σπουδαστές του να μάθουν μια εικαστική γλώσσα, η οποία θα τους διευκολύνει να εκφραστούν με διάφορα υλικά και Τεχνοτροπίες, ανάλογα το επίπεδο τους.

Name: Artmastry
Description:
Welcome to Artmastry, where imagination meets canvas, and colors come to life! We're a passionate team of artists dedicated to transforming spaces into extraordinary works of art through paint.

Our journey began with a simple brushstroke and a dream, evolving into acclaimed paint artists known for awe-inspiring masterpieces resonating with emotion and creativity. At Artmastry, the canvas is our playground, each stroke a testament to our commitment to pushing artistic boundaries.

We believe art transcends boundaries, evoking profound emotions and inspiring beauty in people's lives. From homes to offices, we enrich spaces with captivating paintings, each reflecting our dedication to craftsmanship and creativity.

Join us on our journey as we explore the vibrant world of Artmastry!

Le Conservatoire Rachmaninoff propose des formations professionnelles en musique, voix et acting, alliant tradition d’excellence et pédagogie innovante. 

Situé au cœur de Paris, face à la Tour Eiffel, il accueille artistes, comédiens et musiciens en voie de professionnalisation dans un cadre unique, propice à l’exigence artistique et à la création.
