Name: Musiart
Description: A Musiart é uma escola de música localizada em Indaiatuba, focada em oferecer uma educação musical de qualidade para todas as idades. Com uma equipe de professores especializados e apaixonados pelo ensino, a Musiart promove aulas de diversos instrumentos, incluindo piano, teclado, violino, violão, guitarra, percussão e muito mais. Além das aulas práticas, a escola organiza eventos musicais ao longo do ano, como recitais para alunos e apresentações comemorativas, incentivando o desenvolvimento artístico e a confiança dos estudantes. A missão da Musiart é transformar a vida de seus alunos por meio da música, promovendo não apenas aprendizado técnico, mas também o crescimento pessoal e cultural.

Name: Creative Art Campus Ltd
Description:
At Creative Art Campus, we are a one-of-a-kind art studio that inspires creativity, discovery, and independent thinking. Our Hounslow-based art studio provides an array of creative art experiences for both kids and adults alike. We take pride in our expertise in visual art education and deliver quality art classes to our students in their homes, schools, camps, cultural venues, and in our art studio.

Our offerings include kids art classes for ages 6-8, teen art classes for ages 9-11, and adult art classes for ages 14 and above. We have weekly classes starting from £20 per session, with the option of purchasing 7 classes for £15 or 14 classes for £12 per session. In addition to our weekly classes, we offer holiday and evening classes, and we also personalize our classes to suit your choice of medium and skills.

Our goal at Creative Art Campus is to nurture the creative talents of our students and help them develop a lifelong love for the arts. Whether you are an art enthusiast or just looking to explore your creative side, we have something to offer for everyone. Come join us and experience the joy of creating art!

Name: G Fine Arts International Academy
Description: FINE ARTS | DRAWING | PAINTING | UX/UI DESIGN | WEB DESIGN | GRAPHIC DESIGN Certification Courses For All Ages | After Office/College Timings | Weekend Classes | Madhapur and Beeramguda, Hyderabad.

Name: Dipinto Wellness Art Studio
Description:
Qui tutto è dipinto con amore. At Dipinto, everything is painted with love. 

We are a creative art studio in San Pedro Garza García, N.L. Mexico, that blends art, community, and wellbeing. Our mission is to create meaningful experiences where people of all ages and artistic levels can reconnect with themselves and others through painting, creativity, and joy.

Research shows that engaging in creative activities can lower anxiety levels in the brain, reduce stress, and foster overall wellbeing. At Dipinto, we harness that power by offering welcoming, inspiring spaces where brushstrokes turn into moments of peace and connection.

Dipinto offers:

 Guided Paint Sessions: Two-hour, “Sip & Paint” style classes where creativity flows in a warm, inspiring environment.

 Open Studio: A free-painting space where you let your imagination take the lead.

 Private & Corporate Events: From birthdays and date nights to team-building sessions, Dipinto transforms art into unforgettable moments.

 Masterclasses: Sessions with local artists that showcase unique techniques and perspectives.

 Monthly Themes: Each month, we explore an artist, style, or cultural inspiration to keep creativity fresh and exciting.

What makes Dipinto unique is our focus on emotional wellbeing through art. We are not an art school and not therapy. We are a space where expression, laughter, and connection matter most. Whether you’re a child discovering colors, a teen finding your voice, or an adult seeking relaxation, Dipinto is your canvas for inspiration.

With peace, empathy, authenticity, and community at the heart of everything we do, Dipinto is more than a studio. It’s a place where creativity becomes a shared language and memories are painted stroke by stroke.
Location: San Pedro Garza García, Nuevo León

Name: Sadnati
Description:
Success starts with creativity.  
I’m the founder of **Sadnati**, Ashkelon’s leading creative studio for team-building workshops and corporate art events. Since 2020 we’ve delivered hands-on sessions in **ceramics, concrete (terrazzo), macramé, mosaic and styling** that turn colleagues into creators.

Our cosy studio by the sea hosts up to **30 participants** with everything on site: coffee bar, water station, projector, restrooms and a styled buffet corner. Prefer an on-site experience? We bring the entire workshop—materials, tools and décor—directly to your office or venue anywhere in Israel.

### What participants take home  
* New skills and fresh inspiration  
* Unique handmade objects they’re proud to display  
* Stronger connections built through shared creativity  

### Why companies choose Sadnati  
* 4+ years of proven group facilitation for tech firms, municipalities and NGOs  
* Bilingual delivery (Hebrew  English  Russian) and full logistical planning  
* 2 minutes from Ashkelon beach + cafés within walking distance  
* Flexible formats: 60-min taster, half-day off-site, full creative retreat  

Let’s craft a memorable experience for your team.

Name: Resin By Creative Arts
Description: Company provides resin products like coasters, tray, photoframes, keychains, Nameplate, etc. These products made up of pressed dried flowers, leaves, Gold flakes, Fluid colours, resin liquid.

Name: Divyakala
Description:
Divyakala is an art studio founded by — and featuring the work of — Drdha Vrata Gorrick, an artist devoted to the study and preservation of South Indian classical art traditions. After years of immersive training and sharing his work internationally, he established Divyakala as a space for authentic, disciplined, and spiritually grounded artistic practice.

Through courses, commissioned artwork, and high-quality art products, Divyakala brings the depth and richness of South Indian visual culture to students and art enthusiasts around the world. Our mission is to make traditional art accessible, authentic, and deeply rewarding for learners at every level — from complete beginners to experienced practitioners.

Connect with us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/drdha_art

Name: Happy World Academy
Description:
Happy World  provides educational services to children and adolescents starting from the age of 6 years focus on getting a good status of health and well-being, more independent, take care of themselves, group learning and leisure opportunities, have more chances to explore their talents, life skills development.

* CREATIVE ARTS: MUSIC & PAINTING PROGRAMME
Studies show creating art can reduce stress, lower anxiety levels, and improve memory. Immersing in the music space will help children and adolescents with special needs release emotions and live happier.
Painting helps special needs children and adolescents practice their observation and memorization skills. They can imagine and express their feelings, allowing the brain to work better.

*PHYSICAL ACTIVITIES: Activities such as yoga, bicycling, walking on the treadmill, lifting weights, etc., will help them improve and improve their physical health under the guidance of a professional trainer experienced in working with special needs children and adolescents.

*SOCIAL SKILLS: Guide children and adolescents with special needs to care for themselves, protect themselves, manage their behavior, and develop skills to integrate into diverse environments, not only confined to familiar spaces like home.

FLEXIBLE & OPTIMAL SCEDULE FOR ALL NEEDS: 
Bringing effective learning programs for children with special needs over six years old, Happy World Academy is confident that this will be a loving and safe learning and experience space to help children develop life skills, increase independence, and improve their physical and mental health with the following time frames:
* FULL DAY: Monday – Friday, 7:00 – 17:00.
* HALF DAY: Monday - Friday, 7:00 –11:00 or 13:00 – 17:00
* HOURLY: 45 minutes- 60 minutes/ day

Description: Carnatic Varisai Academy of Fine arts is a virtual academy, which was established on January 1, 2022. CVA has been started with the vision to develop and promote the South Indian art forms such as Carnatic Music, Carnatic Veena, Carnatic Vocal, and Bharatanatyam. CVA much willingly stretches it’s limit beyond to help and teach, to whom with great interest towards the art form.

Name: AURA ART
Description:
'AURA', a German word, meaning 'Emmanuel'. 
It was proposed in aesthetics concept by Walter Benjamin, a German philosopher. 
He believed that art had the nature of Emmanuel and its charm made art attractive to human being. 
Because of the charm of art, artists were typical while artworks were unique.

Art Event Services
Corporate Event | Team Building | Workshop | Party | Course | Art Store

Our teachers put into life motto, V.A. Sukhomlinsky "I give my heart for children"

Name: Art Attack Room
Description:
Of je nu stress wilt loslaten, wilt bonden met je team, of gewoon plezier wilt maken met vrienden of familie, dit is de plek om jezelf helemaal te laten gaan. Ontdek de gekste schildertechnieken, maak een rotzooi zonder zorgen over de schoonmaak en laat je fantasie de vrije loop.

Art Attack Room is een gloednieuw concept waar je een ruimte kunt boeken om je volledig uit te leven met verf! Bij binnenkomst krijg je een overall aan en leer je verschillende schildertechnieken, waaronder action painting – een expressieve stijl waarbij je de verf letterlijk op het doek gooit en jezelf helemaal kunt laten gaan. Hier draait alles om loslaten, jezelf bevrijden van regels en gewoon doen! 

Of je nu kiest voor een klein of groot schilderij, je gaat altijd naar huis met een eigen uniek kunstwerk. Dit is niet zomaar een workshop, maar een creatieve beleving waarbij alles draait om expressie en plezier.

Kom binnenkort langs  en ervaar de vrijheid van Art Attack Room – de ideale plek om helemaal los te gaan en je innerlijke kunstenaar te ontdekken!

Name: University of Waterloo Art Gallery
Description: Art Gallery

Name: Jingdezhen Ceramic University
Description: Jingdezhen Ceramic University, as the only multi-disciplinary university whose talents cultivation level includes undergraduates, graduates and PhDs in the world with ceramics as its symbol and ceramics as its main discipline, is one of the first 31 independently-set up undergraduate art universities in China, one of the 94 eligible colleges and universities enrolling international students entitled to the Chinese government’s scholarship in China. It is one of the colleges and universities carrying out the Excellent Engineer Training Plan of Ministry of Education; a model college and university to deepen reform of creative education by the Ministry of Education, the college and university nationwide with typical innovative entrepreneurial experience, the first college and university to launch a pilot project of the transformation of development. It has become the national and even the worldwide important base of ceramic talents cultivation, ceramic technology innovation and ceramic culture and art exchange.

Name: L'Art de Casa
Description:
L'Art de Casa is a dynamic creative project dedicated to empowering individuals through the transformative power of art. Based in Casablanca, we specialize in providing high-quality art therapy sessions and art classes tailored for children, teenagers, and adults.

Our mission is to create a nurturing environment where creativity knows no boundaries, transcending language and cultural barriers. With multilingual offerings in Spanish, French, Arabic and English, we strive to make art accessible and inclusive for all.

Whether it's through therapeutic expression or skill-building workshops, L'Art de Casa encourages exploration, self-discovery, and emotional growth. Each session is designed to inspire, heal, and connect, fostering both personal and artistic development.

Join us on a journey of creativity and transformation

Name: The Song Spot
Description: The Song Spot is Durham Region's Fastest growing performing arts school!

Name: Déka Studio
Description: Um lugar aonde a Arte é ferramenta de transformação para formar pessoas mais conscientes, expressivas e comunicativas. Aqui, a prática é espaço de autoconhecimento e o estudo é exercício de escuta e colaboração. No Déka Studio trabalhamos para fortalecer presença, comunicação e criatividade. Mais do que preparar para o palco, preparamos para a vida: para falar em público, para trabalhar em equipe e para assumir sua expressividade com autenticidade. Junto a nossos artistas e profissionais parceiros, promovemos encontros, eventos, workshops, oficinas, rodas de conversa, exibições, exposições, mentorias e Núcleos de Desenvolvimento Artístico, Profissional e Pessoal com turmas reduzidas para Prática, Estudo e Criação.

Name: Arts Shala
Description:
Welcome to Arts Shala - Your Creative Haven! 

 Dive into the world of art with our diverse art and craft workshops, expertly crafted for artists of all levels. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned artist, our workshops and recorded video tutorials will guide your journey, enriching your skills at your own pace.

 Need supplies? We've got you covered with high-quality raw materials delivered right to your doorstep. 

Additionally, we offer India's first Artist-driven eCommerce platform where artists unite to showcase and sell their stunning creations. 

Join our community, unleash your creativity, and let your art speak! Follow us for inspiration, tips, and a splash of color in your life!

Name: Kaliada
Description:
We are a company of artists and craftsmen from Belarus.
We specialize in arts and crafts of different peoples and cultures.
Offline and online workshops, custom-made products, educational and training courses, etc.

Name: Lincoln Square Pottery Studio - Learning Center
Description: Specializing in ceramics classes for adults of all skill levels, Lincoln Square Pottery Studio - Learning Center, a non-for-profit in the heart of Chicago’s Northside, opened in May of 2003. Our storefront space has grown to include 12 wheels, an extruder, a slab roller, an ever expanding palette of glazes, several field trips to raku and wood firings, and many display shelves to show off the work being made here. We have 8-week Evening Classes for adults, Independent Study for artists looking for a place to work, and Weekend Workshops for people who just want to give clay a try.

Name: Niiliving
Description:
Started in January 2020, from learning to release stress become the first REAL passion as living source.
And since March 2021, from one day per week becomes Monday-Sunday class.
We focus on teaching a daily fun pottery class to a Pro detailed courses in private or group, and it’s beginner-friendly for anyone. Also, provide an event for companies, schools and organizations.
Sometimes, we make a batch of pottery to sell, accept custom order for any events: weddings, birthdays, gifts, all that required happiness and special handmade.

Name: Kretinga Art School
Description:
Greeting words from Lithuania, where we live and study the secrets of music, art and choreography! Kretinga art’s school was founded in 1958. In the first year, 67 students entered the school to study music. Nowadays here study about 550 students-musicians, artists and dancers.

We are proud of the choir "Saulainė", choir "Smiltė", the orchestra of the wind instruments „Vėjūnas“ and majorettes group „Vėjūnės“, Lithuanian folk dance group „Ratilėlis“, the group of string, folk instruments and a group of accordions.

In case you would like to get acquainted and establish friendly relations, please, contact us via email or by calling +370 445 79255.

Name: Micro Fiber School
Description:
The Micro Fiber School is a first step towards creating weaving, sewing, and dyeing hub in Silicon Valley. Let’s build it together, thread by thread. 

Located at the Alameda Artworks in San Jose, the Micro Fiber School hosts small group workshops and private lessons. Due to its “micro” size, we also host textile events and workshops at pop-up locations around the Bay Area.

We’re open for special events and by appointment.

Name: Eunoia Fine Arts Club - IIT GOA
Description:
Eunoia – The Arts Club of IIT Goa 

Eunoia is the official arts and creativity club of IIT Goa, dedicated to nurturing imagination, self-expression, and artistic collaboration among students.

From painting and sketching to Modeling we celebrate every form of creativity.

We host workshops, competitions, exhibitions, and collaborative projects that bring together art enthusiasts from across the campus and beyond.

Our mission: To make art a vibrant part of campus life, inspire creative confidence, and provide a platform for students to showcase their talents.

Location: Indian Institute of Technology Goa, India
Contact: eunoia-club@iitgoa.ac.in

Name: Sulocks Art Studio
Description: Sulocks Art Studio is a creative space dedicated to realistic pencil sketches, portraits, and art education. We conduct beginner to intermediate online drawing classes, helping students explore their creativity through shading, perspective, and anatomy. Our mission is to make art learning simple, joyful, and inspiring for all ages.

Name: Jinhua Gowin Co. Ltd.
Description:
Jinhua Gowin Canvas Co., LTD was established in 2005 with a registered capital of 10 million RMB. Gowin is specialized in manufacturing products made of canvas and wood: art canvas, inkjet canvas, wooden stretcher bars and frames, stretched canvas, printed canvas, sketch boards, wooden easels and painting sets. With around 100 skilled workers and advanced automatic equipments, Gowin has already become the largest wooden stretcher bars and frames producing factory in central Zhejiang of China.

The factory spans over 20,000 square meters and includes specialized workshops for canvas production, canvas board production, stretcher bars and frames production, easel production, and packaging. With years of efforts, Gowin has established strong partnerships with many trading companies and world-renowned art material suppliers. Gowin constantly develops new products to meet the needs of professional artists and art galleries, meanwhile it also provides mid-range products to satisfy the demands of painting enthusiasts.

To enhance product recognition in the market, Gowin has registered the “Gowin” trademark, establishing a strong brand image. While maintaining its leading position in the domestic market, Gowin continues to expand its market, aiming to contribute more to the global community of art lovers.

Name: Arts & Cinema
Description:
The potential relationship between cinema and painting is elucidated when one recognizes that the moving image operates as a distinct language, employing intricate codes and conventions to convey meaning. The semiotics of the image offers valuable insights for both cinematic and painterly analyses. As an iconic representation, the image inherently signifies something, necessitating textual exploration.

Cinema, akin to painting within the realm of visual arts, affords diverse representations of the world of images, thereby accommodating the author's unique perspective, much like painting allows artists to articulate their individual worldview. Filmmakers and painters alike can capture moments or phases of their lives within their respective works. Thus, both cinema and painting serve as vehicles through which creators mold the intended meaning they seek to convey. Whether fictional or grounded in reality, both mediums possess a formidable expressive capacity.

This manipulation of reality's form and function can transcend into the realm of imagination, reshaping worldly forms and engaging in complex mental associations, thereby enveloping the viewer within a psychological realm.

Name: wawaarce
Description:
Wawa Arce es un proyecto con profundo valor artesanal y educativo, fundado por Lu Arce. Transformamos una tradición familiar de cerámica, heredada de su abuelo y su padre, en una propuesta educativa y creativa para la infancia.

Nuestra misión es conectar a los niños y niñas con la magia ancestral de la arcilla. Creemos firmemente que el trabajo manual con arcilla es una herramienta poderosa que calma, mejora la concentración, fortalece sus habilidades motoras y despierta una creatividad única, enseñándoles a amar y respetar el arte desde pequeños.

Para cumplir con este objetivo, ofrecemos:

Kits de Cerámica para Niños: Materiales completos y creativos para llevar la experiencia de la arcilla a casa.

Talleres de Arcilla y Cerámica: Experiencias educativas y sensoriales que fomentan el desarrollo artístico.

En Wawa Arce, cultivamos la creatividad y la tradición con cada pieza. Nos dedicamos a ser el puente entre el legado familiar y el desarrollo integral de la infancia.

Especialidades: Cerámica Educativa, Arte y Desarrollo Infantil, Kits Creativos DIY, Talleres de Arcilla, Tradición Artesanal, Juguetes Educativos.

Name: South Pacific Redology Institution
Description: The South Pacific Redology Institution, headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand, is the most impactful Redology group in the Southern Hemisphere. Established in the early 2000s, it serves as a hub for scholars, students, and enthusiasts of *Dream of the Red Chamber*, facilitating in-depth research, translations, and discussions on this cornerstone of Chinese literature. The institution regularly hosts conferences, publishes scholarly articles, and collaborates with universities across the Asia-Pacific region to promote the study and appreciation of Redology. By bridging Eastern and Western literary traditions, the South Pacific Redology Institution has become a leading force in expanding the global understanding of *Dream of the Red Chamber* in the Southern Hemisphere.

Name: Atelier Ceramic Studio
Description:
Atelier Ceramic Studio is a handbuilding-focused ceramic studio dedicated to creativity, presence, and community. Rooted in thoughtful design and a slower way of working, Atelier offers a welcoming space where people come together to explore clay as both an artistic practice and a grounding experience.

We specialize in handbuilding ceramics, offering workshops, weekly classes, memberships, and private events for individuals, groups, and teams. Our experiences are designed for beginners and experienced makers alike — no prior experience is required, just curiosity and a willingness to create with your hands.

Atelier was created with the belief that working with clay can be both expressive and restorative. Our studio environment encourages mindfulness, experimentation, and connection, allowing participants to step away from the pace of daily life and reconnect with the creative process. Whether attending a one-time workshop, joining a recurring class, or becoming a studio member, guests are supported through guided instruction while having the freedom to work on personal projects.

In addition to classes and memberships, Atelier hosts private events such as corporate team-building sessions, celebrations, and community gatherings, all centered around hands-on making and shared experience. We also offer firing services for low-fire work, supporting local ceramic artists with accessible studio resources.

Atelier Ceramic Studio is more than a place to make objects — it’s a creative sanctuary built around intentional making, meaningful connections, and the joy of working with clay.

Name: Cine Form(AÇÃO)
Description:
O Cine Form(ação) é um projeto que une cineclubismo, formação e pesquisa para democratizar o acesso ao cinema e fortalecer o audiovisual no Vale do Paraíba e Litoral Norte. Com uma trajetória consolidada em Jacareí e região, o projeto promove exibições itinerantes e atividades formativas em escolas, museus, ONGs e centros culturais, impactando diferentes públicos, de crianças a estudantes do EJA.
Nossa curadoria, liderada pelo idealizador Luiz Brasileiro, considera as características de cada território e público, ampliando o diálogo entre os filmes exibidos e as demais ações do projeto. Na Casa de Passagem de Jacareí, por exemplo, os próprios moradores escolhiam os filmes, o que resultou em um aumento da participação nas sessões e na adesão ao abrigo. No Museu de Antropologia do Vale do Paraíba, realizamos ciclos formativos integrados às atividades do Centro da Juventude, abordando temas como mitologia e narratologia, a partir da série de Joseph Campbell.
A atuação do Cine Form(ação) inclui ainda um olhar especial para o cinema latino-americano e a produção documental. Na Sala Mário Lago, promovemos ciclos com filmes como Para recibir el canto de los pájaros (Jorge Sanjinés) e También la lluvia (Icíar Bollaín), debatendo colonialismo e memória. Também realizamos sessões com clássicos de Jean Rouch, discutindo a relação entre documentário, ética e linguagem cinematográfica.
Além das exibições, trabalhamos com formação e pesquisa em cinema, incentivando a produção e análise crítica da linguagem audiovisual. Nosso compromisso é fortalecer redes regionais, promover o cinema como ferramenta de transformação e garantir que mais pessoas tenham acesso a produções diversas e de qualidade.

Name: Allegory Artists
Description:
Many experiment with art in their schooling. Some even obtain an Arts degree only to leave art behind, caught up in the busy corporate world with little creative outlet. Some find work in creative corporate services only to find the roles lack the desired creative freedom or regular  
 
After many years of working and leading in the fields of hospitality, retail strategy, experiential design, business innovation, and marketing, our artists are now reconnecting with their passion for visual arts and sharing artwork in our artist gallery.
 
We are committed to supporting other business professionals who want to reconnect with their creative and artistic side. Practising art regularly can significantly enhance business creativity. Artistic activities stimulate the brain, which can lead to more innovative thinking and problem-solving skills, which are crucial in business. 

Furthermore, art encourages risk-taking and exploration, qualities that are essential for business growth and development. It also fosters emotional intelligence, a key factor in leadership and team management. Therefore, incorporating art into daily routines can provide a competitive edge in the business world by fostering a culture of creativity and innovation.

Connect with us, and let's talk about how you can unlock more creativity with Structured Art Practice to support you in growing and moving those creative muscles

Name: Munen Mushin Dojo
Description:
O lugar onde o eu com egoísmo transforma-se no eu sem egoísmo, ou seja, aberto, flexível, adaptável, fluido e dinâmico em corpo, mente e espírito.

O Munen Mushin Dojo é um espaço dedicado a inspirar pessoas a desenvolverem-se como seres humanos através da prática de disciplinas que potencializam a reflexão a partir da busca interior.

Simbolicamente, o termo japonês Munen Mushin possui um significado extremamente importante para o mundo moderno, um dos valores que infelizmente está desaparecendo a cada dia dentro de nossa sociedade.

Mushin, representa um dos princípios do guerreiro samurai no Budo retratando um estado de espírito sem medo, distrações, raiva ou ansiedade. Desta forma, desenvolvemos a capacidade de acalmar a mente, perceber o que ocorre em volta e nos organizarmos para tomar decisões e agir corretamente.

Munen é um estado mental em que não nos deixamos conduzir influenciado por desejos. Um estado de espírito que passa por transformações constantes de aprendizado.

Finalmente, o ideograma Munen Mushin pode ser traduzido como uma mente vazia, não no sentido da ausência de conteúdo, mas neutra, sem ego e não julgadora, aberta a novos aprendizados.

What is Chroma’s purpose?
Chroma aims to help people gain a deeper understanding of visual arts and their importance, allowing them to appreciate beauty in simple, everyday things. All fees will be collected solely for workshop operations, including purchasing materials and covering additional costs. Chroma does NOT organize fundraising activities.

Description:
O Expressarte é um projeto cultural sem fins lucrativos dedicado à promoção do teatro como instrumento de transformação social. Atuando em comunidades com pouco acesso a atividades culturais, o projeto oferece oficinas teatrais, apresentações gratuitas e ações formativas, incentivando o protagonismo artístico e o fortalecimento das expressões populares.

Mais do que encenar, o Expressarte busca formar sujeitos críticos e criativos, capazes de refletir e dialogar com a realidade por meio da linguagem cênica. Valorizando a arte como direito, o projeto leva o teatro para praças, escolas, ruas e espaços alternativos, fazendo da cena um espaço de encontro, resistência e expressão coletiva.

Name: Koreci Art Güzel Sanatlara Hazırlık Kursu
Description:
İstanbul, Bakırköy'de hizmet veren güzel sanatlara hazırlık kursumuzun amacı öğrencilerimizi en iyi sanat okullarına yerleştirmek. Hiç çizim yapmamış olsanız bile kısa sürede sizi iyi bir çizere dönüştürüyoruz.

8 yıllık güzel sanatlara hazırlık deneyimi olan yetenekli eğitmenimizden ders alan adaylarımız Türkiye'nin en iyi sanat üniversitelerine yerleşiyor. Geçmişte kazanan öğrencilerimiz bu başarının kanıtıdır

Yetenek sınavlarının gerektirdiği formatı, aranan çizim yöntemlerini ve çıkmış soruları bizimle çalışabilirsiniz.

Mimar Sinan Güzel Sanatlar Üniversitesi mezunlarının kurduğu bir güzel sanatlara hazırlık kursu olarak önceliğimiz adaylarımızı mezun olduğumuz bu değerli üniversiteye yerleştirmek. Bununla birlikte hedefimiz Marmara Üniversitesi başta olmak üzere diğer devlet okullarına dereceyle, vakıf üniversitelerine ise burslu olarak öğrencilerimizi kazandırmaktır.

Sunduğumuz eğitim her bir güzel sanatlar üniversitesinin kendi sınavına yöneliktir. Örneğin adayımız hem Mimar Sinan Güzel Sanatlar Üniversitesinin yetenek sınavlarında baraj sınavına hem de yerleşmek istediği bölüme yönelik bölüm sınavlarına (grafik, moda tasarımı vb.) hazırlanıyor.

Dosya isteyen üniversiteler için öğrencilerimizin portfolyo hazırlamasına yardım ediyor, derslerde ürettikleri eserleri tarihinde imzalayıp damgalayarak dosyalarını güçlendirmelerini sağlıyoruz.

Sınavlarda istenen perspektif, kompozisyon, oran, anatomi, hacim, tonlama, doku, gölge, çizgi değeri gibi öğeleri kullanarak imgesel (hayalden) bir kompozisyon oluşturmayı en işe yarar yöntemlerle öğretiyoruz.

Yetenek sınavlarına hazırlığın yanı sıra serbest çizim ve resim eğitimi de sunuyoruz.

Amacımız sadece güzel sanatlara hazırlık kursu olmak değil aynı zamanda başka sanatçıları yetiştiren birçok sanatçıyı bünyesinde toplayan bir sanat akademisi hâline gelmektir. Böylece sanatı dileyen ve ihtiyaç duyan herkese ulaştırmayı hedefliyoruz.

Μουσική Σχολή

Ξεκινώντας από πολύ μικρές ηλικίες και φτάνοντας στις πολύ μεγάλες, κύριος στόχος των μαθημάτων είναι να κεντρίσουν το ενδιαφέρον των μαθητών ώστε να αυξήσουν την ικανότητα πρόσληψης των ερεθισμάτων. Εδώ έγκειται για εμάς, η αρχή της ανάπτυξης των φυσικών τους ταλέντων.

Στα προγράμματά μας, η μουσική και το θέατρο είναι περισσότερο μέσο παρά σκοπός. Είναι εργαλεία που βοηθούν στην κοινωνικοποίηση, στη δημιουργία ομάδων που ψυχαγωγούνται παίζοντας, ακούγοντας, αλληλεπιδρώντας.

Θέλουμε ταξίδι των μαθητών στις δύο τέχνες να μείνει αξέχαστο, ώστε να συνεχιστεί στην ενήλικη ζωή τους.
